meaning: 英文字母表中的第二十三個字母，大寫 W
sentences: Write a large W on the board. 在黑板上寫一個大寫 W。
The alphabet begins with A and ends with W here. 在這裡，字母表從 A 開始，以 W 結束。

meaning: 英文字母表中的第二十三個字母，小寫 w
sentences: The lowercase w is easy to write in print. 小寫 w 很容易用印刷體寫出來。
She practiced the letter w again and again. 她一再練習字母 w。

meaning: 音節 wa；也可作為外來語的拼寫形式
sentences: The translator kept the syllable Wa unchanged. 翻譯者保留了 wa 這個音節不變。
Wa appears in several borrowed words. wa 出現在幾個外來語中。

meaning: 音節 wa；也可作為外來語的拼寫形式
sentences: The guidebook explained how to pronounce wa. 那本指南解釋了 wa 的發音方式。
She wrote wa in lowercase on the page. 她把 wa 以小寫寫在頁面上。

meaning: Women's Auxiliary Army Corps，女子陸軍輔助部隊
sentences: The history book mentioned the WAAC during wartime. 那本歷史書提到了戰時的 WAAC。
Many women served in the Waac before the name changed. 許多女性在名稱改變前曾加入 WAAC。
The flag seemed to waag in the breeze. 旗子似乎在微風中輕輕擺動。
He could waag the pole from side to side. 他能把那根杆子左右擺動。
The old botany text listed waapa among rare plants. 舊植物學書把 waapa 列為稀有植物之一。
A waapa was sketched beside the other specimens. 另一份標本旁邊畫著一株 waapa。

meaning: 荷蘭語中的 waar，意為真實的；真的
sentences: The word waar can mean true in Dutch. 荷蘭語中的 waar 可以表示「真實的」。
He used waar in a note about language study. 他在一則語言學習筆記裡用了 waar。
The article described a Waasi living near the river. 那篇文章描述了一位住在河邊的 Waasi。
A Waasi elder spoke at the meeting. 一位 Waasi 長者在會議上發言。

meaning: 輕微搖擺；一下不穩的動作
sentences: There was a small wab when the cart hit the stone. 車子撞到石頭時晃了一下。
The table gave a wab on the uneven floor. 那張桌子在不平的地板上輕微晃動。
The candle flame seemed to wabber in the draft. 蠟燭的火焰似乎在氣流中晃動。
The wheels wabber when the road is rough. 路面顛簸時，輪子會晃動。
The chair began to wabble on the uneven ground. 那張椅子在不平的地面上開始搖晃。
He could wabble the stick with a quick motion. 他能迅速地把那根棍子晃動起來。
The old ladder felt wabbly near the top. 那把舊梯子在頂端附近感覺很不穩。
His voice sounded a little wabbly after the cold. 感冒後他的聲音聽起來有點發抖。
The puppy took a wabby step after sleeping. 小狗睡醒後走了一步，有點搖晃。
Her wabby handwriting was hard to read. 她那種歪斜無力的字跡很難辨認。

meaning: 邊緣；界線；舊式用語中的一種邊界
sentences: The old poem described the wabe of the hill. 那首舊詩描寫了山坡的邊緣。
A wabe marked the end of the grassy field. 一條邊界標示出草地的盡頭。
A Wabena elder told the story in a calm voice. 一位 Wabena 長者用平靜的聲音講述了故事。
The museum label identified him as a Wabena. 博物館標示他是 Wabena 族人。

meaning: Wabeno 族的一名成員；亦可作專名
sentences: The record listed a Wabeno among the visitors. 紀錄中列出一名 Wabeno 訪客。
She studied the history of the Wabeno people. 她研究了 Wabeno 族的歷史。
The artist admired the quiet beauty of wabi. 那位藝術家欣賞侘寂的安靜美感。
Wabi values simplicity and imperfection. 侘寂重視簡樸與不完美。
The old village had a wabster who made cloth. 那個古老村莊有一位織布工人製作布料。
The novel calls him a skilled wabster. 那部小說稱他為熟練的織工。
The survey interviewed a Wabuma fisherman. 那份調查訪問了一位 Wabuma 漁夫。
A Wabuma village was marked on the map. 地圖上標出了 Wabuma 村落。
The ethnography mentioned a Wabunga elder. 民族誌提到一位 Wabunga 長者。
Her guide was a Wabunga man from the region. 她的嚮導是當地一位 Wabunga 男子。

meaning: WAAC 的縮寫；女子輔助軍隊的稱呼
sentences: The archive file used Wac as a short form. 檔案中把 WAAC 簡寫成 Wac。
She served in the Wac during the war. 她在戰爭期間服役於 Wac。
The old field guide listed wacago among rare plants. 舊的田野指南把 wacago 列為稀有植物之一。
A wacago grew beside the stream in the illustration. 插圖中溪邊長著一株 wacago。

meaning: 罕見或古舊的詞形；舊式用語
sentences: The glossary marked wace as an archaic form. 詞彙表把 wace 標成古舊詞形。
He found the word wace in an old manuscript. 他在一份古手稿裡找到了 wace 這個字。
A Wachaga farmer spoke about the harvest. 一位 Wachaga 農夫談到了收成。
The Wachaga people live near the mountain slopes. Wachaga 族居住在山坡附近。

meaning: 來自 Wachenheim 的人；Wachenheim 的居民或姓氏
sentences: The speaker introduced himself as a Wachenheimer. 演講者自我介紹是 Wachenheim 來的人。
Her family name is Wachenheimer. 她的姓氏是 Wachenheimer。

meaning: 罕見的人名、地名或專有名稱
sentences: The family kept the name wachna in old records. 那個家族在舊紀錄裡保留了 wachna 這個名字。
Wachna appeared as a place name on the map. wachna 以地名的形式出現在地圖上。

meaning: 一個地名或山名，作為專有名詞使用
sentences: Wachuset was printed on the old survey map. 舊測量地圖上印著 Wachuset。
They climbed toward the summit of Wachuset. 他們朝著 Wachuset 的山頂攀登。

meaning: 在各種意義上，令人煩惱或令人失望的糟糕；糟糕、老套、卑鄙、不酷、一團糟。
sentences: Every record they ever made was straight-up wack. 他們製作的每張唱片都非常古怪。
The report describes the result as wack. 報告稱這項結果很奇怪。

meaning: 雜砂岩；一種粗粒沉積岩
sentences: The geologist identified the stone as wacke. 地質學家把那塊石頭辨認為雜砂岩。
Wacke is a common term in rock descriptions. Wacke 是岩石描述中常見的術語。
The long illness seemed to wacken his strength. 長期生病似乎削弱了他的體力。
Heat can wacken the glue over time. 熱度會隨時間削弱膠水的黏性。
The wacker soldier held his ground. 那位勇敢的士兵堅守陣地。
He looked wacker after a day of rest. 休息一天後，他看起來更有精神。
The movie's wackiness made everyone laugh. 那部電影的古怪情節讓每個人都笑了。
He admired the wackiness of the design. 他欣賞那個設計的怪趣味。
The show used a wacky costume for the finale. 這場表演在結尾用了很古怪的服裝。
Her wacky idea actually worked. 她那個古怪的點子居然真的成功了。
Waco is a city in Texas. Waco 是德州的一座城市。
They planned a road trip to Waco. 他們計畫去 Waco 自駕旅行。
He threw a wad of paper into the bin. 他把一團紙丟進垃圾桶。
The tissue was rolled into a small wad. 那張面紙被揉成一小團。

meaning: 蹣跚地行走；笨拙地移動
sentences: The child began to waddent across the sand. 孩子開始笨拙地在沙地上移動。
The duck seemed to waddent toward the pond. 那隻鴨子似乎蹣跚地朝池塘走去。

meaning: 涉水的人；在水中前行的人
sentences: The wadder moved carefully through the marsh. 那位涉水者小心地穿過沼澤。
A wadder can cross the stream where the water is shallow. 涉水者可以從水淺處穿過溪流。
The coat was lined with soft wadding. 這件外套內襯柔軟的填充棉。
Use wadding to pad the box safely. 用填充棉把箱子墊好。

meaning: 蹣跚行走的人；搖搖擺擺走路的人
sentences: The waddler crossed the yard slowly. 那個蹣跚行走的人慢慢穿過院子。
The little waddler looked adorable in boots. 那個搖搖擺擺走路的小傢伙穿靴子很可愛。
His waddlesome steps were easy to notice. 他那種搖擺的步伐很容易被注意到。
The waddlesome puppy followed behind us. 那隻愛搖擺的小狗跟在我們後面。

meaning: 蹣跚而行的；搖搖擺擺的
sentences: The waddling duck headed for the pond. 那隻蹣跚而行的鴨子朝池塘走去。
He noticed a waddling walk across the floor. 他注意到有人在地板上搖搖擺擺地走。
The child moved waddlingly across the room. 那孩子蹣跚地穿過房間。
The geese walked waddlingly toward the water. 那些鵝搖搖擺擺地往水邊走去。

meaning: 搖搖擺擺的；步態不穩的
sentences: The waddly walk made everyone smile. 那種搖搖擺擺的步子讓大家都笑了。
His waddly posture showed he was tired. 他那種搖晃的姿勢顯示他很累。
The traveler carried a waddy for protection. 那位旅人帶著一根木棒作防身用。
A waddy was displayed in the museum case. 博物館展示櫃裡陳列著一根重棒。

meaning: 可製作木棒或木杖的硬木
sentences: The craftsman carved the handle from waddywood. 那位工匠用硬木雕出把手。
Waddywood was valued for its strength. waddywood 因其堅硬而珍貴。
We had to wade across the shallow stream to get to the other side. 我們不得不涉水穿過淺灘溪流以到達另一邊。
The children enjoyed a gentle wade in the cool water of the lake. 孩子們喜歡在涼爽的湖水中輕輕地涉水。
Wade called to his friend from the porch. Wade 在門廊上喊他的朋友。
Her last name is Wade. 她的姓氏是 Wade。
The stream was shallow and wadeable. 那條溪很淺，可以涉水通過。
Only the wadeable parts of the river were safe. 只有河流可涉水的部分才安全。
The heron is a common wader along the shore. 鷺鳥是海岸邊常見的涉水鳥。
A wader crossed the flooded path. 一位涉水者穿過了淹水的小路。
The expedition followed the dry wadi. 探險隊沿著乾谷前進。
A wadi may fill with water after heavy rain. 在大雨後，乾谷可能會積滿水。
The pool is too small for doing laps: it’s only a wading pool. 泳池太小，無法繞圈：它只是一個淺水池。
The report describes the result as wading. 報告將結果描述為涉水。
They moved wadingly through the marsh. 他們像涉水一樣穿過沼澤。
The boots let him walk wadingly in the mud. 那雙靴子讓他能在泥地裡像涉水般前進。

meaning: resembling a wad; thickly clumped or packed
sentences: The clay formed a wadlike lump in his hand. 那團黏土在他手裡變成一個像團塊的東西。
A wadlike piece of paper blocked the narrow tube. 一團紙狀的塊塞住了細管。
The old workshop employed a wadmaker for paper cartridges. 那間老工坊僱了一位做填塞物的人來處理紙彈藥筒。
A skilled wadmaker knew how to cut every piece to size. 熟練的製作者知道怎麼把每一片裁到合適大小。

meaning: the act or process of making wads
sentences: The manual described wadmaking as a careful workshop task. 那本手冊把製作填塞物描述成一項需要細心的工坊工作。
He spent the afternoon wadmaking for the old machine. 他整個下午都在為那台老機器製作填塞物。

meaning: a coarse woolen cloth, especially from Scandinavia
sentences: The coat was lined with rough wadmal for winter wear. 那件外套裡面襯著粗糙的 wadmal 以便過冬。
Museum visitors could feel the texture of the wadmal sample. 博物館參觀者可以摸到那塊 wadmal 樣品的紋理。

meaning: a coarse meal or grain meal; a rough meal mixture
sentences: The recipe called for wadmeal rather than fine flour. 那份食譜要用粗磨穀粉，不是細麵粉。
She sprinkled a little wadmeal into the porridge for texture. 她往粥裡撒了一點粗磨穀粉增加口感。
He said he wadna leave the farm before dawn. 他說天亮前他不會離開農場。
The old song repeats that she wadna change her mind. 那首老歌反覆唱著她不會改變心意。

meaning: a mortgage or pledge of land in Scots law
sentences: The family placed the estate under a wadset to raise money. 那個家庭把莊園拿去做抵押，以籌措資金。
The lawyer explained the old wadset system in simple terms. 律師用簡單的話解釋了古老的抵押制度。

meaning: a person who holds land by wadset; a mortgagee
sentences: The wadsetter managed the land until the debt was paid. 抵押權人一直管理那塊土地，直到債務清償為止。
In the record, the wadsetter had the right to use the estate. 紀錄中寫道，抵押權人有權使用那座莊園。
The surfer caught a massive wae and rode it all the way to the shore. 衝浪者抓到一個巨大的浪，並一路滑向岸邊。
She gave a friendly wae to her neighbor from across the street. 她從街對面親切地向鄰居揮手。

meaning: 浪潮，湧現 (修正為 wave rose)
sentences: A sudden wae rose in the distance as the storm approached. 隨著風暴接近，遠處突然湧現了一陣浪潮。
A wae rose of enthusiasm swept through the crowd after the announcement. 宣佈後，一股熱情浪潮席捲了人群。

meaning: a rare dialect word for a movement or swing
sentences: The rope made a slow waeg in the wind. 繩子在風中慢慢地晃了一下。
She noticed a gentle waeg in the boat before it settled. 她注意到那艘船先輕輕晃了一下才穩定下來。

meaning: an old or dialect form related to 'wear' or 'wary'
sentences: The poem uses waer as an old-fashioned word. 那首詩把 waer 當作一個古老用語。
A waer look crossed his face when the door opened. 門一打開，他臉上掠過一絲警覺的神情。
Her waesome smile made the room feel warm. 她愉快的笑容讓房間都暖了起來。
The village had a waesome air on summer evenings. 夏夜裡，那個村子有一種愉悅的氣氛。

meaning: an exclamation of sorrow or woe
sentences: Waesuck, the harvest was lost after the storm. 唉，暴風雨後收成全毀了。
He cried waesuck when he saw the broken cart. 他看到壞掉的車子時哀嘆了一聲。

meaning: 晶圓，威化餅 (修正為 wafer)
sentences: Silicon wafs are used in the manufacturing of computer chips. 矽晶圓被用於製造電腦晶片。
The child enjoyed eating a crispy chocolate waf for a snack. 孩子喜歡吃脆皮巧克力威化餅當零食。

meaning: the Wafd party or something associated with it
sentences: The archive file mentioned Waf in a political context. 那份檔案在政治脈絡中提到了 Waf。
A historian linked Waf to modern Egyptian nationalism. 一位歷史學家把 Waf 與現代埃及民族主義連在一起。
Wafd played a major role in Egyptian politics. Wafd 在埃及政治中扮演了重要角色。
The newspaper article traced the history of Wafd and its leaders. 那篇報紙文章追溯了 Wafd 及其領袖的歷史。

meaning: a supporter or member of the Wafd party
sentences: The Wafdist spoke about reform at the rally. 那位 Wafd 支持者在集會上談改革。
She described her grandfather as a lifelong Wafdist. 她說祖父一生都是 Wafd 的支持者。

meaning: a thin crisp biscuit or a very thin slice
sentences: He ate a chocolate wafer with his coffee. 他配著咖啡吃了一片巧克力威化餅。
The microscope stage held an ultra-thin wafer of glass. 顯微鏡載台上放著一片超薄玻璃片。

meaning: a maker or seller of wafers
sentences: The waferer arranged the trays before the market opened. 賣威化餅的人在市場開門前整理好托盤。
A street waferer called out his sweets to passing children. 一位街頭賣薄餅的人向路過的小孩招呼。

meaning: thin and crisp like a wafer
sentences: The crust had a waferish snap when he broke it. 他一掰開，外皮發出像薄餅般的清脆聲。
A waferish sheet of ice covered the pond. 池塘表面覆著一層薄脆如威化餅的冰。
The wafermaker checked the oven temperature carefully. 製作薄餅的人仔細檢查烤箱溫度。
Each wafermaker in the factory followed the same recipe. 工廠裡每位做薄餅的人都照著同一份配方。
Wafermaking requires heat, timing, and a steady hand. 製作威化餅需要火候、時間與穩定的手法。
The class watched wafermaking from start to finish. 那堂課從頭到尾觀摩了威化餅的製作。

meaning: a woman who makes or sells wafers
sentences: The waferwoman stood by the church gate with a basket of sweets. 那位賣薄餅的婦人提著一籃點心站在教堂門口。
Children gathered around the waferwoman after the service. 禮拜結束後，孩子們都圍到那位賣薄餅的婦人身邊。

meaning: work done with wafers or wafer-like material
sentences: The studio displayed delicate waferwork on the shelf. 工作室的架子上展示著精緻的薄片工藝品。
He admired the patience needed for waferwork. 他很佩服做這種薄片工藝所需的耐心。

meaning: thin, delicate, or wafer-like in appearance
sentences: The leaves had a wafery texture after drying. 葉子曬乾後呈現薄脆的質地。
A wafery glaze covered the top of the pastry. 甜點表面覆著一層薄薄的糖霜。

meaning: to speak or act in a vague or undecided way
sentences: He kept waffing instead of giving a clear answer. 他一直含糊其詞，沒有給明確答案。
The candidate waffed between two policies during the interview. 那位候選人在面試中對兩個政策搖擺不定。
She ordered a fresh waffle with strawberries and cream for breakfast. 她點了一份配有草莓和鮮奶油的新鮮格子鬆餅當早餐。
Stop trying to waffle and just give me a straight answer. 別再胡扯了，直接給我一個明確的回答。

meaning: vague or flimsy like waffle speech
sentences: His wafflike excuse did not convince anyone. 他那套含糊的藉口沒有說服任何人。
The report sounded wafflike and lacked facts. 那份報告聽起來空泛含糊，缺乏事實。

meaning: indecisive, vague, or shifting in tone
sentences: She gave a waffly answer about the schedule. 她對行程給了一個模稜兩可的回答。
The editor cut the waffly paragraphs from the article. 編輯刪掉了文章裡那些空泛的段落。

meaning: to carry or move gently through the air
sentences: A breeze wafted the smell of bread through the kitchen. 微風把麵包香味輕輕吹進廚房。
The music seemed to waft from the open window. 音樂彷彿從敞開的窗戶飄了進來。

meaning: the act or movement of being wafted
sentences: The waftage of smoke made the room smell sharp. 煙霧的飄散讓房間聞起來很刺鼻。
We felt the waftage of warm air from the vent. 我們感受到通風口送出的暖氣流動。

meaning: something or someone that wafts or drifts lightly
sentences: The candle flame acted like a small wafter in the still air. 那盞燭火在靜止的空氣中像個小小的飄動者。
A slow wafter of clouds crossed the evening sky. 一團緩慢漂移的雲穿過了傍晚的天空。

meaning: a gentle waving or drifting motion
sentences: The curtains moved in a soft wafture by the window. 窗邊的窗簾在微風中輕輕飄動。
Her hand made a graceful wafture as she said goodbye. 她告別時，手優雅地輕揮了一下。

meaning: light, drifting, or moving gently in the air
sentences: The wafty perfume drifted across the room. 那股輕柔的香味飄遍了整個房間。
She wore a wafty scarf that fluttered behind her. 她戴著一條輕飄飄的圍巾，尾端在身後飄動。
The dog began to wag its tail with excitement when its owner arrived. 當主人回來時，這隻狗興奮地搖起了尾巴。
He is a bit of a wag and always has a funny joke to tell his friends. 他有點愛開玩笑，總能給朋友們講些有趣的笑話。

meaning: a member of the Baganda people
sentences: The guide explained that a Waganda person comes from the Baganda people. 導遊解釋說，Waganda 指的是巴干達族的人。
The museum label identified the costume as belonging to a Waganda. 博物館標籤把那套服飾標為屬於 Waganda 族人。

meaning: the action of moving about aimlessly or wagging repeatedly
sentences: The child was waganging across the yard with excitement. 那個孩子興奮地在院子裡亂跑亂晃。
He noticed the waganging of the loose sign in the wind. 他注意到那塊鬆動的牌子在風中不停晃動。

meaning: a rare dialect term for a wagon or cart
sentences: The old farmer loaded sacks onto the wagaun. 那位老農把麻袋搬上那輛舊車。
A wooden wagaun rattled down the lane at dawn. 清晨，一輛木製貨車吱吱作響地沿著小路前進。

meaning: a man with a noticeable or swinging beard
sentences: The wagbeard laughed loudly at the market stall. 那位鬍鬚飄動的男子在市場攤位前大笑。
A wagbeard in the story was known for his long white beard. 故事裡有個以長白鬍子聞名的男子。
The company agreed to increase the minimum hourly wage for its workers. 公司同意提高工人的最低時薪。
The government is determined to wage war against drug trafficking. 政府決心開展打擊毒品販運的戰爭。
The workers are campaigning for a higher minimum hourly wage. 工人們正在爭取更高的最低時薪。
He earns a decent wage at the local international bank in Taipei. 他在台北當地的國際銀行領取優渥的薪資（薪水）。

meaning: carried on or conducted, especially a war or struggle
sentences: The country waged a long campaign against corruption. 那個國家發起了長期的反貪運動。
She waged a quiet battle to finish the project on time. 她默默地奮戰，好準時完成專案。

meaning: the condition or sphere of earning wages
sentences: He left school and entered the world of wagedom. 他離開學校，進入了領薪工作的世界。
The essay described wagedom as both freedom and routine. 那篇文章把領薪生活描寫成自由與例行公事並存。
The wageless apprentice still came to work every day. 那名沒有薪水的學徒還是每天來上工。
A wageless period can be hard for any family. 沒有薪資的時期對任何家庭都很艱難。

meaning: the state of having no wages
sentences: Wagelessness made the internship impossible to continue. 沒有薪資讓那份實習無法繼續下去。
The report warned about the effects of wagelessness on workers. 那份報告警告了無薪狀態對勞工的影響。

meaning: a kind of tree or shrub used in old botanical naming
sentences: The old botany book listed wagenboom among its local names. 那本舊植物學書把 wagenboom 列為地方名稱之一。
We saw a label that identified the specimen as wagenboom. 我們看見一個標籤把那株標本標為 wagenboom。
Wagener signed the letter at the bottom. Wagener 在信件底部署名。
The family name Wagener appeared in the archive. 檔案裡出現了 Wagener 這個姓氏。

meaning: 打賭某事；將其作為抵押品。
sentences: I'd wager my boots on it. 我願意用我的靴子打賭。
To wager means to bet something; to put it up as collateral. 下注意味著打賭某事；將其作為抵押品。

meaning: a person who makes a wager
sentences: The wagerer doubled his bet after the first round. 那位下注的人在第一輪後把賭注加倍。
A careful wagerer studies the odds before acting. 謹慎的下注者會先研究賠率再行動。
His repeated wagerings of his allowances led him to ruin. 他反覆 下注 他的津貼導致他破產。 他反覆用自己的津貼下注，導致他破產。 他反复支付了他的津貼導致他破產。
The term wagering refers to An amount wagered. 術語「下注」是指下注的金額。 術語「下注」是指下注的金額。 術語“下注”是指下注的金額。
Factory workers demanded higher wages. 工廠工人要求提高工資。
The term wages refers to one's total income for a time period. 工資一詞是指一個人在一段時間內的總收入。

meaning: a wage earner or hired worker
sentences: The wagesman arrived before sunrise to start work. 那位領薪工人天還沒亮就來上工。
In the village, the wagesman was respected for his skill. 在村子裡，那位領薪工人因手藝而受人尊敬。

meaning: work done for wages; paid employment
sentences: He moved from farming to wagework in the city. 他從務農轉到城市裡做領薪工作。
Wagework gave her a steady income and a schedule. 領薪工作讓她有穩定收入和固定作息。

meaning: a person who works for wages
sentences: Every wageworker in the factory wore a blue badge. 工廠裡每位領薪工人都戴著藍色識別證。
The union fought for better pay for each wageworker. 工會為每位領薪工人爭取更好的薪資。

meaning: working for wages; engaged in paid labor
sentences: The wageworking crowd filled the train at rush hour. 上班通勤的人群在尖峰時段擠滿了火車。
She came from a wageworking family with little savings. 她來自一個靠工資維生、存款不多的家庭。

meaning: able to be wagged or moved in a wagging way
sentences: The loose sign was waggable in the strong wind. 那塊鬆動的招牌在強風裡可以被晃動。
He checked whether the handle was waggable before buying it. 他買之前先確認把手能不能晃動。

meaning: in a waggling or wagging manner
sentences: The dog moved its tail waggably at the door. 那隻狗在門口歡快地搖著尾巴。
He nodded waggably when the joke landed. 笑話奏效時，他帶著逗趣的樣子點了點頭。

meaning: to move lightly or in a jaunty way; also a light wagging motion
sentences: The child waggeled across the stage with confidence. 那個孩子自信地輕快走過舞台。
Leaves waggeled in the rain before falling. 樹葉在落下前於雨中輕輕晃動。

meaning: one who wags, or someone who speaks in banter
sentences: The wagger joked with everyone in the line. 那位愛開玩笑的人和隊伍裡每個人都打趣。
She smiled at the wagger and kept walking. 她對那位愛說笑的人笑了笑，然後繼續走。
His waggery kept the room laughing during the long meeting. 他那種愛開玩笑的調皮舉動，讓冗長的會議裡充滿笑聲。
The teacher tolerated a little waggery as long as it stayed friendly. 只要不過火，老師可以接受一點俏皮的惡作劇。
She gave him a waggie grin before walking away. 她在離開前對他露出一抹俏皮的笑容。
The waggie tune made the café feel lively. 那首輕快俏皮的曲子讓咖啡館氣氛很熱鬧。
He made a waggish remark that everyone understood at once. 他說了一句略帶調侃的話，大家立刻都聽懂了。
Her waggish smile suggested she was about to tease him. 她那帶點戲謔的笑容表示她又要捉弄他了。
He waggishly blamed the cat for the broken cup. 他用戲謔的方式把打破杯子的事怪到貓身上。
She waggishly asked whether anyone had finished the work. 她俏皮地問有沒有人把工作做完了。
The speaker's waggishness softened the mood in the hall. 講者的俏皮風格緩和了大廳裡的氣氛。
His waggishness sometimes hid how serious he really was. 他那種愛耍嘴皮子的性格，常常掩蓋了他其實很認真的一面。

meaning: to move back and forth repeatedly
sentences: The child began to waggle the loose tooth with a finger. 那個孩子開始用手指前後搖那顆鬆動的牙。
A bird may waggle its tail while balancing on a branch. 鳥類停在樹枝上時，可能會不停擺動尾巴來保持平衡。

meaning: the action of wagging back and forth
sentences: The waggling of the flag caught everyone's eye. 旗子前後搖動的樣子吸引了所有人的目光。
He noticed the waggling of the dog's tail at the door. 他注意到門口那隻狗的尾巴不停擺動。
The pointer moved wagglingly as he explained the map. 他在解說地圖時，指示棒搖搖晃晃地移動著。
The dog wagged its tail wagglingly whenever it heard her voice. 每次聽到她的聲音，那隻狗就會搖著尾巴。
The puppy had a waggly tail that never stayed still. 那隻小狗有一條總是停不下來的搖擺尾巴。
His waggly handwriting made the note hard to read. 他歪歪扭扭的字跡讓那張便條很難辨認。

meaning: a proper name, especially a surname or place name
sentences: Waggumbura appears on the old map near the river. 舊地圖上，Waggumbura 出現在河邊附近。
The family name Waggumbura was written in the guest list. 宴客名單上寫著 Waggumbura 這個姓氏。
The waggy puppy greeted us at the door. 那隻愛搖尾巴的小狗在門口迎接我們。
She had a waggy way of speaking that made people smile. 她說話帶著俏皮活潑的語氣，常讓人發笑。

meaning: resembling a wag; playful or teasing
sentences: He wore a waglike expression while telling the story. 他講故事時帶著一副愛開玩笑的表情。
The waglike comment was meant to lighten the room. 那句俏皮的話是為了讓氣氛輕鬆一點。

meaning: tending to wag or move back and forth
sentences: The wagling banner moved in the morning wind. 那面擺動的旗幟在晨風中搖來晃去。
He gave a wagling nod instead of a firm answer. 他只是搖頭晃腦地點了一下頭，沒有明確回答。

meaning: in the style of Richard Wagner
sentences: The film's music had a Wagneresque sweep and drama. 那部電影的配樂有著瓦格納式的磅礡與戲劇感。
Her Wagneresque poem felt grand and heavy. 她那首帶有瓦格納風格的詩，顯得宏大而厚重。

meaning: relating to Wagner or his music
sentences: The orchestra played a Wagnerian overture at the concert. 管弦樂團在音樂會上演奏了一段瓦格納式的序曲。
He admired the Wagnerian sense of scale in the opera. 他很欣賞那齣歌劇裡瓦格納式的宏大格局。
The museum catalog listed Wagneriana among the rare titles. 博物館目錄把 Wagneriana 列為稀有書名之一。
She found a note labeled Wagneriana in the archive. 她在檔案裡找到一張標著 Wagneriana 的紙條。

meaning: the style, ideas, or influence of Wagner
sentences: The essay discussed Wagnerianism in nineteenth-century music. 那篇文章討論了十九世紀音樂中的瓦格納主義。
His taste in opera leaned toward Wagnerianism. 他對歌劇的品味偏向瓦格納風格。

meaning: admiration for or imitation of Wagner's style
sentences: The critic traced Wagnerism in several modern compositions. 那位評論家在幾首現代作品中追溯瓦格納主義的痕跡。
Wagnerism shaped the way many composers wrote for the stage. 瓦格納風格影響了許多作曲家寫舞台作品的方式。

meaning: a devotee of Wagner or his style
sentences: The Wagnerist praised the opera's huge orchestral sound. 那位瓦格納派擁護者稱讚這齣歌劇龐大的管弦樂音響。
She was known as a careful Wagnerist in the local music club. 在當地音樂社團裡，她被認為是很講究的瓦格納派。
The old Wagnerite collected recordings of every opera. 那位老派瓦格納迷蒐集了每一部歌劇的錄音。
As a Wagnerite, he preferred long orchestral passages. 身為瓦格納迷，他偏愛長篇的管弦樂段落。
The specimen was labeled wagnerite in the geology cabinet. 那塊標本在地質標本櫃中被標為 wagnerite。
The mineral wagnerite was examined under strong light. 地質學家在強光下檢查了 wagnerite 這種礦物。
Some critics accused the composer of trying to Wagnerize the whole score. 有些評論家指責那位作曲家想把整部配樂都做成瓦格納風格。
He did not want to Wagnerize the melody too much. 他不想把那段旋律過度瓦格納化。

meaning: a member of the Wagogo people
sentences: The book described the Wagogo and their traditional music. 那本書介紹了 Wagogo 族群及其傳統音樂。
A Wagogo elder spoke at the cultural festival. 一位 Wagogo 長者在文化節上發言。

meaning: a member of the Wagoma people
sentences: The survey included interviews with several Wagoma villagers. 那份調查訪問了幾位 Wagoma 村民。
He studied the Wagoma language for his thesis. 他為了論文研究了 Wagoma 語言。
The farmer used a wooden wagon to transport his heavy crops. 農夫用一輛木車（車皮）來運送他沈重的莊稼。
The children were happily playing in the colorful wooden wagon. 孩子們正在彩色木車裡開心地玩耍。
The road was not wagonable after the storm. 暴風雨過後，那條路已經不適合馬車通行。
The farmer chose the wagonable route across the field. 農夫選了那條適合馬車行走的田間道路。

meaning: wagon transport or the cost of hauling by wagon
sentences: The merchant paid wagonage to move the crates to town. 商人付了馬車運費，才把木箱運到鎮上。
Old invoices listed wagonage as a separate charge. 舊式發票上把馬車運輸費列成獨立項目。

meaning: a person who drives a wagon
sentences: The wagoner led the horses through the muddy road. 那位馬車夫牽著馬穿過泥濘的道路。
A tired wagoner stopped at the inn for the night. 一位疲憊的馬車夫在客棧停下來過夜。

meaning: a woman who drives or tends a wagon
sentences: The wagoness guided the cart across the bridge. 那位女馬車夫把車子引過橋去。
In the story, the wagoness knew every road in the valley. 在故事裡，那位女馬車夫熟悉山谷裡的每一條路。
The family rode in a wagonette through the park. 那家人坐著敞篷馬車穿過公園。
The old wagonette was painted bright green. 那輛老式敞篷馬車被漆成鮮綠色。

meaning: as much as a wagon can hold
sentences: They brought a wagonful of apples from the farm. 他們從農場運來滿滿一車蘋果。
The child imagined a wagonful of toys arriving at once. 那孩子想像有滿滿一車玩具一起送來。

meaning: a load that fills a wagon
sentences: The workers unloaded a wagonload of hay. 工人卸下滿滿一車乾草。
One wagonload of coal was enough for the small factory. 一車煤已足夠那座小工廠使用。
The wagonmaker repaired the broken wheel by noon. 那位造車匠在中午前修好了壞輪子。
His grandfather had been a wagonmaker in the village. 他的祖父曾是村裡的造車匠。
He studied wagonmaking in a workshop at the museum. 他在博物館的工坊裡學習造車技術。
Wagonmaking once supported many rural towns. 造車業曾經支撐許多鄉村城鎮。

meaning: a man who drives a wagon
sentences: The wagonman tied the horses before entering the yard. 那位馬車夫在進院子前先把馬綁好。
The wagonman knew the city streets better than anyone. 那位馬車夫對城裡街道熟得不能再熟。

meaning: wagon transport or the wagon trade
sentences: The town relied on wagonry before railroads arrived. 在鐵路出現之前，那座城鎮仰賴馬車運輸。
Wagonry declined after trucks became common. 卡車普及後，馬車運輸業就逐漸式微。
The wagonsmith checked every joint for cracks. 那位造車匠逐一檢查每個接合處有沒有裂痕。
An old wagonsmith could repair almost anything wooden. 一位老牌造車匠幾乎什麼木製東西都能修。

meaning: a road or track used by wagons
sentences: The wagonway ran straight between the mill and the farm. 那條馬車道直直連著磨坊和農場。
A narrow wagonway crossed the hill behind the house. 一條狹窄的馬車道從屋後山坡穿過。
The wagonwayman kept the track clear of stones. 那位馬車道工人把路面上的石頭清乾淨。
Each wagonwayman knew the route by heart. 每位馬車道工人都把路線記得很熟。

meaning: work involving wagons, especially making or repairing them
sentences: Wagonwork filled the winter months in that village. 那個村子的人在冬天常靠修造馬車工作度日。
The shed was used for wagonwork and tool storage. 那間棚屋拿來做馬車修理和工具存放。

meaning: a maker or repairer of wagons
sentences: The wagonwright shaped the oak boards by hand. 那位造車匠親手把橡木板修整成形。
A skilled wagonwright was valued in every market town. 每個集市小鎮都很看重技術好的造車匠。
He had a wagsome look whenever the discussion grew tense. 每當討論變得緊繃時，他就會露出一副愛開玩笑的神情。
Her wagsome reply made the whole table smile. 她那句俏皮的回答讓整桌人都笑了。

meaning: a small bird known for flicking its tail
sentences: A wagtail hopped across the path near the stream. 一隻鶺鴒在溪邊的小路上跳來跳去。
The wagtail flicked its tail and flew away. 那隻鶺鴒擺了擺尾巴就飛走了。

meaning: a member of the Waguha people
sentences: The article described the Waguha and their local customs. 那篇文章介紹了 Waguha 族群及其在地習俗。
A Waguha elder spoke at the village gathering. 一位 Waguha 長者在村落聚會上發言。
The dog seemed to wagwag its tail every time she entered. 每次她進門，狗都像是在不停搖尾巴。
He wagwagged the flag in the wind to get attention. 他在風中反覆揮動旗子，好引起注意。
The village wagwants was famous for his quick jokes. 村裡那位愛開玩笑的人以反應快和嘴快出名。
Everyone treated him like a harmless wagwants. 大家都把他當成一個無傷大雅的愛鬧笑話的人。

meaning: a member of the Wagweno people
sentences: The document mentioned a Wagweno community near the coast. 那份文件提到海岸附近有一個 Wagweno 社群。
A Wagweno fisherman explained the local tides to us. 一位 Wagweno 漁夫向我們解釋當地潮汐。
He was a wagwit who could improvise jokes instantly. 他是個妙語連珠的人，總能立刻想出笑話。
The wagwit kept the party lively all evening. 那位機智又愛開玩笑的人讓整場派對都很熱鬧。

meaning: an exclamation of surprise, complaint, or triumph
sentences: Wah, I did not expect the answer to be that simple. 哇，我沒想到答案會這麼簡單。
Wah, the crowd cheered when the final goal was scored. 哇，最後一球進了時，全場都歡呼起來。
The historical note described him as a Wahabi. 那篇歷史註記把他描述成一名瓦哈比派追隨者。
The term Wahabi is used for followers of Wahhabi doctrine. Wahabi 這個詞用來指瓦哈比教義的追隨者。
The book examined the spread of Wahabiism in the region. 那本書探討了瓦哈比主義在該地區的擴散。
Wahabiism shaped the religious debate for decades. 瓦哈比主義多年來一直影響著宗教辯論。

meaning: 瓦哈比派信徒；瓦哈比主義者
sentences: The Wahabit in the story rejected local customs. 故事裡那位瓦哈比派信徒拒絕了當地習俗。
A Wahabit was described as a strict reformer. 瓦哈比主義者被描述為一位嚴格的改革者。
The article explained the history of Wahabitism. 那篇文章解釋了瓦哈比主義的歷史。
Wahabitism emphasized a strict religious reform. 瓦哈比主義強調嚴格的宗教改革。

meaning: 一個罕見的專名或地方名稱
sentences: The old record listed wahahe as a local name. 舊紀錄把 wahahe 列為一個地方名稱。
Researchers found wahahe in an early regional catalogue. 研究人員在早期的區域名錄中找到了 wahahe。

meaning: 瓦赫赫族；東非的一個民族
sentences: The Wahehe lived in a mountainous part of East Africa. 瓦赫赫族住在東非的一個山區。
Historians wrote about the Wahehe in regional studies. 歷史學家在區域研究中提到了瓦赫赫族。

meaning: 瓦希瑪族；東非的一個族群成員
sentences: The Wahima were known for their cattle culture. 瓦希瑪族以畜牧文化聞名。
An old report described a Wahima chief in the region. 一份舊報告描述了該地區的一位瓦希瑪族酋長。

meaning: 女人；妻子，常見於毛利語或夏威夷語借詞
sentences: The song praised a brave wahine by the sea. 那首歌讚美了海邊一位勇敢的女人。
He referred to his partner as his wahine. 他稱他的伴侶為他的妻子。

meaning: 瓦倫貝里亞屬；一種植物屬名
sentences: The botanist identified the flower as Wahlenbergia. 那位植物學家把這朵花辨認為瓦倫貝里亞屬植物。
Wahlenbergia includes many delicate bluebells. 瓦倫貝里亞屬包含許多嬌小的風鈴草。

meaning: 鰆鰺；一種快速游泳的海水魚
sentences: The fisherman caught a wahoo near the reef. 漁夫在礁附近捕到一條鰆鰺。
Wahoo is prized for its speed and firm flesh. 鰆鰺因速度快和肉質結實而受到喜愛。

meaning: 瓦赫佩庫特族；達科他蘇族的一支
sentences: The Wahpekute were part of the Dakota people. 瓦赫佩庫特族是達科他族的一支。
A museum exhibit described the Wahpekute migration. 博物館展覽介紹了瓦赫佩庫特族的遷徙。

meaning: 瓦赫佩頓族；達科他蘇族的一支
sentences: The Wahpeton lived near the upper Mississippi. 瓦赫佩頓族居住在密西西比河上游附近。
The book mentioned the Wahpeton as a Dakota band. 那本書把瓦赫佩頓族稱為達科他族的一支。
The choir ended the evening with a waiata. 合唱團以一首毛利歌謠結束了晚會。
A traditional waiata can tell a family story. 傳統的 waiata 可以講述家族故事。

meaning: 瓦伊布林根人；瓦伊布林根的居民
sentences: A Waibling was described as a resident of the town. 瓦伊布林根人被描述為該鎮的居民。
The old chronicle compared Waiblings with their rivals. 舊編年史把瓦伊布林根居民和他們的對手做比較。

meaning: 瓦伊庫里人；西印度群島的一個原住民族
sentences: The Waicuri are mentioned in early colonial records. 早期殖民紀錄中提到了瓦伊庫里人。
Researchers studied the Waicuri as an island people. 研究人員把瓦伊庫里人視為島嶼族群來研究。

meaning: 瓦伊庫里人的；與瓦伊庫里族有關的
sentences: The report described Waicurian customs in detail. 那份報告詳細描述了瓦伊庫里人的習俗。
A Waicurian artifact was displayed in the museum. 博物館展出了一件瓦伊庫里文化的文物。
The waif stood quietly at the station doorway. 那個流浪兒安靜地站在車站門口。
She adopted a waif she found in the alley. 她收養了在巷子裡發現的無家可歸孩子。

meaning: 瓦伊古利人；巴布亞地區的一個族群成員
sentences: The Waiguli were listed among the mountain peoples. 瓦伊古利人被列為山地族群之一。
An anthropologist recorded Waiguli traditions in the field. 一位人類學家在田野中記錄了瓦伊古利人的傳統。

meaning: 瓦伊拉特普安語系；北美原住民語言的一個語族
sentences: Linguists compared several Waiilatpuan languages. 語言學家比較了幾種瓦伊拉特普安語系語言。
The textbook placed the term Waiilatpuan among tribal language families. 那本教科書把 Waiilatpuan 列為部落語言語系之一。
He felt waik after the long journey. 他在長途旅程後感到非常虛弱。
The waik child needed help walking home. 那個虛弱的孩子需要人幫忙走回家。
She spoke waikly after the fever. 她發燒後說話很虛弱。
The patient smiled waikly at the nurse. 那位病人虛弱地對護士微笑。
The doctor noted his waikness after the illness. 醫生注意到他病後的虛弱。
Waikness made it hard for her to climb the hill. 虛弱讓她很難爬上那座山。
The baby began to wail loudly when she realized her mother had left. 當寶寶意識到母親離開時，開始大聲嚎啕大哭。
The wail of the ambulance siren could be heard in the distance. 遠處可以聽到救護車警報器的哀號聲。

meaning: 瓦伊拉基族；北美原住民族之一
sentences: The Wailaki lived in northern California. 瓦伊拉基族居住在加州北部。
Historians recorded the Wailaki language and customs. 歷史學家記錄了瓦伊拉基族的語言和習俗。
The wailer cried loudly in the market square. 那個哀號者在市場廣場大聲哭喊。
A lone wailer could be heard in the distance. 遠處可以聽見一個孤單的哭喊者。
The music had a wailful tone. 那首音樂帶著哀傷的調子。
She gave him a wailful look before leaving. 她離開前哀傷地看了他一眼。
He spoke wailfully about the loss. 他哀傷地談起失去的事情。
The child called wailfully for his mother. 那個孩子悲傷地呼喊著媽媽。
The dog barked wailingly at the storm. 那隻狗對著暴風雨哀號般地叫。
She asked wailingly for one more chance. 她帶著哭腔哀求再給一次機會。
The poem described a wailsome winter night. 那首詩描寫了一個悲慘的冬夜。
The villagers told a wailsome tale of hardship. 村民講了一個令人哀傷的苦難故事。
The waily tune made everyone quiet. 那首哀傷的曲子讓大家都安靜下來。
He sounded waily after the bad news. 壞消息傳來後，他聽起來很愛哭。
The old wain rattled along the road. 那輛舊大車在路上嘎嘎作響地前進。
A wain carried hay from the field to the barn. 一輛大車把乾草從田裡運到穀倉。
The farmer paid for wainage to move the grain. 農夫付了車運費來搬運穀物。
Wainage was the main way to transport goods then. 當時用車運輸是運送貨物的主要方式。

meaning: 修理大車用材的權利或木料
sentences: The estate granted wainbote to the tenants. 莊園允許佃戶取得修車用材的權利。
The old law mentioned wainbote in woodland rights. 舊法在林地權利中提到了 wainbote。
The wainer led the wagon through the pass. 那位趕車人把大車帶過山口。
An experienced wainer knew every road in the valley. 經驗豐富的趕車人熟悉山谷裡的每一條路。
They collected a wainful load of hay. 他們收集了一大車的乾草。
The fields produced a wainful harvest this year. 今年田裡產出了一大車的收成。
The wainman slept beside his wagon. 那位車夫睡在他的車旁。
Every wainman in town knew the river road. 鎮上的每位車夫都熟悉河邊那條路。

meaning: 車索；捆綁大車貨物的繩索
sentences: He tightened the wainrope before starting the trip. 他在出發前把車索綁緊。
A broken wainrope could spill the whole load. 車索一斷就可能讓整車貨物灑出來。
The hall was lined with dark wainscot. 大廳的牆面覆著深色護壁板。
They polished the old wainscot until it shone. 他們把舊的木護壁板擦亮到發光。
The room had wainscoting up to the middle of the wall. 那個房間的牆面中段以下都做了護壁板裝飾。
They chose white wainscoting for the dining room. 他們為餐廳選了白色護壁板。
The wainwright repaired broken wagon wheels. 那位車匠修好了壞掉的車輪。
His grandfather had worked as a wainwright. 他的祖父曾是一名大車製造者。
The label warned that the bottle contained waipiro. 標籤警告那瓶子裡裝的是烈酒。
In the glossary, waipiro was translated as alcohol. 詞彙表裡把 waipiro 譯為酒精飲料。
The trail made a sharp wairch around the hill. 這條小路繞著山形成一道急彎。
A wairch in the river slowed the boat. 河道的一個轉折讓船慢了下來。
The castle kept a waird at the gate. 城堡在大門口安排了一名守衛。
A loyal waird guarded the passage all night. 一名忠誠的看守整夜守著通道。
The path ended in a wairepo near the river. 小路在河邊的一片沼澤前結束了。
Birds nested in the wet wairepo behind the village. 鳥類在村子後方潮濕的沼澤裡築巢。

meaning: 潮濕的；稀薄的，方言用法
sentences: The soup tasted wairsh after too much water. 這湯加太多水後味道變得稀薄。
A wairsh wind blew through the valley. 一陣潮濕的風吹過山谷。

meaning: 虛弱的；衰弱的，方言用法
sentences: The waise man rested by the fire. 那位虛弱的人在火邊休息。
After the fever, she felt waise and tired. 發燒過後，她感到虛弱又疲倦。
She wore a beautiful silk scarf tied around her slim waist. 她在纖細的腰間圍了一條漂亮的絲巾。
The water in the swimming pool was up to my waist. 游泳池裡的水深及我的腰部。
We had to walk through waist-deep snow to reach the cabin. 我們不得不穿過深及腰部的積雪才能到達小屋。
The floodwaters were waist-deep in some parts of the city. 城市某些部分的洪水深及腰部。
The trousers have an elastic waistband for extra comfort. 這條長褲有彈性褲腰以增加舒適度。
She adjusted the waistband of her skirt before going on stage. 她上台前調整了一下裙子的腰帶。
The actor wore a simple waistcloth on stage. 那位演員在舞台上穿著簡單的腰布。
A waistcloth was tied around his waist. 一條腰布綁在他的腰間。
He wore a formal three-piece suit with a matching waistcoat. 他穿著一套正式的三件式西裝，配有相稱的背心。
The waiter looked very professional in his black waistcoat and white shirt. 侍者穿著黑色背心和白色襯衫，看起來非常專業。

meaning: 穿著背心的；有背心裝飾的
sentences: The waistcoated gentleman arrived early. 那位穿著背心的紳士很早就到了。
A waistcoated figure stood by the door. 一個穿背心的人影站在門邊。

meaning: 穿背心的人；常穿背心的人
sentences: The waistcoateer adjusted his collar before dinner. 那位常穿背心的人在晚餐前整理了衣領。
A stylish waistcoateer walked into the room. 一位時髦的背心客走進了房間。

meaning: 背心扣眼；背心上的扣孔
sentences: He pulled the thread through the waistcoathole. 他把線穿過背心扣眼。
A torn waistcoathole made the vest look shabby. 破掉的背心扣眼讓這件背心看起來很破舊。

meaning: 背心布料；背心裁製材料
sentences: The tailor selected fine waistcoating for the suit. 裁縫為這套西裝選了精細的背心布料。
The shop displayed rolls of waistcoating by the window. 店裡把成卷的背心布料擺在窗邊。

meaning: 沒穿背心的；沒有背心的
sentences: He came to the party waistcoatless. 他沒穿背心就來參加派對。
The waistcoatless waiter looked unusually casual. 那位沒穿背心的服務生看起來格外隨意。
She wore a waisted dress to the concert. 她穿了一件有腰身的洋裝去聽音樂會。
The coat had a waisted cut that fitted well. 那件外套是腰身收緊的版型，穿起來很合身。

meaning: 浪費布料的廢料；成品不良的布料
sentences: The tailor tossed the broken cut into the waister pile. 裁縫師把裁壞的布料丟進廢料堆。
One waister can waste a surprising amount of cloth. 一塊不良成品就能浪費掉相當多的布料。

meaning: 收腰；在中間縮細成腰身的動作
sentences: The dressmaker adjusted the waisting to flatter the figure. 裁縫師調整收腰設計，好讓身形更好看。
Careful waisting can change the whole silhouette of a garment. 仔細的收腰處理能改變整件衣服的輪廓。

meaning: 沒有腰身的；腰部不明顯的
sentences: The coat looked loose and almost waistless on her. 那件外套穿在她身上顯得寬鬆，幾乎沒有腰身。
A waistless dress can feel modern and relaxed. 沒有腰身的洋裝會讓人感到現代又輕鬆。
He is trying to exercise more to reduce his waistline. 他正試圖多運動以縮小腰圍。
The dress is designed with a high waistline that is very flattering. 這件洋裝設計有高腰線（腰圍處較高），非常顯瘦。
Please wait here until the manager is ready to see you. 請在這裡等候，直到經理準備好見您。
I've been waiting for the bus for over twenty minutes. 我等公車等了二十多分鐘了。
The waiter recommended the chef's special pasta dish for tonight. 侍者推薦了今晚主廚特別推薦的義大利麵。
He worked as a waiter in a busy downtown restaurant during the summer. 他夏天在市中心一家繁忙的餐廳當侍者。
The waiter was very polite and provided excellent service to us. 男服務生非常有禮貌，為我們提供了優質的服務。
The waitress recommended the chef's special seafood dish. 女服務生推薦了主廚特製的海鮮料理。

meaning: 侍者服務；侍者的酬勞或費用
sentences: The inn charged a small waiterage for special table service. 那家旅館對特別桌邊服務收取少量侍者費。
He earned enough waiterage to cover his train fare home. 他靠侍者工作的收入，剛好夠付回家的火車票。

meaning: 侍者行業；侍者這個職業圈
sentences: He entered waiterdom while studying at the university. 他在念大學時進入了侍者這個行業。
Waiterdom taught her patience, speed, and calmness. 侍者工作教會她耐心、速度和冷靜。

meaning: 擔任侍者的身分；侍者生涯
sentences: His waiterhood began in a tiny cafe near the station. 他的侍者生涯始於車站附近一家小咖啡館。
He spoke about waiterhood as if it were a school of discipline. 他把當侍者這件事說得像是一所紀律學校。

meaning: 擔任侍者；做侍者的工作
sentences: He spent the summer waitering at a seaside restaurant. 他整個夏天都在海邊餐廳當侍者。
Waitering helped him learn how to serve people quickly. 做侍者讓他學會如何快速服務客人。

meaning: 像侍者的；有侍者風格的
sentences: His waiterlike manners made the guests feel comfortable. 他那種像侍者般的舉止讓客人感到自在。
She gave a waiterlike bow before bringing the tray. 她在端上托盤前，像侍者一樣鞠了一躬。

meaning: 侍者職位；侍者的服務工作
sentences: He treated waitership as a temporary step before law school. 他把侍者工作視為進法律學院前的過渡工作。
The hotel offered waitership to students seeking part-time work. 那家飯店提供侍者職位給想找兼職的大學生。
I have been waiting for the bus for over twenty minutes now. 我已經等公車等了二十多分鐘了。
There is a large crowd of people waiting outside the theater. 劇院外有一大群人在等待。
Please take a seat in the waiting room until the doctor is ready. 在醫生準備好之前，請先在候診室坐一下。
The airport waiting room was crowded with travelers during the holidays. 假期期間，機場候車室擠滿了旅客。

meaning: 等待地；帶著等待的樣子
sentences: She stood waitingly by the door for the guest to arrive. 她站在門邊等待著客人到來。
The dog looked waitingly at the bowl. 那隻狗眼巴巴地盯著碗。
The waitress provided excellent service throughout the evening. 那位女侍者整個晚上都提供了極佳的服務。
She worked as a part-time waitress to help pay for her college tuition. 她當兼職女侍者以幫助支付大學學費。

meaning: 較冷門的地方名或族名
sentences: The old map listed waivatua as a settlement name. 那張舊地圖把 waivatua 列為一個聚落名稱。
A footnote explained waivatua as a local historical term. 腳註把 waivatua 解釋成一個地方性的歷史用語。

meaning: 放棄（權利等）；放棄主張；放棄。
sentences: If you waive the right to be silent, anything you say can be used against you in a court of law. 如果您放棄保持沉默的權利，您所說的任何話都可能在法庭上對您不利。
To waive means to relinquish (a right etc.); to give up claim to; to forgo. 放棄意味著放棄（權利等）；放棄主張；放棄。
I needed a waiver from the department head to take the course because I didn't technically have the prerequisite courses. 我需要獲得系主任的豁免才能參加該課程，因為從技術上講我沒有先修課程。
I needed a waiver from the zoning board for the house because the lot was so small, but they let me build because it was next to the park. 我需要獲得房屋規劃委員會的豁免，因為地塊太小，但他們讓我建造，因為它靠近公園。

meaning: 反覆無常的；容易改變的
sentences: His waivery promise made the team nervous. 他那反覆無常的承諾讓團隊很不安。
The weather stayed waivery all afternoon. 整個下午天氣都忽晴忽陰、變化不定。

meaning: 東歐地區的軍事首領或總督；voivode 的異拼
sentences: The chronicle named a waivod who ruled the border province. 那部編年史提到一位統治邊境省份的 waivod。
In older texts, waivod appears as a title of authority. 在較早的文本裡，waivod 是一種權力頭銜。

meaning: 瓦伊瓦伊族，南美洲的原住民族之一
sentences: The book described the Waiwai as an Indigenous people of the Amazon. 那本書把 Waiwai 描述為亞馬遜地區的原住民族之一。
Researchers visited a Waiwai community to document its traditions. 研究人員拜訪 Waiwai 社群，以記錄他們的傳統。

meaning: 東歐地區的軍事首領或總督；voivode 的異拼
sentences: A waiwode once governed the province from the hill fort. 一位 waiwode 曾從山丘堡壘統治該省。
Historical records list the waiwode among regional rulers. 歷史紀錄把 waiwode 列為地方統治者之一。

meaning: 爪哇的皮影戲或木偶戲
sentences: The museum displayed a wajang puppet from Java. 博物館展出了一個爪哇的 wajang 木偶。
Children watched the wajang performance with wide eyes. 孩子們睜大眼睛看著那場 wajang 演出。
They crossed the river in a narrow waka. 他們乘著狹長的 waka 過河。
A waka is often used in traditional Pacific travel. waka 常用於太平洋傳統航行。

meaning: 瓦坎巴族，肯亞的班圖族群之一
sentences: The Wakamba were mentioned in the regional history chapter. 那一章區域史提到了 Wakamba 族群。
Anthropologists studied Wakamba customs and oral traditions. 人類學家研究 Wakamba 的習俗與口述傳統。

meaning: 神聖力量；靈力，常見於蘇族信仰用語
sentences: The elder spoke of wakan as a sacred power. 長者把 wakan 談成一種神聖力量。
In the story, the mountain was believed to hold wakan. 在故事裡，那座山被認為蘊藏著 wakan。

meaning: 瓦卡山語族；北美西北部的原住民語言家族
sentences: The linguist compared several Wakashan languages. 那位語言學家比較了幾種 Wakashan 語言。
Wakashan speakers live along the Pacific Northwest coast. Wakashan 語言使用者生活在太平洋西北沿岸。
What time do you usually wake up in the morning? 你通常早上幾點醒來？
The alarm clock woke me up at 6:30 this morning. 鬧鐘今天早上六點半把我叫醒。
The wakeel spoke on behalf of the merchant. 那位 wakeel 代表商人發言。
In some regions, a wakeel acts as a legal representative. 在某些地區，wakeel 會擔任法律代理人。
She spent a wakeful night worrying about her upcoming exam. 她因擔心即將到來的考試而徹夜難眠（失眠）。
The dog remained wakeful and alert to any strange noises outside. 這隻狗保持警覺，留意著外面的任何怪聲。
She sat wakefully through the long night. 她清醒地熬過漫漫長夜。
The guard watched wakefully from the doorway. 警衛在門口警覺地守望。
Too much coffee can increase wakefulness at night. 咖啡喝太多會讓晚上更清醒。
Wakefulness helped him finish the last chapter. 保持清醒讓他把最後一章完成了。

meaning: 不被喚醒的；沒有醒來的
sentences: The child slept wakeless through the storm. 那孩子在暴風雨中睡得始終沒被吵醒。
He hoped for a wakeless hour before dawn. 他希望黎明前能有一段不被打擾的睡眠。
We should try to 'waken' the problem from a different angle. 我們應該嘗試從不同角度來「waken」這個問題。
The new software will help us 'waken' tasks more efficiently. 這款新軟體將幫助我們更有效地「waken」任務。

meaning: 喚醒者；使人醒來的人或事物
sentences: The alarm was the wakener that got everyone moving. 鬧鐘是讓大家起身的喚醒者。
She became the household wakener on school mornings. 上學日早晨，她成了全家的叫醒者。

meaning: 醒來；喚醒；清醒過來的過程
sentences: His wakening came slowly after the medicine wore off. 藥效退去後，他才慢慢醒來。
The wakening of the town happened with the first bell. 鎮子在第一聲鐘響中醒了過來。
He was the family waker on early market days. 早市日他就是全家的叫醒者。
The bird acted like a natural waker before sunrise. 那隻鳥在日出前就像天然的叫醒者。

meaning: 守靈儀式；喪禮前後的守夜聚會
sentences: The family held wakes for three nights in a row. 家人連續守靈三晚。
In some places, wakes are both solemn and social. 在某些地方，守靈既莊嚴又帶有社交性。
Her waketime started very early during exam week. 考試週她起床得很早。
The nurse recorded the patient's waketime in the chart. 護士把病人的醒著時間記在病歷上。

meaning: 瓦克夫；伊斯蘭教的宗教捐贈或信託財產
sentences: The wakf supported a school and a small clinic. 這筆 wakf 支援了一所學校和一間小診所。
Old records described the land as a wakf property. 舊紀錄把那塊土地記為 wakf 財產。
The Wakhi live in mountain regions of Central Asia. Wakhi 族群生活在中亞山區。
The professor played a recording of Wakhi speech. 教授播放了一段瓦希語的錄音。

meaning: 立 wakf 的人；捐贈者
sentences: The wakif signed the deed before the judge. 立 wakf 的人在法官面前簽下文件。
A wakif gives property for a lasting charitable use. wakif 會把財產捐作長久的公益用途。
The fishermen launched a wakiki into the lagoon. 漁夫把一艘 wakiki 放入潟湖。
A wakiki is small enough to move easily through shallow water. wakiki 很小，能輕鬆穿過淺水。
He spends every waking hour thinking about his new business project. 他清醒時的每一刻都在思考他的新商業計畫。
It was like a waking dream that I couldn't quite explain. 那就像是一場我無法解釋的清醒夢。
He moved wakingly from room to room after midnight. 午夜後他清醒地在房間間走動。
The child listened wakingly to the story. 那孩子醒著聽完了故事。

meaning: 叫醒信號；喚醒用的提示
sentences: The school bell worked as a wakiup for sleepy students. 校鐘對打瞌睡的學生來說就是叫醒信號。
She set a wakiup on her phone for the early train. 她在手機上設了叫醒提醒，好趕早班車。

meaning: 喚醒；叫醒，為古舊或方言用法
sentences: The noise wakkened the campers before sunrise. 那聲響在日出前喚醒了露營者。
A warm breeze seemed to wakken the village. 一陣暖風似乎把村子都喚醒了。

meaning: 較舊或地方性的稱呼，指小舟或類似船隻
sentences: The old diary mentioned a wakon waiting by the shore. 那本舊日記提到岸邊停著一艘 wakon。
He crossed the stream in a narrow wakon. 他乘著窄小的 wakon 渡過溪流。

meaning: 神聖力量；靈力，為近似 wakan 的用語
sentences: The elder used wakonda to mean a sacred force. 長者用 wakonda 來表示神聖力量。
The legend said the mountain held wakonda. 傳說說那座山蘊藏著 wakonda。

meaning: 較舊民族誌中提到的族名或人群名
sentences: The expedition notes mentioned the Wakore in passing. 探險筆記順帶提到了 Wakore。
An anthropologist later tried to identify the Wakore group. 後來一位人類學家試著辨認 Wakore 這個群體。

meaning: 較舊民族誌中提到的族名或人群名
sentences: The archive preserved a short note about the Wakwafi. 檔案裡保存著一段關於 Wakwafi 的短註記。
Researchers debated whether the Wakwafi name referred to one clan or many. 研究人員爭論 Wakwafi 這個名稱究竟指一個氏族還是多個氏族。
The baby was waky after only a short nap. 那嬰兒只睡一下就醒了，精神很清醒。
She stayed waky enough to hear the first alarm. 她保持著足夠的清醒，聽見了第一聲鬧鐘。

meaning: 瓦拉幾亞人；瓦拉幾亞地區的人
sentences: The story referred to a Walach who served the king. 這則故事提到一位侍奉國王的 Walach。
A Walach in the old record came from Wallachia. 舊紀錄中的那位 Walach 來自瓦拉幾亞。

meaning: 瓦拉幾亞的；瓦拉幾亞人的
sentences: The museum displayed Walachian folk costumes. 博物館展出了瓦拉幾亞風格的民俗服飾。
Walachian history often appears in medieval studies. 瓦拉幾亞史常出現在中世紀研究中。

meaning: 較舊文獻中的地方名或族名
sentences: The survey map marked walahee as an old settlement name. 調查地圖把 walahee 標成一個舊聚落名稱。
An index entry listed walahee among regional names. 索引條目把 walahee 列在地區名稱之中。

meaning: 瓦拉派族，北美原住民族之一
sentences: The Walapai live in parts of Arizona. Walapai 人居住在亞利桑那州的一部分地區。
The researcher listened to Walapai stories and songs. 研究人員聆聽 Walapai 的故事與歌曲。

meaning: 瓦爾基亞屬；已滅絕的針葉植物屬
sentences: The fossil was identified as a Walchia specimen. 那塊化石被鑑定為 Walchia 樣本。
Walchia is an extinct genus of conifers. Walchia 是一種已滅絕的針葉植物屬。

meaning: 瓦勒度派；中世紀基督教教派的成員
sentences: The book described the Waldenses as a medieval Christian sect. 那本書把 Waldenses 描述為中世紀的基督教教派。
Historians studied the Waldenses for their reform ideas. 歷史學家研究 Waldenses 的宗教改革思想。

meaning: 瓦勒度派的；與 Waldenses 有關的
sentences: The archive kept several Waldensian manuscripts. 檔案館保存了幾份瓦勒度派手稿。
Waldensian beliefs influenced later reform movements. 瓦勒度派信仰影響了後來的改革運動。

meaning: 林間長笛；鄉野用的長笛
sentences: He played a waldflute beside the campfire. 他在營火旁吹起一支林間長笛。
The waldflute gave the melody a rustic tone. 那支 waldflute 讓旋律帶有鄉野氣息。

meaning: 林地伯爵；森林區的貴族或領主頭銜
sentences: The novel mentioned a waldgrave who ruled the forest lands. 那本小說提到一位統治森林領地的 waldgrave。
A waldgrave was once a noble title in German lands. waldgrave 曾是德國地區的一種貴族頭銜。

meaning: a female ruler or noblewoman associated with a waldgrave
sentences: The waldgravine welcomed the visitors at the castle gate. 那位女伯爵在城堡門口迎接來賓。
In the story, the waldgravine ruled the valley with strict fairness. 在故事裡，那位女伯爵以嚴格而公正的方式治理山谷。

meaning: a plant genus name used for certain daisy-like flowers
sentences: The label identified the flower as a Waldheimia species. 標籤把這朵花標示為 Waldheimia 屬的植物。
Botanists studied the Waldheimia specimen under bright light. 植物學家在明亮的光線下研究這株 Waldheimia 樣本。

meaning: a horn or a type of brass instrument
sentences: The waldhorn gave the concert a deep, warm sound. 那支長號為音樂會帶來低沉溫暖的音色。
He polished the waldhorn before the rehearsal began. 排練開始前，他先把那支長號擦亮。
The tea was flavored with waldmeister and tasted mildly sweet. 這杯茶加了香車葉草，喝起來帶點清甜。
She picked a small bunch of waldmeister from the garden. 她從花園裡採了一小把香車葉草。

meaning: a plant genus name for certain strawberry-like herbs
sentences: The gardener planted Waldsteinia along the shaded path. 園丁把 Waldsteinia 種在陰影步道旁。
A botanist compared Waldsteinia with other ground-cover plants. 一位植物學家把 Waldsteinia 和其他地被植物作比較。

meaning: a ridge, stripe, or raised mark
sentences: A thin wale ran across the old fabric. 舊布料上有一道細細的紋路。
The sweater had a wide wale pattern that looked bold. 這件毛衣有寬條紋，看起來很醒目。
The carpenter waled the beam to give it texture. 木匠在橫樑上做出條紋紋理。
The cloth was waled by the heavy press. 那塊布被重壓機壓出了紋路。

meaning: a piece of wood or metal used as a wale or brace
sentences: The builder added a walepiece to strengthen the frame. 建築工加了一塊支撐板來加固框架。
A broken walepiece caused the wall to shift slightly. 一塊支撐板斷裂後，牆面就稍微移位了。

meaning: a horse from New South Wales; also, a supporting wale piece
sentences: The rider chose a strong Waler for the long journey. 騎士挑了一匹健壯的瓦勒馬來走長途。
The old stable record listed the Waler as calm and sure-footed. 舊馬廄記錄把這匹瓦勒馬寫成性情穩定、步伐穩健。

meaning: a horse from New South Wales; also, a supporting wale piece
sentences: The rider chose a strong waler for the long journey. 騎士挑了一匹健壯的瓦勒馬來走長途。
The old stable record listed the waler as calm and sure-footed. 舊馬廄記錄把這匹瓦勒馬寫成性情穩定、步伐穩健。

meaning: a plant name used in older botanical writing
sentences: The herb book mentioned walewort as an old plant name. 那本草藥書把 walewort 當作舊植物名來提及。
She found a note about walewort in a yellowed field guide. 她在一本泛黃的野外指南裡找到關於 walewort 的註記。

meaning: a ruler, governor, or guardian in some cultures
sentences: The wali settled the dispute before sunset. 那位地方長官在日落前化解了爭端。
The village respected the wali for his steady leadership. 村民敬重那位 wali 的穩定領導。

meaning: the act of making wales or ribbed marks
sentences: The fabric gained texture through careful waling. 布料透過細心的壓紋而有了質感。
He studied the waling on the old leather strap. 他檢查那條舊皮帶上的壓紋。
I usually go for a walk in the park after dinner. 我通常晚餐後去公園散步。
It takes about fifteen minutes to walk from here to the station. 從這裡走路到車站大約需要十五分鐘。

meaning: suitable for walking; easy to walk through
sentences: The neighborhood is highly walkable and safe. 這個社區很適合步行，也很安全。
They chose a walkable route to the museum. 他們選了一條適合步行的路去博物館。

meaning: something easy to win or complete; a casual departure
sentences: The match was not a walkaway, so they had to fight for every point. 這場比賽並不輕鬆，所以他們每一分都得拚。
Her walkaway from the meeting surprised everyone. 她突然離開會議，讓大家都很驚訝。
They walked along the beach and enjoyed the sunset. 他們沿著海灘漫步並欣賞日落。
I have walked this path many times before. 我以前走過這條路很多次。
The park is popular with morning walkers and joggers. 這個公園很受晨運步行者和慢跑者的歡迎。
The elderly man uses a walker to help him move around safely. 那位老人使用助行器來幫助他安全地走動。
Walking is a simple and effective form of exercise. 走路是一種簡單且有效的運動形式。
The shop sells a variety of comfortable walking shoes. 這家店販售各式各樣舒適的健行鞋。
He leaned on his walking stick as he climbed the hill. 他在爬山時靠著他的手杖。
My grandfather has a collection of antique walking sticks. 我祖父收藏了一批古董手杖。

meaning: a person who walks, especially as a habit or pastime
sentences: The walkist preferred long routes through the park. 那位愛走路的人偏好穿過公園的長路線。
She called herself a walkist because she enjoyed daily walks. 她自稱是個愛散步的人，因為她喜歡每天走路。

meaning: a mill powered by walking motion or a walking platform
sentences: The museum displayed an old walkmill beside the tools exhibit. 博物館把一座舊式步行磨機放在工具展區旁。
A walkmill could turn motion into useful work. 步行磨機可以把動作轉成有用的工作。

meaning: a worker who operates or tends a walkmill
sentences: The walkmiller checked the gears before starting the machine. 操作步行磨機的人在啟動前先檢查齒輪。
An experienced walkmiller could keep the mill running smoothly. 經驗豐富的步行磨機操作員可以讓機器運轉順暢。

meaning: 人們以 抗議 形式離開某個地方的類似大規模行動。
sentences: The term walkout refers to A similar mass action of people leaving a place as a form of protest. 罷工一詞指的是人們離開某個地方的類似大規模行動，以 抗議 的形式。 罷工一詞指的是人們離開某個地方作為抗議形式的類似大規模行動。 抗議指的是人們離開某個地方的類似大規模行動，以抗議的形式。
The lesson introduced walkout as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「罷工」作為一個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了「罷工」作為一個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了“工會”作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: an easy victory or effortless success
sentences: The game was a walkover for the stronger team. 這場比賽對較強的一方來說輕鬆取勝。
He expected a walkover but the final round was close. 他原以為會輕鬆過關，但決勝回合其實很接近。

meaning: a person who roams or wanders on foot
sentences: The old tale described him as a lonely walkrife. 舊故事把他描述成一位孤獨的徒步流浪者。
A walkrife might travel from village to village without a plan. 徒步流浪者可能毫無計畫地從一個村莊走到另一個村莊。

meaning: the side of a path or road used for walking
sentences: He stayed on the walkside to avoid the cyclists. 他走在步行側，避開腳踏車騎士。
The walkside was lined with bright flowers. 步行側旁邊種滿了鮮豔的花。

meaning: a person who walks a great deal; a walker
sentences: The walksman crossed the city on foot every morning. 那位常步行的人每天早上都徒步穿越城市。
She was known as a walksman because she preferred walking to driving. 她因為喜歡走路勝過開車，而被稱為愛走路的人。
The covered walkway protects pedestrians from the rain. 有遮蓋的走道保護行人免受雨淋。
A wooden walkway leads from the hotel directly to the beach. 一條木製走道從飯店直接通往海灘。

meaning: a variant spelling of valkyrie; a female chooser of the slain
sentences: The poet described the warrior as a walkyrie in armor. 詩人把那位戰士描寫成身披盔甲的女武神。
A walkyrie in the tale carried the hero to the sky. 故事中的女武神把英雄帶上了天空。
There is a beautiful painting hanging on the living room wall. 客廳牆上掛著一幅漂亮的畫。
The Great Wall of China is one of the most famous landmarks in the world. 中國長城是世界上最著名的地標之一。
The wall lamp provides a soft and warm light for reading in bed. 這盞壁燈為在床上閱讀提供了柔和溫暖的光線。
They installed two elegant wall lamps in the hallway. 他們在走廊安裝了兩盞優雅的壁燈。
A wall-mounted television can save space in a small room. 壁掛式電視可以節省小房間的空間。
The bathroom has a wall-mounted mirror and cabinet. 浴室裡有一個壁掛式的鏡子和櫃子。

meaning: a tropical tree or its hard wood
sentences: The carpenter used wallaba for the outdoor bench. 木工用 wallaba 木料做那張戶外長椅。
A wallaba tree can thrive in hot, dry conditions. wallaba 樹能在炎熱乾燥的環境中生長。
We saw a wallaby hopping near the fence. 我們看見一隻袋鼠在圍欄附近跳著走。
The wallaby carried its young in a pouch. 那隻袋鼠把幼崽養在育兒袋裡。

meaning: a name used for Wallachian people or a surname
sentences: The historian mentioned Wallach in the old census record. 歷史學家在舊人口普查紀錄中提到了 Wallach。
Wallach was listed as the family name on the document. 文件上把 Wallach 列為姓氏。

meaning: a person engaged in a specified task or profession
sentences: He hired a tea wallah near the station. 他在車站附近請了一位賣茶的人。
The wallah knew every shortcut in the market. 那位擺攤的人知道市場裡每條捷徑。
The wallaroo stood still on the rocky slope. 那隻牆袋鼠靜靜地站在岩坡上。
A wallaroo is larger than a wallaby but smaller than a kangaroo. 牆袋鼠比小袋鼠大，但比大袋鼠小。

meaning: a place name or tribal name used as a proper noun
sentences: Wallawalla appeared in the travel notes as a local place name. Wallawalla 在旅行筆記中被當作地名出現。
The map marked Wallawalla near the river bend. 地圖把 Wallawalla 標在河灣附近。

meaning: a bird that rests or nests near walls
sentences: The wallbird perched on the stone fence all afternoon. 那隻牆鳥整個下午都停在石牆上。
In the poem, the wallbird watched the street in silence. 在那首詩裡，牆鳥靜靜望著街道。

meaning: a board or panel used for interior walls
sentences: They replaced the damaged wallboard in the hallway. 他們更換了走廊裡損壞的牆板。
The wallboard made the room look clean and smooth. 這塊牆板讓房間看起來乾淨又平整。
The old city center remained walled and quiet. 舊城中心仍被城牆圍著，顯得安靜。
They found a walled garden behind the house. 他們在屋後找到一座有圍牆的花園。
The term waller refers to the place where animals make their bed. Waller一詞指的是動物鋪床的地方。
The lesson introduced waller as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Waller 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: relating to Waller or to Wallerian degeneration
sentences: The doctor explained the Wallerian change in the nerve sample. 醫生解釋了神經樣本中的 Wallerian 變化。
Wallerian degeneration can follow a serious nerve injury. Wallerian 變性可能發生在嚴重的神經損傷之後。
He reached into his pocket and pulled out his leather wallet. 他伸進口袋掏出了皮夾。
I need to buy a new wallet because my old one is worn out. 我需要買個新錢包，因為我的舊錢包磨損了。

meaning: as much as a wallet can hold
sentences: He carried only a walletful of cash on the trip. 他這趟旅行只帶了一皮夾的現金。
A walletful of receipts spilled onto the desk. 一皮夾的收據散落到桌上。

meaning: a freshwater fish with a pale eye
sentences: They caught a large walleye in the lake. 他們在湖裡釣到一條大梭鱸。
The walleye was cooked with lemon and herbs. 那條梭鱸配上檸檬和香草烹調。

meaning: having a squint or pale-eyed appearance
sentences: The old portrait showed a slightly walleyed man. 那張舊肖像裡的人有點鬥雞眼。
The horse looked walleyed under the bright sun. 這匹馬在強光下看起來眼白很明顯。

meaning: a shy person who stays at the edge of social activity
sentences: At the party, she felt like a wallflower near the door. 在派對上，她覺得自己像站在門邊的壁花。
He was no longer a wallflower after joining the club. 加入社團後，他不再是那個害羞的旁觀者。

meaning: as much as a wall can hold or contain
sentences: They hung a wallful of photographs in the corridor. 他們在走廊掛滿了一整面牆的照片。
The artist filled a wallful with bright painted shapes. 那位藝術家把一整面牆都填滿鮮明的彩色圖形。

meaning: a person who sits or lingers by a wall
sentences: The wallhick stayed near the back corner of the hall. 那個靠牆久坐的人待在大廳後角。
Nobody noticed the wallhick until the lights came on. 直到燈亮起來，才有人注意到那位靠牆的人。
The stone walling of the cottage is very traditional and charming. 這棟小屋的石牆結構非常傳統且迷人。
The construction team is busy finishing the walling of the new house. 建築團隊正忙著完成新房子的牆壁工程。

meaning: to wall in or enclose with a wall
sentences: They wallised the courtyard to keep the goats out. 他們把庭院砌上牆，以免山羊跑進來。
The builders wallised the garden in one afternoon. 工人們在一個下午就把花園砌牆圍起來。
The wallless room felt open and airy. 這個沒有牆的房間感覺開闊通風。
They designed a wallless pavilion for the summer fair. 他們為夏季市集設計了一座無牆涼亭。

meaning: a person who builds or works on walls
sentences: The wallman repaired the cracked stone fence. 那位砌牆工修補了裂開的石牆。
An experienced wallman can read old masonry quickly. 經驗豐富的砌牆工很快就能看懂舊磚石結構。

meaning: a Walloon person or language form
sentences: The Wallon speaker greeted us in the old village. 那位瓦隆語使用者在老村莊裡向我們打招呼。
A Wallon family name appeared in the archive. 檔案裡出現了一個瓦隆人的姓氏。

meaning: relating to Wallonia or the Walloons
sentences: The museum showed Wallonian folk costumes and tools. 博物館展示了瓦隆地區的民俗服飾和工具。
They studied Wallonian traditions in the old manuscript. 他們在舊手稿中研究瓦隆地區的傳統。

meaning: a person from Wallonia or the Walloon language
sentences: The guide explained a Walloon phrase on the sign. 導遊解釋了牌子上的一句瓦隆語片語。
A Walloon artist painted the market scene. 一位瓦隆藝術家畫下了市場景象。

meaning: of or relating to Walloons or the Walloon language
sentences: The walloon dialect sounded distinct in the recording. 錄音中的瓦隆方言聽起來很有特色。
She collected walloon songs from older villagers. 她向年長的村民蒐集瓦隆歌曲。

meaning: to hit hard; also, a heavy blow or force
sentences: The boxer walloped the bag with his right hand. 那位拳擊手用右手猛擊沙包。
A strong wave walloped the side of the boat. 一股強浪重重拍打船身。

meaning: a hard hitter or someone who delivers a strong blow
sentences: The walloper landed a clean punch in the final round. 那位重擊手在最後一回合打出乾淨的一拳。
He was known as a walloper on the school team. 他在校隊裡以重擊手聞名。

meaning: severe, striking, or vigorous; also the act of hitting hard
sentences: They took a walloping loss in the tournament. 他們在比賽中遭遇慘敗。
The walloping rain kept everyone indoors. 傾盆大雨讓大家都待在室內。

meaning: 在骯髒的東西上打滾，例如泥巴里。
sentences: Pigs wallow in the mud. 豬在泥裡打滾。
People often wallow when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會沉迷其中。

meaning: a person or animal that rolls or lingers in something
sentences: The wallower rolled in the dust to cool off. 那隻愛打滾的動物在灰塵裡翻身降溫。
As a wallower in self-pity, he needed a friend to pull him up. 他總是沉溺於自憐，需要朋友把他拉回來。

meaning: 喜歡打滾的；邋遢懶散的
sentences: The wallowish pig dropped straight into the mud. 那隻愛打滾的豬一頭栽進泥裡。
His wallowish habits kept his room messy. 他那種懶散邋遢的習慣讓房間一直很亂。

meaning: 邋遢懶散地；像在泥中打滾般地
sentences: The dog rolled wallowishly across the wet grass. 那隻狗懶洋洋地在濕草地上打滾。
He answered wallowishly and stayed on the sofa. 他懶散地回了話，還是躺在沙發上。

meaning: 邋遢懶散的樣子；愛打滾的性質
sentences: The puppy's wallowishness made bath time necessary. 那隻小狗愛打滾的習性讓洗澡變得很有必要。
Her mother complained about the wallowishness of the boys' room. 她母親抱怨男孩房間那種邋遢散漫的樣子。
They chose a floral wallpaper for their bedroom. 他們為臥室選了一款花卉圖案的壁紙。
It took them the entire weekend to wallpaper the dining room. 他們花了整個週末給餐廳貼壁紙。
The wallpapering took all afternoon to finish. 整個下午都花在貼壁紙上才做完。
She watched the wallpapering crew smooth each strip carefully. 她看著貼壁紙工人仔細抹平每一條壁紙。

meaning: 牆上的裝飾品；掛牆作品
sentences: A carved wooden wallpiece hung above the fireplace. 壁爐上方掛著一件雕刻木質壁飾。
They bought a bright wallpiece for the new office. 他們替新辦公室買了一件色彩鮮明的牆面裝飾。
Her grandparents once lived in Wallsend. 她的祖父母以前住在沃爾森德。
The postcard from Wallsend showed a quiet street by the river. 那張來自沃爾森德的明信片上是一條河邊的安靜街道。
The shelves were stacked wallwise to save space. 那些架子沿著牆擺放，以節省空間。
He moved wallwise to let the others pass. 他貼著牆移動，好讓其他人通過。
The wallwork around the garden took two weeks. 花園周圍的砌牆工程花了兩週。
Poor wallwork caused cracks near the window. 不良的牆體施工讓窗邊出現裂縫。

meaning: 生長在牆邊的植物；古名牆草
sentences: A patch of wallwort grew between the old stones. 一小叢牆草長在舊石縫之間。
The guide identified the tiny plant as wallwort. 那本指南把那株小植物辨認為牆草。

meaning: 一個大的醃小黃瓜或黃瓜。
sentences: The term wally refers to a large pickled gherkin or cucumber. 「沃利」一詞指的是醃製的大黃瓜或黃瓜。
The lesson introduced wally as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 wally 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
She added some chopped walnuts to the cake batter for extra flavor. 她在蛋糕麵糊裡加了一些碎核桃以增加風味。
He bought a beautiful wooden desk made of high-quality solid walnut. 他買了一張用優質實心胡桃木製成的漂亮書桌。
The report mentioned a Walpapi family in the region. 那份報告提到該地區有一戶瓦爾帕皮人家庭。
A Walpapi elder shared local history with the class. 一位瓦爾帕皮族長者向全班分享當地歷史。

meaning: 與霍勒斯．華波爾或其風格有關的
sentences: The novel has a dark, Walpolean mood. 那本小說帶有陰鬱的華波爾式氣氛。
They admired the Walpolean details of the old house. 他們欣賞那棟老屋帶有華波爾風格的細節。

meaning: 瓦爾普吉斯；可指聖名或瓦爾普吉斯之夜
sentences: The festival was held on Walpurgis in the mountain town. 那座山城在瓦爾普吉斯節那天舉辦慶典。
The play opens on the night of Walpurgis. 那齣戲在瓦爾普吉斯之夜揭開序幕。
The museum displayed a pale sample of walpurgite. 博物館展出一塊淡色的瓦爾普吉石樣本。
A student labeled the mineral tray walpurgite. 一名學生把那盤礦物樣本標記為瓦爾普吉石。
A huge walrus rested on the ice. 一頭巨大的海象躺在冰上休息。
The child pointed at the walrus and laughed at its long tusks. 那個孩子指著海象，看到牠長長的獠牙就笑了。
The name walsh appeared at the bottom of the page. 頁面底部出現了華許這個姓氏。
She asked whether walsh was the family name on the letter. 她問信上的姓氏是不是華許。
To walt means to turn; cast; hurl; fling; overturn. walt 的意思是轉動；投擲;投;一扔;顛覆。
People may walt in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下做出不同的舉動。

meaning: 華特；男子名，Walter 的暱稱
sentences: Walt waved from the front porch. 華特從前廊揮手。
Everyone called him Walt instead of Walter. 大家都叫他華特，而不是沃特。
Walter arrived early for the train. 沃特提早到車站等火車。
The teacher thanked Walter for helping after class. 老師謝謝沃特下課後幫忙。
The username walter was already taken. 使用者名稱華特已經被用了。
She typed walter in lowercase on the form. 她在表格上用小寫輸入華特。
One strong walth sent the barrel downhill. 一次猛烈的翻滾讓木桶滾下坡。
The poem used walth to describe the sea's motion. 那首詩用這個古字來描寫海浪的翻動。

meaning: 與艾薩克．沃爾頓或釣魚文風有關的
sentences: His essay had a calm, Waltonian love of rivers. 他的文章帶著沃爾頓式對河流的平靜喜愛。
The club kept a Waltonian tone in its fishing notes. 那個社團在釣魚筆記中保持一種沃爾頓式風格。
They waltzed for twenty-one hours and seventeen minutes straight, setting a record. 他們連續跳華爾滋二十一小時十七分鐘，創下了紀錄。
While waltzing her around the room, he stepped on her toes only once. 當她在房間裡跳著華爾滋時，他只踩到了她的腳趾一次。

meaning: 華爾滋舞者；跳華爾滋的人
sentences: The waltzer turned smoothly across the floor. 那位華爾滋舞者平順地旋過舞池。
She trained as a waltzer before trying other dances. 她先以華爾滋舞者身分受訓，之後才學其他舞蹈。

meaning: 像華爾滋的；帶有三拍子旋律感的
sentences: The song has a soft, waltzlike rhythm. 那首歌有柔和的華爾滋式節奏。
Her steps were light and almost waltzlike. 她的步伐很輕，幾乎像在跳華爾滋。
The costume included a quilted walycoat. 那套服裝包含一件縫棉厚襯裙。
The museum card described the walycoat as everyday wear. 博物館卡片把那件厚襯裙說明為日常服飾。
The guide pointed out a tall wamara near the trail. 嚮導指出步道旁一棵高大的瓦馬拉樹。
Carvers valued wamara for its hard wood. 雕刻工重視瓦馬拉木材的堅硬質地。
A Wambais hunter was mentioned in the field notes. 田野筆記裡提到一位萬拜族獵人。
The map marked an old Wambais settlement. 地圖標出了舊時的萬拜族聚落。
The rough boat ride made my stomach wamble. 顛簸的船程讓我的胃開始翻騰。
His belly began to wamble after the heavy meal. 他吃了太油膩的一餐後，肚子開始不舒服。
A sudden wambliness hit her during the bus ride. 她坐公車時突然感到一陣噁心不適。
He sat quietly until the wambliness passed. 他安靜坐著，直到那股翻騰感過去。
She felt wambling after reading in the car. 她在車上看書後感到一陣作嘔。
The smell left him with a wambling stomach. 那股氣味讓他的胃一直翻騰。
He walked wamblingly back to the hotel after the boat trip. 坐船回來後，他帶著噁心感慢慢走回旅館。
She answered wamblingly and asked for some water. 她不舒服地回了話，並要了一點水。
I feel wambly whenever the road gets too twisty. 只要路太彎，我就會感到胃裡翻騰。
The child looked pale and wambly after spinning around. 那個孩子轉了幾圈後，看起來臉色發白又想吐。
The article mentioned a Wambuba village near the forest. 那篇文章提到森林附近的一座萬布巴族村落。
A Wambuba speaker recorded a traditional song. 一位萬布巴語使用者錄下了一首傳統歌曲。
Professor Wambugu gave the closing talk. 萬布古教授做了閉幕演講。
The report cited Wambugu as an expert source. 報告把萬布古列為專家來源。
The documentary followed a Wambutti family through the forest. 那部紀錄片跟拍一戶萬布提人家庭穿越森林。
A Wambutti guide showed the team a safe path. 一位萬布提嚮導帶隊找到安全的路。
The old nail was wame and hard to pull out. 那根舊釘子歪斜變形，很難拔出來。
A wame branch reached over the narrow path. 一根彎曲的樹枝伸到了窄道上方。
The botanist tagged the young tree as wamefou. 植物學家把那棵幼樹標記為瓦美富樹。
Only a few wamefou were growing near the stream. 小溪附近只長著少數幾棵瓦美富樹。
A faint wamel spread across the water. 水面上泛起一道淡淡的波紋。
The painter used the word wamel for a rippling line. 那位畫家用這個古字來稱呼一條波動的線。

meaning: 小包袱；小東西；微不足道的人
sentences: He carried a tiny wammikin tied with string. 他帶著一個用繩子綁好的小包袱。
The bully called him a wammikin, which was unfair. 那個霸凌者叫他小不點，這很不公平。
There was a small wamp in the carpet near the door. 門邊的地毯有一小塊鼓起來的地方。
The tailor smoothed the wamp out of the cloth. 裁縫把布料上的鼓包慢慢壓平。

meaning: 萬帕諾亞格人；萬帕諾亞格語
sentences: The museum highlighted Wampanoag history and culture. 那座博物館重點介紹萬帕諾亞格人的歷史與文化。
A Wampanoag artist explained the meaning of the pattern. 一位萬帕諾亞格藝術家解釋了圖樣的含義。
The market sold fresh wampee in small baskets. 市場裡用小籃子販售新鮮的黃皮果。
A wampee tree grew beside the old house. 老房子旁長著一棵黃皮樹。
The ducklings wample after their mother across the yard. 那群小鴨搖搖晃晃地跟著母鴨穿過院子。
He had to wample through the deep snow. 他只好搖晃著身子穿過深雪。

meaning: 貝珠串；北美原住民用作裝飾或交換的貝珠
sentences: The necklace was made of polished wampum. 那條項鍊是用打磨過的貝珠串成的。
The exhibit explained how wampum was used in trade and ceremony. 展覽解釋了貝珠如何被用於交易與儀式。
The old record used the spelling wampumpeag. 那份古老紀錄使用這個拼法。
She compared wampumpeag with the more common form wampum. 她把這個拼法和較常見的拼法做比較。
One leg of the table went wampus after the move. 搬家後，桌子有一隻腳變得歪歪的。
The picture frame hung wampus on the wall. 那個相框在牆上掛得歪斜。

meaning: 厚工作外套；粗布短上衣
sentences: He put on a heavy wamus before chopping wood. 他砍柴前先穿上一件厚工作外套。
The old photo shows a farmer in a dark wamus. 那張老照片裡是一位穿著深色粗布外套的農夫。
She looked wan and tired after her long illness. 在大病一場後，她看起來臉色蒼白且疲憊。
He gave a wan smile to show he was feeling a little better. 他露出一抹無力的微笑，表示他感覺好一點了。
The lesson included the history of the Wanapum people. 那堂課包含瓦納彭族人的歷史。
A Wanapum fisherman described the river in winter. 一位瓦納彭漁夫描述了冬天的河流。
Their plan felt wanchancy from the start. 他們的計畫從一開始就顯得很碰運氣。
A wanchancy bridge crossed the narrow stream. 一座不太穩靠的橋跨過那條窄溪。

meaning: 魔術師（魔杖）、魔術師或占卜師使用的棍子或棒（占卜棒）。
sentences: The term wand refers to a stick or rod used by a magician (a magic wand), conjurer or diviner (divining rod). 魔杖一詞是指魔術師（魔杖）、魔術師或占卜師（占卜棒）使用的棍子或棒子。
The lesson introduced wand as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「魔杖」這個易於理解的有用術語。
We spent the afternoon wandering through the narrow city streets. 我們花了一下午在城市狹窄的街道中漫步（徘徊）。
His mind managed to wander during the long and boring meeting. 他的心思在那場漫長乏味的會議中竟然開小差（漫遊）了。

meaning: 可以漫步的；適合閒逛的
sentences: The old town is small and very wanderable. 那座古城不大，很適合慢慢閒逛。
They wanted a wanderable park with shaded paths. 他們想找一座適合散步閒走、而且有樹蔭小路的公園。
The term wanderer refers to The wandering albatross, Diomedea exulans. 流浪者一詞指的是流浪信天翁 Diomedea exulans。
We learned the meaning of wanderer during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了流浪者的意義。

meaning: 能夠異常地向某些方向移動。
sentences: a wandering kidney; a wandering liver 流浪的腎臟；流浪的肝臟
The report describes the result as wandering. 報告將結果描述為「徘徊」。

meaning: 漫遊地；恍惚地；四處遊走地
sentences: He looked wanderingly at the lights in the distance. 他恍惚地望著遠方的燈光。
The dog moved wanderingly through the empty field. 那隻狗在空曠的原野裡漫無目的地走動。
His wanderingness made it hard for him to keep one job. 他總想四處走走的性子，使他很難長久待在同一份工作。
The poem captures the wanderingness of youth. 那首詩捕捉了青春時期那種漂泊不定的感受。

meaning: 遊學年；四處旅行學習的一年
sentences: After college, she took a Wanderjahr across Europe. 大學後，她到歐洲展開一年的遊學旅行。
The old diary described his Wanderjahr in detail. 那本舊日記詳細記錄了他的遊學年。

meaning: 旅行癖；喜歡到處旅行的強烈欲望
sentences: His wanderlust pushed him to leave home again. 他那股旅行癖又推著他離家出走。
The movie gave many viewers a strong wanderlust. 那部電影讓許多觀眾興起強烈的旅行欲望。
She is a true wanderluster who loves new cities. 她是真正熱愛旅行的人，喜歡新城市。
Every wanderluster in the group wanted one more stop. 團裡每個愛旅行的人都想再多停一站。
He gave a wanderlustful sigh at the map on the wall. 他看著牆上的地圖，發出一聲充滿旅行慾望的嘆息。
The wanderlustful boy kept asking about distant places. 那個充滿旅行慾望的男孩一直問遠方的地方。
A wanderoo sat quietly on the branch. 一隻長尾葉猴安靜地坐在樹枝上。
The guide spotted a wanderoo near the riverbank. 嚮導在河岸附近看見一隻長尾葉猴。
The wandery cat spent the afternoon near the gate. 那隻愛閒逛的貓整個下午都待在門邊。
His wandery mood made him miss the bus stop. 他那種遊蕩不定的心情讓他錯過了公車站。

meaning: 漫遊的一年；流浪的一年
sentences: She remembered her wanderyear as a time of change. 她把那段漫遊的一年記作轉變期。
His wanderyear taught him how to live simply. 他流浪的一年教會他如何簡單生活。
A tiny wandflower bloomed beside the fence. 籬笆旁開了一朵小小的藤花。
She drew the wandflower in her sketchbook. 她把那朵藤花畫進了素描本。
We wandle through the market every Saturday. 我們每週六都在市場裡漫步。
They wandle slowly along the river path. 他們沿著河邊小徑慢慢走著。

meaning: 像手杖的；細長而筆直的
sentences: The plant had a wandlike stem. 那株植物有一根像手杖般細長的莖。
She held a wandlike stick in her hand. 她手裡拿著一根細長如杖的棍子。
A tall wandoo shaded the dry path. 一棵高大的澳洲尤加利樹遮住了乾燥的小路。
The forest included many wandoo trees. 那片森林裡有許多澳洲尤加利樹。
The article described a Wandorobo hunting camp. 那篇文章描述了一處萬多羅博人的狩獵營地。
A Wandorobo elder shared stories of the hills. 一位萬多羅博族長者分享了山區故事。
The wandsman led the procession at dawn. 那位持杖者在黎明時帶領隊伍前進。
The story gave the wandsman a noble role. 那個故事讓執杖人擔任尊貴的角色。

meaning: 像手杖的；細長而彎曲的
sentences: The wandy branch bent over the roof. 那根細長彎曲的樹枝垂到屋頂上方。
He picked up a wandy piece of driftwood. 他撿起一塊細長彎曲的漂木。
Support for the government has begun to wane in recent months. 近幾個月對政府的支持率已開始下降（衰落）。
The moon will wane after it reaches its full phase. 月亮在滿月後會開始虧缺。

meaning: 瓦妮亞塔；女子名或地名
sentences: Waneatta signed the guest book first. 瓦妮亞塔第一個在留言簿上簽名。
The village of Waneatta was mentioned in the report. 報告裡提到瓦妮亞塔這個村名。
Her waned interest showed in the short replies. 她興致衰退，回覆也變得很短。
The waned light made the room feel calm. 減弱的光線讓房間顯得安靜。
The poem imagined a waneless moon. 那首詩想像出一輪不會消減的月亮。
Their hope seemed waneless through the winter. 他們的希望在整個冬天裡似乎都不曾減弱。
He wang the metal rod against the stone to make a loud noise. 他猛擊金屬棒敲在石頭上發出巨響。
The door closed with a loud wang. 門砰的一聲猛力關上了。
The healer held a wanga during the ceremony. 儀式進行時，巫醫手持一根占卜棒。
An old wanga was kept in a woven pouch. 一根古老的占卜棒被收在編織袋裡。
The map marked Wangala near the coast. 地圖上標出旺加拉靠近海岸的位置。
A Wangala family lived beside the river. 一戶旺加拉家庭住在河邊。
He used a wangan to catch fish in the shallows. 他用一支魚叉在淺水區捕魚。
The museum displayed a carved wooden wangan. 博物館展出了一支雕刻木製魚叉。
Wangara arrived early for the meeting. 旺加拉很早就到會場。
The teacher asked about the history of Wangara. 老師問起旺加拉這個名稱的歷史。
Everyone ignored the wangateur at the table. 大家都不理桌邊那個愛吹噓的人。
He sounded like a wangateur when he spoke. 他說話時聽起來像個愛炫耀的人。
The ranger pointed out a wanghee near the trail. 管理員指著步道旁的一棵旺希樹。
A pair of birds nested in the wanghee. 兩隻鳥在旺希樹上築巢。
She managed to wangle an extra ticket. 她設法弄到了一張額外的票。
He wangled his way into the private event. 他用巧妙手段混進了那場私人活動。

meaning: 善於鑽營的人；會耍手段的人
sentences: The wangler always found a shortcut. 那個善於鑽營的人總能找到捷徑。
No one trusted the wangler in the office. 辦公室裡沒有人信任那個會耍手段的人。
The field notes mentioned the Wangoni migration. 田野筆記提到了萬戈尼人的遷徙。
A Wangoni guide explained the local customs. 一位萬戈尼嚮導解釋了當地習俗。
The horse broke into a wangrace across the field. 那匹馬在田野裡撒開腿快跑。
The children watched the wangrace with excitement. 孩子們興奮地看著那陣快跑。
The dentist checked the wangtooth for decay. 牙醫檢查那顆臼齒有沒有蛀壞。
He cracked a nut with his wangtooth. 他用大牙咬開了一顆堅果。
The letter was full of wanhope after the loss. 經過那場失落後，信裡滿是絕望。
She fought against wanhope and kept going. 她努力對抗絕望，繼續向前。
The antelope had a thin wanhorn. 那隻羚羊長著一對細而淡色的角。
He carved a wanhorn from ivory. 他用象牙雕出一支淡色號角。

meaning: 移動補給車；船上的補給艙
sentences: The cooks loaded supplies into the wanigan. 廚師把補給品裝進移動補給車。
A small wanigan followed the logging crew. 一輛小型補給車跟著伐木隊。
my patience is waning 我的耐心正在減弱
The report describes the result as waning. 報告稱這一結果正在減弱。
The botanist tagged the tree as wankapin. 植物學家把那棵樹標為瓦恩卡平樹。
A wankapin grew beside the stream. 溪邊長著一棵瓦恩卡平樹。
The ladder felt wankle on the wet ground. 那把梯子在濕地上感覺很不穩。
His wankle steps showed he was tired. 他步伐搖晃，表示已經很累了。
The wankliness of the chair annoyed everyone. 那張椅子搖晃不穩，讓大家都很煩。
She noticed the wankliness of the old bridge. 她注意到那座舊橋的不穩。
The cart moved wankly over the stones. 那輛車在石子路上搖搖晃晃地前進。
He stood wankly after the long climb. 長時間攀爬後，他站得不太穩。
The path wanle through the reeds. 小路蜿蜒穿過蘆葦叢。
We wanle uphill for another mile. 我們又曲折地往山上走了一英里。
She smiled wanly after the long night. 經過漫長的一夜，她虛弱地笑了笑。
The lamp shone wanly through the fog. 燈光在霧中微弱地閃著。
His face looked wanner than before. 他的臉色看起來比以前更蒼白。
The wanner light made the room feel sad. 更微弱的光讓房間顯得有點哀傷。
The wanness in her face worried the nurse. 她臉上的蒼白讓護士很擔心。
Sleep helped the wanness fade a little. 睡眠讓那股憔悴稍微退去。

meaning: 有點蒼白的；稍微憔悴的
sentences: He looked wannish after the fever. 他發燒後看起來有點蒼白。
The wannish glow of dawn filled the sky. 黎明微微蒼白的光亮充滿天空。
The wanny child stayed close to his mother. 那個柔弱的孩子一直靠著媽媽。
Her wanny hands trembled in the cold. 她那雙蒼白的手在寒冷中發抖。
The painting used a wanrufe over the hills. 那幅畫在山丘上鋪出一層淡色。
Morning light gave the room a wanrufe. 早晨的光讓房間染上一層蒼白色調。

meaning: 怪誕的；古怪不合常規的
sentences: The wansonsy tale was hard to believe. 那則古怪的故事很難讓人相信。
He wore a wansonsy hat to the party. 他戴著一頂怪誕的帽子去參加派對。
I want to travel around the world and see different cultures. 我想環遊世界，看看不同的文化。
What do you want to be when you grow up? 你長大後想當什麼？
There was a wantage of clean water in summer. 夏天時清水短缺。
The report described a wantage of workers. 那份報告指出人手不足。
The police are looking for a man who is wanted for robbery. 警方正在尋找一名因搶劫而被通緝的男子。
She finally felt wanted and appreciated in her new job. 她在新工作中終於感到被需要與被賞識。
The charity helped every wanter in the district. 那個慈善組織幫助了區內每一位有需要的人。
A wanter at the door asked for bread. 門口一位求助者開口要麵包。
The child gave a wantful look at the cake. 那孩子用渴望的眼神看著蛋糕。
Her wantful voice showed she needed help. 她那帶著渴求的聲音表示她需要幫忙。

meaning: 荒涼的小丘；空曠的高地
sentences: They climbed the wanthill to watch the sunset. 他們爬上那座荒涼的小丘看夕陽。
A lone tree stood on the wanthill. 一棵孤樹立在那座空曠的高地上。
The wanthrift spent his wages too quickly. 那個揮霍者把工資花得太快。
No wanthrift can keep the house running. 揮霍的人無法把家裡經營好。
The plan was wanting in detail. 這個計畫在細節上不足。
The dinner was wanting without salt. 這頓晚餐少了鹽就不完整。
He looked wantingly at the warm light inside. 他渴望地望著屋內的暖光。
She reached wantingly for the last apple. 她迫切地伸手去拿最後一顆蘋果。

meaning: the quality of wanting; a state of strong desire or need
sentences: His wantingness for praise showed in every meeting. 他對稱讚的渴求在每次會議裡都看得出來。
The report linked the child's wantingness to insecurity. 那份報告把孩子的強烈渴望和不安連在一起。

meaning: free from want; not in need of anything
sentences: They hoped to live a wantless life in the countryside. 他們希望在鄉下過上無憂無缺的生活。
The old poem imagined a wantless land with no hunger. 那首舊詩描寫了一個沒有飢餓的無缺之地。

meaning: the state of having no want or lack
sentences: The story praised wantlessness as a sign of peace. 那個故事把無所匱乏當作平靜的象徵。
Her wantlessness came from a simple and careful life. 她那種不匱乏的狀態來自簡單而謹慎的生活。

meaning: 浪費或揮霍，尤其是在快樂中（最常見的是離開）。
sentences: The young man wantoned away his inheritance. 這個年輕人肆意奪走了他的遺產。
People often wanton when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會肆意妄為。

meaning: a person who behaves wantonly or recklessly
sentences: The village called him a wantoner after the fire. 那場火災後，村裡把他看成一個放縱胡鬧的人。
A wantoner in the tale ignored every warning. 故事裡那個放縱的人把每個警告都當成耳邊風。

meaning: resembling wanton behavior; reckless or unrestrained
sentences: His wantonlike jokes upset the whole team. 他那種放縱無度的玩笑惹得整個團隊都不高興。
The crowd's wantonlike cheer made the room noisy. 人群那種肆無忌憚的歡呼讓房間變得很吵。

meaning: in a reckless, unrestrained, or malicious way
sentences: The driver wantonly ignored the red light. 那名駕駛任性地無視了紅燈。
The storm wantonly damaged the small pier. 那場風暴肆意地毀壞了小碼頭。
The judge criticized the wantonness of the attack. 法官批評那次攻擊的肆意妄為。
Her wantonness turned a small joke into a big problem. 她那種放縱的態度把一個小玩笑變成大麻煩。

meaning: 想要（第三人稱單數），需求
sentences: He wants to become a pilot when he grows up. 他長大後想成為一名飛行員。
The charity aims to meet the basic wants of the homeless population. 該慈善機構旨在滿足無家可歸者的基本需求。
The old play mocks the wantwit who never listens. 那部舊劇嘲笑那個從不聽勸的傻瓜。
He acted like a wantwit and lost the key. 他像個笨蛋一樣行事，把鑰匙弄丟了。

meaning: lacking, needy, or poor in supply
sentences: The wanty room had only one broken chair. 那間匱乏的房間裡只有一張壞椅子。
His wanty budget left little room for extras. 他那拮据的預算幾乎沒有餘地做額外開銷。

meaning: marked by pale, weak, or feeble speech
sentences: The letter felt wanwordy and strangely timid. 那封信的措辭蒼白而且有點畏縮。
Her wanwordy apology failed to sound sincere. 她那種無力的道歉聽起來並不真誠。

meaning: of little worth; meager in value
sentences: The old coin seemed wanworth at first glance. 那枚舊硬幣乍看之下沒什麼價值。
He refused to trade his time for wanworth promises. 他不願把時間換成毫無價值的承諾。
The moon looked wany through the fog. 月亮在霧裡顯得蒼白而微弱。
After the fever, he felt wany and tired. 發燒後，他覺得身體虛弱又疲倦。

meaning: a member of the Wanyakyusa people
sentences: A Wanyakyusa elder spoke at the ceremony. 一位瓦尼亞庫薩族長者在儀式上發言。
The book described a Wanyakyusa village by the lake. 那本書描寫了一座湖邊的瓦尼亞庫薩族村落。

meaning: a member of the Wanyamwezi people
sentences: The guide was a proud Wanyamwezi from the region. 那位嚮導是當地自豪的瓦尼亞姆韋齊族人。
A Wanyamwezi trader appeared in the old travel account. 舊旅行記錄裡出現了一位瓦尼亞姆韋齊族商人。

meaning: a member of the Wanyasa people
sentences: A Wanyasa fisherman showed us the river path. 一位瓦尼亞薩族漁夫帶我們看了河道。
The lecture covered the history of the Wanyasa people. 那場講座介紹了瓦尼亞薩族的歷史。

meaning: a member of the Wanyoro people
sentences: The museum display included a Wanyoro basket. 博物館展品裡有一個瓦尼約羅族籃子。
A Wanyoro storyteller kept the audience quiet. 一位瓦尼約羅族說書人讓觀眾安靜聆聽。

meaning: a sharp slap, blow, or hit
sentences: The paddle gave the boat a hard wap. 船槳重重一拍，船身晃了一下。
He heard a sudden wap against the door. 他聽見門上突然傳來一下重擊。

meaning: a Native American place name or tribal name
sentences: The map marked Wapacut near the coast. 地圖上把瓦帕庫特標在海岸附近。
An old record listed Wapacut among local names. 舊紀錄把瓦帕庫特列為當地名稱之一。

meaning: an aquatic plant with edible tubers; arrowhead
sentences: The marsh was full of Wapato in summer. 那片沼澤在夏天長滿了慈姑類植物。
They dug Wapato roots for food in the story. 故事裡的人們挖慈姑根來當食物。

meaning: a variant name for wapato; an edible marsh plant
sentences: The field guide used the name wapatoo for the plant. 那本野外指南用這個名稱來稱呼這種植物。
A wapatoo patch grew in the shallow water. 淺水裡長出一大片慈姑類植物。
The history lesson explained the wapentake system. 歷史課解釋了這種古老的行政區制度。
A wapentake once controlled several nearby villages. 一個古代行政區過去曾管轄附近幾個村莊。

meaning: a member of the Wapisiana people
sentences: The article mentioned a Wapisiana guide in the forest. 那篇文章提到森林裡的一位瓦皮西亞納族嚮導。
A Wapisiana elder explained the river route. 一位瓦皮西亞納族長者說明了河道路線。
A wapiti crossed the snowy plain at dawn. 一頭馬鹿在黎明時穿過雪原。
The children watched the wapiti from the hill. 孩子們從山丘上看那頭馬鹿。

meaning: a member of the Wapogoro people
sentences: A Wapogoro farmer greeted us at the road. 一位瓦波戈羅族農夫在路邊向我們打招呼。
The guidebook described Wapogoro customs and songs. 那本導覽書介紹了瓦波戈羅族的習俗與歌謠。

meaning: a member of the Wapokomo people
sentences: The river settlement was home to many Wapokomo families. 那座河邊聚落住著許多瓦波科莫族家庭。
A Wapokomo speaker opened the meeting with a prayer. 一位瓦波科莫族發言者以祈禱開場。
One wapp on the bell sent a clear sound. 鐘上重重一擊，發出清脆聲響。
The board moved with a loud wapp against the wall. 木板啪的一聲撞上牆面。
