The teacher explained that wawa is a childish form of speech. 老師解釋說，咿呀語是幼兒化的說話方式。
Wawah, the crowd cheered when the team scored. 嘩哈，球隊得分時觀眾歡呼起來。
He shouted wawah to celebrate the news. 他高喊嘩哈來慶祝這個消息。
The field guide listed wawaskeesh among the rare plants. 野外圖鑑把瓦瓦斯基什列為稀有植物之一。
A small wawaskeesh grew near the riverbank. 河岸邊長著一株小小的瓦瓦斯基什。
She used some scented wax to make her own homemade candles. 她用一些香氛蠟做了自己的手作蠟燭。
Please remember to wax the wooden floor regularly to keep it shiny. 請記得定期為木地板打蠟以保持其光澤。

meaning: 蠟果；表面有蠟質的漿果
sentences: The waxberry had a pale coating on its skin. 那顆蠟果表皮上有一層淡淡的蠟質。
Birds pecked at the waxberry on the branch. 鳥兒啄食樹枝上的蠟果。
A waxbill perched on the fence. 一隻文鳥停在籬笆上。
The birdwatcher pointed out the bright waxbill. 那位賞鳥者指著那隻鮮豔的文鳥。
The waxbird flashed past the window. 那隻蠟色鳥從窗前掠過。
They noted the waxbird in their bird list. 他們把那隻蠟色鳥記進賞鳥清單。

meaning: 蠟灌木；表面有蠟質的灌木
sentences: The waxbush stayed green through the dry season. 那株蠟灌木在乾季仍保持翠綠。
She trimmed the waxbush near the path. 她修剪了小路旁的蠟灌木。
The waxchandler sold handmade candles in the market. 那位製蠟燭的人在市場賣手工蠟燭。
An old waxchandler shop appeared in the story. 故事裡出現了一家老舊的蠟燭工坊。
The town once supported a small waxchandlery. 那個小鎮曾經有一家小型蠟燭作坊。
The museum displayed tools from a waxchandlery. 博物館展示了蠟燭作坊使用的工具。
Her waxen face showed that she was tired. 她那張蒼白的臉看得出很疲倦。
The statue had a waxen shine under the lamp. 那座雕像在燈下帶著蠟質的光澤。
The waxer polished the floor in long strokes. 打蠟工人用長長的動作把地板拋光。
He bought a waxer for the car seats. 他買了一個上蠟工具來處理車座。
The bouquet included a white waxflower. 那束花裡有一朵白色蠟花。
She dried the waxflower and kept it in a book. 她把那朵蠟花風乾後夾進書裡。
The map marked Waxhaw near the border. 地圖上在邊界附近標出瓦克斯霍。
The exhibit included stories from Waxhaw history. 展覽裡收錄了瓦克斯霍歷史的故事。
He was waxhearted and quickly forgave them. 他心很軟，很快就原諒了他們。
The waxhearted judge listened to every plea. 那位心軟的法官聽取了每一個請求。
He smiled waxily after the long illness. 他在久病之後露出蒼白的笑容。
The surface shone waxily in the light. 那個表面在燈光下帶著蠟質光澤。
The waxiness of the fruit made it hard to peel. 那顆果子的蠟質外皮讓它不容易剝開。
A waxiness came over his face after the fever. 發燒後，他的臉上出現一種蒼白感。
The waxing of the moon was easy to see tonight. 今晚很容易看出月亮正在漸盈。
We noticed the waxing of interest in the project. 我們注意到大家對這個計畫的興趣正在增長。
The crowd grew waxingly louder. 人群的聲音漸漸變大。
The sky brightened waxingly after sunrise. 日出後，天空漸漸變亮。
The leaf had a waxlike surface. 那片葉子表面像蠟一樣。
A waxlike sheen covered the old floor. 舊地板上覆著一層蠟質光澤。
The waxmaker prepared candles for the festival. 製蠟者為節慶準備了蠟燭。
An old waxmaker taught her the trade. 一位老製蠟者把這門手藝教給她。
Waxmaking was once a common village craft. 製蠟曾經是村裡常見的工藝。
The workshop explained the basics of waxmaking. 那個工作坊說明了製蠟的基本步驟。
The waxman polished the old table. 那位打蠟工人把舊桌子擦亮了。
A waxman supplied candles to the church. 一位製蠟人為教堂供應蠟燭。
The waxweed grew beside the dry ditch. 蠟草長在乾涸的溝邊。
A gardener removed the waxweed from the bed. 園丁把花圃裡的蠟草拔掉了。
A waxwing landed on the berry tree. 一隻太平鳥落在結莓果的樹上。
The waxwing flock moved quickly through the yard. 那群太平鳥迅速穿過院子。
The museum displayed a lifelike waxwork of the singer. 博物館展出一尊栩栩如生的歌手蠟像。
Visitors stood beside the waxwork for photos. 參觀者站在那尊蠟像旁邊拍照。

meaning: 製作蠟像或蠟製品的人
sentences: The waxworker shaped the face with careful hands. 那位蠟工用細心的手把臉部塑形。
A skilled waxworker can make the figure look alive. 熟練的蠟工能讓作品看起來像活的一樣。
The class learned basic waxworking in the afternoon. 那堂課下午學習了基本的蠟加工。
Waxworking requires steady heat and patient hands. 蠟加工需要穩定的熱度和耐心的雙手。
The leaves had a waxy surface after the rain. 雨後葉子表面呈現蠟質般的光澤。
His hands felt waxy from the cold ointment. 他的手因為冰涼的藥膏而有種蠟滑的感覺。
Could you please tell me the way to the nearest hospital? 你能告訴我最近的醫院怎麼走嗎？
Learning a new language is a great way to broaden your mind. 學習新語言是開闊心胸的好方法。
The field guide listed wayaka among the local trees. 那本野外指南把瓦亞卡列為當地樹木之一。
A wayaka grew near the path behind the house. 房子後方的小路旁長著一棵瓦亞卡。

meaning: 皮影戲；爪哇傳統木偶戲
sentences: We watched a wayang performance after dinner. 晚餐後我們看了一場皮影戲表演。
The wayang puppets moved behind a glowing screen. 那些皮影偶在發光的幕布後方移動。
The article described the history of the Wayao people. 那篇文章描述了瓦亞奧族的歷史。
A Wayao elder spoke about river life and farming. 一位瓦亞奧族長者談到河流生活和耕作。
He sat in the wayback of the old van. 他坐在那台舊廂型車的後排。
They remembered the wayback days of their childhood. 他們回想起童年的久遠往事。
The children picked wayberry along the hedge. 孩子們沿著樹籬採摘瓦莓果。
A bowl of wayberry sat beside the bread. 一碗瓦莓果放在麵包旁邊。
The clerk checked the waybill before loading the truck. 職員在裝貨前先核對貨運單。
Every crate needed a matching waybill. 每個箱子都需要一張對應的託運單。
A waybird rested briefly on the fence. 一隻候鳥短暫停在圍欄上。
The lake attracts many waybirds in spring. 這座湖在春天會吸引許多候鳥。
She packed a small waybook for the journey. 她替這趟旅程帶了一本小小的路書。
The old waybook listed inns and river crossings. 那本舊路書列出了旅店和渡河點。

meaning: 旅途乾糧；方便攜帶的麵包
sentences: The hikers shared waybread at noon. 登山客中午分著吃旅途乾糧。
She baked sturdy waybread for the long trip. 她為長途旅行烤了耐放的麵包。
The botanist noted waybung as a local plant name. 那位植物學家把瓦邦記作一種當地植物名。
A cluster of waybung grew near the stream. 小溪附近長著一叢瓦邦。
Their wayfare across the hills took two days. 他們穿越山丘的旅程花了兩天。
The poem describes the wayfare of a lone rider. 那首詩描寫了一位獨行騎士的旅途。
A tired wayfarer asked for water at the door. 一位疲憊的旅人到門口要水喝。
The inn was built to welcome every wayfarer. 那家旅店就是為了接待每一位過路人而建。
The wayfaring merchant stayed in small inns. 那位旅行商人住在小旅店裡。
She kept a wayfaring life for many years. 她過了很多年四處旅行的生活。
He moved wayfaringly from town to town. 他像旅人一樣在城鎮之間漂泊。
The story follows a boy living wayfaringly. 那個故事追隨一名四處流浪生活的男孩。
She met a kind wayfellow on the road. 她在路上遇到一位善良的旅伴。
The two wayfellows shared food and stories. 這兩位同路人分享食物，也交換故事。
The waygang crossed the plain at dawn. 那支行路隊伍在黎明時穿越平原。
A waygang of traders reached the market. 一群商旅抵達了市場。
The waygate led into the orchard. 那個通道口通往果園。
He opened the old waygate with a rusty key. 他用一把生鏽的鑰匙打開了舊路門。
Their waygoing was delayed by heavy rain. 他們的出發因大雨而延後。
The village gathered to witness the waygoing. 村民聚在一起送行。
The cart looked waygone after years of use. 那輛手推車用了多年，看起來很老舊。
He spoke of waygone summers by the sea. 他談起過去那些海邊的夏天。
The tailors held a waygoose after finishing the coats. 裁縫們做完外套後辦了一場工匠慶宴。
A waygoose often marked the end of a busy season. 工匠慶宴常常象徵忙碌季節的結束。
They stopped at a wayhouse before the mountain pass. 他們在翻山口前先停在一家旅舍休息。
The old wayhouse offered soup and a warm bed. 那家舊旅舍提供湯和溫暖的床鋪。
The guide's waying kept the group on track. 嚮導的引路讓隊伍沒有走偏。
Good waying matters when the path is unclear. 走道不明時，好的引導就很重要。
The courier was waylaid on the forest road. 那名信使在森林路上被攔下。
We were waylaid by an old friend on the way home. 我們回家途中被一位老朋友攔住了。
He enjoyed the waylaidlessness of the empty road. 他享受那條空無一人的路上不受打擾的自在。
The journey had a feeling of waylaidlessness and calm. 那趟旅程帶著一種不受攔阻的平靜感。
Robbers tried to waylay the coach at night. 強盜想在夜裡攔截馬車。
She wanted to waylay him after class for a talk. 她想在下課後把他攔下來談一談。
The waylayer hid behind the stones. 那名伏擊者躲在石頭後面。
A waylayer waited for travelers on the road. 一名攔截者在路上等著旅人。
The company needed a wayleave to build the line. 公司需要通行許可才能鋪設線路。
They signed the wayleave before work began. 他們在施工前先簽了過路權文件。
The wayless valley was hard to cross. 那片無路的山谷很難穿越。
A wayless trail disappeared into the fog. 一條看不見路徑的小徑消失在霧中。
The teacher became a waymaker for many students. 那位老師成了許多學生的開路者。
In the story, the hero is a waymaker for the village. 故事裡，英雄是村子的引路人。
A wayman asked for directions to the river. 一位過路男子問去河邊的路。
The old tale begins with a wayman at dusk. 那個古老故事從黃昏時的一位路人開始。
We followed the waymark on the hill. 我們跟著山上的路標走。
A red waymark showed the turn near the bridge. 一個紅色路線標記指示了橋邊的轉彎。
Her waymate carried the heavier bag. 她的同行者提著比較重的袋子。
A waymate can make a long road feel short. 有旅伴同行，長路也會顯得比較短。
Wayne arrived just before the meeting started. 韋恩在會議開始前剛好抵達。
The letter was addressed to Wayne in blue ink. 那封信是用藍色墨水寫給韋恩的。
The waypost stood beside the dirt road. 那座路標立在土路旁。
They paused at the waypost to check the map. 他們在里程牌旁停下來看地圖。
a little ways out 有點出路
We walked a ways from my house to the mall. 我們從我家步行到商場。
Many wild flowers grew on the wayside. 路邊長滿了許多野花。
The term wayside refers to The side of a road or path. 術語“路邊”是指道路或小路的一側。
A waysider waved to the passing bus. 一位路邊的人向經過的公車揮手。
The story follows a lonely waysider by the coast. 那個故事描寫海邊一位孤單的沿路居住者。
His waysliding began with small lies. 他的走偏是從小謊開始的。
The novel warns against waysliding in youth. 那本小說警告年輕時不要偏離正道。
The hedge was thick with waythorn. 那道樹籬長滿了瓦刺棘。
A waythorn shrub blocked the narrow path. 一叢瓦刺棘擋住了狹窄的小路。

meaning: 故意、反常地偏離預期標準；傾向於迷失。
sentences: Something described as wayward is given to a wilful, perverse deviation from the expected norm; tending to stray. 被描述為任性的東西是指故意、反常地偏離預期的規範。傾向於迷失。
The word wayward is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 任性這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 道路看守人；路務管理者
sentences: The waywarden checked the bridge after the storm. 那位道路看守人在暴風雨後檢查了橋樑。
Villagers trusted the waywarden to keep the path safe. 村民信任這位路務管理者維持道路安全。
The child wandered waywardly through the garden. 那個孩子任性地在花園裡亂走。
He waywardly refused every suggestion. 他任性地拒絕了每個建議。
Her waywardness made school difficult at times. 她的任性有時讓上學變得很困難。
The coach handled the team's waywardness calmly. 教練冷靜地處理了球隊的散漫不受控。
The surveyor carried a waywiser on the trail. 測量員在小徑上帶著測路儀。
A waywiser can help measure distance along a road. 測路儀可以幫助量出道路距離。

meaning: 地方領主；舊式軍政長官
sentences: The waywode ruled the border region for years. 那位地方領主多年治理邊境地區。
The old chronicle speaks of a fierce waywode. 那部古老編年史提到一位兇猛的軍政長官。

meaning: 地方領主的職位；軍政長官職
sentences: He gained the waywodeship after the election. 他在選舉後取得了地方領主職位。
The waywodeship carried great authority in the region. 這個軍政長官職在該地區擁有很大的權力。
The wayworn traveler sat by the fire. 那位旅途勞頓的旅行者坐在火邊。
By sunset, the team looked wayworn and dusty. 到了日落時，隊伍看起來又累又滿身灰塵。
Waywort grew beside the path in spring. 春天時，路邊長出了瓦草。
The herbalist collected a few waywort leaves. 那位草藥師採了幾片瓦草葉。
The printing shop held a wayzgoose every summer. 那家印刷店每到夏天都舉辦工匠聚餐。
A wayzgoose was a chance to celebrate hard work. 工匠聚餐是慶祝辛勞工作的機會。

meaning: 維齊爾；伊斯蘭或印度宮廷中的大臣
sentences: The wazir advised the ruler each morning. 維齊爾每天早上都向統治者進言。
In the story, the wazir kept the court calm. 在故事裡，維齊爾讓宮廷保持平靜。

meaning: 我們；第一人稱複數代名詞
sentences: We arrived before sunrise. 我們在日出前就到了。
We will finish the task together. 我們會一起完成這項工作。

meaning: 我們（我們，我們的，我們的，我們自己）
sentences: We are planning to visit our grandparents next weekend. 我們正計劃下週末去探望祖父母。
We did all the work by ourselves without any outside help. 我們沒有任何外界幫助，獨自完成了所有工作。

meaning: 韋亞族；北美原住民族群
sentences: The Wea traded with nearby settlements. 韋亞族和附近聚落進行交易。
A Wea leader spoke at the gathering. 一位韋亞族領袖在聚會上發言。
He felt weak after recovering from a long and serious illness. 大病初癒後，他感到身體虛弱。
The argument was weak and failed to convince the audience. 這個論點很薄弱，未能說服聽眾。

meaning: 頭腦遲鈍的；缺乏判斷力的
sentences: The weakbrained plan collapsed quickly. 那個頭腦遲鈍的計畫很快就失敗了。
He was mocked for his weakbrained decision. 他因為判斷遲鈍的決定而被嘲笑。
The constant rain managed to weaken the foundation of the house. 持續的雨水竟然削弱了房子的地基。
His illness managed to weaken him significantly over the weeks. 他的病在幾週內竟然讓他顯著虛弱了。

meaning: 削弱者；使力量或效果變弱的人或事物
sentences: Doubt is a weakener of resolve. 疑慮會削弱決心。
The weakener in the system was quickly replaced. 系統中的削弱因素很快就被替換掉了。
The weakening of the bridge worried the crew. 橋樑的鬆弱讓工人們擔心。
They noticed a gradual weakening in the signal. 他們注意到訊號正在逐漸變弱。
The fisherman caught a weakfish off the coast. 漁夫在海岸外捕到一條弱魚。
The weakfish was cooked with herbs for dinner. 那條弱魚被加上香草做成晚餐。

meaning: 手勁弱的；無力的；笨拙的
sentences: The weakhanded worker dropped the crate. 那位手勁無力的工人把箱子弄掉了。
A weakhanded grip made the tool slip. 無力的握法讓工具滑了出去。
The weakhearted child hid behind the chair. 那個膽小的孩子躲到椅子後面。
Only the weakhearted gave up before the race. 只有意志薄弱的人在比賽前就放棄了。
He weakheartedly agreed to the unfair deal. 他膽怯地同意了那筆不公平的交易。
She weakheartedly stepped away from the edge. 她膽怯地從邊緣退開。
His weakheartedness showed in every delay. 他的膽怯在每一次拖延中都表露無遺。
The coach refused to excuse weakheartedness. 教練不接受意志薄弱當藉口。
The tea tasted weakish but pleasant. 這茶味道有點淡，卻很順口。
He felt weakish after the long walk. 他走了長路後感到有點虛弱。

meaning: 有點虛弱地；稍微無力地
sentences: He weakishly smiled at the nurse. 他虛弱地對護士笑了笑。
The candle weakishly flickered in the dark. 那支蠟燭在黑暗中微弱地閃動。
His weakishness showed after the fever. 發燒後，他顯得有些虛弱。
The doctor noted a mild weakishness in her pulse. 醫生注意到她的脈搏有些偏弱。
Her weakliness kept her indoors for days. 她的虛弱讓她待在屋裡好幾天。
The weakliness in his voice worried the family. 他聲音裡的虛弱讓家人很擔心。
The bully called him a weakling. 那個霸凌者叫他膽小鬼。
No weakling could finish that climb. 沒有體弱的人能完成那段攀登。

meaning: 身體虛弱、多病或體質虛弱；。
sentences: Something described as weakly is frail, sickly or of a delicate constitution; weak. 形容虛弱的事物是指身體虛弱、體弱多病或體弱多病的事物；虛弱的。
The word weakly is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 弱這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 說話無力的；聲音微弱的
sentences: The weakmouthed patient could barely answer. 那位聲音微弱的病人幾乎無法回答。
A weakmouthed reply came from the bed. 床上傳來了一句微弱的回應。
She hid her weakness from the team. 她對隊友掩飾自己的弱點。
The weakness in the wall was easy to spot. 牆面的薄弱處很容易看出來。
The weaky rope snapped quickly. 那條無力的繩子很快就斷了。
He gave a weaky wave from the doorway. 他在門口虛弱地揮了揮手。
The reform was meant for the weal of the people. 這項改革是為了人民的福祉。
They worked together for the common weal. 他們為了共同利益而一起努力。

meaning: 林地；林木覆蓋的平原地帶
sentences: The path crossed a weald of oak and fern. 小路穿過一片橡樹和蕨類生長的林地。
Fog drifted over the quiet weald at dawn. 霧氣在清晨飄過寧靜的林地。

meaning: 與威爾德地區有關的；威爾德地區居民
sentences: The Wealden hills are known for ancient forests. 威爾德地區的丘陵以古老森林聞名。
They studied the Wealden landscape in class. 他們在課堂上研究威爾德地區的地貌。

meaning: 威爾德地區的人；林地居民
sentences: The wealdsman knew every track in the woods. 那位林地居民熟悉林間每一條小徑。
An old wealdsman guided the travelers home. 一位老林地居民把旅人帶回家。
True wealth is found in good health and happy relationships. 真正的財富存在於健康與幸福的關係中。
He dedicated his life to sharing his wealth with those in need. 他一生致力於與有需要的人分享他的財富。
They lived wealthily in the old house. 他們在老宅裡過著富足的生活。
The city expanded wealthily after the trade boom. 這座城市在貿易繁榮後富裕地成長。
The wealthiness of the district attracted investors. 那個地區的富裕程度吸引了投資者。
They discussed the wealthiness of the old merchant family. 他們談到那個老商人家族的富有。
They remained wealthless after the fire. 大火過後，他們依然一貧如洗。
The wealthless village depended on the harvest. 那個貧困村落仰賴收成維生。
The family praised her as a wealthmaker. 家人稱她是能創造財富的人。
Tourism became the town's biggest wealthmaker. 觀光成了這座城鎮最大的財富來源。
His wealthmaking schemes hurt the town. 他那種逐利生財的計畫傷害了城鎮。
The book criticized wealthmaking at any cost. 那本書批評不擇手段的致富行為。
The novel mocked the wealthmonger who cared for nothing else. 那部小說嘲諷那種只顧攫財的人。
He was known as a wealthmonger in the town. 他在鎮上被視為一個貪財的人。
He became a very wealthy businessman after selling his company. 他在賣掉公司後成了一名非常富有的商人。
The city has a large number of wealthy residents and businesses. 這座城市有大量的富裕居民與企業。
The Wealthy family donated generously. 那個富裕的家庭慷慨捐款。
They moved into a Wealthy neighborhood. 他們搬進了富裕的社區。
A dark weam marked the old mirror. 舊鏡子上留下一道黑色污痕。
She polished away the weam on the metal. 她把金屬上的瑕疵擦掉了。
The baby is starting to wean and eat solid food. 寶寶開始斷奶並吃固體食物了。
The doctor is trying to wean him off the strong medication. 醫生正試圖讓他戒掉（逐步停用）那種強效藥物。
The calf is now weanable. 這頭小牛現在可以斷奶了。
The vet said the puppy is weanable this week. 獸醫說這隻小狗這週就能斷奶。
The kitten's weanedness made feeding easier. 小貓已經斷奶，餵食變得容易多了。
Weanedness was noted in the farm records. 農場紀錄中記下了斷奶的狀態。
The farmer looked after the weanel in a warm pen. 農夫把那隻剛斷奶的幼畜安置在溫暖的欄舍裡。
A weanel needs gentle care at first. 剛斷奶的幼畜一開始需要細心照顧。
The nursery tagged each weaner before moving it. 育幼場在轉移前替每一隻剛斷奶的幼畜做了標記。
Each weaner was kept in a separate stall. 每隻剛斷奶的幼畜都被安置在獨立的欄位。
The weanling followed its mother slowly. 那隻剛斷奶的幼畜慢慢跟著母親走。
A weanling often needs extra warmth. 剛斷奶的幼畜通常需要額外保暖。

meaning: 威諾克族；北美原住民族群
sentences: The Weanoc were mentioned in the frontier records. 邊疆紀錄中提到了威諾克族。
A Weanoc elder told stories by the fire. 一位威諾克族長者在火邊講故事。
The weanyer branch bent first in the wind. 較細弱的樹枝先在風中彎下。
The weanyer child needed more rest. 那個比較弱小的孩子需要更多休息。

meaning: 威佩米奧克族；北美原住民族群
sentences: The Weapemeoc lived near the coast. 威佩米奧克族住在海岸附近。
Weapemeoc history was taught in the museum. 博物館裡教授了威佩米奧克族的歷史。
The government is taking steps to control the spread of weapons. 政府正採取措施管制武器的擴散。
Knowledge is the most powerful weapon which you can use to change. 知識是你可以用來改變（世界）最強大的武器。

meaning: 攜帶武器的；全副武裝的
sentences: The rebels were heavily weaponed. 叛軍全副武裝。
A weaponed guard stood at the gate. 一名攜帶武器的守衛站在大門口。
The weaponeer checked every blade before the march. 那位武器操持者在行軍前檢查每一把刀。
An old weaponeer taught the boys how to aim. 一位老武器專家教男孩們如何瞄準。

meaning: 手無寸鐵的；沒有武器的
sentences: The guards left him weaponless. 守衛讓他手無寸鐵。
A weaponless traveler must rely on speed. 沒有武器的旅人只能依靠速度。
The weaponmaker forged blades for the castle. 那位武器匠為城堡鍛造刀刃。
The village trusted the weaponmaker's skill. 村子信任那位武器匠的手藝。

meaning: 武器製造；武器製作工藝
sentences: He studied weaponmaking as a craft. 他把武器製作當成一門技藝來學習。
Weaponmaking demanded patience and precision. 武器製作需要耐心與精準。

meaning: 能抵禦武器的；不易被武器穿透的
sentences: The shield was weaponproof against light blows. 那面盾牌足以擋住輕型武器的攻擊。
They wore weaponproof armor into the hall. 他們穿著能擋武器的盔甲走進大廳。
The army has a wide array of weaponry. 軍隊擁有多種武器裝備。
The term weaponry refers to weapons collectively. 武器一詞是指武器的統稱。
The museum planned a medieval weaponshaw. 博物館策劃了一場中世紀武器展演。
A weaponshaw drew visitors to the square. 一場武器展演把遊客吸引到廣場上。
The village staged a weaponshow for the festival. 村子為節慶舉辦了一場武器展示。
The weaponshow filled the hall with curious guests. 那場武器展示讓大廳擠滿了好奇的來賓。

meaning: 展示武器的行為；武器展示
sentences: The weaponshowing drew a crowd to the square. 那場武器展示吸引了廣場上的人群。
His weaponshowing was meant to impress the crowd. 他的武器展示是為了讓群眾留下深刻印象。
The weaponsmith repaired the sword at dawn. 那位武器匠在黎明時修好長劍。
Every weaponsmith in town knew the forge. 鎮上的每位武器匠都熟悉那座鍛爐。

meaning: 武器匠的工坊；武器製作作坊
sentences: They found the weaponsmithy behind the forge. 他們在鍛爐後方找到了武器匠的工坊。
The weaponsmithy rang with hammer blows. 那間武器作坊裡迴盪著鐵鎚聲。
I need to wear my glasses for reading and driving. 我讀書和開車時需要戴眼鏡。
She likes to wear bright and colorful clothes in the summer. 她喜歡在夏天穿明亮鮮豔的衣服。
The designer tested the wearability of the jacket. 設計師測試了那件夾克的可穿性。
Good wearability matters when clothes are used every day. 衣服天天穿的時候，耐穿性就很重要。
a wearable device 穿戴式裝置
Something described as wearable is able to be worn. 被描述為可穿戴的東西是能夠被穿戴的。
On Saint Patrick's day I put on my green shirt and join the wearers of the green. 在聖派翠克節，我穿上綠色襯衫，加入綠色穿著者的行列。
The term wearer refers to one who wears. 佩戴者一詞是指佩戴的人。

meaning: 容易疲倦的；使人厭倦的
sentences: The long walk felt weariable after noon. 中午過後，那段長路變得很讓人疲倦。
His weariable voice made the meeting drag on. 他那種令人厭倦的說話方式讓會議拖得很長。

meaning: 容易疲倦；令人厭倦的狀態
sentences: The weariableness of the task was obvious. 這項工作的令人疲倦之處很明顯。
She complained about the weariableness of the same routine. 她抱怨同樣例行公事帶來的厭倦感。
The wearied hikers sat down by the road. 那些疲倦的健行者坐在路邊休息。
He felt wearied after the long argument. 經過長時間爭論後，他感到很厭倦。
She smiled weariedly at the end of the shift. 她在輪班結束時疲倦地笑了一下。
He weariedly closed the book and went to bed. 他疲倦地合上書本去睡覺。
The weariedness showed in her eyes. 她眼中透露出疲倦。
A feeling of weariedness settled over the room. 一種倦意籠罩了整個房間。
He looked wearier after the second night. 第二個晚上過後，他看起來更疲倦了。
The wearier child asked to rest first. 那個更疲倦的孩子先要求休息。

meaning: 令人疲憊的；令人厭煩的
sentences: The weariful commute took an hour each way. 那段令人疲憊的通勤單程就要一個小時。
The weariful rain lasted all afternoon. 那場令人厭煩的雨下了整個下午。

meaning: 令人疲憊地；令人厭煩地
sentences: The line moved wearifully slowly. 隊伍移動得慢得讓人厭煩。
He wearifully repeated the same story. 他令人疲憊地一再重複同一個故事。
The wearifulness of the journey was hard to hide. 這段旅程的疲憊感很難掩飾。
There was a quiet wearifulness in her reply. 她的回答裡帶著安靜的厭倦感。
The weariless runner kept going at dawn. 那位不知疲倦的跑者在黎明時仍繼續前進。
Her weariless effort saved the team. 她不知疲倦的努力救了整個團隊。
He worked wearilessly through the night. 他整夜不知疲倦地工作。
The waves beat wearilessly against the rocks. 海浪不斷地拍打著岩石。
She nodded wearily at the table. 她在桌邊疲倦地點了點頭。
He walked wearily toward the bus stop. 他疲倦地朝公車站走去。
Weariness set in after the long climb. 那段長時間爬坡後，倦意湧了上來。
The weariness in his face worried his family. 他臉上的疲倦讓家人很擔心。
Clothes used to be called wearing apparel. 衣服過去被稱為穿著服裝。
The report describes the result as wearing. 報告將結果描述為磨損。

meaning: 使人疲倦地；令人厭煩地
sentences: The speech went on wearingly for an hour. 那場演說令人厭煩地持續了一個小時。
The rain fell wearingly all week. 那場雨令人疲憊地連下了一整週。
The wearish child needed a better meal. 那個瘦弱的孩子需要更好的飲食。
His wearish face showed how hard the winter had been. 他那張憔悴的臉顯示出冬天有多難熬。
She smiled wearishly after the bad news. 她在壞消息後憔悴地笑了笑。
The dog moved wearishly across the yard. 那隻狗瘦弱地穿過院子。
The wearishness of the old man was hard to miss. 那位老人的憔悴模樣很難不被注意到。
Her wearishness came from weeks of poor sleep. 她的瘦弱樣子來自好幾週的睡眠不足。

meaning: 令人疲倦的；令人厭煩的
sentences: The wearisome wait tested everyone's patience. 這場令人厭煩的等待考驗了每個人的耐心。
The wearisome task never seemed to end. 那項令人疲憊的工作似乎永遠做不完。

meaning: 令人厭煩地；令人疲倦地
sentences: He wearisomely explained the rules again. 他令人厭煩地又解釋了一次規則。
The clock ticked wearisomely in the quiet room. 時鐘在安靜的房間裡令人疲倦地滴答作響。
The wearisomeness of the lecture made several students yawn. 那場演講的冗長乏味讓好幾個學生打呵欠。
She could not shake off the wearisomeness of the day. 她怎麼也擺脫不了那天的疲倦感。
This wearproof fabric is made for heavy use. 這種耐磨布料就是為了高強度使用而做的。
The shoes were wearproof enough for school life. 這雙鞋夠耐穿，適合上學穿。
He felt extremely weary after working long hours at the office all week. 在辦公室加班一整週後，他感到非常疲倦。
I am becoming weary of his constant complaining and negative attitude. 我對他不間斷的抱怨和消極態度感到厭煩了。

meaning: 使人疲倦的；使人厭煩的
sentences: The wearying heat made everyone slow down. 令人疲倦的炎熱讓每個人都慢了下來。
His wearying complaints filled the room. 他那些令人厭煩的抱怨充滿了整個房間。

meaning: 使人疲倦地；使人厭煩地
sentences: The child asked the same question wearyingly. 那個孩子令人厭煩地反覆問同一個問題。
The minutes passed wearyingly during the test. 考試時，時間一分一秒令人疲倦地過去。
The doctor checked the weasand carefully. 醫生仔細檢查了食道。
Something in his weasand made swallowing painful. 他喉嚨和食道裡像有東西，吞嚥時很痛。
The term weasel refers to a least weasel (Mustela nivalis). 黃鼠狼一詞是指最小的黃鼠狼（Mustela nivalis）。
The lesson introduced weasel as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了黃鼠狼這個術語，它是一個值得理解的有用術語。

meaning: 像鼬鼠的；狡猾而愛偷襲的
sentences: The weaselfish thief slipped through the alley. 那個像鼬鼠般狡猾的小偷溜進了巷子。
His weaselfish smile made her suspicious. 他那種狡猾的笑容讓她起了疑心。
The weasellike creature darted under the fence. 那隻像鼬鼠的動物竄過了籬笆下方。
He gave a weasellike answer and avoided the truth. 他給出一個狡黠的回答，避開了真相。
The weaselly reply annoyed the judge. 那個狡猾的答覆惹惱了法官。
She disliked his weaselly excuses. 她不喜歡他那種推託責任的藉口。
His weaselship ruined the trust in the group. 他那種狡猾作風破壞了團隊的信任。
The novel criticizes political weaselship. 那本小說批評了政治上的推諉作風。
The coat was lined with soft weaselskin. 那件大衣內襯是柔軟的鼬鼠皮。
The trader offered a strip of weaselskin. 那名商人拿出一條鼬鼠毛皮。

meaning: 鼬鼠的鼻嘴；像鼬鼠一樣尖長的鼻子
sentences: The drawing showed a sharp weaselsnout. 那幅畫畫出一個尖長的鼬鼠鼻嘴。
He joked that the dog had a weaselsnout. 他開玩笑說那隻狗有個像鼬鼠的鼻嘴。
He weaselwise avoided the direct question. 他狡猾地避開了直接問題。
The cat moved weaselwise through the grass. 那隻貓像鼬鼠一樣敏捷地穿過草地。
The old tale warns about a weaser in the woods. 舊故事警告森林裡有個狡猾的人。
No weaser could fool the village elder for long. 任何狡猾的人都騙不了村長太久。
He gave no weason for his sudden leave. 他對突然離開沒有給出理由。
The weason for the change was simple. 變動的原因很簡單。
The weather in London is famous for being unpredictable. 倫敦的天氣以難以預測而聞名。
What's the weather like in your city today? 今天你們城市的天氣怎麼樣？
The house was covered with old weatherboard. 那棟房子的外牆覆著舊式外牆板。
A weatherboard protected the porch from rain. 一塊隔風板保護了門廊不被雨淋。

meaning: 外牆板工程；鋪設外牆板
sentences: The weatherboarding gave the cottage a neat look. 外牆板工程讓那間小屋看起來很整齊。
They finished the weatherboarding before winter. 他們在冬天前完成了外牆板鋪設。
The trees formed a useful weatherbreak. 那些樹形成了一道有用的擋風帶。
We stopped in a weatherbreak before crossing the hill. 我們在一處避風地帶停下來，再穿越山丘。
The weathercock on the roof spun in the wind. 屋頂上的風向雞在風中轉動。
He was called a weathercock because he changed sides often. 因為他常常轉變立場，大家叫他風向雞。

meaning: 像風向雞的；反覆無常的
sentences: Her weathercockish opinions changed with every rumor. 她那種像風向雞般的看法會隨著每個傳聞而改變。
The weathercockish crowd followed the strongest voice. 那群反覆無常的人跟著最強勢的聲音走。
The essay criticized the politician's weathercockism. 那篇文章批評那位政治人物見風轉舵。
Weathercockism made the group hard to trust. 反覆無常讓這個團體很難被信任。

meaning: 反覆無常的；見風轉舵的
sentences: His weathercocky stance annoyed both sides. 他那種見風轉舵的立場讓雙方都不滿。
A weathercocky leader changes with every breeze. 反覆無常的領袖會隨著每一陣風改變。

meaning: 經風化的；受風雨侵蝕的
sentences: The weathered stone looked smooth and gray. 那塊經風化的石頭看起來平滑而灰白。
Her weathered hands showed years of work. 她那雙受風霜侵蝕的手顯示了多年的勞作。

meaning: 經受風雨者；使物體風化的人或事物
sentences: The weatherer left the metal on the roof for years. 風化者把那塊金屬放在屋頂上好幾年。
Every weatherer in the field changed the surface a little. 野外每一次風雨侵蝕都讓表面改變一點。
The weatherfish wriggled in the shallow water. 那條泥鰍在淺水裡扭動。
Some people keep a weatherfish in a jar as a pet. 有些人把泥鰍放在罐裡當寵物養。
The weatherglass fell before the storm. 暴風雨前，晴雨表的數值下降了。
He checked the weatherglass before going out. 他出門前先看了氣壓計。
A soft weathergleam appeared over the hills. 山丘上空出現柔和的天光。
The weathergleam on the water looked silver. 水面上的天際微光看起來像銀色。

meaning: 迎風處；暴露在風雨中的部位
sentences: The weatherhead of the cliff took the full wind. 那處懸崖的迎風面承受了全部風勢。
We sheltered under the rock to avoid the weatherhead. 我們躲在岩石下，避開最迎風的地方。

meaning: 頭腦反覆的；隨環境變動的
sentences: He was weatherheaded and changed his mind often. 他頭腦反覆，常常改變主意。
A weatherheaded crowd follows the loudest opinion. 一群隨風倒的人會跟著最大聲的意見走。
The weathering of the wall took decades. 那堵牆的風化花了幾十年。
Weathering slowly changed the shape of the rock. 風化慢慢改變了岩石的形狀。

meaning: 耐候性；經得起風雨的特性
sentences: The weatherliness of the coat made it ideal for travel. 那件外套的耐候性讓它很適合旅行。
Sailors valued the weatherliness of the ship. 船員很看重那艘船的耐風雨特性。

meaning: 適合某種天氣的；受天氣影響的
sentences: The weatherly path stayed muddy after the rain. 那條受天氣影響的小路在雨後仍然泥濘。
She liked the weatherly feel of the old coast town. 她喜歡那座老海岸小鎮帶著天氣感的氛圍。

meaning: 能左右局勢的人；像能造天氣的人
sentences: The mayor became a true weathermaker in the city. 那位市長成了城裡真正能左右局勢的人。
In the story, the king was treated like a weathermaker. 在故事裡，那位國王被看成像能造天氣的人。

meaning: 影響局勢的行為；造勢般的作為
sentences: His speech was a kind of weathermaking for the campaign. 他的演講替這場競選造勢。
The article described rumor and weathermaking in politics. 那篇文章描述了政治中的傳言與造勢。
The weatherman predicted rain for the weekend. 那位氣象主播預報週末會下雨。
Children watched the weatherman point to the map. 孩子們看著氣象主播指向地圖。

meaning: 最受天候侵蝕的；最暴露在風雨中的
sentences: The weathermost wall needed fresh paint every year. 那面最受風雨侵蝕的牆每年都要重新粉刷。
The weathermost side of the house faded first. 房子最暴露在風雨中的那一側最先褪色。

meaning: 氣象學；研究天氣的學問
sentences: She studied weatherology at the university. 她在大學裡學氣象學。
Weatherology helps people understand storms and seasons. 氣象學能幫助人們了解暴風雨與季節。
The jacket is weatherproof and light. 這件外套防風雨又輕便。
They built a weatherproof shelter for the tools. 他們蓋了一個耐候的工具棚。
The weatherproofed door kept the room dry. 那扇做過防風雨處理的門讓房間保持乾燥。
We bought a weatherproofed cover for the bike. 我們買了一個做過防風雨處理的腳踏車罩。
The weatherproofing saved the old roof. 那層防風雨處理保住了老屋頂。
They spent the weekend on weatherproofing the shed. 他們花了週末替小屋做防風雨處理。
The weatherproofness of the tent impressed everyone. 那頂帳篷的防風雨性讓大家印象深刻。
Engineers tested the weatherproofness of the seal. 工程師測試了密封處的耐候程度。

meaning: 迎著風雨的一側；向著風雨的方向
sentences: The boat drifted weatherward in the storm. 那艘船在風暴中漂向迎風的一側。
He moved weatherward to avoid the spray. 他朝迎風處移動，好避開飛濺的水霧。
The weatherworn sign was hard to read. 那塊被風雨侵蝕的招牌很難辨認。
We found a weatherworn bench beside the road. 我們在路邊找到一張風化的長椅。

meaning: 多變的；像天氣一樣陰晴不定的
sentences: His mood was weathery all afternoon. 他整個下午的情緒都陰晴不定。
The sky had a weathery look before sunset. 日落前天空呈現出多變的樣子。
The fiber is soft and weavable. 這種纖維柔軟而且可編織。
They chose a weavable material for the scarf. 他們替圍巾挑了一種可織成布的材料。
My grandmother is learning how to weave a traditional silk rug. 我祖母正在學習如何編織一張傳統的絲綢地毯。
The story is a fascinating weave of fact and historical fiction. 這個故事是事實與歷史虛構的迷人交織（編織）。
The cloth was weaveable even by hand. 這種布料就連手工也能編織。
She preferred a weaveable yarn for the project. 她為這個作品選了可織成布的紗線。
She weaved a basket from dried grass. 她用乾草編了一個籃子。
The artisan weaved the cloth by hand. 那位工匠用手工把布織了出來。
The rug showed careful weavement. 那張地毯顯出細緻的編織工藝。
The weavement of the shawl was almost invisible. 那條披肩的編織痕跡幾乎看不出來。

meaning: 會編織的人；尤其是以織布為生的人。

meaning: weave 的現在分詞和動名詞
sentences: The motorcycle is weaving in and out of traffic 摩托車在車陣中穿梭

meaning: 像網的；黏糊糊結成絲的
sentences: The old basement looked webby and dark. 那個老地下室看起來又像網又陰暗。

sentences: The essay took a Weberian view of bureaucracy. 那篇文章以韋伯式觀點看待官僚體系。

meaning: 網狀眼斑；蛛網般的眼部構造
sentences: The insect had a dark webeye near its head. 那隻昆蟲頭部附近有一個深色的網狀眼斑。

meaning: 頁尾內容；網頁底部區塊
sentences: The designer moved the logo into the webfooter. 設計師把標誌移到網頁底部區塊。

The new idea was welcomely received by the team. 這個新想法受到團隊熱情歡迎。
The welcomeness of the cafe drew many students. 那家咖啡館的親切感吸引了許多學生。
She felt the welcomeness of the small town right away. 她立刻感受到那座小鎮的友善氛圍。
A welcomer stood at the station with a sign. 一位接待者站在車站拿著牌子。
The welcomer showed us to the meeting room. 那位迎賓人員帶我們去會議室。

meaning: 熱情好客的；表示歡迎的
sentences: Their welcoming smiles made the guests relax. 他們熱情的笑容讓客人放鬆下來。
The welcoming sign was placed at the entrance. 那塊歡迎標誌被放在入口處。
She waved welcomingly from the doorway. 她站在門口熱情地揮手。
The host spoke welcomingly to every new guest. 主人對每位新來的客人都說得很熱情。
The mechanic needs to weld the two metal plates together. 技師需要將這兩塊金屬板焊接在一起。
A common cause can weld diverse groups into a single movement. 共同的目標可以將不同的群體結合成一個單一的運動。

meaning: 可焊性；容易焊接的特性
sentences: The alloy has high weldability and is easy to join. 這種合金可焊性高，很容易接合。
Engineers tested the weldability of the metal sheet. 工程師測試了那片金屬板的可焊性。
The new parts are weldable without extra treatment. 新零件不用額外處理就可焊接。
Only weldable pieces were sent to the workshop. 只有可焊接的零件被送進工坊。

meaning: 經理 ；一個實際的 佔用者 ；農民或中間人持有的土地佃戶。
sentences: The term welder refers to A manager; an actual occupant; a land-tenant holding under the farmer or middleman. 焊工一詞指的是 經理 ；一個實際的 佔用者 ；佃戶或中間人持有的土地中間人持有的土地。 焊工一詞指的是A經理；實際居住者；農民或中間人持有的土地佃戶。 焊工指的是經理；一個實際的佔用者；佃戶或中間人持有的土地中間人持有的土地。
The lesson introduced welder as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了焊工這個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了焊工這個易於理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了焊工這個易於理解的有用術語。
The welding took place in a noisy factory. 焊接工作是在一間吵雜的工廠裡進行的。
He learned welding from an experienced mechanic. 他跟一位有經驗的技師學焊接。
The frame was weldless and fitted together by bolts. 那個框架不用焊接，而是靠螺栓組裝。
They chose a weldless design to speed up repairs. 他們選擇無焊接設計來加快維修。
The weldment was checked for cracks. 那個焊件被檢查是否有裂縫。
A heavy weldment held the two plates together. 一個厚重的焊接構件把兩片板固定在一起。
The weldor wore a dark mask and thick gloves. 那位焊工戴著深色面罩和厚手套。
A skilled weldor repaired the broken gate. 一位熟練的焊工修好了那扇壞掉的大門。
The chronicle mentioned Welf in the royal line. 那部編年史在王族譜系中提到韋爾夫。
Historians traced the name Welf through old records. 歷史學家在舊紀錄中追溯韋爾夫這個名字。
The government is responsible for the welfare of its citizens, especially the vulnerable. 政府有責任照顧公民的福利，特別是弱勢群體。
The organization works to improve the health and welfare of children in developing countries. 該組織致力於改善發展中國家兒童的健康與福祉（福利）。
The village focused on the welfaring of children. 那個村莊把兒童的福祉放在首位。
Public schools support the welfaring of every student. 公立學校支持每位學生的福祉。

meaning: 韋爾夫的；與韋爾夫王朝有關的
sentences: The museum displayed a Welfic crest from the court. 博物館展出了一枚來自宮廷的韋爾夫徽章。
The book described the Welfic family line. 那本書描述了韋爾夫家族的血脈。
The flowers began to welk in the hot sun. 這些花在烈日下開始枯萎。
His mood seemed to welk after the bad news. 聽到壞消息後，他的心情似乎也凋謝了。
The birds circled high in the welkin. 鳥兒在蒼穹高處盤旋。
A bright moon hung in the welkin at night. 夜裡，一輪明月高掛天空。
The cliffs gave the valley a welkinlike feel. 那些懸崖讓山谷有一種高遠如天的感覺。
Her voice rose in a welkinlike song. 她的歌聲高揚得像天空一樣遼闊。
I hope you are doing well and enjoying your new job. 我希望你過得很好，並且喜歡你的新工作。
The business is running well under the new management. 業務在新管理層的領導下運作良好。
The wellat path led down to the farm spring. 那條井邊小路通向農場泉水處。
They set a wellat bench under the shade tree. 他們在樹蔭下放了一張井邊長凳。

meaning: 哎呀；唉；表示悲傷或惋惜
sentences: Wellaway, the rain ruined the market day. 唉，下雨毀了集市日。
Wellaway, we arrived after the train left. 哎呀，我們到的時候火車已經開走了。
The wellborn child received a careful education. 那個出身良好的孩子接受了細心教育。
She was wellborn but still lived simply. 她出身好，卻依然過著簡樸生活。
The mason repaired the stone wellcurb. 那位石匠修好了石製井緣。
A wooden wellcurb surrounded the old well. 一圈木製井口護欄圍著那口舊井。
They covered the wellhead to keep it clean. 他們把井口蓋起來，以保持乾淨。
The wellhead supplied water to the whole village. 那個井口為整個村莊提供了水。
The worker climbed down the wellhole carefully. 工人小心地爬下井筒。
A metal cover protected the wellhole from debris. 金屬蓋子保護井口下方不受碎屑掉入。

meaning: 湧出；上升；冒出來的動作
sentences: She felt a quiet welling of emotion. 她感到一陣安靜的情緒湧上來。
The water showed a slow welling from the ground. 水從地面慢慢湧出。

meaning: Wellington 的替代字母大小寫形式（靴子）。
sentences: The term wellington refers to alternative letter-case form of Wellington (the boot). Wellington 一詞是指 Wellington（靴子）的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced wellington as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了惠靈頓這個易於理解的有用術語。
The park planted a young Wellingtonia near the path. 公園在小路旁種了一棵年輕的巨杉。
A towering Wellingtonia shaded the picnic area. 一棵高聳的巨杉為野餐區遮出陰影。

meaning: 還算健康的；略微良好的
sentences: He looked wellish after a long rest. 經過長時間休息後，他看起來還算有精神。
The soup tasted wellish, though a little plain. 那碗湯味道還可以，只是有點清淡。
The wellmaker visited the farm at dawn. 那位鑿井者在清晨來到農場。
Each wellmaker in the village knew the local soil. 村裡每位打井的人都熟悉當地土壤。
The project focused on wellmaking in the desert. 那個計畫專注於沙漠中的鑿井工程。
Wellmaking took longer than the team expected. 打井工作比團隊預期花了更久。

meaning: 井工；與井相關的工作人員
sentences: The wellman checked the pump before sunrise. 那位井工在日出前檢查幫浦。
An experienced wellman could judge water depth quickly. 經驗豐富的井工能很快判斷水深。
We were wellnear ready when the guests arrived. 客人到的時候，我們幾乎已經準備好了。
The road was wellnear empty at midnight. 那條路在午夜時分幾乎空無一人。

meaning: 了解並參與可能帶來最佳健康的行為的過程。
sentences: She made a fortune as a wellness guru. 她作為健康專家賺了一大筆錢。
The term wellness refers to The process of learning about and engaging in behaviors that are likely to result in optimal health. 健康一詞是指學習和參與可能帶來最佳健康的行為的過程。
The old wellring was made of rough stone. 舊井圈是用粗石做成的。
They repaired the cracked wellring before summer. 他們在夏天前修好了破裂的井圈。

meaning: 與赫伯特．喬治．威爾斯或其風格有關的
sentences: The novel had a Wellsian sense of wonder. 那部小說帶有威爾斯式的奇想感。
His speech was full of Wellsian ideas about the future. 他的演說充滿威爾斯式的未來觀念。
The children sat at the wellside and talked. 孩子們坐在井邊聊天。
A small bench stood beside the wellside. 井旁放著一張小長凳。
The engineer visited the wellsite early in the morning. 工程師一早就去了井址。
A fence was built around the wellsite for safety. 為了安全，井址四周築起了圍欄。
Her kindness was a wellspring of comfort for the team. 她的善意是團隊安慰的源泉。
The old song treated memory as a wellspring of hope. 那首老歌把記憶視為希望的源頭。

meaning: 井邊宅地；帶有好井的住處
sentences: The family lived in a small wellstead by the hill. 那家人住在山邊一處小小的井邊宅地。
A sturdy fence surrounded the wellstead. 一道結實的圍籬包圍著那處宅地。

meaning: 井旁地帶；靠近井的狹長地段
sentences: A narrow wellstrand ran beside the spring. 泉邊有一條狹長的井旁地帶。
Grass grew thick along the wellstrand after the rain. 雨後，井旁地帶長滿了濃密的草。
He pulled on his muddy welly before going out. 他出門前穿上了沾泥的長靴。
The welly kept her feet dry in the flood. 那雙雨靴讓她在積水裡腳保持乾燥。
The chickens wandered into the wellyard at noon. 雞群在中午走進了井旁院落。
The wellyard was shaded by a big mango tree. 井院被一棵大芒果樹遮著陰。
The lake was known for its giant wels. 那座湖以巨大鯰魚聞名。
A fisherman lifted a wels from the net. 漁夫從網裡拉出一條大鯰魚。

meaning: 欺騙或欺騙某人，通常是不償還債務，尤其是賭債。
sentences: To welsh means to cheat or swindle someone, often by not paying a debt, especially a gambling debt. 威爾斯語的意思是欺騙或詐騙某人，通常是不償還債務，尤其是賭債。
People may welsh in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會遇到不同的情況。

meaning: 威爾士的；威爾士人；威爾士語
sentences: The Welsh flag flew above the school. 威爾士旗幟飄揚在學校上方。
She enjoyed the Welsh songs on the radio. 她很喜歡收音機裡的威爾士歌曲。
Nobody wanted to bet with a known welsher. 沒有人想跟一個出了名的賴帳者下注。
The gambler was called a welsher after the race. 賽後，那名賭徒被叫作賴帳的人。

meaning: 威爾士風俗；威爾士特性
sentences: The museum display highlighted local Welshery. 博物館展覽強調了當地的威爾士風俗。

meaning: 威爾士式用法；威爾士語特色
sentences: The editor marked the phrase as a Welshism. 編輯把那個片語標成威爾士式用法。
Her writing included a few clear Welshisms. 她的寫作裡包含幾個很明顯的威爾士語特色。

The map labeled Welshland in bright green. 地圖把威爾士標成鮮綠色。

meaning: 像威爾士的；帶有威爾士風格的
sentences: The cottage had a Welshlike roof and stone walls. 那間小屋有威爾士風格的屋頂和石牆。

An elderly Welshman told the children a story. 一位年長的威爾士男子給孩子們講了個故事。
The festival celebrated the Welshness of the town. 那場節慶展現了城鎮的威爾士特質。
She spoke about the Welshness of the old songs. 她談到那些老歌中的威爾士性。
The old poem praised the courage of the Welshry. 那首舊詩讚頌了威爾士人的勇氣。
He studied the customs of the local Welshry. 他研究當地威爾士群體的習俗。
A Welshwoman led the choir with confidence. 一位威爾士女子充滿自信地帶領合唱團。
The Welshwoman spoke gently to the visitors. 那位威爾士女子溫和地和訪客說話。

meaning: 有威爾士風的；像威爾士人的
sentences: The tartan scarf gave him a Welshy look. 那條格紋圍巾讓他看起來很有威爾士風。
Her Welshy humor made the room laugh. 她那種有點威爾士味的幽默讓全場都笑了。

meaning: 一種罕見的礦物名；舊式科學名稱
sentences: The catalog listed welsium among rare specimens. 目錄把這種礦物列為稀有標本之一。
A small label identified the stone as welsium. 一張小標籤把那塊石頭標示為這種礦物。
A red welt rose on his arm after the bite. 被叮咬後，他手臂上浮起一道紅腫痕。
The tailor traced a welt along the seam. 裁縫沿著縫線做出一道隆起線條。
The welted skin needed cold compresses. 那片有腫痕的皮膚需要冷敷。
The welted edge of the shoe looked neat. 那雙鞋隆起的包邊看起來很俐落。
The room fell into a welter of papers. 房間裡亂成一團，紙張四散。
He wrote about the welter of emotions after the news. 他寫下消息傳來後那一團混亂的情緒。

meaning: 次中量級拳擊手；次中量級
sentences: The welterweight won the final round by points. 那位次中量級拳手靠點數贏下最後一回合。
She trained hard to enter the welterweight class. 她努力訓練，想進入次中量級組別。

meaning: 包邊；做腫痕；壓出隆起邊
sentences: The shoemaker finished the welting by hand. 鞋匠親手完成了包邊工序。

The desert plant Welwitschia can live for centuries. 這種沙漠植物千歲蘭能活上數百年。
Botanists studied a rare Welwitschia in the greenhouse. 植物學家在溫室裡研究一株罕見的千歲蘭。
He let out a small wem after the pain. 他因疼痛發出一聲輕微的哼聲。
The child answered with a faint wem. 那孩子用微弱的聲音回應。
The child stayed wemless during the visit. 參觀時那個孩子一直安靜不出聲。
A wemless cat curled up by the stove. 一隻安靜不叫的貓蜷在爐邊。
A painful wen grew behind his ear. 他耳後長了一個疼痛的囊腫。
The doctor removed the wen in a short procedure. 醫生用短暫的手術切除了那個贅瘤。

meaning: 年輕女子；丫頭；舊式或帶貶義的說法
sentences: The old tale mentioned a brave wench. 那個古老故事提到一位勇敢的年輕女子。
In modern speech, wench can sound rude. 在現代用法裡，這個詞聽起來可能帶有無禮意味。

meaning: 好女色的人；追女人的人
sentences: The novel described him as a loud wencher. 那本小說把他寫成一個喧鬧的好色之徒。
Everyone in town knew the wencher's habits. 鎮上的每個人都知道那個追女人的人有什麼習慣。

meaning: 沒有女子的；缺少女人的
sentences: The camp felt wenchless after the festival ended. 節慶結束後，那個營地顯得少了女子氣息。
The story imagined a wenchless household by the sea. 那個故事想像了一個海邊沒有女子的家庭。

meaning: 像年輕女子的；女子氣的
sentences: Her wenchlike laugh filled the room. 她那帶點少女氣的笑聲充滿整個房間。
The portrait showed a wenchlike grace. 那幅肖像呈現出女子般的柔美。
The ship reached Wenchow after sunset. 船在日落後抵達溫州。
She studied the history of Wenchow at school. 她在學校裡研究溫州的歷史。
The Wenchowese dialect sounded unfamiliar to him. 他覺得溫州話很陌生。
A Wenchowese merchant visited the port. 一位溫州商人來到港口。

meaning: 文德人；古時對斯拉夫族群的稱呼
sentences: The history book mentioned the Wend people. 那本歷史書提到了文德人。
Archaeologists studied a Wend settlement near the river. 考古學家研究河邊的一處文德聚落。
We wend home before dark. 我們在天黑前返家。
The travelers wend slowly through the valley. 旅人們慢慢穿過山谷前行。

meaning: 轉折；轉向；古舊拼法中的詞形
sentences: The old song used wende as a forgotten word. 那首老歌把這個舊字當作被遺忘的詞形。
A small wende in the path led to the lake. 小路的一個轉折把人帶向湖邊。
Wendell signed the guest book at the entrance. 溫德爾在入口處的來賓簿上簽名。
The teacher called Wendell to the front of the class. 老師把溫德爾叫到教室前面。
Wendi answered the phone with a cheerful voice. 溫蒂用愉快的聲音接了電話。
The card was addressed to Wendi in blue ink. 那張卡片用藍色墨水寫著寄給溫蒂。

meaning: 文迪克的；與文迪克人或文迪克語有關的
sentences: The article described a Wendic settlement near the coast. 那篇文章描述了海岸附近的一處文迪克聚落。
She studied Wendic history in a language class. 她在語言課上研究文迪克歷史。

meaning: 文德的；與文德人或文德語有關的
sentences: The museum displayed Wendish embroidery and tools. 博物館展出了文德人的刺繡和工具。
He read a Wendish folktale before bed. 他睡前讀了一則文德民間故事。
Wendy arrived early for the meeting. 溫蒂提早到會議現場。
Everyone trusted Wendy to organize the trip. 大家都信任溫蒂來安排這次旅行。
The old poem said he would wene for home. 那首古詩說他會盼望回家。
She seemed to wene that the rain would stop soon. 她似乎盼著雨很快就會停。
The map marked Wenlock beside the river. 地圖在河邊標出了溫洛克。
A school trip passed through Wenlock in the morning. 校外教學的隊伍早上經過溫洛克。

meaning: 溫洛克期的；與溫洛克地層有關的
sentences: The fossil came from a Wenlockian layer. 那塊化石來自溫洛克期地層。
Geologists compared the Wenlockian rocks with nearby strata. 地質學家把溫洛克期岩層和附近地層做比較。
The mineral sample was labeled wennebergite. 那份礦物樣本標示為溫內貝格石。
A student held the wennebergite under bright light. 一名學生把溫內貝格石拿到亮光下觀察。

meaning: 文恩式的；像文恩人的；與文恩有關的
sentences: The old diary had a clear wennish style. 那本舊日記帶有明顯的文恩式風格。
Her family traced a wennish line in the town records. 她的家族在鎮上紀錄裡追溯到文恩一系。
The doctor checked the small wenny on his hand. 醫生檢查了他手上的小瘤。
She noticed a tiny wenny near the ankle. 她注意到腳踝附近有一顆小疣。
Wenonah signed the guest book at the front desk. 溫諾娜在前台簽了來賓簿。
The teacher called on Wenonah to read aloud. 老師請溫諾娜朗讀。
The exhibit introduced the Wenrohronon people. 展覽介紹了溫羅羅諾族。
A Wenrohronon story was preserved in oral tradition. 一則溫羅羅諾人的故事被保存在口述傳統中。

meaning: 一門課程；一條路，一條路；一段旅程。
sentences: The term went refers to a course; a way, a path; a journey. 「goed」一詞指的是一門課程；一條路，一條路；一次旅程。
The lesson introduced went as a useful term to understand. 所介紹的課程是一個值得理解的有用術語。
The shell collector found a broken wentletrap on the beach. 貝殼收藏家在海灘上找到一枚破損的梯螺。
A wentletrap's spiral shape caught her eye. 梯螺那種螺旋外形吸引了她的注意。
Wenzel helped carry the heavy boxes upstairs. 溫策爾幫忙把沉重的箱子搬上樓。
The letter was addressed to Wenzel. 那封信是寄給溫策爾的。

meaning: 哭泣；流淚；為 weep 的過去式與過去分詞
sentences: She wept quietly after hearing the news. 她聽到消息後默默流淚。
He wept for joy when the plane landed safely. 飛機平安降落時，他喜極而泣。
The old tale said every wer had a duty to the clan. 古老故事說每個男人都對氏族負有責任。
A wer in the poem guarded the gate through the night. 那首詩裡的一名男子整夜守著門口。
The map identified a Werchowinci village in the valley. 地圖標出了山谷中的魏爾霍溫齊村落。
A Werchowinci elder spoke at the heritage event. 一位魏爾霍溫齊長者在文化活動中發言。

meaning: 指示 be 的第二人稱單數簡單過去式。
sentences: John, you were the only person to see him. 約翰，你是唯一見到他的人。
To were means to second-person singular simple past indicative of be. To were 表示第二人稱單數過去式指示 be。
The legend warned of a werebear in the forest. 傳說警告森林裡有熊人。
The children imagined the werebear hiding behind the trees. 孩子們想像那個熊人躲在樹後。

meaning: 小牛怪；能變成小牛的怪物
sentences: The story mentioned a werecalf in the meadow. 故事提到草地上有一隻小牛怪。
No one wanted to meet the werecalf after dark. 沒有人想在天黑後遇見那隻小牛怪。

meaning: 變身族群；狼人等變形者的統稱
sentences: The novel described a hidden community of werefolk. 那本小說描寫了一個隱密的變身族群。
The villagers feared the werefolk living beyond the hills. 村民害怕住在山丘外的變身者。

meaning: 狐人；能變成狐狸的怪物
sentences: The comic featured a clever werefox with silver fur. 那本漫畫裡有一隻聰明的銀毛狐人。
The werefox slipped away before sunrise. 狐人在日出前悄悄溜走了。

meaning: 鬣狗人；能變成鬣狗的怪物
sentences: The film showed a werehyena stalking the camp. 電影裡有一隻鬣狗人在營地外徘徊。
Everyone blamed the werehyena for the missing goats. 大家都把山羊失蹤怪到那隻鬣狗人身上。

meaning: 豹人；能變成美洲豹的怪物
sentences: The myth spoke of a werejaguar guarding the temple. 神話提到有一隻豹人守著神廟。
A werejaguar appeared in the jungle at dusk. 傍晚時，一隻豹人出現在叢林中。

meaning: 豹變身者；能變成豹的怪物
sentences: The tale said a wereleopard could vanish in tall grass. 傳說說豹變身者能消失在高草之中。
The villagers left food outside for the wereleopard. 村民把食物放在外面留給那隻豹變身者。
His werent grin made the crowd nervous. 他那種狼人式的笑容讓群眾不安。
The artist painted the creature with a werent face. 那位畫家把那個生物畫成帶有狼人氣息的臉。

meaning: 虎人；能變成老虎的怪物
sentences: The story warned that a weretiger roamed the hills. 故事警告說山裡有一隻虎人出沒。
No hunter wanted to track the weretiger alone. 沒有獵人想獨自追蹤那隻虎人。

meaning: 轉變為或可以轉變為狼或類似狼的人的人，通常據說是在滿月期間這樣做的。
sentences: The term werewolf refers to a person who is transformed or can transform into a wolf or a wolflike human, often said to do so during a full moon. 狼人一詞指的是被轉變為或能夠轉變為狼或類狼人類的人，通常據說是在滿月期間這樣做。
The lesson introduced werewolf as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了狼人這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 像狼人的；兇狠而野獸般的
sentences: His werewolfish stare frightened the children. 他那種狼人般的眼神嚇壞了孩子們。
The actor gave the role a werewolfish intensity. 那位演員把角色演得充滿狼人的狠勁。

meaning: 狼人化；變成狼人的狀態
sentences: The old story treated werewolfism as a curse. 舊故事把狼人化看成一種詛咒。
The doctor in the novel searched for a cure for werewolfism. 那本小說裡的醫生在尋找治療狼人化的方法。
The fishing boat waited at the werf until morning. 漁船在碼頭一直等到早上。
Workers repaired the old werf after the storm. 風暴過後，工人修理了舊船塢。
The saga mentions a wergil paid to settle the feud. 那部傳說提到用賠償金平息了仇怨。
He read about wergil in a history text. 他在一本歷史課本裡讀到人命金這個概念。
The knight would weri the gate through the night. 那位騎士會整夜守衛城門。
Old songs praise those who weri the home. 古老歌謠讚頌那些守護家園的人。
Werner checked the map before leaving. 韋爾納出發前先看了地圖。
The package was addressed to Werner. 那個包裹是寄給韋爾納的。

meaning: 韋爾納式的；與韋爾納有關的
sentences: The lecture explained the Wernerian view of minerals. 那場講座解釋了韋爾納式的礦物觀點。
She compared the Wernerian theory with modern geology. 她把韋爾納理論和現代地質學做比較。

meaning: 韋爾納學說；韋爾納的理論體系
sentences: The book introduced Wernerism as an old mineral theory. 那本書把韋爾納學說介紹為一種舊礦物理論。
Students discussed Wernerism in the geology club. 學生們在地質社討論韋爾納學說。
The museum label identified the crystal as wernerite. 博物館標籤把那顆水晶辨認為韋爾納石。
A geologist held the wernerite up to the light. 一位地質學家把韋爾納石舉到光下。
The werowance welcomed the travelers to the village. 那位酋長歡迎旅人進村。
The story praised the werowance for wise leadership. 故事讚揚那位首領有智慧的領導。

meaning: 是；為；古字，意為第二人稱單數的 was/were
sentences: If thou wert ready, we could begin. 如果你準備好了，我們就可以開始。
He wrote, 'Thou wert kind to me.' 他寫道：「你待我很仁慈。」

meaning: 維特；歌德小說中的人物名
sentences: Werther is the tragic hero of the novel. 維特是那部小說中的悲劇男主角。
She studied the character of Werther in class. 她在課堂上研究維特這個角色。

meaning: 維特式的；充滿感傷與憂鬱的
sentences: The poem had a Wertherian mood of despair. 那首詩有種維特式的絕望氣氛。
He described the novel as deeply Wertherian. 他說那本小說充滿維特式的感傷。

meaning: 維特式情感；過度感傷的傾向
sentences: The critic mocked the play's Wertherism. 那位評論家嘲諷這齣戲的維特式感傷。
The essay examined Wertherism in romantic literature. 那篇文章探討了浪漫文學中的維特式傾向。
A quick wervel sent the toy spinning. 一次快速旋轉讓玩具轉了起來。
The poet used wervel to describe the dance. 那位詩人用這個古字來描寫舞步的轉動。
Wes opened the door for the guests. 韋斯替客人開了門。
The coach asked Wes to take the lead. 教練要韋斯帶頭。
The path crossed a cold wese at dawn. 那條小路在清晨穿過一片寒冷沼地。
Birds nested quietly in the edge of the wese. 鳥兒安靜地在沼地邊緣築巢。
He wore a gray weskit with his suit. 他穿著一件灰色背心搭配西裝。
The tailor adjusted the weskit at the waist. 裁縫把那件馬甲的腰身改了一下。

meaning: 衛斯理宗的；與衛斯理有關的
sentences: The chapel followed a Wesleyan tradition. 那座禮拜堂遵循衛斯理宗傳統。
Her family kept a Wesleyan style of worship. 她的家人保持衛斯理宗式的禮拜方式。
The lecture traced the growth of Wesleyanism. 那場講座追溯了衛斯理宗的發展。
He learned about Wesleyanism in church history. 他在教會歷史課上學到衛斯理主義。

meaning: 衛斯理精神；衛斯理的宗教理念
sentences: The essay described Wesleyism as practical faith. 那篇文章把衛斯理精神描述成務實的信仰。
The pastor spoke about Wesleyism and service. 牧師談到衛斯理理念與服事。

meaning: 威塞爾頓；一種鑽石色級名稱
sentences: The jeweler called the stone a wesselton. 珠寶商把那顆石頭稱作威塞爾頓級。
She compared the wesselton diamond with a brighter one. 她把威塞爾頓級鑽石和更亮的一顆做比較。

meaning: 威塞克斯人；來自威塞克斯的人
sentences: The novelist wrote a proud Wessexman into the story. 那位小說家在故事裡寫進一個自豪的威塞克斯人。
A Wessexman guarded the old village road. 一位威塞克斯人守著那條舊村路。
The sun rises in the east and sets in the west. 太陽從東方升起，從西方落下。
Taichung is located in the western part of Taiwan. 台中位於台灣的中部偏西地區。
They followed the westaway until sunset. 他們沿著向西的路走到日落。
The map showed a westaway through the hills. 地圖上畫出一條穿過山丘的西行道路。
He was driving westbound on the George Washington Bridge. 他當時正在喬治華盛頓大橋上向西行駛。
The team responded westbound to the change. 團隊向西行響應這項變更。
The old sailor looked toward the weste. 那位老水手朝西邊望去。
The trail bent to the weste after the creek. 小徑在小溪後轉向西邊。

meaning: to move or turn toward the west
sentences: The road begins to wester after the bridge. 過橋後，道路開始向西轉去。
By evening, the clouds seemed to wester across the sky. 到了傍晚，雲似乎向西橫過天空。
We watched the westering sun sink behind the hills. 我們看著西斜的太陽沉到山後。
A westering wind pushed the rain toward the coast. 一陣西向的風把雨推向海岸。

meaning: the quality of being toward the west or from the west
sentences: The westerliness of the route made the trip longer. 這條路線偏西，讓旅程更長。
She noted the westerliness in the storm's movement. 她注意到暴風向西移動的特徵。
a westerly course or voyage 西風航線或航程
The report describes the result as westerly. 報告將結果描述為西風。
They camped on the westermost ridge of the range. 他們在山脈最西邊的山脊上紮營。
The westermost village was the first to see dawn. 最西邊的村莊最先看見曙光。
The city is a fascinating blend of eastern and western cultures. 這座城市是東西方文化的迷人融合。
Many western countries have high standards of living and health. 許多西方國家擁有高水準的生活與健康。
The westerner was curious about the local market. 那位來自西方的人對當地市場很好奇。
As a westerner, she noticed different customs right away. 身為西方人，她立刻注意到不同的習俗。

meaning: western customs, ideas, or ways of life
sentences: The essay discussed westernism in modern cities. 這篇文章討論現代城市中的西方風尚。
He admired the westernism of the old film set. 他很欣賞那座舊片場的西方風格。

meaning: the process of becoming more western in style or culture
sentences: The town changed quickly during westernization. 那座城鎮在西化過程中變化很快。
Historians debate the costs of westernization. 歷史學家爭論西化帶來的代價。

meaning: to make or become more western in style or culture
sentences: The company tried to westernize its advertising. 那家公司試著把廣告做得更西化。
Some traditions changed when the school began to westernize. 學校開始西化後，有些傳統也跟著改變。

meaning: in a western direction or manner
sentences: The hikers moved westernly along the valley floor. 健行者沿著谷底向西前進。
The road bends westernly before it reaches the river. 那條路在抵達河邊前先向西彎去。
The westernmost island lies beyond the harbor mouth. 最西邊的島嶼位在港口外海。
They marked the westernmost point on the map. 他們在地圖上標出了最西端。
The convoy rolled westerwards at dawn. 車隊在黎明時向西行駛。
She turned westerwards when the trail split. 小徑分岔時，她轉向西邊。

meaning: a person or thing associated with Westphalia
sentences: The guide listed him as a Westfalite from the old region. 指南把他列為來自舊地區的威斯特法利亞人。
A Westfalite custom appeared in the village festival. 村裡的節慶出現了一項威斯特法利亞習俗。

meaning: the act or process of going west
sentences: The ship made good westing during the night. 那艘船在夜裡向西推進得很順。
Navigation logs recorded each mile of westing. 航海紀錄記下每一英里的西行進度。
The novel opens in a cold westland by the sea. 這部小說從一片靠海的寒冷西部土地開始。
They crossed the westland on horseback. 他們騎馬穿越那片西部土地。

meaning: a person from a western land or region
sentences: The Westlander spoke with a slow, calm accent. 那位西部地區的人說話帶著緩慢沉穩的口音。
As a Westlander, he knew the mountain passes well. 身為西部人，他很熟悉那些山口。

meaning: by way of the westland; toward the west
sentences: The traders traveled westlandways after harvest. 商人們在收成後沿著西部路線旅行。
We went westlandways to avoid the flooded bridge. 我們改走西邊的路線，以避開淹水的橋。
The westmost house faced the open fields. 最西邊的房子朝向開闊田野。
They waited at the westmost gate for the bus. 他們在最西邊的門口等公車。

meaning: the state or quality of being westward or western
sentences: The poet wrote about the westness of the horizon. 那位詩人寫到地平線的西向感。
The map gave the town a stronger sense of westness. 這張地圖讓城鎮更有一種向西的感覺。

meaning: relating to Westphalia or its people
sentences: The recipe came from a Westphalian village. 這道食譜來自威斯特法利亞的一個村莊。
They studied Westphalian folk songs in class. 他們在課堂上研究威斯特法利亞民歌。
The Westralian coast was bright in the afternoon sun. 西澳海岸在午後陽光下顯得格外明亮。
She collected Westralian postcards from her trip. 她收集了旅途中買到的西澳明信片。

meaning: a strong sense of identity with Western Australia
sentences: The speech reflected Westralianism in politics and culture. 這場演說反映了西澳在政治與文化上的認同感。
Westralianism shaped the way the museum told its story. 西澳認同感塑造了博物館敘事的方式。
ride westward. 向西騎行。
If someone acts westward, they do so in a way that is toward the west. 如果有人向西行事，他就會以向西的方式行事。

meaning: toward the west; in a westward direction
sentences: The river bends westwardly near the old bridge. 河流在舊橋附近向西彎去。
They marched westwardly until sunset. 他們一路向西行進，直到日落。
The westwardmost cabin sat alone on the hill. 最偏西的木屋獨自坐落在山坡上。
He pointed to the westwardmost marker on the trail. 他指著步道上最西邊的標記。
The caravan moved westwards across the plain. 商隊向西穿越平原。
We drifted westwards as the current picked up. 水流加強後，我們也向西漂去。
A westy breeze touched the orchard in the afternoon. 午後，一陣偏西的微風吹過果園。
The sailor noticed a westy shift in the clouds. 船員注意到雲層有向西偏移的跡象。
The grass was wet with morning dew. 草地上沾滿了晨露。
Don't sit on that bench; the paint is still wet. 別坐在那張長椅上，油漆還沒乾。

meaning: a large wingless insect native to New Zealand
sentences: A weta crawled across the tree trunk at night. 夜裡，一隻維塔蟲爬過樹幹。
The children watched the weta from a safe distance. 孩子們遠遠地觀察那隻維塔蟲。

meaning: a derogatory term for a migrant who crossed a river into the United States
sentences: The old word wetback is now considered offensive. 這個舊詞如今被視為冒犯性的說法。
Writers usually avoid the term wetback in careful speech. 寫作者在正式表達時通常避免使用這個詞。

meaning: a bird that lives in wet places or appears soaked
sentences: The wetbird shook water from its feathers. 那隻濕鳥抖落羽毛上的水。
A wetbird stood quietly at the edge of the marsh. 一隻喜濕的鳥安靜地站在沼澤邊。
His wetched coat clung to his shoulders. 他那件濕透的外套緊貼著肩膀。
After the storm, the path looked wetched and muddy. 暴風雨過後，小路看起來又濕又泥濘。

meaning: a damp spot or a small wet mark
sentences: A wetchet formed on the table after the glass tipped. 杯子傾倒後，桌上留下了一小塊濕痕。
She wiped away the wetchet with a paper towel. 她用紙巾把那塊濕痕擦掉。
The wether grazed quietly beside the flock. 那隻閹羊安靜地在羊群旁吃草。
Farmers often keep a wether for its calm nature. 農夫常因閹羊性情溫和而飼養它。
The wetherhog was raised for meat on the farm. 那隻閹豬在農場裡被養來供肉用。
A wetherhog is calmer than an uncastrated boar. 閹豬通常比未閹公豬溫馴。
The wetherteg followed the older sheep across the field. 那隻年輕閹羊跟著年長的羊穿過田地。
The shepherd counted every wetherteg before dusk. 牧羊人在黃昏前清點每一隻年輕閹羊。
The dog shook wetly beside the door. 狗在門邊濕淋淋地甩身體。
The paint glistened wetly in the light. 油漆在燈光下濕亮地閃著。
The wetness of the clothes made the bag heavy. 衣服的濕氣讓袋子變得很重。
She felt the wetness of the grass through her shoes. 她透過鞋子感受到草地的濕意。

meaning: the ease with which a surface can be wetted
sentences: The lab tested the wettability of the new fabric. 實驗室測試這種新布料的潤濕性。
High wettability helps water spread across the surface. 高潤濕性有助於水在表面鋪開。
The wettable coating helped the liquid spread fast. 這種可潤濕塗層讓液體擴散得很快。
Not every plastic surface is wettable. 不是每一種塑膠表面都容易被潤濕。
Rain wetted the pavement before sunrise. 日出前，雨水把路面打濕了。
She wetted the cloth before cleaning the glass. 她先把布沾濕，再去擦玻璃。

meaning: something or someone that makes wet
sentences: The sponge acted as a wetter for the paint. 那塊海綿成了油漆的沾濕工具。
The sprinkler worked as a reliable wetter for the lawn. 灑水器是草坪穩定的灑濕工具。

meaning: the act of making something wet
sentences: The wetting of the soil helped the seeds sprout. 土壤被潤濕後，種子更容易發芽。
Careful wetting keeps the cloth from tearing. 小心潤濕可以避免布料撕裂。
The floor felt wettish after the spill. 地板在灑水後摸起來微微潮濕。
Her shoes were still wettish from the grass. 她的鞋子因為草地而還有點濕。

meaning: a city in Alabama, United States
sentences: Wetumpka is a small city near the river. 維坦帕卡是河邊的一座小城市。
They drove through Wetumpka on the way home. 他們回家途中經過了維坦帕卡。

meaning: to weave; to move in a weaving way
sentences: The path seemed to weve between the trees. 小徑看起來在樹間蜿蜒穿過。
She could weve a basket from thin grass. 她能用細草編出一個籃子。

meaning: a small woven piece or strip
sentences: The wevet was tied around the bundle. 那條編織帶綁在包裹外面。
She cut a wevet from the old mat. 她從舊墊子上剪下一條編織帶。

meaning: a member of the Wewenoc people
sentences: The museum exhibit mentioned a Wewenoc leader. 博物館展覽提到一位威溫諾克領袖。
A Wewenoc story was preserved in the archive. 檔案館裡保存著一則威溫諾克故事。

meaning: an old unit of weight or measure
sentences: The merchant measured grain by the wey. 商人用古老的重量單位來量穀物。
A wey was once common in old trade records. 這種古老單位曾常見於舊商業紀錄。

meaning: a bright star in the constellation Canis Major
sentences: Wezen shines low in the southern sky. 威זן星低低地照亮南方天空。
Astronomers studied Wezen through the telescope. 天文學家透過望遠鏡觀察威זן星。
The old chart used the spelling Wezn. 舊星圖使用威茲恩這個拼法。
Wezn refers to the same bright star as Wezen. 威茲恩指的就是同一顆亮星。

meaning: an exclamation of surprise or confusion
sentences: Wha, did you hear that sound? 啊，你聽到那個聲音了嗎？
He stared at the door and said, Wha! 他盯著門，驚訝地喊出一聲：啊！
His knees felt whabby after the long climb. 長時間攀爬後，他的膝蓋感覺發軟。
The old chair had whabby legs and sank a little. 那張舊椅子的椅腳鬆軟，還微微下沉。

meaning: 一次嘗試，一次機會，一次轉身，一次嘗試，最初是試圖擊敗某人或某事。
sentences: C'mon. Take a whack at it. 來吧。猛擊一下它。
40 bucks a whack. 40塊錢一拳。
He swung the whacker at the weeds. 他揮起重擊工具清理雜草。
The old car was a real whacker to drive. 那輛舊車開起來特別難對付。
It was a whacking storm. 那是一場猛烈的大風暴。
She gave the table a whacking shove. 她狠狠推了桌子一把。
His whacky idea made everyone laugh. 他的古怪想法讓大家都笑了。
The movie had a whacky sense of humor. 那部電影有種古怪的幽默感。
Whafabout going home now? 我們現在回家怎麼樣？
Whafabout the plan we discussed yesterday? 我們昨天討論的計畫怎麼樣呢？
The blue whale is the largest animal that has ever lived on Earth. 藍鯨是地球上曾存在過的最大動物。
We went on a boat trip to see the magnificent whales in the ocean. 我們乘船去觀賞大海中壯觀的鯨魚。

meaning: 鯨背形的隆起；鯨背似的山脊
sentences: A whaleback rose above the snow. 雪地上隆起一道鯨背似的山脊。
The roof had a smooth whaleback curve. 屋頂有一道平滑的鯨背弧線。

meaning: 鯨背式船的船員；鯨背式船
sentences: The whalebacker watched the harbor lights. 鯨背式船的船員望著港口燈火。
A whalebacker is rare in modern shipping. 現代航運中幾乎看不到鯨背式船。
The whalebird circled over the cold sea. 那隻鯨鳥在寒海上空盤旋。
Its beak looked long enough for a whalebird. 它的喙長得像一隻鯨鳥。
The whaleboat pushed through the waves. 那艘捕鯨小艇穿過海浪。
Each whaleboat carried strong oars and harpoons. 每艘捕鯨小艇都帶著結實的槳和魚叉。
The dress was stiffened with whalebone. 那件洋裝裡襯著鯨骨。
Old tools were once made from whalebone. 以前有些工具是用鯨骨做的。
The whaleboned corset was hard to bend. 那件用鯨骨撐硬的束身衣很難彎曲。
She wore a whaleboned jacket for the costume. 她為了戲服穿上一件硬挺的外套。

meaning: 鯨魚世界；鯨群棲息的範圍
sentences: The explorer wrote about the mystery of whaledom. 那位探險家寫下鯨魚世界的神秘。
Ice made the whaledom hard to reach. 冰層讓鯨魚棲地很難抵達。
The carved whalehead hung above the door. 門上方掛著一個雕刻成鯨頭的裝飾。
He joked that his backpack made him look like a whalehead. 他開玩笑說背包讓他看起來像個大頭。
The cloud had a whalelike shape. 那朵雲呈現鯨魚般的輪廓。
Its body moved in a whalelike roll. 它的身體以鯨般的起伏方式移動。
The whaleman told stories of storms at sea. 那位捕鯨人講起海上風暴的故事。
A whaleman needed patience and courage. 捕鯨人需要耐心和勇氣。
The whaler returned with a full hold. 那艘捕鯨船滿載而歸。
A whaler once used smoke to keep warm. 以前捕鯨船員會用煙火取暖。
The chart marked an old whaleroad. 海圖上標出一條舊捕鯨航路。
Seals followed the whaleroad across the bay. 海豹沿著那條捕鯨航路穿過海灣。

meaning: 捕鯨場；處理鯨魚的地方
sentences: The whalery smelled of salt and oil. 那座鯨場充滿鹽味和油味。
Workers sorted the blubber at the whalery. 工人在鯨場分揀鯨脂。
The whaleship left the port at dawn. 那艘捕鯨船在清晨離港。
Life aboard a whaleship was harsh. 捕鯨船上的生活很艱苦。
Whaling once drove many coastal towns. 過去捕鯨曾經帶動許多海岸城鎮。
The museum explained the history of whaling. 博物館解釋了捕鯨的歷史。
The fish had a whalish shape. 那條魚有點像鯨魚的形狀。
A whalish shadow passed under the boat. 一道像鯨魚的影子從船下掠過。
The hill had a whally curve in the fog. 那座山在霧裡有種鯨背般的弧度。
A whally figure moved below the surface. 水面下有個像鯨魚般的龐大影子在移動。
The wave seemed to whalm the small boat. 那股海浪幾乎把小船吞沒。
Do not whalm the box against the wall. 不要把箱子猛撞到牆上。
He tried to whalp the nail into the board. 他試著把釘子猛敲進木板。
The stick can whalp the drum with a sharp sound. 那根棍子能敲出清脆的聲音。
The cloud line was long and whaly. 雲線又長又像鯨魚。
A whaly figure moved below the surface. 水面下有個像鯨魚般的龐大影子在移動。
The ball whammed into the fence. 球重重撞上圍欄。
He whammed the door shut. 他砰地把門關上。
The old dog began to whamble across the yard. 那隻老狗開始笨拙地穿過院子。
She whambled down the stairs after the fall. 她摔倒後笨拙地走下樓梯。
A sudden whame startled the crowd. 突然的一下重擊嚇到了人群。
The storm gave the roof a hard whame. 暴風雨重重打在屋頂上。
The news seemed to whammle him at once. 這個消息一下子把他弄得六神無主。
Too many choices can whammle a child. 太多選擇會讓孩子手足無措。
One whamp on the table stopped the noise. 在桌子上重重一拍，聲音就停了。
The box fell with a heavy whamp. 盒子砰的一聲掉了下來。
He was the whampee in the rough game. 在那場粗暴遊戲裡他成了挨打的人。
The cartoon turned the whampee into a joke. 漫畫把挨打者畫成了笑料。
The cart began to whample over the stones. 車子開始在石頭路上顛簸搖晃。
She could whample through the crowd with ease. 她能輕鬆地擠著人群搖擺前進。
Whan did you last see him? 你最後一次見到他是什麼時候？
In old songs, whan means when. 在舊歌裡，這個詞就是表示「何時」的字。
He lifted the cup with his whand. 他用手端起杯子。
The old text wrote whand instead of hand. 那份舊文把這個字寫成了古拼法。
There was a whang when the gate shut. 大門關上時發出一聲巨響。
The metal lid hit the floor with a whang. 金屬蓋掉到地上砰地一響。
The drumhead is whangable with a soft stick. 這面鼓皮用軟鼓棒也能敲響。
A whangable bell should ring clearly. 一只容易敲響的鈴應該聲音清楚。
One whangam shook the whole shed. 一聲重擊震動了整個棚屋。
He heard a whangam from the back room. 他從後房聽見一聲巨響。
The child talked about a whangdoodle in the attic. 那孩子說閣樓裡有個怪東西。
His story turned into pure whangdoodle. 他的故事最後變成了胡言亂語。

meaning: 竹製傘柄；竹子做的手杖
sentences: The cane had a smooth whangee handle. 那根手杖有一個光滑的竹製握把。
A whangee umbrella is light and strong. 竹柄雨傘輕巧又結實。

meaning: 竹製傘柄；竹子做的手杖
sentences: The museum labeled the handle as whanghee. 博物館把那個把手標為竹製材料。
Old shops sold whanghee sticks to travelers. 舊時商店會把竹手杖賣給旅人。
He whanked the box onto the bench. 他把箱子重重放到長凳上。
The hammer can whank against the nail. 鐵鎚可以重重敲向釘子。
She whapped the mat against the rail. 她把墊子用力拍在欄杆上。
The branch whapped the window in the wind. 樹枝在風中啪地打到窗戶。
The little whappet ran in circles. 那隻小獵犬繞著圈跑。
He called the puppy a whappet with affection. 他親暱地叫那隻小狗小傢伙。
They grilled a whapuka for dinner. 他們把一條瓦普卡魚烤來當晚餐。
The diver spotted a whapuka near the reef. 潛水員在礁石附近看到一條瓦普卡魚。

meaning: 瓦普卡魚；同一魚名的另一拼法
sentences: The guide used the name whapukee for the same fish. 嚮導用這個魚名來稱呼同一種魚。
Fishermen caught a whapukee near the coast. 漁夫在海岸附近捕到一條瓦普卡魚。
A whapuku lay on the market stall. 市場攤位上擺著一條瓦普卡魚。
The whapuku is prized for its firm flesh. 瓦普卡魚因肉質結實而受歡迎。
Whar are you going now? 你現在要去哪裡？
In dialect, whar means where. 在方言裡，這個字就是表示「哪裡」的字。
The family slept in a small whare. 那一家人睡在一間小木屋裡。
The old whare stood near the river. 那間老木屋矗立在河邊。

meaning: 住在小屋的人；小屋主人
sentences: The whareer welcomed the travelers inside. 那位住屋者把旅人迎進屋內。
A lone whareer kept the fire burning. 一位獨居者把火一直燒著。
The cargo ship was moored at the wharf, and workers started to unload it. 貨船停靠在碼頭，工人們開始卸貨。
We enjoyed a pleasant walk along the busy wharf and watched the boats. 我們在繁忙的碼頭邊愉快地散步並看船。

meaning: 碼頭費；靠泊碼頭的費用
sentences: The port charged high wharfage. 港口收取很高的碼頭費。
We paid for wharfage before unloading. 我們在卸貨前先付了碼頭費。
The boat nudged the wharfhead gently. 船輕輕碰到碼頭盡頭。
Children waited at the wharfhead for the ferry. 孩子們在碼頭盡頭等渡船。

meaning: a person who owns or holds a wharf
sentences: The wharfholder collected rent from the fishing boats. 碼頭持有人向漁船收取租金。
The new wharfholder repaired the broken dock gate. 新任碼頭持有人修好了損壞的碼頭門。

meaning: the act of docking, loading, or unloading at a wharf
sentences: Wharfing began before sunrise at the busy port. 繁忙的港口在日出前就開始裝卸作業。
The crew finished the wharfing before the tide turned. 船員在潮水轉向前完成了碼頭裝卸。

meaning: a keeper or operator of a wharf
sentences: The wharfinger checked every crate before release. 碼頭管理員在放行前檢查每個木箱。
A good wharfinger keeps the dock safe and orderly. 優秀的碼頭管理員會讓碼頭安全又有秩序。

meaning: land beside a wharf or dock
sentences: The hotel was built on wharfland near the river. 這家飯店蓋在河邊的碼頭地上。
Old warehouses still stand on the wharfland today. 舊倉庫至今仍矗立在那片碼頭地上。
The wharfless cove made unloading difficult. 那個沒有碼頭的海灣讓卸貨變得困難。
They launched the boat from a wharfless beach. 他們從沒有碼頭的海灘把船推下水。
The wharfman guided the truck to the correct bay. 碼頭工人把卡車引到正確的卸貨區。
Each wharfman wore gloves and a bright vest. 每位碼頭工人都戴著手套，穿著亮色背心。

meaning: the person in charge of a wharf
sentences: The wharfmaster assigned berths to the arriving ships. 碼頭主管為抵達的船隻分配停靠位置。
Ask the wharfmaster if the cargo is ready. 如果貨物備妥，就去問碼頭主管。

meaning: a small landing stage or minor wharf
sentences: A narrow wharfrae led out into the creek. 一條狹窄的小碼頭延伸到小溪裡。
Fishermen tied their boats to the old wharfrae. 漁夫把船拴在那座舊小碼頭上。
The crates were stacked along the wharfside. 木箱沿著碼頭邊堆放。
He waited at the wharfside for the ferry. 他在碼頭邊等渡船。
The scarf began to wharl in the strong wind. 圍巾在強風中開始打旋。
Leaves wharl across the road after a storm. 暴風雨後，樹葉在路上飛旋。

meaning: to bend, twist, or turn sharply
sentences: The old board began to wharp in the heat. 那塊舊木板在高溫下開始彎曲。
Do not wharp the wire too hard. 不要把鐵絲扭得太用力。

meaning: rough, hurried, or noisy in movement
sentences: The wharry cart rattled over the stones. 那輛顛簸的車在石頭上發出喀啦聲。
His wharry steps echoed down the corridor. 他那種匆忙的腳步聲在走廊裡迴盪。
The boat scraped a whart of rock near the shore. 船在岸邊擦過一處突出的岩角。
The path curved around a sharp whart in the hill. 小路繞過山坡上一個尖突的邊角。
The cargo was carried to the wharve at dawn. 貨物在黎明時被搬到碼頭。
A small wharve sheltered the boats from waves. 一座小碼頭替船隻擋住了海浪。

meaning: to hiss, breathe, or move with a soft rushing sound
sentences: Steam seemed to whase out of the pipe. 蒸氣彷彿從管子裡輕輕嘶出來。
The kettle began to whase before it boiled. 水壺在沸騰前先發出嘶嘶聲。

meaning: to whistle, hiss, or make a thin rushing sound
sentences: The wind seemed to whasle through the crack. 風似乎從裂縫中呼呼作響。
He could whasle softly to call the dog. 他能輕聲吹哨叫狗過來。
What is your favorite subject at school? Mine is science. 你在學校最喜歡的科目是什麼？我的是科學。
What time does the next train to Taipei leave? 下一班去台北的火車幾點開？

meaning: an old exclamation meaning what a thing or event
sentences: Whata, what a storm that was! 哎呀，那真是一場大風暴！
He laughed and cried, Whata day this has been! 他又笑又喊：這真是充滿戲劇性的一天！

meaning: the circumstances or details of something
sentences: Tell me the whatabouts of the accident. 告訴我事故的經過細節。
They discussed the whatabouts of the new plan. 他們討論了新計畫的各種細節。
You can choose whatever you like from the menu; it's on me. 你可以從菜單上隨便點妳喜歡的，我請客。
Whatever happens, I will always be there to support you. 無論發生什麼事，我都會一直在妳身邊支持妳。

meaning: of what kind; what sort of
sentences: Whatkin machine did they buy for the workshop? 他們為工坊買了哪一種機器？
She asked whatkin cloth would last the longest. 她問哪一種布料最耐用。
Whatlike answer do you expect from me? 你希望我給出什麼樣的回答？
The child asked whatlike bird had flown overhead. 孩子問飛過頭頂的是什麼樣的鳥。
Whatna do you mean by that old word? 你說的那個老詞是什麼意思？
The note asked whatna house they lived in. 筆記上寫著他們住在哪一種房子裡。

meaning: the essential nature of a thing
sentences: Philosophers argued over the whatness of truth. 哲學家爭論真理的本質是什麼。
The essay tries to explain the whatness of art. 這篇文章試著說明藝術的本質。

meaning: 其他相關的物體或想法。
sentences: At the lexicography club, we welcome all discussion of words and whatnot. 在字典編纂俱樂部，我們歡迎所有關於單字之類的討論。
All of the cakes and whatnot have been laid out, ready for the children's birthday party this afternoon. 所有的蛋糕什麼的都已經擺好了，準備今天下午孩子們的生日派對。

meaning: what does it matter; what concern is it
sentences: In the end, whatreck did the choice really make? 到頭來，那個選擇真的有多重要嗎？
He treated the noise with a whatreck shrug. 他對那陣噪音只是聳聳肩，滿不在乎。
Whats do you want from the market? 你想從市場買什麼？
She asked whats had happened after the fire. 火災之後，她問究竟發生了什麼。
Whatso you decide, I will help. 不管你怎麼決定，我都會幫忙。
Take whatso you need from the shelf. 你需要什麼，就從架上拿什麼。
He had whatsoeer reason to stay quiet. 他有理由保持沉默。
There was whatsoeer doubt about the result. 對結果沒有任何疑問。
There is no evidence whatsoever to support his claims about the project. 沒有任何證據（絲毫沒有）支持他對該專案的說法。
She showed no interest whatsoever in the movie and fell asleep halfway. 她對這部電影絲毫提不起興趣，看了一半就睡著了。
Whatsomever path you choose, be careful. 不管你選哪條路，都要小心。
She accepted whatsomever help was offered. 不管別人提供什麼幫助，她都接受。

meaning: what kind of; what sort of
sentences: Whatten coat will keep out the rain? 什麼樣的外套能擋雨？
He wondered whatten boat could cross the river. 他在想哪一種船才能過河。

meaning: a New Zealand tree with fibrous bark and large leaves
sentences: The guide pointed to a whau beside the track. 嚮導指向步道旁的一棵華烏樹。
Mori used the whau for baskets and cordage. 毛利人把華烏樹用來做籃子和繩索。

meaning: to snatch, jerk, or strike sharply
sentences: He tried to whauk the rope free from the hook. 他試著把繩子猛地從鉤子上扯開。
The child gave the toy a whauk and laughed. 孩子把玩具一拉，然後笑了起來。

meaning: a curlew or similar wading bird
sentences: A lone whaup called over the marsh. 一隻孤單的杓鷸在沼澤上方鳴叫。
The whaup searched the mud for small crabs. 那隻杓鷸在泥灘裡找小螃蟹。
Whaur have you put the keys? 你把鑰匙放在哪裡了？
They asked whaur the road would end. 他們問這條路會通到哪裡。

meaning: to flutter or move lightly in the air
sentences: The flag seemed to whauve in the breeze. 旗幟似乎在微風中輕輕飄動。
Dust began to whauve across the floor. 灰塵開始在地板上輕輕飄移。

meaning: a raised welt or mark on the skin
sentences: A red wheal appeared after the mosquito bite. 蚊子叮咬後出現了一道紅腫的痕跡。
The doctor checked the wheal on his arm. 醫生檢查了他手臂上的腫痕。

meaning: a small worm or larva once thought to cause wheals
sentences: The old field guide mentioned the whealworm. 舊野外指南提到一種會引起腫痕的小蟲。
Children feared the whealworm after playing in grass. 孩子們在草地裡玩過後會怕那種小蟲。

meaning: covered with wheals or raised marks
sentences: His whealy skin needed a soothing lotion. 他那佈滿腫痕的皮膚需要舒緩乳液。
The whealy patch faded by morning. 那片腫痕到了早上就消退了。

meaning: to breathe or blow with a soft hiss
sentences: The kettle began to wheam just before boiling. 水壺在沸騰前開始發出嘶聲。
Warm air seemed to wheam from the vent. 溫暖的空氣似乎從通風口輕輕吹出。
Farmers in this fertile region grow high-quality organic wheat. 這個肥沃地區的農夫種植高品質的有機小麥。
Wheat is a key ingredient in many types of bread and cereal. 小麥是多種麵包與穀物的主要食材。

meaning: a bird that feeds in wheat fields
sentences: A wheatbird hopped between the stalks. 一隻麥田鳥在麥稈間跳來跳去。
The wheatbird was easy to spot in the field. 那隻麥田鳥在田裡很容易看見。

meaning: a small songbird with pale markings near the ears
sentences: A wheatear perched on the stone wall. 一隻鵐鳥停在石牆上。
The wheatear flashed its pale ear patches in the sun. 那隻鵐鳥在陽光下閃出淡淡的耳側斑紋。

meaning: having pale ear markings like a wheatear
sentences: The wheateared bird stood out against the grass. 那隻耳側帶淡色斑紋的鳥在草地中特別顯眼。
He drew a wheateared bird in the notebook. 他在筆記本裡畫了一隻耳側帶淡色斑紋的鳥。

meaning: made of wheat; pale yellow like wheat
sentences: The wheaten bread was warm and soft. 那條小麥麵包又熱又軟。
Her hair had a wheaten color in the sun. 她的頭髮在陽光下呈現麥色。
The wheatgrower watched the weather closely. 那位小麥種植者密切觀察天氣。
Every wheatgrower hoped for a dry harvest. 每位小麥種植者都希望收成時天氣乾燥。
The train crossed a wide wheatland at noon. 火車中午穿過一大片小麥田地。
The wheatland stretched to the edge of town. 那片小麥田一直延伸到城鎮邊緣。
They baked a wheatless loaf for the guest. 他們為客人烤了一條無小麥麵包。
The meal was wheatless but still filling. 這餐雖然不含小麥，卻仍然很有飽足感。

meaning: resembling wheat in appearance or quality
sentences: The grass had a wheatlike color after summer. 夏天過後，那片草呈現出麥稈般的顏色。
The fabric had a wheatlike softness. 那種布料帶有麥穗般柔和的質感。

meaning: the stalk of a wheat plant
sentences: A single wheatstalk bent in the wind. 一根麥稈在風中彎了下來。
She held the wheatstalk between her fingers. 她把麥稈夾在手指間。

meaning: a worm or larva that feeds on wheat
sentences: The farmer found wheatworm in the crop. 農夫在作物裡發現了啃食小麥的蟲。
Wheatworm can damage a field quickly. 啃食小麥的蟲會很快破壞一整片田。

meaning: having the taste, smell, or look of wheat
sentences: The porridge had a wheaty smell. 那碗粥有淡淡的小麥香。
She liked the wheaty flavor of the soup. 她喜歡湯裡帶點小麥風味。

meaning: a person who wheedles or flatters
sentences: The whedder praised the shopkeeper for a discount. 那個愛奉承的人稱讚店主，好換取折扣。
No whedder could change her careful answer. 再會拍馬屁的人也改不了她謹慎的回答。

meaning: an exclamation of delight, excitement, or speed
sentences: Whee, the swing went higher and higher! 哇，鞦韆越盪越高！
He shouted whee as the cart rolled downhill. 當小車往下坡滾時，他高喊哇。
He tried to wheedle a second cookie from his mother. 他想用甜言蜜語再向媽媽騙一塊餅乾。
The child could wheedle the answer out of his teacher. 那個孩子能用哄勸的方式從老師口中問出答案。
The wheedler smiled until everyone gave in. 那個愛哄騙的人一直陪笑，直到大家讓步。
She saw him as a wheedler who never asked directly. 她覺得他是個從不直接開口的哄騙者。
His wheedlesome tone made the request sound fake. 他那種愛討好的語氣讓請求聽起來很假。
The wheedlesome boy kept asking for one more turn. 那個愛撒嬌的小男孩不停要求再玩一次。
She answered in a wheedling voice. 她用討好的口氣回答。
The wheedling note asked for help with the homework. 那張討好的紙條請人幫忙做功課。
He spoke wheedlingly until the guard opened the gate. 他討好地說話，直到守衛把門打開。
The cat rubbed against her wheedlingly for food. 那隻貓討好地蹭著她要食物。
The steering wheel of the new car is covered in soft leather. 新車的方向盤覆蓋著柔軟的皮革。
The invention of the wheel was a major milestone in history. 輪子的發明是歷史上的一個重大里程碑。
The company charged extra for wheelage. 那家公司另外收取車輪運輸費。
Wheelage made the shipment more expensive than expected. 車輛運費讓這批貨比預期更貴。
The old cart had a cracked wheelband. 那輛舊車的輪箍裂開了。
A metal wheelband kept the wooden wheel together. 金屬輪箍把木輪固定在一起。
He pushed the wheelbarrow full of soil across the yard. 他推著裝滿泥土的獨輪車穿過院子。
The wheelbarrow tipped over on the uneven path. 那台獨輪車在不平的路上翻倒了。
They carried a wheelbarrowful of bricks to the site. 他們把一獨輪車的磚塊運到工地。
One wheelbarrowful of gravel was enough for the path. 一獨輪車的碎石就足夠鋪那條小路。

meaning: 輪形裝飾的鳥；古怪名稱的鳥
sentences: The guidebook called the rare bird a wheelbird. 那本指南把那種稀有鳥叫作輪鳥。
A wheelbird was sketched in the margin of the field notes. 野外筆記的邊欄畫了一隻輪鳥。
The mechanic opened the wheelbox to inspect it. 那位技師打開齒輪箱檢查。
Dust had collected inside the wheelbox. 灰塵積在輪盒裡面。
The building is fully accessible to people who use a wheelchair. 該建築完全開放給使用輪椅的人士進入。
He needed a wheelchair to get around after breaking both his legs. 雙腿骨折後，他需要坐輪椅才能四處走動。
The article explored the wheeldom of modern transport. 那篇文章探討了現代交通的輪子世界。
In wheeldom, small design changes can matter a lot. 在輪車文化裡，小小的設計變化也可能很重要。

meaning: 具有指定數量或類型的車輪。
sentences: a three- wheeled car 三輪汽車
an iron- wheeled chariot 鐵輪戰車
The term wheeler refers to someone who operates a wheel. 術語“輪子”指的是操作輪子的人。
The lesson introduced wheeler as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了惠勒這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The old wheelery stood beside the river. 那間古老的製輪工場建在河邊。
He learned the trade in a small wheelery. 他在一家小小的輪具工場學會這門手藝。
The captain watched the storm from the wheelhouse. 船長從駕駛艙裡觀察風暴。
Public speaking is really in her wheelhouse. 演講其實正是她最擅長的領域。
the wheelings of birds in the sky 天空中鳥兒的盤旋
The term wheeling refers to The motion of something that wheels. 術語「轉動」是指轉動物體的運動。
The cart moved wheelingly down the hill. 那輛車滾動著往山下走。
Leaves spun wheelingly in the wind. 葉子在風中旋轉著飛舞。
The wheelless cart could not move on its own. 那輛無輪的車無法自己移動。
A wheelless machine sat in the corner of the workshop. 一台沒有輪子的機器停在工作坊角落。
The flower had a wheellike shape. 那朵花長得像輪子一樣。
The wheelike pattern spread across the fabric. 那種輪狀圖案鋪滿了布料。
The wheelmaker repaired wagon wheels for the village. 那位製輪匠替村子修理馬車輪子。
A skilled wheelmaker could shape wood by hand. 熟練的製輪匠能徒手把木材做成輪子。
Wheelmaking used to be a valued craft. 製輪曾經是一門很受重視的工藝。
He studied wheelmaking from an old master. 他向一位老匠師學習製輪。
The wheelman kept the truck steady on the curve. 駕駛者讓卡車在彎道上保持穩定。
Every boat needs a careful wheelman. 每艘船都需要一位細心的掌舵者。
The stone wheelrace was worn smooth. 那條石製輪槽已經磨得很平滑。
Rain filled the wheelrace with muddy water. 雨水把輪道灌滿了泥水。
The wagon followed the old wheelroad through the fields. 馬車沿著田野間的舊輪行路前進。
A narrow wheelroad cut between the hills. 一條狹窄的車輪道穿過山丘之間。
The wheelsman turned the ship toward the harbor. 舵手把船轉向港口。
A good wheelsman stays calm in rough water. 好舵手在風浪中也能保持冷靜。
The wheelsmith shaped a new rim by hand. 那位輪匠徒手做出一個新輪圈。
Villagers trusted the wheelsmith to fix broken carts. 村民信任那位輪匠修好壞掉的車。
The car's wheelspin left marks on the wet road. 汽車空轉時在濕路上留下痕跡。
Too much power caused wheelspin on the hill. 馬力太大讓汽車在坡上打滑。
The floor was covered with wheelswarf after the repair. 維修後，地上滿是輪屑。
He swept away the metal wheelswarf from the bench. 他把工作台上的金屬輪屑掃掉。
The cart followed the wheelway across the field. 那輛車沿著輪道穿過田地。
A stone wheelway led to the mill. 一條石砌輪道通往磨坊。

meaning: 輪子方向地；按輪子轉向地
sentences: The boxes were stacked wheelwise in the truck. 箱子在貨車裡是沿著輪子方向堆放的。
He turned the chair wheelwise to fit it through the door. 他把椅子按輪向轉過去，好塞進門口。
The clock's wheelwork was beautifully made. 那座時鐘的齒輪機件做得很精巧。
Dust slowed the wheelwork inside the toy. 灰塵讓玩具裡的齒輪機構變慢了。
The wheelwright built sturdy wagon wheels. 那位製輪匠做出結實的馬車輪子。
An old wheelwright taught the apprentice the craft. 一位老製輪匠把這門技藝教給學徒。
Wheelwrighting demanded patience and precision. 製輪工藝需要耐心與精準。
He made a living by wheelwrighting in a small town. 他靠在小鎮上做製輪工藝維生。
The wheely cart rolled across the pavement. 那輛有輪的推車在路面上滾動。
He did a wheely trick on his bike. 他騎腳踏車做了一個翹前輪的特技。
A faint wheem came from the pipes. 管子裡傳來一陣輕微的嘯聲。
He heard a wheem in the wind outside. 他聽見外面的風發出細細的聲音。
He had a wheen of coins in his pocket. 他口袋裡有幾枚硬幣。
A wheen of people gathered near the gate. 一些人聚在大門附近。
A wheencat slept on the warm roof. 一群貓中的一隻睡在溫暖的屋頂上。
She fed the wheencat that wandered into the yard. 她餵了那隻跑進院子的貓。
The child began to wheenge when bedtime came. 到了睡覺時間，孩子開始輕聲抱怨。
The old hinge wheenged every time the door opened. 那個老鉸鏈每次開門都發出尖細聲。
The bird gave a short wheep from the tree. 那隻鳥從樹上發出一聲短促尖叫。
He could wheep when frightened. 他害怕時會發出細聲叫喊。
The horse began to wheeple after the hard run. 那匹馬在激烈奔跑後開始喘鳴。
You could hear her wheeple in the cold air. 在冷空氣裡可以聽見她的喘鳴聲。
The wheer of the cart faded down the road. 車輪的響聲沿著路漸漸遠去。
A soft wheer passed through the trees. 一陣輕柔的呼嘯聲穿過樹林。
Wheerikins, that was a close call! 哎呀，那真是千鈞一髮！
Wheerikins, the ladder nearly fell over. 哎呀，那把梯子差點倒下。
Wheesht, the baby is sleeping. 噓，寶寶正在睡覺。
He whispered, wheesht, and pointed to the door. 他低聲說噓，然後指向門口。
The puppy tried to wheetle his shoelace. 小狗試著輕咬他的鞋帶。
The bird wheetled the crumb from the table. 那隻鳥把桌上的麵包屑輕啄走。
The elderly man began to wheeze after climbing the stairs. 那位老人在爬完樓梯後開始喘氣（發出喘鳴聲）。
He has a persistent wheeze due to his asthma. 因為哮喘，他有持續性的喘鳴。
The wheezer paused to catch his breath. 那個喘氣的人停下來換氣。
The doctor listened carefully to the wheezer. 醫生仔細聽那位喘息者的呼吸。
He laughed wheezily after climbing the stairs. 他爬完樓梯後，喘著氣笑了。
The old engine ran wheezily in the shed. 那台老引擎在棚子裡喘鳴著運轉。
The wheeziness in her chest worried the nurse. 她胸口的喘鳴讓護士很擔心。
After the cold, his wheeziness lasted for days. 感冒之後，他的氣喘不順持續了好幾天。
The dog lay wheezingly beside the fire. 那隻狗喘鳴著躺在火邊。
He spoke wheezingly after the long climb. 他爬了長坡後，說話都帶著喘音。
A wheezle came from the old radiator. 舊暖氣片發出一陣微弱的呼氣聲。
She heard a wheezle in the dark room. 她在黑暗的房間裡聽見細細的喘聲。
The wheezy engine needed repair. 那台喘鳴的引擎需要修理。
He sounded wheezy after running in the heat. 他在熱天跑完後，說話帶著喘聲。
A wheft of smoke drifted from the chimney. 一陣輕煙從煙囪飄出。
She caught a wheft of fresh bread. 她聞到一陣新鮮麵包的香氣。
The whein of the child grew softer. 孩子的哀鳴聲漸漸變小。
He answered with a low whein of complaint. 他用低低的抱怨聲回應。

meaning: a hawk-like bird name used in Maori contexts
sentences: The whekau circled above the hill. 那隻鷹鴞在山丘上空盤旋。
A whekau call echoed through the valley. 鷹鴞的叫聲在山谷裡迴盪。

meaning: a fern or fern frond, especially in Maori usage
sentences: He brushed aside a wet wheki on the path. 他撥開小路上一片濕漉漉的蕨葉。
The wheki grew thick near the stream. 那種蕨類在溪邊長得很茂密。

meaning: a sea snail with a spiral shell
sentences: We found a whelk on the beach. 我們在海灘上找到一隻海螺。
The whelk shell was smooth and pale. 那個海螺殼光滑而淡色。

meaning: marked with raised ridges or whelks; covered with bumps
sentences: The old wood had a whelked surface. 那塊舊木頭表面有突起的紋理。
Her hands felt rough and whelked after the work. 她的手做完活後粗糙又有凸起。

meaning: a person or thing that gathers whelks
sentences: The whelker emptied the basket onto the dock. 那位撿海螺的人把籃子倒在碼頭上。
A whelker knows the tides well. 撿海螺的人很懂潮汐。
The shell had a whelklike curve. 那個貝殼有海螺般的弧形。
A whelklike spiral decorated the drawing. 一道像海螺的螺旋裝飾了那幅畫。

meaning: covered with whelks or with bump-like marks
sentences: The rocky shore looked whelky at low tide. 退潮時，那片岩岸看起來布滿海螺。
His skin became whelky after the rash spread. 皮疹擴散後，他的皮膚變得一粒一粒。

meaning: to engulf or submerge; to overwhelm
sentences: The waves whelm the tiny boat. 海浪把那艘小船淹沒。
Too many tasks can whelm a new student. 太多任務會讓新生應接不暇。

meaning: a young animal, especially a puppy; to give birth to young
sentences: The whelp slept beside its mother. 那隻幼崽睡在母獸身邊。
A small whelp followed the pack. 一隻小幼獸跟著獸群。

meaning: the state or period of being a whelp
