sentences: The puppy was noisy throughout whelphood. 那隻小狗在幼年期一直很吵。
Whelphood passed quickly for the growing dog. 這隻狗的幼年期很快就過去了。

meaning: like a young animal; childish or immature
sentences: His whelpish energy filled the room. 他那種幼獸般的精力充滿了整個房間。
The boy gave a whelpish grin. 那男孩露出一個孩子氣的笑容。
The kennel was whelpless after the litter left. 那窩幼崽離開後，犬舍就空了。
A whelpless mother seemed restless and quiet. 沒有幼崽的母獸顯得焦躁而安靜。
The whelpling stumbled toward the bowl. 那隻幼崽跌跌撞撞地走向食盆。
A whelpling hid behind the crate. 一隻幼崽躲在箱子後面。

meaning: to turn over or toss up; to heave
sentences: The workers whelve the soil before planting. 工人在種植前把土翻起來。
A strong wind seemed to whelve the leaves. 強風似乎把樹葉翻了起來。

meaning: to press, crush, or beat down; to overwhelm
sentences: The storm whemmel the grass flat. 暴風把草壓得平平的。
Stress can whemmel a tired mind. 壓力會把疲憊的心思壓垮。
When did you start learning how to speak English? 你什麼時候開始學說英文的？
Please let me know when you arrive home safely. 妳平安到家後請告訴我一聲。

meaning: the time or occasion when something happens
sentences: She asked about the whenabouts of the meeting. 她詢問會議大約什麼時候舉行。
The whenabouts of his return were unclear. 他回來的時間還不清楚。
Whenas the bell rang, the class stood up. 鐘聲一響，全班就站了起來。
Whenas winter came, the river froze. 冬天一到，河面就結冰了。

meaning: 來自 哪裡 ；來自哪個 哪裡 ；來自哪個 ； rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/wiki/source" title="source">來源 。
sentences: Whence came I? 我從哪裡來 ？ 我從哪裡來？ 我從哪裡來？
"Pork" comes from French, whence we get most of our modern cooking terms. 「豬肉」來自法語， 從這裡 我們得到了大部分現代烹飪術語。 「豬肉」來自法語，我們大部分現代烹飪術語都是從法語中獲得的。 「豬肉」來自現代，從這裡我們得到了大部分烹飪術語。

meaning: an archaic spelling of whence, meaning from what place or source
sentences: Whenceeer the letter came, it was lost. 那封信不論從哪裡來，都已經遺失了。
He asked whenceeer the rumor had started. 他問那個傳聞究竟是從哪裡開始的。

meaning: from what place or time onward
sentences: Whenceforth the road climbs, the view opens. 從道路開始上坡之後，視野就開闊了。
They wondered whenceforth the story would go. 他們想知道故事接下來會怎麼發展。
Whenceforward, the rules were stricter. 從那時起，規則變得更嚴格。
The village changed whenceforward the bridge was built. 橋建好之後，村莊從此改變。
Whencesoeer the news arrives, call me first. 不論消息從哪裡來，先打給我。
The letter was sent whencesoeer the writer could. 那封信是作者一有機會就寄出的。
Whencesoever the idea came, it was useful. 不管這個想法從哪裡來，它都很有用。
The coach welcomed help whencesoever it appeared. 教練歡迎任何來源的幫助。
Whencever the wind blows, the flags turn. 不管風從哪裡吹來，旗子都會轉向。
He accepted advice whencever it was offered. 不論建議來自哪裡，他都接受。
Wheneer the door opened, the cat ran in. 不管什麼時候門一開，貓就衝了進去。
She smiled wheneer the song played. 那首歌一播放，她就會微笑。
Please feel free to call me whenever you need any help. 只要妳需要任何幫助，隨時都可以打電話給我。
Whenever I listen to this song, it reminds me of my childhood. 每當我聽這首歌，它都會讓我想起童年。

meaning: the time or moment when something occurs
sentences: The whenness of the event was hard to pin down. 這件事發生的時間很難確定。
He was interested in the whenness of the change. 他對變化發生的時機很感興趣。
Whenso the door creaked, everyone turned. 門一吱呀作響，大家就都轉過頭。
Whenso he visits, he brings tea. 他每次來訪都會帶茶。
Whensoever she called, he answered quickly. 她每次打電話來，他都很快接聽。
Whensoever the storm ended, people returned outside. 每當暴風雨停下，人們就回到戶外。

meaning: at whatever time it may be
sentences: Whensomever you arrive, the key will be here. 不論你何時到，鑰匙都會在這裡。
Whensomever the work begins, she is ready. 無論工作何時開始，她都已準備好。
Where are you from? I'm from Taipei, Taiwan. 你從哪裡來？我來自台灣台北。
I don't know where I left my car keys. 我不知道我把車鑰匙放在哪裡了。

meaning: the place or position where something is located
sentences: The whereabout of the map was unknown. 那張地圖所在的位置不明。
He asked about the whereabout of the lost bag. 他詢問那個遺失包包的下落。
The police are still trying to determine the whereabouts of the suspect. 警方仍在試圖確定嫌疑人的行蹤（下落）。
His whereabouts remained a mystery for several years after his disappearance. 在他失蹤後的幾年裡，他的下落一直是一個謎。
The speech ended, whereafter the lights dimmed. 演講結束後，燈光隨即暗了下來。
They rested, whereafter they continued hiking. 他們休息了一會兒，之後繼續健行。
The report listed the issue whereanent the meeting. 報告列出了與會議相關的問題。
She wrote a note whereanent the budget. 她寫了一張關於預算的便條。
She enjoys hiking in the mountains, whereas her husband prefers the beach. 她喜歡在山裡健行，而（然而）她的丈夫更喜歡海灘。
Some people thrive under pressure, whereas others find it very stressful. 有些人在壓力下表現出色，反之有些人則覺得壓力很大。

meaning: at which; at what point or place
sentences: The gate whereat they stopped was old. 他們停下來的那道門很老舊。
The hill whereat the path ends was steep. 小路盡頭的那座山坡很陡。

meaning: some distance away; in a far place
sentences: The cabin stood whereaway on the ridge. 那間小屋遠遠地立在山脊上。
A light flickered whereaway in the dark. 遠處有一盞燈在黑暗中閃爍。

meaning: 透過什麼，向哪個方向；如何。
sentences: Whereby goest thou? 你要去哪裡？
If someone acts whereby, they do so in a way that is by what, in which direction; how. 如果某人採取行動，他們會以某種方式這樣做，即透過什麼，朝哪個方向；如何。
Whereer he wandered, he carried a notebook. 不管他走到哪裡，都帶著一本筆記本。
The dog slept whereer the floor was warm. 狗只要找到地板溫暖的地方就睡。
She did not know wherefor he left early. 她不知道他為什麼提早離開。
The child asked wherefor the train stopped. 那孩子問火車為什麼停下來。
Wherefore did the crowd gather so early? 人群為什麼那麼早就聚集起來？
He explained the wherefore of the delay. 他解釋了延誤的原因。
Wherefrom came the smell of smoke? 那股煙味是從哪裡來的？
She traced wherefrom the package had arrived. 她追查包裹是從哪裡寄來的。
Wherein did I misspeak myself? 我自己哪裡說錯了？
If someone acts wherein, they do so in a way that is how, or in what way. 如果某人採取其中行動，他們會以何種方式或以什麼方式這樣做。

meaning: in whatever thing or place; in whatever respect
sentences: Whereinsoever the rule applies, be careful. 不論這條規則適用於何處，都要小心。
The answer lay whereinsoever he looked. 不管他往哪裡看，答案都藏在其中。
The box whereinto the letters were placed was sealed. 放信的那個盒子已經封好。
He wondered whereinto the river flowed. 他想知道那條河流向何處。

meaning: the place, position, or whereabouts of something
sentences: The whereness of the house was easy to describe. 那棟房子所在的位置很容易描述。
We discussed the whereness of the missing tool. 我們討論了那件遺失工具的下落。
The book whereof he spoke is rare. 他所提到的那本書很罕見。
She knew not whereof the warning was made. 她不知道那個警告是出於什麼。
The table whereon the vase stood was small. 花瓶所在的那張桌子很小。
He pointed to the page whereon the note appeared. 他指向那頁有註記的地方。
The well whereout the water came was deep. 那口井很深，水就是從那裡出來的。
He climbed the crate whereout he had fallen. 他爬回那個他曾跌下來的箱子上。
The bridge whereover they walked was narrow. 他們走過的那座橋很窄。
A cloud floated whereover the field. 一朵雲飄在田野上方。
Whereso the cat went, the child followed. 貓走到哪裡，那孩子就跟到哪裡。
They slept whereso they found shelter. 他們找到庇護處就睡在哪裡。
Wheresoeer he looked, he saw dust. 不管他往哪裡看，都看到灰塵。
The trail led wheresoeer the river bent. 小徑沿著河灣延伸到哪裡都跟著走。
Wheresoever the road ended, they kept walking. 不論道路在哪裡結束，他們都繼續走。
He carried hope wheresoever he traveled. 不管他走到哪裡，都帶著希望。
Wheresomever the birds nested, they returned. 鳥兒不論在哪裡築巢，最後都會回來。
She left a mark wheresomever she stopped. 她每停下來的地方都留下記號。

meaning: through which; by means of which
sentences: The tunnel wherethrough they passed was cold. 他們穿過的那條隧道很冷。
A narrow path wherethrough the stream flowed was visible. 一條溪水流過的狹窄通道清晰可見。

meaning: to which place or point; until where
sentences: He asked wheretill the road would run. 他問這條路會通到哪裡。
Wheretill the journey went, the map was uncertain. 這趟旅程會到哪裡，地圖也不確定。
He did not know whereto the road would lead. 他不知道這條路會通往何處。
They asked whereto the package should be sent. 他們詢問這個包裹應該寄往哪裡。

meaning: to whatever place; to any place
sentences: She would follow him wheretoever he went. 不管他去哪裡，她都會跟著去。
The caravan moved wheretoever the guide pointed. 商隊朝著嚮導指向的任何地方前進。

meaning: to whichever place; to any place whatsoever
sentences: He promised to travel wheretosoever the council sent him. 他答應無論議會派他去哪裡，他都會前往。
The map could guide us wheretosoever we wished to go. 那張地圖能引導我們去任何想去的地方。
The old law described the case whereunder the rule applied. 舊法條說明了規則適用的情形。
They found the shelf whereunder the box had been hidden. 他們找到那個箱子藏放在其下方的架子。

meaning: until which point; up to what time
sentences: The note asked whereuntil the contract remained valid. 那張便條問合約有效到什麼時候。
We waited to learn whereuntil the bridge would stay open. 我們等著確認這座橋會開放到幾點。
He spoke of the goal whereunto the company was moving. 他談到公司正在朝著的目標。
The clause explains whereunto each payment is assigned. 這條條款說明每一筆付款分配到哪裡。

meaning: upward from where; on which upward side
sentences: The path slanted whereup the hillside became steeper. 小徑向上延伸，坡面也變得更陡。
He glanced whereup the lanterns were hung. 他朝著燈籠懸掛的上方看去。
The network went down, whereupon I made a cup of tea 網路壞了，於是我泡了一杯茶
The word whereupon is used to connect ideas in a sentence. 「whereupon」一詞用於連接句子中的想法。
You can park your car wherever you find an empty space. 只要有空位，妳可以把車停在任何地方。
Wherever you go in Taiwan, you can find delicious local food. 無論妳在台灣哪裡，都能找到美味的當地小吃。

meaning: with which; by means of which
sentences: She found the tool wherewith the nail could be removed. 她找到了能把釘子拔出的工具。
The engineer explained the method wherewith the bridge was repaired. 工程師解釋了修橋所用的方法。
They lacked the wherewithal to finish the project. 他們缺少完成這項計畫所需的資源。
A small grant gave the studio the wherewithal to open. 一筆小額補助讓工作室有了開張的資金。
A faint wherret came from the old fan. 舊電扇傳出細微的嗡嗡聲。
The machine gave a short wherret before stopping. 那台機器先發出一陣短促的轉動聲，接著停下。

meaning: to whirr; to make a quick buzzing sound
sentences: The beetle seemed to wherrit across the window. 那隻甲蟲似乎從窗邊嗡嗡飛過。
A loose pulley began to wherrit in the shed. 倉庫裡一個鬆動的滑輪開始發出嗡嗡聲。
We crossed the river in a small wherry. 我們搭著一艘小型輕舟過河。
The wherry moved quietly through the reeds. 那艘輕舟靜靜穿過蘆葦叢。

meaning: a boatman who rows a wherry
sentences: The wherryman pushed off from the bank. 船夫把船推離岸邊。
An old wherryman told stories to the passengers. 一位老船夫對乘客講故事。

meaning: to sharpen; to stimulate appetite or desire
sentences: He used a stone to whet the blade. 他用磨石把刀刃磨利。
The smell of soup whetted my appetite. 湯的香味勾起了我的食慾。
I'm not sure whether I can attend the meeting tomorrow. 我不確定明天是否能參加會議。
The decision depends on whether we can get enough funding. 決定取決於我們是否能獲得足夠的資金。

meaning: a small whetstone; a sharpening stone
sentences: He kept a whetile in his tool pouch. 他把一塊小磨石放在工具袋裡。
The whetile was used to touch up the edge. 那塊小磨石用來修整刀口。

meaning: a rock or stone used for sharpening
sentences: The farmer used a whetrock beside the barn. 農夫在穀倉旁用磨石磨刀。
A rough whetrock sat near the sink for tools. 水槽旁放著一塊給工具用的粗磨石。

meaning: a stone used for sharpening blades
sentences: He soaked the whetstone before sharpening the knife. 他先把磨刀石浸濕，再開始磨刀。
The whetstone made the old scissors cut cleanly again. 磨刀石讓那把舊剪刀又能俐落地剪東西。
A good title can be a whetter for curiosity. 好標題能勾起好奇心。
The aroma acted as a whetter before dinner. 那股香味在晚餐前先開了胃。

meaning: 發出富有表現力的聲音，表示釋放內心的緊張；呼吸的釋放；一種寬慰的表達。
sentences: Whew! That box weighs a ton! 哇！那個盒子有一噸重！
Whew! Thank goodness youʼre safe! I thought something terrible had happened to you! 哇！謝天謝地，你很安全！我以為你發生了可怕的事！

meaning: a mineral form of calcium oxalate
sentences: The geologist identified the white crystal as whewellite. 地質學家把那塊白色晶體辨認為韋維石。
A museum label described whewellite as a rare mineral. 博物館標籤把韋維石說成是一種罕見礦物。

meaning: one who makes a whew or whistles softly
sentences: The whewer stood outside the gate and called softly. 那個吹哨的人站在門外輕聲呼喚。
In the story, the whewer warned the village at dawn. 在故事裡，吹哨的人在黎明時提醒村民。

meaning: to give a soft whew or whistle; a soft whistling sound
sentences: The kettle seemed to whewl as it cooled. 那把水壺冷卻時似乎發出輕微的嘯聲。
He could whewl to get the dog's attention. 他能吹出輕聲口哨來吸引狗的注意。

meaning: an exclamation of relief, surprise, or alarm
sentences: Whewt, that was a close call. 呼，剛剛真是好險。
She shouted whewt when the balloon popped. 氣球爆開時，她忍不住喊了一聲。

meaning: 在製作起司的過程中，牛奶凝結並過濾後剩餘的液體。
sentences: The term whey refers to the liquid remaining after milk has been curdled and strained in the process of making cheese. 乳清一詞是指在製作乳酪的過程中牛奶凝結和過濾後剩餘的液體。
The lesson introduced whey as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了乳清作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: a pale, weak-looking person with a light beard
sentences: The old tale mocked the wheybeard for his thin frame. 那個古老故事嘲笑那位鬍鬚發白、身形瘦弱的人。
He looked like a wheybeard after weeks of illness. 經過幾週生病後，他看起來臉色蒼白又消瘦。
The soup had a wheyey color and a weak taste. 那碗湯顏色淡白，味道也很清。
His face looked wheyey after the long fever. 他退燒後臉色看起來很蒼白。

meaning: the quality of being pale and thin
sentences: The doctor noticed the boy's wheyeyness at once. 醫生一眼就看出那男孩臉色蒼白又瘦弱。
The wheyeyness of the broth made it seem watery. 那鍋湯的淡白感讓它看起來很稀。
The coach laughed and called him a wheyface. 教練笑著叫他蒼白臉。
After staying indoors all winter, she felt like a wheyface. 整個冬天都待在室內後，她覺得自己像個臉色蒼白的人。
He looked wheyfaced after skipping breakfast. 他沒吃早餐，看起來臉色蒼白。
The actor wore a wheyfaced expression for the scene. 那名演員在那場戲裡刻意露出蒼白的神情。

meaning: like whey; pale, watery, or weak
sentences: The paint had a wheyish tint. 那層油漆帶著淡淡的乳白色。
Her voice sounded wheyish and tired. 她的聲音聽起來虛弱又沒精神。

meaning: the state of being pale, watery, or weak
sentences: The wheyishness of the sauce made it look thin. 那醬汁偏淡白，看起來很稀。
He worried about the wheyishness of his own skin. 他擔心自己皮膚那種蒼白的樣子。
The broth had a wheylike appearance. 那鍋高湯看起來有點像乳清。
A wheylike film coated the top of the liquid. 液體表面浮著一層乳白色薄膜。

meaning: the quality of looking like whey; paleness
sentences: The wheyness of the sauce made it look unappealing. 醬汁那種淡白感讓它看起來不太誘人。
He noticed the wheyness in her cheeks after the cold. 感冒後，他注意到她臉頰有種蒼白感。
The botany notebook listed whiba among rare plants. 植物學筆記把它列為稀有植物之一。
A whiba grew beside the stream in the old drawing. 舊畫裡，小溪邊長著一株稀有植物。
Which of these two beautiful dresses do you prefer? 這兩件漂亮的洋裝妳比較喜歡哪一件？
The book which I borrowed from the library was very interesting. 我從圖書館借的那本書非常有趣。
Good heavens! Whichever button did you press to make that happen?! 天哪！無論您按下哪個按鈕來實現這一點？
The word whichever is used in English writing and speech. 該詞以英語寫作和演講中使用的為準。
Choose whichsoever option suits you best. 選擇任何最適合你的選項。
Whichsoever path they took, they reached the hill. 無論他們走哪條路，最後都到了山丘。
He asked whichway the train station was. 他問火車站往哪個方向走。
The sign showed whichway to turn at the bridge. 指示牌顯示在橋邊該往哪裡轉。
The children looked whichways for their teacher. 孩子們四處張望找老師。
The branches bent whichways in the storm. 樹枝在暴風中往各個方向彎折。

meaning: to move or strike with a quick jerk
sentences: The horse seemed to whick its tail at the flies. 那匹馬似乎快速甩尾趕蒼蠅。
He whicked the rope aside before it could snag. 他迅速把繩子甩開，免得勾住東西。

meaning: to become quick; to make quick or lively
sentences: The pace began to whicken as the race neared the end. 比賽接近尾聲時，步調開始加快。
The news seemed to whicken their spirits. 那消息似乎讓他們精神振奮起來。

meaning: to make a low whinny, as a horse does
sentences: The mare began to whicker when she saw the foal. 母馬看到小馬時開始低聲嘶鳴。
From the stall came a soft whicker in the dark. 黑暗中，馬廄裡傳出柔和的低鳴聲。

meaning: a whisper; a rumor; a slight movement
sentences: There was a whid of news before sunrise. 日出前先有一點風聲傳開。
The curtain moved with the slightest whid of air. 窗簾隨著極微弱的氣流輕輕晃動。
The whidah flashed black and gold in the sun. 那隻維達鳥在陽光下閃著黑金色。
A whidah perched on the fence and sang. 一隻維達鳥停在圍欄上唱歌。
The candle flame began to whidder in the draft. 蠟燭火焰在穿堂風中開始顫動。
Her hands whiddered when she heard the bad news. 聽到壞消息時，她的手不住發抖。

meaning: 一陣短暫而柔和的微風；一陣輕風；一陣風。
sentences: The term whiff refers to a brief, gentle breeze; a light gust of air; a waft. 「wiff」一詞指的是一陣短暫、柔和的微風；一陣輕風；一陣風。
The lesson introduced whiff as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「whiff」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: a fanciful or comic name; a whimsical nonsense word
sentences: The children used whiffenpoof as a silly made-up word. 孩子們把它當成一個滑稽的自造詞。
He laughed at the whiffenpoof name on the poster. 他看著海報上那個滑稽的名字笑了。
The batter was a whiffer on that pitch. 那位打者對那球揮空了。
A whiffer of smoke drifted from the stove. 爐子冒出一縷微弱的煙。
A whiffet of perfume reached the doorway. 門口飄來一縷淡淡的香水味。
He caught a whiffet of warm bread from the kitchen. 他聞到廚房飄出的一點熱麵包香。

meaning: to move lightly or uncertainly; to vacillate
sentences: The flag began to whiffle in the breeze. 旗子在微風中輕輕飄動。
She tends to whiffle when choosing a new job. 她在選新工作時容易猶豫不決。
He is a whiffler who changes his mind too often. 他是個老是改變主意的人。
The whiffler could not decide on a route. 那個猶豫不決的人無法決定路線。

meaning: the habit of vacillating or flitting about
sentences: His whifflery made the team lose time. 他猶豫不定的毛病讓團隊浪費了時間。
The play captured the whifflery of a restless mind. 這齣戲捕捉到一顆浮動不安的心那種反覆搖擺。

meaning: a horizontal bar in a harness for distributing a pull
sentences: The cart's whiffletree helped spread the load evenly. 馬車的橫木幫助平均分散拉力。
He repaired the broken whiffletree before dawn. 他在天亮前修好了斷掉的橫木。
A whiffling curtain drifted across the window. 簾子輕輕飄動著掠過窗前。
His whiffling opinion changed every hour. 他那種搖擺不定的看法每小時都在變。

meaning: in a light, wavering, or uncertain manner
sentences: The leaves drifted whifflingly down the lane. 葉子飄飄忽忽地落在小路上。
He whifflingly agreed, then changed his mind. 他猶豫地答應，之後又改變了主意。

meaning: slightly smelly; having a noticeable whiff
sentences: The milk smelled a little whiffy after noon. 那杯牛奶到了中午後有點怪味。
His whiffy socks needed a wash. 他那雙有味道的襪子該洗了。

meaning: a brief puff, gust, or whiff
sentences: A whift of smoke drifted from the chimney. 一縷煙從煙囪裡飄出來。
She caught a whift of rain in the air. 她聞到空氣裡有一點雨味。

meaning: a member or supporter of the Whig party
sentences: The Whig argued for reform in Parliament. 那位輝格黨人主張在議會推動改革。
History class explained what a Whig believed. 歷史課解釋了輝格黨人的主張。

meaning: a Whig supporter; a liberal reformer
sentences: He called himself a whig in the old political debate. 在那場舊式政治辯論中，他稱自己是輝格派支持者。
The word whig appears often in history books. 這個字常出現在歷史書裡。

meaning: a historical Scottish Whig or Covenanting supporter
sentences: The old song mentioned a Whiggamore marching north. 那首老歌提到一位輝格派蘇格蘭人向北行軍。
A Whiggamore was once a political label in Scotland. 輝格派蘇格蘭人曾是蘇格蘭的政治稱呼。

meaning: a historical Scottish Whig or Covenanting supporter
sentences: The writer used whiggamore as an old political term. 作者把這個詞當作一個古老的政治名詞。
A whiggamore would have backed reform in that era. 在那個時代，這類人會支持改革。
The pamphlet mocked the Whiggarchy of the day. 那本小冊子諷刺了當時的輝格黨執政局面。
Some readers saw Whiggarchy as a clever insult. 有些讀者把這個字看成一種機智的嘲諷。
Whiggery shaped the debate on reform. 輝格主義影響了改革辯論。
The essay traced the rise of Whiggery in Britain. 那篇文章追溯了英國輝格政治的興起。

meaning: a female Whig or Whig supporter
sentences: The novel described a sharp-tongued Whiggess. 那本小說描寫了一位口齒犀利的輝格派女性。
She was called a Whiggess in the old satire. 在那部舊諷刺作品裡，她被叫作輝格派女士。

meaning: the act of making Whig-like or adopting Whig ideas
sentences: The cartoon mocked the Whiggification of politics. 那幅漫畫諷刺政治被輝格化。
He joked about the Whiggification of every debate. 他拿每場辯論都變得輝格化來開玩笑。

meaning: to make Whig-like; to convert to Whig ideas
sentences: The editor tried to Whiggify the speech before printing it. 編輯試圖在印刷前把演說改得更像輝格派。
You cannot Whiggify every old document. 你不可能把每份舊文獻都改成輝格味。

meaning: showing Whig opinions or liberal reformist tendencies
sentences: The book has a Whiggish view of progress. 那本書對進步抱有輝格式看法。
His Whiggish tone favored reform and liberty. 他那種輝格式語氣偏向改革與自由。
She wrote Whiggishly about the past. 她用輝格式的角度來寫過去。
The historian argued Whiggishly about progress. 那位歷史學家以輝格式方式談論進步。
The essay's Whiggishness was easy to spot. 那篇文章的輝格式傾向很容易看出來。
Critics disliked the Whiggishness of the argument. 批評者不喜歡那個論點的輝格色彩。
Whiggism promoted reform and constitutional balance. 輝格主義提倡改革與憲政平衡。
The lecture introduced the roots of Whiggism. 那堂課介紹了輝格主義的根源。

meaning: a young or minor Whig; a small Whig supporter
sentences: The columnist used Whiglet as a playful insult. 那位專欄作家用這個詞當作玩笑式的嘲諷。
A Whiglet in the story still had much to learn. 故事中的小輝格派還有很多要學。

meaning: a small or youthful Whig supporter
sentences: The old speaker dismissed him as a Whigling. 那位老演說者把他貶稱為小輝格派。
A Whigling was not taken seriously in the debate. 在辯論裡，小輝格派並不被當回事。

meaning: a fanciful notion, odd device, or whimsical contraption
sentences: The inventor showed off a strange whigmaleerie. 那位發明家展示了一個古怪的小玩意兒。
The room was full of whigmaleerie and clutter. 那個房間堆滿了怪奇玩意和雜物。

meaning: the state of being a Whig or Whig supporter
sentences: His whigship was obvious from his speeches. 他的輝格立場從演說裡就很明顯。
The essay discussed the meaning of whigship. 那篇文章討論了輝格派身份的意義。

meaning: a rare or dialectal term for a whim or odd fancy
sentences: He followed a whikerby and changed his route. 他一時起意，便改了路線。
The tale treats the whikerby as a passing fancy. 那個故事把這個古怪念頭當成一時興起。
I like to listen to music while I'm studying to help me focus. 我喜歡在唸書時聽音樂，以幫助我集中注意力。
The phone rang while I was taking a shower this morning. 我今天早上洗澡時電話響了。

meaning: for a while; a little while ago
sentences: He sat there whileen before speaking. 他在開口前先坐了一會兒。
The memory came back whileen later. 過了一會兒，那段回憶又浮上心頭。
Whilere the kettle boiled, she set the table. 水壺燒開時，她順手擺好餐具。
Whilere we waited, the sun went down. 我們等待的時候，太陽也落山了。

meaning: at times; for a short time; while
sentences: He whiles stopped to look at the sky. 他有時會停下來看看天空。
We rested whiles in the shade. 我們偶爾在陰影下歇一會兒。

meaning: a little while; while; during that time
sentences: She waited whilie the rain passed. 她等了一會兒，直到雨停。
The children were quiet whilie the story was read. 故事被念出來的時候，孩子們安安靜靜。
Whilk door did you choose? 你選了哪一扇門？
He asked whilk path was safest. 他問哪條路最安全。

meaning: a member of the Whilkut people
sentences: The museum panel mentioned a Whilkut family. 博物館展板提到一個威爾庫特族家庭。
A Whilkut elder spoke about the land. 一位威爾庫特族長者談起那片土地。

meaning: to move or turn in a brisk, light way
sentences: The cart seemed to whill down the lane. 那輛車似乎輕快地沿著小路前進。
Leaves whill in the wind by the fence. 風中，樹葉在籬笆旁輕快翻動。
The argument caused a whillaballoo in the hall. 那場爭吵讓大廳一陣喧鬧。
There was a whillaballoo when the bell rang. 鈴聲響起時，現場一片吵雜。

meaning: a noisy cry, uproar, or commotion
sentences: The boys made a whillaloo outside the house. 那些男孩在屋外大聲喧鬧。
A whillaloo rose from the crowd at the show. 表演時，人群裡一陣喧騰。

meaning: a light cry, shout, or lively call
sentences: A whillilew came from the playground. 操場那邊傳來一陣輕快的喊聲。
The song ended with a cheerful whillilew. 歌曲以一聲歡快的呼喊收尾。

meaning: quickly; briskly; in a lively manner
sentences: He walked whilly down the street. 他快步走在街上。
The horse moved whilly across the field. 那匹馬輕快地穿過田野。

meaning: a whimsical or silly person or thing
sentences: The story treated him like a harmless whillywha. 故事把他寫成一個無傷大雅的怪傢伙。
She laughed at the whillywha in the play. 她對戲裡那個滑稽角色笑了出來。
A whilock fell over his forehead. 一綹頭髮垂到他的額頭上。
She tucked the whilock behind her ear. 她把那一綹頭髮塞到耳後。
The whilom king had long since vanished. 那位昔日的國王早已消失。
Whilom friends met after many years. 昔日好友多年後再度相見。
He listened whils the rain fell. 他一邊聽，一邊等雨下。
They whils worked late into the night. 他們有時會工作到深夜。

meaning: 在整個時間或直到結束時；只要、同時。
sentences: Drivers must switch off engines whilst on stand. 駕駛員必須在停車時關閉引擎。
The word whilst is used to connect ideas in a sentence. while 這個字用來連結句子中的想法。

meaning: to move or wander in a shaky, uncertain way
sentences: The old dog seemed to whilter along the path. 那隻老狗沿著小路踉蹌前行。
His thoughts began to whilter under stress. 在壓力下，他的思緒開始飄忽不定。
He bought the expensive sports car on a whim. 他一時興起（突發奇想）買了那輛昂貴的跑車。
She often changes her plans according to her every whim. 她經常根據自己的隨興想法改變計畫。

meaning: a berry or berry-bearing plant; a whimsical berry name
sentences: The child picked a handful of whimberry. 那孩子摘了一把小漿果。
The guidebook mentioned whimberry on the hill. 指南書提到山坡上有這種漿果。

meaning: a small whim or fancy; a trifle
sentences: His idea was only a whimble at first. 他的點子起初只是一時的小想法。
She dismissed the plan as a whimble. 她把那個計畫當成小打小鬧。

meaning: a wading bird with a long, curved bill
sentences: A whimbrel stood near the tide line. 一隻杓鷸站在潮線附近。
The whimbrel probed the sand for food. 那隻杓鷸在沙地裡啄食。

meaning: a fanciful or dreamy person; a child of whim
sentences: The poet was called a whimling by his friends. 朋友們把那位詩人叫作愛幻想的人。
A whimling may wander from one idea to another. 愛幻想的人常常在各種念頭間跳來跳去。
The room had a whimmy charm. 那個房間有種古靈精怪的魅力。
Her whimmy ideas made the game fun. 她那些天馬行空的點子讓遊戲更有趣。

meaning: to cry softly or make a low whining sound
sentences: The puppy began to whimper at the door. 小狗在門邊開始嗚咽。
He tried not to whimper during the pain. 他疼痛時努力不發出嗚咽聲。

meaning: one who whimpers; a low, complaining crier
sentences: The whimperer sat in the corner of the room. 那個嗚咽不止的人坐在房間角落。
No whimperer could be heard after the storm. 暴風雨過後，已聽不見嗚咽聲。

meaning: crying softly or whining in a low voice
sentences: The whimpering child wanted his mother. 那個嗚咽的孩子想找媽媽。
She heard a whimpering sound from the hall. 她從走廊聽到低低的嗚咽聲。
He spoke whimperingly after the bad news. 聽到壞消息後，他帶著嗚咽地說話。
The dog looked at her whimperingly. 那隻狗嗚咽著望向她。

meaning: whimsy; a fanciful idea or playful imagination
sentences: The novel is full of whimsey and humor. 那本小說充滿奇想與幽默。
Her whimsey made the design feel light. 她的奇思妙想讓設計顯得很輕快。
The artist had a whimsic style. 那位藝術家的風格很奇趣。
A whimsic remark started the conversation. 一句奇思妙語開啟了對話。

meaning: playfully unusual or fanciful in style or behavior
sentences: The garden had a whimsical stone path. 那座花園有條充滿奇趣的石子小徑。
Her whimsical laugh made everyone smile. 她那種俏皮的笑聲讓大家都笑了。
The play's whimsicality delighted the crowd. 那齣戲的奇趣風格讓觀眾很著迷。
He admired the whimsicality of her drawings. 他欣賞她畫作中的奇想感。

meaning: in a whimsical or playful manner
sentences: She smiled whimsically at the odd sign. 她看著那個奇怪的招牌，俏皮地笑了。
The child spoke whimsically about clouds and stars. 那個孩子天真地談著雲和星星。
The whimsicalness of the story made children smile. 這個故事的異想天開讓孩子們露出笑容。
She liked the whimsicalness of the little drawings. 她喜歡那些小圖畫的奇想感。

meaning: 以奇想方式構思；幻想著做
sentences: He whimsied about living in a house by the sea. 他幻想著住在海邊的一棟房子裡。
The child whimsied a castle out of spare boxes. 那孩子把幾個空箱子幻想成一座城堡。

meaning: 小巧的奇石；帶有玩賞意味的石頭
sentences: He kept a whimstone in his pocket as a lucky charm. 他把一塊奇石放在口袋裡當作幸運物。
The museum labeled the tiny sample a whimstone. 博物館把那塊小標本標成奇石。

meaning: 小玩意；花俏而不實用的東西
sentences: The shop window was full of colorful whimwham. 那家店的櫥窗擺滿了花俏的小玩意。
She bought a whimwham instead of a useful gift. 她買了花俏小物，而不是實用的禮物。

meaning: 荊豆；金雀花科的一種灌木
sentences: The whin grew thick along the rocky path. 荊豆在多石的小路旁長得很茂密。
Yellow blossoms covered the whin in spring. 春天時，荊豆開滿了黃色花朵。

meaning: 荊豆果；荊豆上的小果實
sentences: The bird picked a whinberry from the bush. 那隻鳥從灌木上啄走一顆荊豆果。
Children gathered whinberry for a small snack. 孩子們採荊豆果當作簡單點心。

meaning: 砍荊豆的人；修剪荊豆的工具
sentences: The whinchacker cleared the hedge before noon. 那個砍荊豆的人在中午前清理了樹籬。
A sharp whinchacker was hanging in the shed. 小屋裡掛著一把鋒利的修剪工具。
A whinchat perched on the fence post. 一隻石鶇停在柵欄柱上。
The whinchat flashed its bright chest for a moment. 那隻石鶇胸口的亮色只閃了一下。

meaning: 粗略檢查；草草看過一遍
sentences: He gave the fence a quick whincheck before leaving. 他離開前草草檢查了一下柵欄。
The mechanic did a whincheck and found no fault. 那位技師隨便看了一遍，沒發現問題。

meaning: 吃荊豆的牛；古老的地方說法
sentences: The whincow wandered near the hedgerow all afternoon. 那頭吃荊豆的牛整個下午都在樹籬邊走動。
Old stories mention a whincow in the field. 舊故事裡提到田裡有一頭吃荊豆的牛。

meaning: 低聲抱怨；發出輕微哀鳴
sentences: The child began to whindle when the game ended. 遊戲結束時，孩子開始低聲抱怨。
Wind seemed to whindle through the cracks. 風似乎從縫隙中發出輕微哀鳴。
The dog began to whine at the door, wanting to go outside for a walk. 狗在門口開始哀鳴，想出去散步。
Stop whining about the small problems and try to find a solution. 別再為那些小問題發牢騷（抱怨）了，試著找個解決方案。

meaning: 愛抱怨的人；愛發牢騷的人
sentences: No one wanted to sit beside the constant whiner. 沒有人想坐在那個老愛抱怨的人旁邊。
The coach told the whiner to focus on the work. 教練叫那個愛發牢騷的人把注意力放在工作上。

meaning: 硬黑石；一種堅硬的火成岩
sentences: The road was paved with broken whinestone. 那條路鋪著碎裂的硬黑石。
A block of whinestone was used for the wall. 一塊硬黑石被拿來砌牆。
The kettle began to whing softly on the stove. 水壺在爐上開始發出細細的鳴聲。
The wire seemed to whing in the wind. 那根電線似乎在風中尖細地鳴響。

meaning: 抱怨；小題大作地發牢騷
sentences: He always whinges when the bus is late. 公車一晚到，他總是要抱怨。
Try not to whinge about every small mistake. 不要對每個小錯都小題大作地抱怨。

meaning: 愛抱怨的人；老是發牢騷的人
sentences: The team was tired of the same old whinger. 團隊已經受夠了那個老愛抱怨的人。
She ignored the whinger and kept working. 她不理那個愛發牢騷的人，繼續做事。
The whininess in his voice made the room tense. 他聲音裡的哀怨感讓房間氣氛緊張。
Her whininess annoyed everyone at the table. 她那種愛抱怨的語氣惹惱了桌邊所有人。

meaning: 哀怨地；帶著抱怨口氣地
sentences: He spoke whiningly when the plan changed. 計畫一改變，他就哀怨地說話。
The puppy looked up whiningly for food. 那隻小狗帶著哀怨的神情抬頭討食。

meaning: 輕聲嘶鳴；短促的馬鳴聲
sentences: A soft whinnel came from the stable. 馬廄裡傳出一聲輕柔的嘶鳴。
He heard a whinnel before the horse moved. 馬動身前，他先聽到一聲短促馬鳴。
The whinner called from the field at dusk. 傍晚時，那匹嘶鳴的馬從田裡叫了起來。
Nobody liked working with such a whinner. 沒有人喜歡和那種老抱怨的人共事。

meaning: 微弱的馬鳴聲；短促嘶聲
sentences: The whinnock was barely audible in the rain. 那聲短促嘶鳴在雨中幾乎聽不見。
A whinnock drifted from the dark barn. 黑暗的穀倉裡飄來一聲微弱馬鳴。
The horse gave a short whinny outside the gate. 那匹馬在門外發出短促的嘶鳴。
A whinny came from the stall after feeding time. 喂食時間過後，馬廄裡傳出一聲馬嘶。
The wall was built from rough whinstone. 那面牆是用粗糙的硬黑石砌成的。
Whinstone chips crunched under their boots. 他們靴子下的硬黑石碎片嘎吱作響。
The whiny tone made the request hard to hear. 那種愛抱怨的語氣讓請求聽起來很刺耳。
He sounded whiny after waiting too long. 他等太久之後，說話就帶著哭腔。
The old soldier carried a whinyard at his side. 那位老兵腰邊掛著一把短劍。
A whinyard hung above the fireplace as a relic. 壁爐上方掛著一把短劍作為古物。
The rider used a leather whip to encourage the horse to run. 騎手用皮鞭鼓勵馬兒跑動。
She learned how to whip fresh cream until it becomes thick. 她學會了如何攪打（鞭打）鮮奶油直到變稠。

meaning: 細長的腹部；身形纖細的人
sentences: The whipbelly of the boat made it move fast. 船身細長的腹部讓船行得很快。
He joked that the athlete was a whipbelly. 他開玩笑說那位運動員身形十分纖細。

meaning: 鞭鳥；叫聲像甩鞭子的鳥
sentences: A whipbird called sharply from the trees. 一隻鞭鳥在樹林裡尖銳鳴叫。
The whipbird's cry sounded like a crack of leather. 鞭鳥的叫聲聽起來像皮鞭一響。

meaning: 鞭索；類似九尾鞭的工具
sentences: The old coachman kept a whipcat on the seat. 那位老車夫把鞭索放在座位上。
A whipcat was hanging beside the stable door. 馬廄門邊掛著一條鞭索。

meaning: 鞭索；又細又硬的強韌繩索
sentences: The parcel was tied with sturdy whipcord. 包裹用結實的鞭索綁著。
Whipcord was strong enough for the heavy load. 那種強韌繩索足以承受重物。
He had a whipcordy frame from years of labor. 多年勞動讓他有一副纖細結實的身形。
The rope looked whipcordy and very tough. 那條繩子看起來像鞭索一樣又細又韌。
The whipcrack echoed across the field. 鞭響在田野上回蕩。
She heard a whipcrack from the training ring. 她從訓練場聽到一聲清脆的抽打聲。

meaning: 甩鞭的人；喜歡抽響鞭子的人
sentences: The whipcracker stood in the center of the yard. 那個甩鞭的人站在院子中央。
Everyone turned when the whipcracker raised his arm. 當那位甩鞭的人抬起手臂時，大家都轉過頭去。
He learned whipcraft from an experienced rider. 他向一位有經驗的騎手學習鞭技。
Good whipcraft takes patience and control. 好的鞭技需要耐心與控制力。

meaning: 舌接法；一種植物嫁接方式
sentences: The gardener used a whipgraft on the young tree. 園丁在幼樹上用了舌接法。
A clean whipgraft can help two stems grow together. 乾淨的舌接法能讓兩根枝條一起生長。

meaning: 由鞭索驅動的裝置；簡單提升器
sentences: The old shop used a whipjack to lift the beam. 那間舊工坊用鞭索驅動的裝置來抬梁木。
He repaired the whipjack before the work began. 開工前，他先修好了那個簡單提升器。
The arena crowd cheered for the whipking. 競技場觀眾為那位鞭技高手歡呼。
He acted like a whipking during the parade. 遊行時，他表現得像個強勢駕馭者。
To whiplash means to jerk back and forth; to buffet. 鞭打的意思是來回猛拉；自助餐。
People may whiplash in different situations depending on the context. 根据具体情况，人们可能会在不同的情况下挥鞭。

meaning: 像鞭子的；細長而有彈性的
sentences: The branch had a whiplike bend at the end. 那根樹枝末端有鞭子般的彎曲。
Her whiplike movements were quick and sharp. 她那種像鞭子一樣的動作又快又俐落。
The whipmaker worked in a small workshop. 那位製鞭者在一間小工坊裡工作。
A skilled whipmaker can shape the handle neatly. 熟練的製鞭者能把把手做得很精緻。

meaning: 製鞭工藝；做鞭子的過程
sentences: Whipmaking was once a common village trade. 製鞭工藝曾經是鄉村常見的行業。
He studied whipmaking before opening a shop. 他在開店前先學習製鞭。
The whipman sat on the front seat of the cart. 那位趕車人坐在馬車前座。
A careful whipman never struck the horse hard. 細心的趕車人從不重重抽打馬匹。

meaning: 鞭技；用鞭子的熟練本領
sentences: The show was impressive because of his whipmanship. 那場表演因為他的鞭技而令人印象深刻。
Whipmanship takes steady hands and timing. 鞭技需要穩定的雙手與準確的時機。
The whipmaster taught the children how to swing safely. 那位鞭技師傅教孩子們如何安全地揮動鞭子。
Everyone trusted the whipmaster's calm voice. 大家都信任那位鞭子高手沉穩的聲音。
He could whippa the rope through the air. 他能把繩子猛力揮過空中。
The rider used the whip to whippa the reins lightly. 騎手用鞭子輕輕抽動韁繩。

meaning: 可鞭打的；可快速攪打的
sentences: The mixture was whippable after a few minutes. 這個混合物幾分鐘後就可以打發。
A whippable cream makes a light dessert topping. 可打發的奶油能做出輕盈的甜點裝飾。
The horse flinched at the whipparee. 那匹馬被那一下鞭打嚇了一跳。
He heard a whipparee and then silence. 他先聽到一記鞭打，接著就安靜下來。

meaning: 被抽打的；打發好的；筋疲力盡的
sentences: She whipped the cream until it was fluffy. 她把奶油打到蓬鬆為止。
By the end of the hike, he felt whipped. 走到最後，他已經累得筋疲力盡。

meaning: 抽打者；鞭子或攪拌器的使用者
sentences: The whipper stood beside the wagon. 那位抽打者站在馬車旁邊。
A quick whipper can move a rope with precision. 熟練的抽打者能精準揮動繩子。

meaning: 乳臭未乾的小子；狂妄年輕人
sentences: The old man scolded the whippersnapper for talking back. 老人因為那個乳臭未乾的小子頂嘴而責備他。
No one liked the loud whippersnapper in the room. 房裡沒有人喜歡那個大聲嚷嚷的年輕人。

meaning: 鞭尾；尾巴細長如鞭的鳥或動物
sentences: The whippertail darted across the sand. 那隻鞭尾生物飛快地穿過沙地。
A whippertail bird flicked its long tail in the sun. 一隻尾巴細長如鞭的鳥在陽光下甩動長尾。

meaning: 惠比特犬；一種細長敏捷的犬種
sentences: The whippet raced across the yard in seconds. 那隻惠比特犬幾秒內就衝過院子。
A whippet is known for speed and grace. 惠比特犬以速度和優雅著稱。
The whippeter kept the horse moving at a steady pace. 那位揮鞭的人讓馬保持穩定步伐。
A careful whippeter knows when to stop. 謹慎的揮鞭者知道什麼時候該停下。

meaning: 柔韌性；像鞭子一樣易彎的特性
sentences: The whippiness of the branch helped it bend without breaking. 樹枝的柔韌性讓它彎曲而不折斷。
She liked the whippiness of the new rope. 她喜歡那條新繩子的柔韌感。
The whipping of the rope made a sharp sound in the wind. 繩子在風中快速抽動，發出清脆聲響。
No one wanted to see whipping used as punishment. 沒有人想看到把鞭打當成懲罰。

meaning: 像抽鞭子一樣地；迅速地
sentences: The wind moved whippingly across the open field. 風像抽鞭子一樣迅速掠過空曠田野。
He turned whippingly and ran toward the gate. 他迅速轉身，朝大門跑去。

meaning: 挽具橫木；連接兩匹牲口的橫樑
sentences: The cart was hitched with a whippletree. 那輛車用挽具橫木連接起來。
The farmer checked the whippletree before starting out. 農夫出發前先檢查那根挽具橫木。
A whippoorwill called from the dark hillside. 一隻夜鷹在黑暗山坡上鳴叫。
We heard the whippoorwill after sunset. 日落後我們聽見了夜鷹的叫聲。

meaning: 鞭刑柱；用來鞭打的柱子
sentences: The old story mentioned a whippost in the square. 那個老故事提到廣場上的鞭刑柱。
The prisoners were tied near the whippost. 囚犯被綁在鞭刑柱附近。
The whippowill sang throughout the warm night. 那隻夜鷹整個溫暖夜晚都在鳴唱。
Older books often used the spelling whippowill. 舊書常使用這種拼法。

meaning: 柔韌的；像鞭子一樣易彎的
sentences: The whippy stem bent in the breeze. 那根柔韌的莖在微風中彎了起來。
He liked the whippy feel of the new fishing rod. 他喜歡那支新釣竿的柔韌手感。

meaning: 長柄雙人鋸；使兩面夾擊
sentences: Two workers used a whipsaw to cut the log. 兩名工人用長柄雙人鋸鋸開原木。
The trader felt a whipsaw from sudden price swings. 那名交易員受到價格劇烈波動的雙面夾擊。
The whipsawyer worked in rhythm with his partner. 那位雙人鋸工人和搭檔配合得很有節奏。
A skilled whipsawyer can cut a thick log quickly. 熟練的雙人鋸工人能很快鋸開粗木頭。

meaning: 快速航行的船；急速前進的船隻
sentences: The whipship raced across the narrow channel. 那艘快速航行的船飛快穿過狹窄海峽。
The captain praised the whipship for its speed. 船長稱讚那艘船的速度很快。

meaning: 鞭柄插孔；固定鞭子的座口
sentences: The handle fit tightly into the whipsocket. 那個手柄緊密地卡進鞭柄插孔。
He repaired the whipsocket before the ride. 他在騎乘前先修好了鞭柄插孔。

meaning: 舊式操舵桿；船上的舵桿
sentences: The sailor gripped the whipstaff with both hands. 那名水手雙手握住舵桿。
Old ships were often steered by a whipstaff. 舊式船隻常靠舵桿來操縱。

meaning: 鞭狀莖；細長且彎曲的莖
sentences: A whipstalk rose from the center of the plant. 一根鞭狀莖從植物中央長出來。
The gardener trimmed the whipstalk carefully. 園丁小心地修剪那根細長莖。

meaning: 鞭具攤位；售賣鞭子的攤位
sentences: They found a whipstall at the old market. 他們在舊市場找到一個賣鞭具的攤位。
The whipstall displayed leather and braided cords. 那個攤位展示著皮革和編繩。

meaning: 精力旺盛的人；機靈又敏捷的人
sentences: He was a real whipster on the basketball court. 他在籃球場上真是個機靈又敏捷的人。
The young whipster finished the task in minutes. 那個靈活的小夥子幾分鐘內就把工作做完了。

meaning: 鞭狀木棒；細長彈性的棍子
sentences: He cut a whipstick from the willow tree. 他從柳樹上砍下一根細長木棒。
The whipstick bent without snapping. 那根鞭狀木棒彎了卻沒有折斷。

meaning: 包邊縫；用來收邊的針腳
sentences: She finished the edge with a whipstitch. 她用包邊縫完成布料邊緣。
The whipstitch kept the fabric from fraying. 那種針腳讓布料不容易鬆邊。
The whipstock cracked after years of use. 那根鞭柄在使用多年後裂開了。
He polished the whipstock until it shone. 他把鞭柄擦到發亮。

meaning: 已鞭打的；whipped 的舊拼法
sentences: The whipt grass bent low after the storm. 風暴過後，那些被壓彎的草垂得很低。
Old texts sometimes used the spelling whipt. 舊文獻有時會使用這種拼法。

meaning: 鞭尾蜥蜴；尾巴細長如鞭的蜥蜴
sentences: A whiptail darted across the warm rock. 一隻鞭尾蜥蜴飛快掠過溫熱岩石。
The guide pointed out the whiptail near the path. 嚮導指著步道旁的鞭尾蜥蜴。

meaning: 細枝樹；枝條像鞭子一樣柔長的樹
sentences: The whiptree swayed in the strong wind. 那棵細枝樹在強風中搖擺。
Its long branches gave the whiptree its name. 它細長的枝條讓這棵樹得了這個名字。
The branch bent whipwise under the pressure. 樹枝在壓力下像鞭子一樣彎下去。
He moved whipwise through the crowd. 他迅疾地穿過人群。
The doctor explained that whipworm can infect the intestine. 醫生解釋說鞭蟲會感染腸道。
Clean water helps reduce whipworm infection. 乾淨的水有助於減少鞭蟲感染。

meaning: 嗡嗡聲；呼呼作響；急速轉動
sentences: The whir of the fan filled the room. 電風扇的嗡嗡聲充滿整個房間。
We could hear a soft whir outside the window. 我們聽見窗外有輕微的嗡嗡聲。
The old wheel seemed to whirken in the mud. 那個舊輪子在泥地裡似乎還在轉動。
He watched the plate whirken slowly on the stand. 他看著盤子在架子上慢慢旋轉。

meaning: 快速旋轉、公轉、旋轉或轉向。
sentences: The dancer whirled across the stage, stopped, and whirled around to face the audience. 舞者旋轉穿過舞台，停了下來，然後旋轉面向觀眾。
People often whirl when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會感到困惑。
The child made a whirlabout on the grass. 那個孩子在草地上轉了一圈。
The dance ended with a quick whirlabout. 舞蹈以一個快速旋轉收尾。

meaning: 旋風；帶著強烈旋轉的風
sentences: A whirlblast of dust crossed the road. 一陣旋風般的塵土穿過道路。
The tent shook in the whirlblast. 帳篷在旋風中搖晃。

meaning: 可旋轉的骨節；轉動感很強的骨頭
sentences: The doctor checked the whirlbone near the ankle. 醫生檢查了腳踝附近那個可轉動的骨節。
He felt a sharp pain in the whirlbone. 他感到那個骨節一陣刺痛。

meaning: 心思轉得很快的人；思緒飛快的人
sentences: She was a whirlbrain who jumped from idea to idea. 她是個思緒飛快的人，總是一個想法接一個想法。
The teacher told the whirlbrain to slow down. 老師叫那個腦子轉得很快的學生慢一點。
The dancer whirled across the stage. 舞者在舞台上旋轉而過。
The leaves whirled in the autumn wind. 葉子在秋風中飛旋。
The whirler spun around with a loud laugh. 那個旋轉者一邊大笑一邊轉圈。
The machine used a small whirler to mix the paint. 那台機器用一個小旋轉裝置來攪拌油漆。

meaning: 旋轉物；快速轉動的東西
sentences: The toy was a colorful whirley. 那個玩具是一個彩色旋轉物。
The whirley spun until it fell over. 那個旋轉玩具一直轉，直到倒下。

meaning: 旋轉玩具；會快速打轉的東西
sentences: The child loved the old whirlgig in the yard. 那個孩子很喜歡院子裡那個舊旋轉玩具。
A small whirlgig spun in the wind. 一個小小的旋轉玩具在風中轉動。
The whirlicane tore through the empty field. 那場旋風席捲了空曠田地。
The villagers ran inside when the whirlicane came. 旋風來臨時，村民趕緊跑進屋內。
The whirligig spun so fast that the colors blurred. 那個旋轉玩具轉得太快，顏色都看糊了。
Children crowded around the whirligig at the fair. 孩子們在市集上圍著旋轉玩具。

meaning: 花俏的旋轉裝置；亂轉的玩意
sentences: The whirlimagig on the shelf kept spinning slowly. 架子上的花俏旋轉裝置慢慢轉個不停。
He built a strange whirlimagig from old parts. 他用舊零件做出一個奇特的亂轉玩意。
a whirling carousel; whirling dancers 旋轉的旋轉木馬；旋轉舞者
The report describes the result as whirling. 報告稱這項結果令人震驚。
The snow moved whirlingly across the road. 雪花旋轉著掠過道路。
The dancers turned whirlingly under the lights. 舞者在燈光下飛快旋轉。

meaning: 旋轉物；花俏的轉動玩意
sentences: The child pointed at the bright whirlmagee on the table. 那個孩子指著桌上那個鮮亮的旋轉物。
No one knew what the whirlmagee was for. 沒人知道那個花俏轉動玩意是做什麼的。
A whirlpool is an instance of a vortex produced by ocean tides, or by a hole underneath where the water would drain out, such as in a bathtub. 漩渦是由海洋潮汐或下面的孔（例如浴缸中的水排出處）產生的渦流的一個例子。
The term whirlpool refers to A swirling body of water. 漩渦一詞指的是旋轉的水體。

meaning: 旋起的一團氣流；小旋風
sentences: A whirlpuff of dust rose from the floor. 一團旋起的塵土從地板上升起。
The kite disappeared into a whirlpuff of wind. 那隻風箏消失在一陣小旋風裡。

meaning: 愛亂轉的人；快速轉動的小東西
sentences: The little whirlwig never sat still for long. 那個小傢伙總是坐不住，像個愛亂轉的人。
A metal whirlwig spun on the table. 一個金屬小轉物在桌上轉動。

meaning: 猛烈向前掃過的人或物體或事件。
sentences: Once he got that new scooter he turned into a whirlwind and damaged all the flowers. 一旦他得到了那輛新摩托車，他就變成了旋風，損壞了所有的花朵。
The weeks leading up to the convention were a whirlwind of preparation and hurried activity. 大會召開前的幾週是一場旋風般的準備和匆忙的活動。

meaning: 像旋風的；急促而猛烈的
sentences: The debate had a whirlwindish pace. 那場辯論的節奏像旋風一樣急促。
Her whirlwindish arrival startled everyone. 她像旋風般出現，把大家都嚇了一跳。

meaning: 帶旋風感的；風大而急的
sentences: The afternoon felt whirlwindy and unstable. 那個下午又急又亂，帶著旋風感。
A whirlwindy sky gathered over the hills. 山丘上方聚起一片風急雲湧的天空。
The whirly toy rolled off the table. 那個旋轉玩具從桌上滾了下來。
She drew a whirly pattern on the page. 她在頁面上畫了一個旋轉圖案。

meaning: 旋轉小玩意；花俏的小轉具
sentences: The whirlygigum on the desk spun in the breeze. 桌上的旋轉小玩意在微風中轉動。
He made a whirlygigum from wire and paper. 他用鐵絲和紙做了一個花俏的小轉具。

meaning: 嗡嗡地轉動；發出低沉轉聲
sentences: The machine began to whirret after a short pause. 機器短暫停頓後又開始嗡嗡轉動。
The old fan seemed to whirret all night. 那台舊風扇整晚都像在嗡嗡作響。
A soft whirrey came from the basement. 地下室傳來輕微的嗡嗡聲。
We listened to the whirrey of the motor. 我們聽著馬達的輕微轉動聲。
A loud whirroo broke the silence outside. 一陣響亮的呼嘯聲打破了外面的寧靜。
The bird answered with a strange whirroo. 那隻鳥以奇特的叫聲回應。

meaning: 快速轉動的；呼呼作響的
sentences: The whirry blades flashed in the sunlight. 那些快速轉動的葉片在陽光下閃了一下。
He heard a whirry noise from the attic. 他聽見閣樓傳來呼呼作響的聲音。
He could whirtle a tune while walking home. 他走回家時能輕聲吹出一段旋律。
The kettle began to whirtle on the stove. 水壺在爐子上開始發出輕微的嘯聲。
A whish came from the wind through the reeds. 風吹過蘆葦時發出一陣輕響。
We heard a soft whish as the arrow flew past. 箭飛過時，我們聽見一聲輕微的呼嘯。
The celebrity was whisked away by her bodyguards to avoid the crowd. 那位名人被保鏢快速帶走以避開人群。
Use a wire whisk to mix the eggs and milk together. 使用金屬攪拌器將雞蛋和牛奶混合在一起。
The cat cleaned its whiskers after finishing its meal. 貓咪吃完飯後清理了自己的鬍鬚。
He missed the target by a whisker. 他差一點點（差一根鬍鬚的距離）就擊中了目標。

meaning: 鬍鬚的總稱；一臉鬚髭的樣子
sentences: His whiskerage made him look older than he was. 他一臉鬚髭，看起來比實際年齡更老。
The old portrait showed a great whiskerage on the men. 那幅老肖像裡，男人們都留著很濃的鬍鬚。

meaning: 滿臉鬍鬚的人；鬍髭張揚的人
sentences: The whiskerando strode into the tavern with pride. 那個滿臉鬍鬚的人昂首走進酒館。
He looked like an old whiskerando from the frontier days. 他看起來像西部拓荒年代的老鬍鬚漢。

meaning: 長滿鬍鬚的；鬍髭飄飄的
sentences: The actor appeared whiskerandoed for the costume scene. 那位演員在服裝場景裡頂著濃密鬍鬚出現。
The whiskerandoed sailor looked ready for a storm. 那位鬍髭飄飄的水手看起來已準備好迎接風暴。
The whiskered man nodded at the door. 那位留鬍子的男人朝門口點了點頭。
A whiskered cat slept beside the window. 一隻鬍鬚很長的貓睡在窗邊。

meaning: 留鬍子的人；修鬍工具的使用者
sentences: The whiskerer trimmed his beard every morning. 那位留鬍子的人每天早上都修整鬍子。
In the story, the whiskerer was known for his neat face. 在故事裡，那位留鬍子的人以整潔的面容聞名。
He only had a tiny whiskerette above his lip. 他的上唇只留著一小撮鬍子。
The joke was about a boy's first whiskerette. 那個笑話是在說男孩第一次長出的小鬍子。
The whiskerless boy looked very young. 那個沒有鬍子的男孩看起來很年輕。
He preferred a whiskerless face for the formal photo. 他拍正式照片時偏好乾淨無鬚的臉。
The whiskerlike roots hung from the branch. 那些像鬍鬚一樣的根從樹枝上垂下來。
A whiskerlike line ran across the sketch. 草圖上劃過一道像鬍鬚般細長的線。
His whiskery face was easy to remember. 他那張滿是鬍鬚的臉很容易記住。
The old fisherman had a whiskery smile. 那位老漁夫帶著一抹鬍鬚濃密的笑容。
He ordered a glass of whiskey after dinner. 晚餐後，他點了一杯威士忌。
The bottle of whiskey stayed unopened on the shelf. 那瓶威士忌一直沒開，放在架子上。
The old man enjoyed a glass of fine Scottish whiskey after his dinner. 老人喜歡在晚飯後喝一杯上好的蘇格蘭威士忌。
Whiskey is a popular alcoholic beverage produced in many countries. 威士忌是許多國家都有生產的一種受歡迎的含酒精飲料。
She added a whiskful of sugar to the tea. 她往茶裡加了一大匙糖。
A whiskful of flour was enough for the sauce. 一匙麵粉就足夠做那份醬汁。

meaning: 喝了威士忌的；帶著醉意的
sentences: He looked whiskied after the long celebration. 長時間的慶祝之後，他看起來有些醉意。
The whiskied guest laughed at every joke. 那位微醺的客人對每個笑話都大笑。

meaning: 加了威士忌的；含威士忌味的
sentences: The chef served a whiskified sauce with the steak. 廚師端出一份帶威士忌風味的醬汁配牛排。
She tried a whiskified dessert at the hotel bar. 她在飯店酒吧試了一道加入威士忌的甜點。
The whisking of eggs took only a minute. 攪打雞蛋只花了一分鐘。
He heard the whisking of leaves in the yard. 他聽見院子裡樹葉被風吹得飛快摩擦的聲音。
She whiskingly cleared the dishes from the table. 她迅速把盤子從桌上收走。
The wind moved whiskingly through the alley. 風迅速穿過那條小巷。
He enjoys sipping a glass of fine Scotch whisky by the fireplace. 他喜歡在壁爐旁啜飲一杯優質的蘇格蘭威士忌。
The shop has a wide selection of whiskies from around the world. 這家店有來自世界各地的多種威士忌可供選擇。

meaning: 加了威士忌的；威士忌化的
sentences: The whiskyfied cream had a warm, sharp flavor. 那道加了威士忌的奶油帶著溫熱而辛辣的風味。
He tasted a whiskyfied pudding at the festival. 他在節慶上試吃了一份加入威士忌的布丁。

meaning: 像威士忌的；帶威士忌味的
sentences: The drink had a whiskylike smell. 那杯飲料帶有像威士忌的氣味。
A whiskylike warmth spread through the sauce. 醬汁裡散出一股像威士忌般的暖味。
A whisp of smoke rose from the chimney. 一縷細煙從煙囪升起。
The cloud broke into a whisp above the hill. 雲層在山頂上方散成一縷縷。
She whispered something softly into my ear so no one could hear. 她在我耳邊輕聲說了些什麼，以免別人聽到。
The secret was shared in a quiet whisper during the meeting. 這個秘密在會議期間以小聲的耳語傳達。

meaning: 可耳語的；適合低聲說的
sentences: The secret was barely whisperable. 這個秘密幾乎只能低聲說。
He chose a whisperable joke for the quiet room. 他挑了一個適合在安靜房間裡低聲說的笑話。
The whisperation in the hall stopped when she entered. 她一進門，走廊裡的耳語聲就停了。
Their whisperation continued long after midnight. 他們低聲交談一直持續到午夜之後。
He gave a whispered warning before the door opened. 門打開前，他低聲提醒了一句。
The whispered answer was enough for the teacher. 那句耳語般的回答已足夠讓老師聽見。
The whisperer spoke so softly that only I heard him. 那位低語者說話極輕，只有我聽得到。
She was known as a whisperer in the library. 她在圖書館裡以善於低聲說話而聞名。

meaning: 耳語的狀態；低聲交談的圈子
sentences: The room fell into whisperhood after the announcement. 公告一出，房間裡就陷入耳語狀態。
Their little whisperhood grew around the campfire. 他們圍著營火形成了一個低聲談話的小圈子。
The whispering in the next room kept him awake. 隔壁房間的耳語聲讓他睡不著。
We heard whispering behind the curtain. 我們聽見窗簾後有人低聲說話。
She whisperingly asked for the door to be shut. 她低聲請人把門關上。
The children spoke whisperingly in the dark. 孩子們在黑暗中低聲說話。
The whisperingness of the room made everyone calm. 那個房間的低語感讓每個人都平靜下來。
He liked the whisperingness of the old chapel. 他喜歡那座老禮拜堂裡的耳語氣氛。

meaning: 沒有耳語的；安靜無聲的
sentences: The whisperless hall felt almost sacred. 那個安靜無聲的大廳幾乎有種神聖感。
They stood whisperless at the back of the room. 他們安靜無聲地站在房間後方。

meaning: 充滿耳語的；像耳語般的
sentences: The whisperous breeze moved through the trees. 那陣像耳語般的微風穿過樹林。
Her whisperous voice was hard to hear but soothing. 她那像耳語般的聲音雖然難聽清，卻很安撫人心。
He spoke whisperously so no one else would hear. 他耳語般地說話，免得別人聽見。
The wind passed whisperously over the grass. 風輕聲地掠過草地。

meaning: 防耳語的；不易被聽見的
sentences: The booth was whisperproof enough for private talk. 那個隔間足夠隔音，適合私下交談。
They wanted a whisperproof room for the meeting. 他們想要一間不容易被偷聽的會議室。
Her whispery voice carried across the room. 她那柔和的低語聲傳遍整個房間。
The song ended in a whispery fade. 這首歌以輕柔的低聲收尾。
He could whissle loudly with his fingers. 他能用手指吹出很響的口哨。
The wind seemed to whissle around the roof. 風似乎在屋頂四周嘶嘶作響。
Mr. Whisson signed the report at the bottom. 惠森先生在報告底部簽了名。
The Whisson family has lived there for generations. 惠森家族世代住在那裡。

meaning: 惠斯特牌戲；一種撲克牌戲
sentences: They played whist after dinner. 晚餐後他們打惠斯特牌戲。
The old club still met for whist on Fridays. 那個老俱樂部仍在週五聚會打惠斯特。
The whister studied the cards carefully. 那位惠斯特牌手仔細研究手中的牌。
Each whister at the table kept a calm face. 桌上的每位惠斯特牌手都神情平靜。
He called himself a whisterpoop after the mistake. 出錯之後，他自嘲自己是個傻瓜。
The children laughed at the silly whisterpoop. 孩子們笑那個滑稽的怪人。
The train gave a loud blast of its whistle as it left station. 火車離開車站時發出了響亮的汽笛（哨）聲。
He whistled a simple melody while he was working in the garden. 他在花園裡忙活時吹著一段簡單的曲子。

meaning: 吹口哨的人；肚子會發聲的鳥名
sentences: The whistlebelly stood by the station and sang. 那個吹口哨的人站在車站旁唱著。
In the bird guide, whistlebelly was listed as a local nickname. 在鳥類指南裡，這個鳥名被列為當地俗名。

meaning: 會發出哨聲的魚；哨音魚
sentences: The fisherman said he caught a whistlefish near the rocks. 那位漁夫說他在岩岸附近捕到一條哨音魚。
The old tale described a whistlefish in the deep river. 舊傳說裡提到深河中的哨音魚。
A whistlelike sound came from the pipe. 管子裡傳出像口哨一樣的聲音。
The bird made a whistlelike call at dawn. 那隻鳥在黎明時發出哨音般的叫聲。

meaning: 吹口哨的人或物，或吹口哨作為樂器的人。
sentences: The term whistler refers to someone or something that whistles, or who plays a whistle as a musical instrument. 口哨者一詞指的是吹口哨的人或物，或將口哨作為樂器演奏的人。
The lesson introduced whistler as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了口哨這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 與惠斯勒有關的；惠斯勒風格的
sentences: The painting had a Whistlerian softness. 那幅畫帶有惠斯勒式的柔和感。
He admired the Whistlerian balance of light and shadow. 他欣賞那種惠斯勒風格的光影平衡。

meaning: 惠斯勒風格；受惠斯勒影響的作風
sentences: The critic explained the artist's whistlerism in detail. 評論家詳細解釋了那位藝術家的惠斯勒風格。
She saw a touch of whistlerism in the quiet colors. 她在那柔和的色彩裡看到一點惠斯勒式風格。

meaning: 會發出哨聲的翅膀；哨翼
sentences: The bird's whistlewing made a thin sound in flight. 那隻鳥的哨翼在飛行時發出細微聲響。
A whistlewing flashed past the fence at dusk. 黃昏時，一隻哨翼飛鳥掠過圍籬。

meaning: 可吹出哨聲的木材；哨木
sentences: The toy was carved from whistlewood. 那個玩具是用哨木雕成的。
A piece of whistlewood gave off a clear note. 一塊哨木發出了清脆的音調。

meaning: 像惠斯特牌戲的；安靜克制的
sentences: The room had a whistlike calm during the game. 比賽進行時，房間裡有種惠斯特牌戲般的安靜。
He kept a whistlike expression while thinking. 他思考時保持著一種安靜克制的神情。

meaning: 尖銳的呼吸聲；一聲口哨。
sentences: The term whistling refers to A shrill, breathy sound; a whistle. 口哨一詞是指一種尖銳的呼吸聲；一聲口哨。
We learned the meaning of whistling during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了吹口哨的意思。
The train moved whistlingly through the tunnel. 火車帶著嘯聲穿過隧道。
He walked whistlingly down the street. 他一邊吹口哨一邊走在街上。
The wind had a whistly edge near the sea. 海邊的風帶著一種哨音般的尖銳感。
Her voice came out thin and whistly. 她的聲音聽起來又細又像哨聲。

meaning: 安靜克制的氣氛；惠斯特式的沉靜
sentences: The room had a whistness that suited the cards. 那個房間有種適合打牌的沉靜氣氛。
He enjoyed the whistness of the old club. 他喜歡那個老俱樂部裡的安靜克制感。

meaning: 與惠斯頓有關的；惠斯頓信徒的
sentences: The lecture took a Whistonian view of history. 這場演講採取了惠斯頓式的歷史觀。
The scholar was known for his Whistonian ideas. 那位學者以惠斯頓式思想聞名。

meaning: 可以想像到的最小的部分或顆粒；一點點。
sentences: The term whit refers to the smallest part or particle imaginable; an iota. 術語「惠特」是指可以想像的最小的部分或顆粒；一點點。
The lesson introduced whit as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「whit」作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Whit arrived early for the meeting. 惠特很早就到會了。
Everyone trusted Whit to keep the schedule. 大家都信任他能守住時間表。
She wore a stunning white dress to the gala dinner. 她穿了一件亮麗的白洋裝參加正式晚宴。
The ground was covered with a thick layer of white snow. 地面覆蓋著一層厚厚的白雪。
The whiteback stood out against the dark water. 那隻白背動物在深色水面上特別醒目。
A whiteback bird flew over the reeds. 一隻白背鳥飛過蘆葦叢。
We fried the whitebait until it was crisp. 我們把幼魚炸到酥脆。
The market sold whitebait in small boxes. 市場用小盒子賣這種小魚苗。
The hikers noticed the whitebark on the ridge. 登山客注意到山脊上的白樹皮樹。
A whitebark grows well in cold wind. 白樹皮樹很適合寒風地帶生長。
The whitebeard greeted the children kindly. 那位白鬍子老人親切地問候孩子們。
A whitebeard sat by the fire and smiled. 一位白鬍子老人坐在火邊微笑。
The whitebelly flashed when the bird turned. 那隻鳥轉身時露出白腹。
A whitebelly can be easy to spot. 白腹動物很容易辨認。
The whitebill nested near the river bank. 那種白嘴鳥在河岸附近築巢。
They saw a whitebill gliding above the marsh. 他們看見一隻白嘴鳥在沼澤上空滑翔。
A whitebird landed on the fence. 一隻白鳥落在籬笆上。
The child pointed at the whitebird in the yard. 孩子指著院子裡那隻白鳥。
The torch gave off a whiteblaze in the cave. 火把在洞裡放出白色耀光。
A whiteblaze flashed across the glass. 一道白亮的光芒劃過玻璃。
The storm sent whiteblow over the rocks. 暴風把白色浪沫捲到岩石上。
We watched the whiteblow crash against the shore. 我們看著白浪沫拍上岸邊。
She set a whitebottle on the shelf. 她把一個白色瓶子放在架上。
The label on the whitebottle was easy to read. 那個白瓶上的標籤很容易辨認。

meaning: 白衣黨成員；愛爾蘭秘密農民組織成員
sentences: The Whiteboy led the group through the fields. 那位白衣黨成員帶隊穿過田地。
The novel described a Whiteboy from the hills. 那部小說描寫了一名來自山區的白衣黨成員。

meaning: 白衣黨運動；白衣黨主義
sentences: Whiteboyism shaped local politics for years. 白衣黨運動多年來影響當地政治。
The historian explained the rise of Whiteboyism. 歷史學家解釋了白衣黨運動的興起。
The wind covered the lake with whitecaps. 風把湖面吹出一片白色浪尖。
A whitecap broke against the pier. 一道白浪打在碼頭上。

meaning: 白浪翻湧者；掀起白浪的東西
sentences: The whitecapper churned the water near the bridge. 那片白浪翻湧把橋邊的水攪動起來。
We watched the whitecapper race across the bay. 我們看著那片白浪翻湧在海灣上擴散。
They stayed near Whitechapel for two nights. 他們在白教堂區附近住了兩晚。
Whitechapel lies in the east of London. 白教堂區位於倫敦東部。
The whitecoat checked the patient carefully. 那位穿白袍的人仔細檢查病人。
She hung her whitecoat by the door. 她把白外套掛在門邊。
The bird showed a whitecomb on its head. 那隻鳥頭上露出白色冠羽。
A whitecomb rose above the shell. 一個白色梳狀突起長在殼上。
We bought whitecorn from the farm. 我們從農場買了白玉米。
Whitecorn can be ground into flour. 白玉米可以磨成粉。
A whitecup bloomed beside the path. 一株白杯花在小路旁綻放。
The gardener planted whitecup in a shady bed. 園丁把白杯花種在陰涼花圃裡。
The fence was whited before the festival. 節慶前圍欄被刷白了。
Her whited shoes looked new. 她那雙刷白的鞋看起來很新。
The clown wore a whiteface and a red nose. 小丑畫著白臉妝，還戴紅鼻子。
A whiteface hid the actor's features. 白臉面妝遮住了演員的五官。

meaning: 與懷特菲爾德有關的；懷特菲爾德式的
sentences: The preacher's style was strongly Whitefieldian. 那位傳教士的風格明顯帶有懷特菲爾德特色。
They studied the Whitefieldian revival movement. 他們研究懷特菲爾德式的復興運動。

meaning: 懷特菲爾德主義；懷特菲爾德思想
sentences: Whitefieldism influenced many sermons. 懷特菲爾德主義影響了許多講道。
The class discussed the spread of Whitefieldism. 課堂討論了懷特菲爾德思想的傳播。

meaning: 懷特菲爾德派信徒；懷特菲爾德追隨者
sentences: A Whitefieldite preached in the village square. 一位懷特菲爾德追隨者在村廣場講道。
The group included several Whitefieldites. 那個團體裡有幾位懷特菲爾德派信徒。
The chef served whitefish with herbs. 廚師把白魚配香草端上桌。
Whitefish live in cold clear lakes. 白魚生活在寒冷清澈的湖裡。
A whitefisher cleaned his nets at dawn. 一名捕白魚的人在黎明清理漁網。
The whitefisher knew the river well. 那位捕白魚的人很熟悉這條河。
The whitefishery closed during winter. 白魚漁場在冬天休業。
Workers repaired the dock at the whitefishery. 工人在白魚漁場修理碼頭。
Whitefoot ran ahead of the rest. 白足者跑在其他人前面。
The story called the hero Whitefoot. 這個故事把主角叫作白足者。
A whitefoot crossed the snow quietly. 一隻白足動物安靜地穿過雪地。
The tracker followed the whitefoot tracks. 追蹤者循著白足動物的足跡前進。
Whitefootism was noted in the old field report. 舊田野報告記下了白足特徵。
The biologist joked about Whitefootism in the species. 生物學家開玩笑說那種生物有白足習性。
The whitehanded clerk counted the bills. 那位手很乾淨的職員清點鈔票。
They wanted a whitehanded leader with no scandal. 他們想要一位沒有醜聞的領導者。
A whitehass grew near the hedge. 一棵白榛樹長在樹籬旁。
The carpenter used whitehass for the handle. 木匠把白榛木用在把手上。
The captain checked the whitehawse before anchoring. 船長在下錨前檢查了船首錨孔。
Salt gathered around the whitehawse after the storm. 暴風後，鹽粒堆積在船首錨孔周圍。

meaning: 粉刺的一種，表現為皮膚出現白色小腫塊，這是由於皮脂和死皮細胞滯留在皮膚毛孔中，被一層薄薄的上皮細胞堵塞所致。
sentences: Ruth knew that the whiteheads of her teenage acne were a temporary state of affairs, but that did nothing to quell her distress when an eruption hit just before prom. 露絲知道她十幾歲的痤瘡的白頭粉刺只是暫時的情況，但這並不能平息她在舞會前爆發的痛苦。

The term whitehead refers to a type of comedo, manifesting as a small whitish bump of the skin due to retention of sebum and dead skin cells in a skin pore blocked by a thin layer of epithelium. 白頭粉刺一詞指的是一種粉刺，表現為皮膚上出現一個白色的小腫塊，這是由於皮脂和死皮細胞滯留在皮膚毛孔中，被一層薄薄的上皮細胞堵塞。
The tree had a pale whiteheart. 那棵樹有淡白的木心。
People called her a whiteheart for her kindness. 大家因為她的善良叫她白心的人。
The whitehearted child shared her lunch. 那個心地純善的孩子分享了午餐。
He gave a whitehearted answer to the stranger. 他對陌生人給出善意的回答。
The whitelike dust covered the shelf. 那層像白色的灰塵覆在架子上。
A whitelike mist drifted over the field. 一層像白色的薄霧飄過田野。
The moon shone whitely on the road. 月光蒼白地照在路上。
She smiled whitely after the long walk. 她走了很久後臉色蒼白地笑了笑。
We whiten the cloth in the sun. 我們把布拿去曬白。
The paint can whiten the old fence. 這種油漆能把舊圍欄刷白。
The laundry whitener brightened the shirt. 洗衣增白劑讓襯衫更亮白。
She bought a whitener for the teeth. 她買了牙齒增白用品。
The whiteness of the snow hurt his eyes. 雪的潔白刺痛了他的眼睛。
She liked the whiteness of the fabric. 她喜歡那塊布料的潔白。
The whitening of the sky came at dawn. 天空在黎明時逐漸變白。
They used a whitening paste on the wall. 他們在牆上用了增白塗料。
The whitenose darted into the brush. 那隻白鼻動物鑽進灌木叢。
A whitenose can be hard to spot. 白鼻動物很難被發現。
She made whitepot for the family. 她為家人做了白布丁甜點。
The old recipe called for rice in whitepot. 那份老食譜要求在白布丁裡放米。
A whiteroot spread under the stone. 一條白根在石頭下伸展。
The gardener cut away the whiteroot carefully. 園丁小心剪掉那條白根。
The whiterump flashed as the bird took off. 那隻鳥起飛時露出白臀。
Birdwatchers tracked the whiterump across the marsh. 賞鳥人追蹤那隻白臀鳥穿過沼澤。
The whites of the eggs were beaten well. 蛋白被充分打發。
He painted the whites of the walls first. 他先刷了牆面的白色部分。
A whitesark swam near the boat. 一條白鯊在船邊游過。
The legend described a huge whitesark. 傳說裡有一條巨大的白鯊。
A whiteseam ran across the cloth. 布料上有一道白色接縫。
The tailor followed the whiteseam by eye. 裁縫用眼睛沿著那道白色接縫工作。
The whiteshank stood in the mud. 白脛鳥站在泥地裡。
We spotted a whiteshank beside the stream. 我們在溪邊看到一隻白脛鳥。
The whiteside of the cloth was faded. 那塊布的白色一面已經褪色了。
She folded the paper so the whiteside faced out. 她把紙摺起來，讓白色那面朝外。
The whitesmith polished the tray until it shone. 那位錫匠把托盤擦得發亮。
In the old town, a whitesmith repaired household metalware. 在那座老城裡，有位錫匠修理家用金屬器皿。
A single whitestone marked the edge of the path. 一塊白石標出了小路的邊緣。
The child picked up a whitestone from the riverbank. 那個孩子從河岸撿起一塊白石。
A whitetail crossed the field at dusk. 一隻白尾鹿在黃昏時穿過田野。
The guide pointed out the whitetail hiding in the grass. 嚮導指出那隻藏在草裡的白尾鹿。
The hedge was planted with whitethorn. 那排樹籬種的是白刺樹。
In spring, the whitethorn covered the lane with blossoms. 春天時，白刺樹把小路開滿了花。
A whitethroat sang from the top of the bush. 一隻白喉鶯在灌木頂端鳴唱。
The birdwatcher recorded a whitethroat near the stream. 那位賞鳥者在溪邊記錄到一隻白喉鶯。
The shark had a bright whitetip on its fin. 那條鯊魚的鰭上有明亮的白尖。
The diver saw a whitetip circling far below. 潛水員看到一條白尖鯊在下方盤旋。
The mountain had a whitetop from the snow. 那座山因積雪而有一個白頂。
The farmer tried to clear the whitetop from the field. 農夫試著清除田裡的白頂草。
The leaf showed a clear whitevein pattern. 那片葉子呈現出明顯的白脈紋路。
A whitevein ran through the center of the petal. 一條白色葉脈穿過花瓣中央。
The room felt brighter with a clean whitewall. 房間因為乾淨的白牆而顯得更明亮。
They painted the whitewall before the party. 他們在派對前把白牆重新刷了一遍。
The sheep moved whitewards across the hill. 那群羊朝著白色的一側穿過山坡。
He turned whitewards when the light changed. 當光線改變時，他轉向白色那邊。
The shop displayed plates made of whiteware. 那家店展示的是白瓷盤子。
She packed the whiteware carefully in the box. 她小心地把白瓷器裝進箱子裡。
The old barn got a fresh coat of whitewash. 那座舊穀倉刷上了一層新的石灰水。
The wall looked brighter after the whitewash. 牆面刷過石灰水後看起來更明亮。
The whitewasher climbed the ladder with a bucket. 那位粉刷工提著桶爬上梯子。
A whitewasher covered the marks on the wall. 一位粉刷工把牆上的痕跡蓋住了。
A patch of whiteweed grew by the fence. 籬笆旁長著一小片白花雜草。
The gardener pulled the whiteweed before it spread. 園丁在白花雜草蔓延前把它拔掉了。
A whitewing flashed over the lake. 一隻白翼鳥掠過湖面。
The children watched the whitewing circle above them. 孩子們看著那隻白翼鳥在他們上方盤旋。
The table was made from whitewood. 這張桌子是用白木做的。
Carpenters liked whitewood for its light color. 木匠喜歡白木，因為它顏色淺。
The soil was full of whiteworm after the rain. 雨後土裡到處都是白蟲。
The fisherman dug for whiteworm near the bank. 那位釣客在河岸附近挖白蟲。
The herb book listed whitewort among old plant names. 那本草藥書把這個舊植物名列為舊名之一。
A tiny whitewort grew between the stones. 一株小小的白花草長在石縫之間。
A whitfinch perched on the wire. 一隻白雀停在電線上。
The whitfinch darted into the hedge. 那隻白雀一下子鑽進了樹籬。
Whither are you going at this hour? 你這個時候要往哪裡去？
They did not know whither the road led. 他們不知道這條路通往何處。

meaning: 無論往哪裡；不論到何處
sentences: He said he would follow whitherso the trail went. 他說不管小徑通到哪裡，他都會跟著走。
The team moved whitherso the work required. 團隊按工作需要移到任何地方。

meaning: 無論到哪裡；不管去哪裡
sentences: The old map promised they could travel whithersoever they wished. 舊地圖上說他們無論想去哪裡都能前往。
She would go whithersoever her family needed her. 家人需要她時，她就會到任何地方去。
Whitherto had the letter been sent? 那封信究竟寄到何處了？
They asked whitherto the river had carried the driftwood. 他們想知道河流把漂木帶到何處。

meaning: 朝著某處；向前往的方向
sentences: The caravan moved whitherward along the plain. 那支商隊沿著平原朝前方走去。
He pointed whitherward and asked them to follow. 他指向前方，叫大家跟著走。
The market sold fresh whiting by the kilo. 市場裡按公斤賣新鮮鱈魚。
The painter mixed whiting into the plaster. 那位畫家把白粉拌進灰泥裡。
The sky had a whitish glow before dawn. 黎明前天空帶著偏白的微光。
A whitish stain showed on the sleeve. 袖子上出現了一塊偏白的污漬。
The whitishness of the fabric made it look clean. 布料偏白的色調讓它看起來很乾淨。
She noticed the whitishness of the soup after it cooled. 她注意到湯放涼後呈現出偏白的顏色。
The bag was made of soft whitleather. 那個包是用柔軟的白皮革做的。
Old gloves of whitleather were stored in the chest. 一副白皮革舊手套被收在箱子裡。

meaning: 懷特利主義；懷特利式觀點
sentences: The essay described Whitleyism as a narrow school of thought. 那篇文章把懷特利主義描述成一種狹窄的思想流派。
He rejected Whitleyism and argued for a broader view. 他拒絕懷特利式觀點，主張更寬廣的看法。
The child caught a tiny whitling in the stream. 那個孩子在溪裡抓到一條小鱈魚。
A whitling flopped in the bucket beside the pier. 一條小白魚在碼頭旁的桶子裡扭動。
The nurse said the whitlow needed careful treatment. 護士說那個甲溝炎需要細心治療。
He wrapped his finger to protect the whitlow. 他把手指包起來，保護那個膿腫處。

meaning: 治甲溝炎的草藥；白花草
sentences: The old remedy called for whitlowwort. 舊配方裡提到要用這種治甲溝炎的草藥。
The herb garden kept a small patch of whitlowwort. 那座草藥園保留了一小塊這種草藥。

meaning: 惠特曼式語言；仿惠特曼風格的話語
sentences: The critic called the poem Whitmanese. 那位評論家把這首詩稱為惠特曼式語言。
He enjoyed the grand Whitmanese of the lecture. 他喜歡那場演講裡那種宏大的惠特曼風格。

meaning: 惠特曼式的；像惠特曼風格的
sentences: The poem had a Whitmanesque sense of freedom. 那首詩帶有惠特曼式的自由感。
Her voice was Whitmanesque in its broad, generous tone. 她的聲音在寬廣而慷慨的語調上很像惠特曼。

meaning: 惠特曼主義；惠特曼風格
sentences: The lecture explained Whitmanism as a literary attitude. 那場演講把惠特曼主義解釋成一種文學態度。
Students discussed Whitmanism after reading the poem. 學生讀完詩後討論起惠特曼主義。

meaning: 使帶有惠特曼風格；惠特曼化
sentences: The editor tried to Whitmanize the lines for effect. 編輯試著把那些詩行惠特曼化，以增加效果。
Some writers Whitmanize their prose with long, open rhythms. 有些作家會用長而開闊的節奏讓散文帶上惠特曼風格。

meaning: 聖靈降臨節後的星期一
sentences: The village fair was held on Whitmonday. 村裡的集市在聖靈降臨節後的星期一舉行。
Families planned a picnic for Whitmonday. 各家為聖靈降臨節後的星期一安排野餐。
The museum label identified the crystal as whitneyite. 博物館標籤把那顆晶體標為惠特尼石。
A geologist compared whitneyite with nearby minerals. 一位地質學家把惠特尼石和附近的礦物作比較。
A whitrack marked the path across the snow. 一道白痕標出了雪地上的路。
The bird left a whitrack in the dawn sky. 那隻鳥在黎明天空中留下白色軌跡。
The old cloth had a few whits in the weave. 那塊舊布的織紋裡有幾處白點。
Tiny whits showed on the dark paint. 深色油漆上出現了細小白點。
The whitster worked in the dye house all morning. 那位漂白工整個上午都在染坊工作。
A whitster prepared the cloth for bleaching. 一位漂白工把布料準備好要漂白。
The family visited the coast at Whitsun. 這家人在聖靈降臨節去海邊拜訪。
Whitsun brought warm weather and a long holiday. 聖靈降臨節帶來了溫暖天氣和長假。
The choir sang a special hymn on Whitsunday. 合唱團在聖靈降臨節主日唱了一首特別的聖歌。
The church was full on Whitsunday morning. 聖靈降臨節主日早晨教堂裡坐滿了人。
The fair opened during Whitsuntide. 那場市集在聖靈降臨節時期開幕。
Children looked forward to Whitsuntide holidays. 孩子們期待聖靈降臨節時期的假日。

meaning: 鞣白皮革的工藝；白皮革
sentences: The workshop specialized in whittaw. 那間工坊專門做鞣白皮革。
He learned the craft of whittaw from his uncle. 他從叔叔那裡學會鞣白皮革的手藝。
The boots were made from whitten hide. 那雙靴子是用鞣白的皮革做的。
A whitten glove lay on the bench. 一只鞣白皮革手套放在工作檯上。
The whittener stood near the wash tubs. 那位漂白工站在洗衣桶旁。
A whittener added powder to make the cloth brighter. 有個漂白的人加了粉末讓布料更白。
He began to whitter about the long wait. 他開始對漫長的等待嘮叨不休。
The old man would whitter softly when he was tired. 那位老人疲倦時就會輕聲嘮叨。
The room filled with whitterick after the meeting. 會後房間裡充滿了閒扯。
She had no patience for his whitterick. 她對他的嘮叨話沒有耐心。

meaning: to carve or cut small pieces off something
sentences: He whittled a stick into a small toy. 他把一根木棒削成小玩具。
She likes to whittle wood on quiet evenings. 她喜歡在安靜的夜晚削木頭。

meaning: a person who whittles wood or other material
sentences: The whittler sat on the porch with a pocket knife. 那位削木者坐在門廊上，手裡拿著小刀。
Every whittler had a different style of carving. 每位削木者都有不同的雕刻風格。

meaning: the act of carving or cutting small pieces off
sentences: Whittling helped him pass the time by the fire. 削木頭讓他在火邊打發了時間。
The whittling left a pile of curls on the floor. 削下來的木屑在地板上堆成一小堆。

meaning: a weasel; a small slender carnivorous animal
sentences: A whittret darted across the snowy bank. 一隻鼬鼠般的小獸竄過積雪的河岸。
The old tale said the whittret could slip through tiny holes. 舊故事說那種小獸能鑽過很小的洞。

meaning: a weasel-like animal; a small nimble creature
sentences: The whittrick vanished into the grass in a flash. 那隻小獸一眨眼就鑽進草叢裡。
Children watched the whittrick with wide eyes. 孩子們睜大眼睛看著那隻小獸。
The cloth had a whity tint in the sunlight. 那塊布在陽光下帶著淡白色。
Her whity face showed how tired she was. 她那張蒼白的臉顯出她有多疲倦。

meaning: 在某方面 顯著 <a rel="mw:Wikied.
sentences: He's a whiz with the computers. 他是計算機方面的 高手 。 他是計算機高手。 他是計算機方面的高手。

The term whiz refers to Someone who is remarkably skilled at something. 「高手」這個字指的是 在某事上 出色 出色 >rel="m/Link="m/Link.com title="skilled">熟練 的人。 「whiz」一詞指的是某件事上非常熟練的人。 「高手」這個字指的是某事上出色 >rel="m/Link="m/Link.com title="skilled">熟練的人。

meaning: a spinning toy or noisy whirling object
sentences: The child made a whizgig from a button and string. 孩子用鈕扣和繩子做了一個旋轉玩具。
The whizgig spun so fast that it blurred. 那個旋轉玩具轉得太快，幾乎看不清。

meaning: something or someone that moves very fast
sentences: That little bike was a real whizzer on the hill. 那輛小腳踏車在坡上跑得飛快。
He became a whizzer at solving math problems. 他解數學題快得很。

meaning: a person who moves or acts very quickly
sentences: The whizzerman finished the job before lunch. 那位動作飛快的人在午餐前就把工作做完了。
Everyone called him the whizzerman of the shop. 大家都叫他那家店裡的快手。

meaning: the quality of being whizzy or very fast
sentences: The whizziness of the ride made the children laugh. 那趟快速遊樂設施的急速感讓孩子們笑了起來。
He liked the whizziness of the spinning top. 他喜歡陀螺飛轉時那種迅速感。
A ball was whizzing past the window. 一顆球正快速掠過窗邊。
The bullet was whizzing through the air. 子彈在空中呼嘯而過。

meaning: in a fast or zipping manner
sentences: The car moved whizzingly down the road. 那輛車飛快地沿著道路前進。
She answered whizzingly and got back to work. 她迅速回應後又回去工作。

meaning: to move with a whizzing sound
sentences: The kite seemed to whizzle in the strong wind. 風箏在強風中似乎呼呼作響地飛動。
A tiny train toy began to whizzle across the table. 一台小火車玩具開始嗡嗡地在桌上滑過。
Who is that person standing over there by the fountain? 站在噴泉那邊的那個人是誰？
The woman who lives next door is a famous scientist. 住在隔壁的那位女士是一位著名的科學家。

meaning: 停止（尤其是在指揮馬或模仿馬時）；冷靜下來;減速。
sentences: Whoa, Nelly! 哇，耐莉！
The word whoa is used in English writing and speech. 哇这个词用于英语写作和演讲中。

meaning: a mystery story about discovering who committed a crime
sentences: She read a whodunit before bed every night. 她每天晚上睡前都看一本推理小說。
The movie was a clever whodunit with many clues. 那部電影是一部充滿線索的巧妙懸疑片。
Whoever found the lost diamond ring will receive a reward. 無論是誰撿到丟失的鑽石戒指，都將獲得獎勵。
Whoever made this delicious cake is a very talented baker. 無論是誰做了這塊美味的蛋糕，都是位很有才華的烘焙師。
I spent the whole afternoon reading an interesting novel. 我花了一整下午讀一本有趣的小說。
The whole family gathered together to celebrate the festival. 全家人聚集在一起慶祝節日。
He gave the plan his wholehearted support. 他對這個計畫給予全心全意的支持。
The team made a wholehearted effort to help. 團隊全力以赴幫忙。

meaning: 全心全意（「展現熱情和無條件的承諾」）；無保留；熱情地、毫無保留地。
sentences: He jumped in wholeheartedly and began to learn the language. 他全心投入並開始學習這門語言。
The team responded wholeheartedly to the change. 團隊全心全意地響應這項變化。
Her wholeheartedness made everyone trust her. 她的真誠讓大家都信任她。
The project succeeded because of their wholeheartedness. 這個專案因為大家的全力投入而成功。

meaning: the state of being complete or entire
sentences: The vase broke, so its wholeness was lost. 花瓶破了之後，就失去了完整性。
He valued the wholeness of the old tradition. 他很重視這項古老傳統的完整性。
The local store buys its products at wholesale prices from the supplier. 當地商店以批發價從供應商那裡購買產品。
The company announced a wholesale restructuring of its entire business. 公司宣佈對其整個業務進行大規模（全面）的重組。

meaning: in a wholesale manner; in large quantities
sentences: The goods were bought wholesalely for the market. 這批貨是大量批發買來的。
They sold the fabric wholesalely to local shops. 他們把布料批量賣給當地商店。

meaning: the quality of being sold or handled in wholesale lots
sentences: The wholesaleness of the business kept prices low. 這門生意以批發方式經營，因此價格較低。
Wholesaleness helped the store reach more buyers. 批發模式讓這家店接觸到更多買家。

meaning: a person or company that sells goods in large quantities
sentences: The wholesaler delivered boxes to the supermarket. 批發商把箱子送到超市。
She works as a wholesaler in the food trade. 她在食品業擔任批發商。
Eating wholesome food and exercising regularly are essential for longevity. 食用有益健康的食物並規律運動對長壽至關重要。
The movie provides a wholesome story that is suitable for the whole family. 這部電影提供了一個適合全家人觀看的健康故事。

meaning: in a healthy, beneficial, or wholesome way
sentences: The children played wholesomely in the park. 孩子們在公園裡健康地玩耍。
He smiled wholesomely at the family dinner. 他在家庭晚餐時露出溫和健康的笑容。

meaning: the quality of being healthy, safe, and beneficial
sentences: The wholesomeness of the meal came from fresh vegetables. 這頓餐點的健康感來自新鮮蔬菜。
People praised the wholesomeness of the old song. 人們稱讚那首老歌的樸實健康。

meaning: with regard to the whole; overall
sentences: Wholewise, the plan looked better than before. 整體來看，這個計畫比以前更好。
Wholewise, the class made solid progress. 從整體來看，班上的進步很明顯。

meaning: 完全地、完全地；最大限度地；非常;在很大程度上。
sentences: Wholly, in my opinion, this is wrong. 總的來說，在我看來，這是錯誤的。
If someone acts wholly, they do so in a way that is completely and entirely; to the fullest extent; very; to a great extent. 如果有人全心全意地行事，那麼他們會以完全徹底的方式行事；最大限度地；非常;在很大程度上。
To whom should I address this formal letter of application? 我這封正式的申請信應該寫給誰？
The person whom I met at the conference was a famous author. 我在會議上遇到的那個人是一位著名的作家。

meaning: to move in a weak, stumbling, or awkward way
sentences: The tired child began to whomble toward bed. 那個疲倦的孩子開始蹣跚地走向床邊。
He would whomble across the room after the long run. 長跑之後，他會踉蹌著穿過房間。

meaning: 無論一個或多個人（作為動詞或介詞的受詞）。
sentences: The letter is addressed to whomever it may concern. 這封信是寫給任何可能涉及的人的。
I'll marry whomever I want. 我願意嫁給誰就嫁給誰。

meaning: an older form meaning whoever or whomever
sentences: Whomso finds the key may keep it. 誰找到鑰匙，誰就可以保留。
The old poem used whomso in a formal line. 那首舊詩在正式句子裡用了這個古詞。

meaning: an emphatic or formal form of whoever or whomever
sentences: Whomsoever you choose will join the team. 無論你選誰，都能加入團隊。
Whomsoever they invited came to the ceremony. 他們邀請的人都來參加了典禮。

meaning: an older or dialect form meaning who or whom
sentences: Whone did you meet at the gate? 你在門口遇見了誰？
The old text asked whone was responsible. 那段舊文問的是誰該負責。

meaning: an exclamation used to express excitement or a hooting sound
sentences: Whoo, that was a thrilling ride! 哇，那真是一趟刺激的旅程！
He shouted whoo when the team scored. 球隊得分時，他大喊一聲哇。

meaning: a low burst of breath or sound
sentences: The dog gave a whoof before lying down. 那隻狗先低低地呼了一聲才躺下。
With a whoof of air, the door slammed shut. 隨著一聲低沉的氣響，門砰地關上了。
Synonym of whoop-de-doo. whoop-de-doo 的同義字。
The term whoop refers to a bump on a racetrack. 術語“whoop”指的是賽道上的顛簸。

meaning: an exclamation of joy or excitement
sentences: Whoopee, the holiday finally started! 太好了，假期終於開始了！
They cried whoopee after winning the game. 他們贏了比賽後歡呼起來。

meaning: a person or thing that whoops; also a large swan
sentences: The whooper laughed so loudly that everyone turned. 那個愛大叫的人笑得太大聲，大家都轉過頭來。
A whooper swan floated across the lake. 一隻大天鵝漂過湖面。

meaning: making loud cries or a deep gasping sound
sentences: Children were whooping in the playground. 孩子們在遊樂場裡大聲歡呼。
The wind was whooping through the trees. 風在樹間呼嘯。

meaning: with loud cries or great excitement
sentences: They ran whoopingly toward the finish line. 他們興奮地大叫著衝向終點線。
The crowd cheered whoopingly at the parade. 人群在遊行時興奮地歡呼。

meaning: resembling a whoop or loud cry
sentences: The bird made a whooplike call from the branch. 那隻鳥從樹枝上發出像呼喊一樣的叫聲。
He answered with a whooplike shout. 他用一聲像呼喊般的大叫回應。

meaning: an exclamation used after a small mistake or surprise
sentences: Whoops, I dropped the spoon on the floor. 哎呀，我把湯匙掉到地上了。
She said whoops and picked up the book. 她哎呀一聲，彎腰把書撿起來。

meaning: a rushing or hissing sound; to move quickly with such a sound
sentences: A whoosh of air came from the open door. 打開的門帶進一陣呼嘯的風。
The rocket went whoosh into the sky. 火箭呼的一聲衝向天空。
He whopped the ball with the bat. 他用球棒猛擊那顆球。
The heavy bag whopped against the wall. 那個重袋子重重撞上牆面。

meaning: something very large, impressive, or outrageous
sentences: That fish was a whopper. 那條魚大得驚人。
He told a whopper of a story. 他講了一個誇張得離譜的故事。
It weighed a whopping 700 pounds when it was full. 裝滿後，它的重量高達 700 磅。
The report describes the result as whopping. 報告稱這一結果是驚人的。

meaning: the practice or business of prostitution
sentences: The book discussed the harsh world of whorage. 那本書談到娼妓生意的殘酷世界。
The old district was once known for whorage. 那個舊區曾以賣淫活動聞名。
The term whore refers to a person who is sexually promiscuous; a slut. 妓女一詞指的是性亂的人。一個蕩婦。
The lesson introduced whore as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了妓女作為一個有用的術語來理解。

meaning: the state or practice of prostitution; lewdness
sentences: The novel condemned the whoredom of the city. 那部小說譴責了城市裡的賣淫風氣。
The preacher spoke against whoredom and greed. 傳教士反對賣淫與貪婪。
The writer used the word whorelike in a bitter remark. 作家在尖刻的評語裡用了這個詞。
His whorelike behavior damaged his reputation. 他那種放蕩的行為毀了名聲。

meaning: a man who keeps or frequents prostitutes
sentences: The play portrayed a rich whoremaster. 那齣戲描繪了一個富有的嫖客。
People in town whispered about the whoremaster. 鎮上的人私下談論那個嫖客。

meaning: like or fit for a whoremaster; lecherous
sentences: The novel gave him a whoremasterly grin. 那部小說把他寫成一副好色的笑容。
His whoremasterly habits ruined the marriage. 他那種好色的習氣毀了婚姻。

meaning: the practices or habits of a whoremaster
sentences: The judge condemned his whoremastery. 法官譴責他流連妓院的惡習。
The story warned against the life of whoremastery. 那個故事警告人們不要過放縱的生活。

meaning: a man who pursues or exploits prostitutes
sentences: The newspaper called him a whoremonger. 報紙稱他是個嫖客。
No one trusted the known whoremonger in town. 鎮上沒有人信任那個有名的嫖客。

meaning: the behavior or practice of seeking prostitutes
sentences: The letter accused him of whoremonging. 那封信指控他沉迷於嫖妓。
Whoremonging brought shame to the family. 嫖妓的惡行給家族帶來羞辱。

meaning: the condition or activity of a whore; prostitution
sentences: The old text referred to whoreship in harsh terms. 舊文獻以嚴厲的語氣提到娼妓生活。
She read about whoreship in a social history book. 她在一本社會史書裡讀到關於娼妓制度的內容。

meaning: an insulting term for a contemptible person; bastard
sentences: The villain was called a whoreson in the drama. 劇中那個惡棍被罵成孽種。
He muttered a rude whoreson under his breath. 他低聲罵了一句難聽的話。
The whorish rumor spread through the alley. 那個放蕩的流言在巷子裡傳開了。
Her whorish costume shocked the crowd. 她那身放蕩的服裝讓人群大吃一驚。

meaning: in a whorish or lewd manner
sentences: He laughed whorishly in the scene. 他在那一幕裡笑得很下流。
The character dressed whorishly for the party. 那個角色穿著放蕩地去參加派對。
The novel hints at whorishness in the city's nightlife. 那部小說暗示這座城市夜生活中的放蕩氣息。
He disliked the whorishness of the gossip column. 他不喜歡那個八卦專欄裡的淫蕩口吻。
A whorl marked the center of the shell. 貝殼中央有一道螺旋紋。
The fingerprint showed a clear whorl pattern. 指紋上有清楚的旋紋圖案。

meaning: 輪生的；呈螺旋狀排列的
sentences: The leaves were whorled around the stem. 葉子呈輪生狀圍繞著莖。
A whorled design covered the vase. 花瓶上覆著螺旋排列的圖案。

meaning: 輪生花；一種花序呈輪狀的植物
sentences: The whorlflower opened late in the season. 那株輪生花在季末才開放。
She sketched the whorlflower beside the pond. 她在池邊畫下那株輪生花。
The river left a whorly trail in the sand. 河水在沙地上留下螺旋狀的痕跡。
Her hair curled in a whorly pattern. 她的頭髮卷成旋轉狀。

meaning: 輪葉草；一種葉序呈輪狀的植物
sentences: The guide listed whorlywort among the rare plants. 那本指南把輪葉草列為稀有植物之一。
A whorlywort grew beside the wet path. 濕潤的小路旁長著一株輪葉草。
The basket held a few ripe whort berries. 籃子裡裝著幾顆成熟的越橘。
She picked whort in the hills after rain. 她在雨後上山採越橘。

meaning: 越橘；一種莓果或其植株
sentences: The children searched the bushes for whortle. 孩子們在灌木叢裡找越橘。
A whortle grew under the pine trees. 松樹下長著一株越橘。
The pie was made with fresh whortleberry. 那個派是用新鮮越橘做的。
She stained her fingers with whortleberry juice. 她的手指被越橘汁染紅了。
Whose book is this? I found it on the coffee table. 這是誰的書？我在咖啡桌上看到的。
The student whose marks were the highest received an award. 成績最高的學生獲得了獎勵。

meaning: 誰的；屬於誰的，古舊拼法
sentences: The manuscript used whosen in an old sentence. 那份手稿在一句古文裡用了古舊的所有格寫法。
He asked whosen coat was left on the chair. 他問椅子上留下的外套是誰的。

meaning: 無論誰的；凡是屬於誰的
sentences: Whosesoever the field was, it was now silent. 不論那塊田原本屬於誰，現在都一片安靜。
Whosesoever takes the note should read it aloud. 無論誰拿到那張紙條，都應該大聲讀出來。
Whosever bag this is should claim it soon. 不論這是誰的包，都該盡快來認領。
The rule applies to whosever enters the room. 這條規定適用於進入房間的任何人。
Whosomever arrives first may sit near the fire. 無論是誰先到，都可以坐在火邊。
The letter may be opened by whosomever is chosen. 這封信可由被選中的任何人打開。

meaning: 無論是誰；任何人，古舊拼法
sentences: Whosumdever wrote the note wanted to stay hidden. 無論是誰寫了那張紙條，都想隱藏身份。
The old poem says whosumdever knows the path. 那首舊詩說，無論是誰都知道那條路。
Whud, that sound came from the dark hall! 哎呀，那聲音是從黑暗的走廊傳來的！
She cried whud when the box fell open. 箱子打開時，她驚叫了一聲哎呀。

meaning: 呼的一聲；短促的喘氣聲
sentences: A whuff came from the horse's nostrils. 馬鼻孔裡發出一聲短促的呼氣聲。
He heard a whuff behind the closed door. 他聽見緊閉的門後傳來一聲呼氣。

meaning: 呼哧地喘；發出短促的噴氣聲
sentences: The dog began to whuffle in its sleep. 那隻狗在睡夢中開始呼哧喘氣。
He could whuffle with laughter for minutes. 他能笑得呼哧作響好幾分鐘。

meaning: 笨重的大塊頭；隆起的大形狀
sentences: The whulk of the machine filled the shed. 那台機器的龐大輪廓塞滿了棚屋。
A whulk rose from the fog on the hill. 山丘上霧中凸起一個笨重的輪廓。
He whultered a reply after the hard climb. 他爬坡後顫著聲回答。
The old man seemed to whulter in the cold. 那位老人似乎在寒冷中喘著顫聲說話。
He began to whummle through the papers. 他開始笨拙地翻找那些文件。
The child whummled a complaint under his breath. 那孩子在嘴裡小聲嘟囔了一句抱怨。
The crate hit the floor with a whun. 那個木箱重重落地，發出一聲重撞。
They heard a whun from the basement door. 他們聽見地下室門那邊傳來一聲重響。

meaning: 石塊；大石頭，蘇格蘭方言
sentences: The whunstane blocked the narrow track. 那塊大石頭堵住了狹窄的道路。
He sat on a whunstane and watched the river. 他坐在一塊大石上看著河流。
The rider tried not to whup the tired horse. 騎手盡量不去抽打那匹疲憊的馬。
They heard him whup the rug against the wall. 他們聽見他把地毯猛甩在牆上。
Whush, the wind went through the cracks. 呼的一聲，風穿過了裂縫。
She said whush to quiet the noisy room. 她說了一聲嘘，讓吵鬧的房間安靜下來。
He cleaned the shelf with a small whuskie. 他用一把小刷子清理架子。
The whuskie hung beside the pantry door. 那把小刷子掛在食品儲藏室門邊。
The wind seemed to whussle through the fence. 風似乎從籬笆間低聲掠過。
He would whussle while fixing the bike. 他修腳踏車時會低聲哼唱。

meaning: 白色的；白淨的，古舊拼法
sentences: The old spelling whute appeared in the poem. 那首詩裡出現了這個古舊拼法。
The whute cloth lay on the table. 那塊白布鋪在桌上。
The flag began to whuther in the storm. 旗子在暴風中開始飄擺。
His thoughts seemed to whuther all afternoon. 他整個下午思緒都搖擺不定。
She whuttered an answer in the cold air. 她在冷空氣裡顫聲回答。
The child whuttered when asked about the noise. 孩子被問到那聲音時，含糊地說了幾句。
His whuttering voice made the room fall silent. 他那顫聲的說話方式讓房間安靜下來。
The old man gave a whuttering reply. 那位老人用顫顫的聲音回話。
Whuz, the drone passed over the field. 嗡的一聲，無人機飛過田野上方。
He heard a whuz from the spinning fan. 他聽見風扇轉動時的嗡嗡聲。
Why were you late for the meeting this morning? 你今天早上開會為什麼遲到？
Could you please explain why you made that decision? 你能解釋一下為什麼做那個決定嗎？

meaning: 無論為何；不管什麼原因
sentences: Whyever he left, the room felt empty. 不管他為何離開，房間都顯得空蕩。
Whyever you chose that route, it was longer. 不管你為何選那條路，那條路都更長。
Whyfor did he keep the letter unopened? 他為什麼一直沒有拆開那封信？
The old dialogue asks whyfor the door was locked. 那段舊對白在問門為什麼上鎖。
The whyness of the delay was never explained. 延誤的原因從未被解釋。
She liked the whyness behind every rule. 她喜歡每條規則背後的理由。

meaning: 為什麼；疑問詞的古怪寫法
sentences: Whyo did the bell ring twice? 為什麼鈴聲響了兩次？
He muttered whyo when the plan failed. 計畫失敗時，他嘟囔著問了一句為什麼。
He went wi his brother to the market. 他和哥哥一起去了市場。
The note was written wi a blue pen. 那張便條是用藍色筆寫的。

meaning: 這樣；以這種方式，方言用法
sentences: He spoke wice when he meant to be clear. 他這樣說話時，是想表達得更清楚。
The story moved wice through old memories. 那個故事以這種方式穿過舊回憶。

meaning: 威奇托；美國地名，也指威奇托族
sentences: They drove to Wichita before sunrise. 他們在日出前開車前往威奇托。
The museum featured Wichita history and art. 那座博物館介紹了威奇托族的歷史與藝術。

meaning: 人；精靈；有力量的生物，古詞
sentences: The tale spoke of a wicht in the hills. 那個故事提到山裡有個精靈般的生物。
He was praised as a strong wicht in the village. 村裡的人稱讚他是個有力氣的人。
The geologist labeled the sample wichtisite. 地質學家把這塊樣本標為稀有礦物。
A chip of wichtisite was stored in the case. 一小片稀有礦物被放在盒中保存。

meaning: 小鬼；小東西，荷蘭語口語
sentences: The child was called a little wichtje in jest. 那個孩子被開玩笑地叫作小鬼。
She used wichtje as a nickname for the puppy. 她把小狗暱稱為小傢伙。
She trimmed the wick of the candle before lighting it. 她在點燃蠟燭前修剪了燭芯。
The lantern failed to light because the wick was too short. 燈籠點不著，因為燈芯太短了。

meaning: 一種植物名；舊式地名或方言名
