sentences: The herb book mentioned a plant called wickawee. 那本草藥書提到一種叫作小草的植物。
A wickawee grew in the damp corner of the garden. 花園潮濕的角落長著一株這種植物。
The movie tells a story about a brave knight and a wicked witch. 這部電影講述了一個關於勇敢騎士與邪惡巫婆的故事。
I have a wicked headache today; I think I need to stay in bed. 我今天頭痛得厲害（邪惡地）；我想我需要臥床休息。

meaning: 有點邪氣的；略帶壞勁的
sentences: He gave her a wickedish grin. 他朝她露出一個略帶壞勁的笑容。
The joke had a wickedish edge. 那個笑話帶點邪氣。
The shadow looked wickedlike on the wall. 牆上的影子看起來邪惡似的。
He wore a wickedlike smile after the prank. 惡作劇之後，他帶著一種像壞蛋似的笑。
The boy grinned wickedly after hiding the key. 那男孩把鑰匙藏起來後，壞壞地笑了。
The storm blew wickedly through the valley. 暴風在山谷裡猛烈地呼嘯。

meaning: 邪惡的狀態；性情邪惡；不道德。
sentences: The term wickedness refers to The state of being wicked; evil disposition; immorality. 邪惡一詞指的是邪惡的狀態；性情邪惡；不道德。
We learned the meaning of wickedness during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了邪惡的意義。
The cold air seemed to wicken his senses. 冷空氣似乎讓他的感官活了起來。
Music can wicken a tired mind. 音樂能讓疲憊的心神振作起來。
The chair was made of wicker. 那張椅子是柳編的。
She dusted the wicker with a soft cloth. 她用柔布擦拭藤編家具。
The village of Wickerby lay beyond the fields. 威克比村位於田野的另一側。
Wickerby was written on the old envelope. 舊信封上寫著威克比。
The shop sold baskets and other wickerware. 那家店販售籃子和其他藤編製品。
He repaired the wickerware before the fair. 他在市集前修好了那些柳編器物。
The museum displayed delicate wickerwork. 博物館展出精緻的柳編工藝品。
She learned wickerwork from her grandmother. 她向祖母學習藤編工藝。

meaning: made of wickerwork; woven from thin flexible rods
sentences: The room had a wickerworked screen beside the door. 房門旁有一塊藤編屏風。
She chose a wickerworked basket for the picnic. 她挑了一個藤編籃子去野餐。

meaning: a person who makes wicker goods
sentences: The wickerworker shaped the frame by hand. 那位藤編匠人用手把骨架編好。
A skilled wickerworker can make a basket in one afternoon. 熟練的藤編匠人下午就能編出一個籃子。

meaning: 解僱；擊球手出局的行為。
sentences: He kept on taking wickets and bowled the opponents team out for 84. 他不斷取得三柱門，並以 84 分將對手淘汰出局。
The term wicket refers to a dismissal; the act of a batsman getting out. 術語“wicket”指的是解僱；擊球手出局的行為。

meaning: to keep wicket in cricket; to act as the wicketkeeper
sentences: He learned to wicketkeep for the school team. 他學著替校隊擔任板球守門員。
Good reflexes help a player wicketkeep well. 反應快能讓球員把守門工作做得更好。

meaning: the player who keeps wicket in cricket
sentences: The wicketkeeper caught the ball cleanly. 板球守門員漂亮地接住了球。
A fast wicketkeeper can stop many runs. 反應快的守門員能擋下很多分數。

meaning: the work or position of keeping wicket in cricket
sentences: His wicketkeeping improved after practice. 經過練習後，他的守門技術進步了。
Wicketkeeping demands quick eyes and steady hands. 守門工作需要敏銳的眼睛和穩定的雙手。

meaning: work made of wicker or similar woven material
sentences: The old chair showed fine wicketwork. 那張舊椅子展現出細緻的藤編工藝。
They repaired the wicketwork on the porch. 他們修好了門廊上的藤編結構。

meaning: material that draws liquid away by capillary action
sentences: The shirt uses wicking to move sweat away. 那件衣服用吸水布料把汗水帶走。
Camping gear often relies on wicking. 露營裝備常常靠導吸材料來保持乾爽。

meaning: a simple conical shelter made of branches and brush
sentences: The guide showed us a wickiup near the trail. 嚮導在步道旁讓我們看一座簡易棚屋。
The wickiup gave the family shade and shelter. 那座簡易棚屋為一家人提供陰影和遮蔽。
The old lamp was wickless and could not burn. 那盞舊燈沒有燈芯，無法點燃。
A wickless candle is useless in the dark. 沒有燈芯的蠟燭在黑暗中毫無作用。

meaning: a small wick or a wick-like raised tuft
sentences: The lantern needed a new wickup to burn well. 那盞燈需要新的燈芯才會燒得順。
A tiny wickup showed at the top of the candle. 蠟燭頂端露出一小截燈芯。
The wicky candle was easy to light. 那支帶燈芯的蠟燭很容易點燃。
She trimmed the wicky tip before using it. 她先修掉那個像燈芯的尖端再使用。
A wicopy vine wrapped around the post. 一條彎曲的藤蔓纏住了柱子。
The rope left a wicopy strand on the floor. 繩子在地上留下了一條扭曲的纖維。

meaning: with; together with, in dialect spelling
sentences: He went wid his cousin to the market. 他和表親一起去市場。
The old song was sung wid great feeling. 那首老歌是帶著很深的感情唱的。
She kept onions in a widbin by the stove. 她把洋蔥放在爐邊的藤編箱裡。
The widbin was light but very strong. 那個藤編箱很輕，卻十分結實。
He woke from a widdendream before dawn. 天亮前他從一場怪夢裡醒來。
The poem drifts through a widdendream. 那首詩像在一場奇幻夢境中漂流。
The widder lived alone near the river. 那位鰥夫獨自住在河邊。
A kind widder welcomed the new neighbors. 一位和善的鰥夫招呼了新鄰居。
The dancers moved widdershins around the room. 舞者們逆時針繞著房間轉。
He turned the key widdershins by mistake. 他不小心把鑰匙往反方向轉了。
The story is full of widdifow and noise. 這個故事充滿奇想和吵鬧。
He dismissed the plan as pure widdifow. 他把那個計畫當成純粹的胡思亂想。

meaning: to cut or whittle away little by little
sentences: He widdled the stick into a smooth point. 他把木棒一點點削成光滑的尖端。
The carpenter widdled away the rough edges. 木匠一點點削平了粗糙的邊角。
The widdy fence bent in the wind. 那道纖弱的籬笆被風吹得彎了。
A widdy branch hung over the path. 一根纖細的樹枝垂在小徑上方。
The river is quite wide at this point, almost half a mile. 河流在這一點相當寬，幾乎有半英里寬。
He opened his eyes wide in surprise when he heard the news. 聽到消息時，他驚訝地睜大了眼睛。

meaning: a big mouth; loud or careless talk
sentences: His widegab got him into trouble. 他愛亂說話，結果惹上麻煩。
Nobody trusted the widegab in the room. 房裡沒有人相信那個愛吹牛的人。
She was widehearted with her time and help. 她對時間和幫助都很大方。
A widehearted host made everyone feel welcome. 一位胸襟寬厚的主人讓大家都感到受歡迎。

meaning: 廣泛地；跨越廣闊的區域。
sentences: I'm widely travelled. 我經常出差。
If someone acts widely, they do so in a way that is in a wide manner; across a wide area. 如果某人的行為廣泛，那麼他的行為方式就廣泛；跨越廣闊的區域。

meaning: having a wide mouth or opening
sentences: The widemouthed jar held the soup well. 那個口大的罐子很適合裝湯。
He opened a widemouthed bag for the apples. 他打開一個口很大的袋子裝蘋果。
The government decided to widen the main road to reduce traffic. 政府決定拓寬主幹道以緩解交通。
The river increases in depth and manages to widen as it flows. 河水在流動過程中深度增加且竟然變寬了。

meaning: something that widens or makes broader
sentences: The lane needed a road widener. 那條小路需要擴寬工程。
She used a smile as a friendship widener. 她用微笑來拉近彼此關係。
The wideness of the river surprised him. 這條河的寬度讓他很驚訝。
She liked the wideness of the open field. 她喜歡那片開闊田野的寬廣感。
The new policy gained widespread support among the local community. 新政策獲得了當地社區的廣泛（普遍）支持。
There is widespread concern about the impact of climate change on agriculture. 大眾對氣候變遷對農業的影響感到普遍擔憂。
The rumor spread widespreadedly across town. 那個謠言在鎮上四處流傳。
The idea was widespreadedly accepted. 那個想法被廣泛接受。
The book was widespreadly read by students. 那本書被許多學生廣泛閱讀。
The news spread widespreadly by noon. 那則消息到中午就已經傳遍各地。
The widespreadness of the error worried the editor. 這個錯誤的普遍程度讓編輯很擔心。
Researchers measured the widespreadness of the disease. 研究人員測量了這種疾病的 გავრცელ範圍。

meaning: far and wide; in many places
sentences: The story was heard widewhere before supper. 晚飯前這個故事已經傳到四處。
Birds were flying widewhere over the fields. 鳥兒在田野上空四處飛翔。

meaning: work done over a broad area or on a large scale
sentences: The crew finished the widework before sunset. 工人們在日落前完成了大範圍作業。
Widework on the site took the whole week. 工地上的大範圍施工花了整整一週。

meaning: a kind of duck, especially a wigeon
sentences: A widgeon swam across the quiet pond. 一隻琵嘴鴨游過安靜的池塘。
The children watched the widgeon land on the water. 孩子們看著那隻琵嘴鴨落到水面上。
The road was widish but still narrow enough. 這條路算是偏寬，但還是有點窄。
He wore a widish hat with a soft brim. 他戴著一頂帽簷偏寬的軟帽。
She has been a widow for ten years since her husband passed away. 自從丈夫去世後，她已經當了十年的寡婦了。
The war widowed many young women in the region. 戰爭使該地區的許多年輕女性成了寡婦。
The poor widow worked hard to support her three children after her husband died. 丈夫去世後，這位可憐的寡婦努力工作撫養三個孩子。
The elderly widower spent most of his time gardening and reading books. 那位年邁的鰥夫大部分時間都在從事園藝和讀書。

meaning: having lost a spouse by death
sentences: She remained widowed after many years. 多年之後，她依然守寡。
The widowed father cared for two children. 那位喪偶的父親照顧兩個孩子。
The widower lived alone in the small cottage after his wife died. 妻子去世後，那位鰥夫獨自住在小木屋裡。
He is a kind and elderly widower who enjoys gardening. 他是一位善良的年長鰥夫，喜歡園藝。

meaning: made a widower; bereft of a spouse
sentences: He was widowered by the sudden accident. 那場突如其來的意外讓他成了鰥夫。
The widowered man kept the old photographs. 那位喪偶的男子保留著舊照片。

meaning: the state of being a widower
sentences: He entered widowerhood at a young age. 他很年輕就成了鰥夫。
Widowerhood changed the rhythm of his days. 鰥夫的生活讓他的日子節奏改變了。

meaning: the condition or status of being a widow
sentences: Her widowership began after a long illness. 她在漫長病痛後成了寡婦。
Widowership brought both grief and duty. 守寡帶來了悲傷，也帶來責任。

meaning: the condition or state of widowhood
sentences: The book describes the loneliness of widowery. 那本書描寫了守寡的孤單。
She spoke softly about the years of widowery. 她輕聲談起那些守寡的歲月。

meaning: the state of being a widow
sentences: Widowhood came to her after sixty. 她在六十歲時成了寡婦。
The family helped her through widowhood. 家人陪她度過守寡的日子。

meaning: resembling a widow; lonely and bereaved
sentences: Her widowish silence filled the house. 她那種像寡婦般的沉默充滿整個屋子。
The portrait gave him a widowish look. 那幅肖像讓他看起來有一種孤寡的神情。
She wore a widowlike black dress. 她穿著一襲像寡婦般的黑裙子。
His expression seemed widowlike and sad. 他的表情看起來像喪偶後那樣憂傷。

meaning: in the manner of a widow; sorrowfully
sentences: She sat widowly by the window all evening. 她整晚都像寡婦般坐在窗邊。
The room felt widowly after the funeral. 葬禮過後，房間顯得格外淒清。
The widowman kept the house tidy. 那位鰥夫把房子收拾得很整齊。
A widowman often learns to do everything alone. 鰥夫常常得學會凡事自己來。

meaning: like a widow; bereaved and sorrowful
sentences: Her widowy face showed quiet grief. 她那張帶著喪偶悲傷的臉很安靜。
The widowy room held too many memories. 那間淒清的房間裝滿了回憶。
We need to measure the total width of the room before buying furniture. 在買家具前，我們需要測量房間的總寬度。
The river increases in width as it flows towards the ocean. 河流流向大海時，寬度會增加。
The path looked nearly widthless between the walls. 牆壁之間的小徑看起來幾乎沒有寬度。
A widthless crack ran across the glass. 玻璃上裂出一道細到幾乎看不見的縫。

meaning: across the width; in the widthwise direction
sentences: The board was laid widthway across the frame. 那塊板子是橫著框架的寬度鋪放。
He measured the cloth widthway first. 他先量布料的橫向寬度。
Place the planks widthways across the gap. 把木板橫向鋪過缺口。
The rug was cut widthways to fit the hall. 地毯被橫向裁開以配合走廊。
The shelf is set widthwise in the closet. 那個架子在衣櫃裡是橫向擺放的。
Turn the box widthwise to fit the shelf. 把箱子橫過來才能放上架子。

meaning: wood; timber, in an old form
sentences: The old text used widu for wood. 那份古老文本用這個古字表示木頭。
The poet wrote widu instead of the modern word. 那位詩人用古字來代替現代的說法。
To wield means to command, rule over; to possess or own. 運用意味著命令、統治；擁有或擁有。
People may wield in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下使用。

meaning: capable of being wielded or handled
sentences: The branch was heavy but still wieldable. 那根樹枝雖然沉，仍然拿得動。
He wanted a tool that was small and wieldable. 他想要一件小巧又好使的工具。
The wielder of the sword stepped forward. 那把劍的持劍者向前走去。
A skilled wielder can use the tool safely. 熟練的使用者能安全運用那件工具。

meaning: easy manageability; the quality of being easy to handle
sentences: The tool's wieldiness made long repairs less tiring. 這個工具很好操作，讓長時間維修不那麼累。
She liked the chair's wieldiness when she moved it alone. 她喜歡那張椅子很容易搬動。
The camera was small and wieldy in one hand. 那台相機很小，一隻手就能輕鬆拿著。
He wanted a wieldy knife for the kitchen drawer. 他想要一把方便操作的廚房刀。

meaning: 一種由牛肉、雞肉或豬肉製成的香腸。
sentences: The term wiener refers to a type of sausage made from beef, chicken or pork. 維也納一詞指的是一種由牛肉、雞肉或豬肉製成的香腸。
The lesson introduced wiener as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了維納這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: a sausage, especially a hot dog sausage
sentences: The vendor sold a wienerwurst with mustard. 那個攤販賣一根加芥末的香腸。
He ate the wienerwurst at the ballpark. 他在球場吃了那根熱狗香腸。
The child asked for a wienie at the fair. 那孩子在園遊會上要了一根熱狗。
She wrapped the wienie in a soft bun. 她把熱狗夾進鬆軟的麵包裡。

meaning: to wrangle; to argue or fuss noisily
sentences: The neighbors would wierangle over the fence line. 那些鄰居常為了圍欄界線爭吵。
They began to wierangle about the last chair. 他們開始為最後一張椅子爭論。
The hikers crossed soft wiesenboden after the rain. 雨後，登山客走過柔軟的草甸地。
The botanist studied the wiesenboden near the stream. 那位植物學家研究溪邊的草甸土壤。
Her husband is a talented architect, and she is a doctor. 她的丈夫是一位有才華的建築師，而她是一位醫生。
They have been happily married for over fifteen years. 他們已經幸福地結婚超過十五年了。
In the old tale, the wifecarl worked in the fields. 在那個古老故事裡，那位丈夫在田裡工作。
The word wifecarl sounded strange to modern readers. 這個古詞聽起來讓現代讀者很陌生。

meaning: the state or role of being a wife
sentences: She wrote about the duties of wifedom in the essay. 她在文章裡寫到為人妻的責任。
The novel explored wifedom in a quiet household. 那部小說探討了平靜家庭中的人妻角色。

meaning: the state of being a wife
sentences: The poem treated wifehood as a serious duty. 那首詩把為人妻視為一種嚴肅責任。
Her wifehood changed the pace of her daily life. 她成為人妻後，日常生活的節奏也改變了。

meaning: the qualities or behavior expected of a wife
sentences: The old essay joked about wifeism in country homes. 那篇舊文拿鄉村家庭裡的妻子特質開玩笑。
He criticized the narrow idea of wifeism. 他批評那種對妻子角色的狹隘想法。

meaning: a wife, used in a diminutive or affectionate sense
sentences: He called his wifekin with a warm smile. 他帶著溫暖的笑容呼喚他的小妻子。
The nickname wifekin sounded old-fashioned and sweet. 這個暱稱帶著老派又親暱的味道。
He remained wifeless after moving to the city. 搬到城市後，他一直沒有妻子。
The story followed a wifeless man in old age. 那個故事寫的是一位晚年沒有妻子的男人。

meaning: the state of having no wife
sentences: His wifelessness made the house feel very quiet. 他沒有妻子，房子裡顯得特別安靜。
The letter spoke of loneliness and wifelessness. 那封信提到孤單與無妻的狀態。

meaning: a little wife; a term of affection
sentences: He joked by calling her his wifelet. 他開玩笑地叫她小妻子。
The old nickname wifelet sounded playful. 這個老派暱稱聽起來俏皮可愛。
Her wifelike care kept the room neat. 她像妻子般細心，把房間整理得很整齊。
He praised her wifelike manner at home. 他稱讚她在家裡很有妻子的體貼樣子。

meaning: a little wife; an affectionate diminutive
sentences: He used wifeling as a teasing pet name. 他把小妻子當成逗趣的愛稱。
The speaker smiled at the word wifeling. 說話的人聽到這個稱呼時笑了。

meaning: a wife or female spouse, used affectionately
sentences: The old song called the bride a wifelkin. 那首老歌把新娘稱作親昵的小妻子。
He laughed at the old word wifelkin. 他被這個古老詞語逗笑了。

meaning: of or suitable for a wife
sentences: She gave him wifely support during the trip. 她在旅途中給了他妻子般的支持。
The letter praised her wifely kindness. 那封信稱讚了她作為妻子的溫柔。

meaning: the position or status of being a wife
sentences: The story examined the burdens of wifeship. 這個故事探討為人妻的負擔。
She spoke honestly about the duties of wifeship. 她坦率談到為人妻的責任。

meaning: toward one's wife; in the direction of the wife
sentences: He turned wifeward when the door opened. 門一開，他就朝妻子那邊轉過去。
The glance moved wifeward across the room. 那道目光朝著房間另一頭的妻子移去。

meaning: wife; a familiar or affectionate form of wife
sentences: He asked his wifie to bring tea. 他請他的妻子端茶來。
The word wifie sounds soft and familiar. 這個稱呼聽起來親切又柔和。

meaning: a little wife; a playful diminutive
sentences: The old letter called her the wifiekie of the house. 那封舊信把她稱作家中的小妻子。
He used wifiekie as a playful nickname. 他把這個詞當成俏皮的暱稱。

meaning: like a wife; domestic or wifely
sentences: Her wifish habits made the house feel warm. 她那種像妻子般的習慣讓家裡很溫暖。
He noticed a wifish touch in the kitchen. 他注意到廚房裡有一種很居家的味道。
The old tale mentioned a loyal wifock. 那個古老故事提到一位忠誠的妻子。
He used wifock in a line of dialect speech. 他在一段方言對話裡用了這個詞。
The famous actor wore a long grey wig for his role in the historic play. 這位著名演員為了在歷史劇中的角色戴了一頂長灰假髮。
She decided to wear a wig to the party to surprise all her friends. 她決定戴假髮去參加派對，好給朋友們一個驚喜。

meaning: 類似帆布的棉織物，通常塗有乳膠橡膠，用於加固和保護褲子、連身裙等的下半部分。
sentences: The term wigan refers to a canvas-like cotton fabric, often coated with latex rubber, used to stiffen and protect the lower part of trousers, dresses, etc. 維根一詞指的是一種類似帆布的棉織物，通常塗有乳膠橡膠，用於加固和保護褲子、連身裙等的下半部。
The lesson introduced wigan as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 wigan 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: the world or practice of wigs
sentences: The museum display explored the history of wigdom. 博物館展覽介紹了假髮世界的歷史。
She entered the strange world of wigdom. 她走進了那個奇特的假髮世界。

meaning: full of wig or wig-like covering
sentences: The costume looked wigful under the stage lights. 在舞台燈光下，那套服裝看起來假髮感很重。
His wigful style made him easy to notice. 他那種滿頭假髮的樣子很容易被注意到。
The judge was wigged during the ceremony. 那位法官在典禮上戴著假髮。
A wigged actor stepped onto the stage. 一位戴假髮的演員走上舞台。

meaning: made of wicker or willow; wickerlike
sentences: The basket had a wiggen handle. 那個籃子有一個柳編把手。
They stored the fruit in a wiggen tray. 他們把水果放在柳編托盤裡。

meaning: a person who wears or makes wigs
sentences: The old comedy mocked the town wigger. 那部老喜劇嘲笑鎮上的假髮匠。
A careful wigger fixed the curls by hand. 一位細心的假髮匠用手整理卷髮。

meaning: the trade or business of wigs
sentences: He worked in wiggery before opening a salon. 他在開沙龍前先做假髮生意。
The shop window advertised old-style wiggery. 櫥窗裡展示著老派假髮行業的招牌。
He got a wigging for being late again. 他因為又遲到而挨了一頓罵。
The teacher gave the class a serious wigging. 老師狠狠訓了全班一頓。

meaning: affected like a wig; odd or stylized
sentences: Her wiggish hat made people stare. 她那頂造型誇張的帽子讓人頻頻回頭。
The portrait had a wiggish and theatrical look. 那幅肖像帶著誇張又戲劇化的感覺。

meaning: the quality of being wig-like or affected
sentences: The critic noted the wiggishness of the costume. 評論者注意到那套服裝的假髮感。
Its wiggishness gave the scene a comic air. 它那種做作感讓場面多了喜劇氣息。

meaning: fondness for wigs or wig-like style
sentences: The article joked about the age of wiggism. 那篇文章拿愛戴假髮的風氣開玩笑。
He treated wiggism as an old fashion habit. 他把這種假髮風尚看成舊式習慣。

meaning: 以不規則的、前後或左右的動作移動；搖晃或搖晃。
sentences: Her hips wiggle as she walks. 她走路時臀部會擺動。
The jelly wiggles on the plate when you move it. 當你移動盤子時，果凍會在盤子​​上晃動。

meaning: something or someone that wiggles; a small larva or lure
sentences: The child laughed at the tiny wiggler in the jar. 孩子看到罐子裡那隻小小扭動的蟲就笑了。
A bright wiggler moved through the water. 一個亮色的擬餌在水中扭動前進。

meaning: full of wiggles; twisting or shaky
sentences: The line became wiggly near the edge. 那條線在邊緣附近變得彎彎曲曲。
The child's handwriting was wiggly but clear. 孩子的字跡彎曲卻還算清楚。
His wiggy style made him easy to spot. 他那種古怪風格讓人一眼就認出來。
The cartoon had a wiggy sense of humor. 那部卡通有種古怪的幽默感。
The term wight refers to a living creature, especially a human being. 「懷特」一詞指的是生物，尤其是人類。
The lesson introduced wight as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「wight」作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
She walked wightly across the yard. 她輕快地穿過院子。
The horse moved wightly along the path. 那匹馬沿著小路輕快前進。

meaning: the state of being a wight; living being or spirit
sentences: The poem reflected on the wightness of every soul. 那首詩思索每個靈魂作為生靈的存在。
He wrote of wightness as if it were a fading light. 他把這種生靈感寫得像漸弱的光。
He looked wigless for the first time in years. 他多年來第一次沒戴假髮。
The actor appeared wigless in the rehearsal. 那位演員在排練時沒有戴假髮。

meaning: a small wig; a small hairpiece
sentences: She clipped a wiglet to the side of her hair. 她把一小撮假髮片夾在頭髮旁邊。
The stage costume included a tiny wiglet. 那套舞台服裝還配了一小塊假髮片。
The doll's hair had a wiglike shine. 那個娃娃的頭髮有種像假髮般的光澤。
His wiglike curls drew the audience's attention. 他那像假髮一樣的捲髮吸引了觀眾注意。
The wigmaker trimmed the hair by hand. 那位製作假髮的人用手修剪髮束。
A skilled wigmaker can shape natural-looking curls. 熟練的假髮師能做出很自然的捲度。
She studied wigmaking as an old craft. 她把製作假髮當作一門古老技藝來學。
The school offered a short course in wigmaking. 學校開了一門短期的假髮製作課程。

meaning: a queue or tail of hair tied behind the head
sentences: The costume included a neat wigtail at the back. 那套服裝在後腦勺留著整齊的髮辮。
He tied his long hair into a wigtail. 他把長髮綁成一條辮尾。

meaning: to signal by moving something back and forth
sentences: The sailor would wigwag a flag to the shore. 那名水手會揮動旗子向岸邊發信號。
They wigwagged the lantern to guide the boat. 他們揮動燈籠來引導船隻。

meaning: a person who wigwags; a signaler
sentences: The wigwagger stood on the hill with a flag. 那位傳信者拿著旗子站在山丘上。
A skilled wigwagger could send messages fast. 熟練的旗語員能很快傳遞訊息。

meaning: a Native American hut or dwelling
sentences: The museum built a model wigwam in the yard. 博物館在院子裡搭了一座示意的圓錐形住所。
Children learned how a wigwam was made. 孩子們學習圓錐形住屋是怎麼建成的。
The geologist labeled the sample as wiikite. 那位地質學家把樣本標記為一種稀有礦物。
A tray of wiikite sat beside the darker stones. 一盤維基石樣本放在較深色的石頭旁。

meaning: a tribal name or people name
sentences: The map marked a settlement connected to the Wikeno. 地圖標出了一處與維克諾族有關的聚落。
An elder from Wikeno spoke at the meeting. 一位維克諾族長者在會議上發言。
The label identified the shrub as Wikstroemia. 標籤把那株灌木辨認為瑞香屬植物。
Botanists studied a Wikstroemia specimen in the lab. 植物學家在實驗室裡研究一份瑞香屬標本。
Wilbur arrived early for the meeting. 威爾伯提早到會議現場。
She asked Wilbur to carry the box upstairs. 她請威爾伯把箱子搬上樓。
The museum displayed a sample of Wilburite. 博物館展出一塊威爾伯石樣本。
A student wrote Wilburite on the mineral card. 一名學生把威爾伯石寫在礦物卡上。
Wild animals should be allowed to live in their natural habitat. 應該允許野生動物生活在它們的自然棲息地。
The garden was full of colorful wild flowers in the spring. 春天時花園裡開滿了繽紛的野花。
A wildbore rushed out of the brush. 一頭野豬從灌木叢裡衝了出來。
The hunters followed the wildbore tracks through the mud. 獵人沿著泥地裡的野豬足跡前進。

meaning: 在以前未發現石油的地區鑽探石油。
sentences: You'd have to be very rich or very desperate to go wildcatting that far east. 你必须非常富有或者非常绝望才能去那个远东地区冒险。
To wildcat means to drill for oil in an area where no oil has been found before. 野猫意味着在以前没有发现石油的地区钻探石油。
The wildcatter drilled where no one expected oil. 那位投機鑽油者在沒人看好的地方鑽井。
Old stories praised the wildcatter's courage and risk. 舊故事稱讚那位投機鑽油者的膽識與冒險。
Wildcatting can bring a huge reward or a total loss. 投機鑽油可能帶來大報酬，也可能全盤皆輸。
The company stopped wildcatting after one dry well. 那家公司在一口乾井之後停止了投機鑽油。
A herd of wildebeest crossed the plain at dawn. 一群角馬在清晨穿過平原。
The guide pointed to a wildebeest near the river. 嚮導指向河邊的一隻角馬。
The broken fence wilded the horses in the field. 破掉的圍欄讓田裡的馬變得更難控制。
Years of neglect wilded the old garden. 多年的荒廢讓那座老花園變得野氣十足。
The storm seemed to wilder the sea. 這場風暴似乎讓海面更加狂亂。
The news only wildered the crowd's fear. 這則消息只讓人群的恐懼更加失控。
He looked wilderedly at the broken map. 他茫然地看著那張破掉的地圖。
The child spoke wilderedly after waking from a dream. 那孩子從夢中醒來後，說話帶著一種茫然感。

meaning: 令人困惑的；使失去方向的
sentences: The maze was wildering to first-time visitors. 這座迷宮讓第一次來的人感到困惑。
A wildering silence filled the room. 一種令人失去方向感的沉默充滿了房間。
His wilderment showed on his face. 他臉上的神情顯出迷惘。
The sudden change caused wilderment in the village. 這場突如其來的變化讓村裡的人十分困惑。
They spent a week exploring the vast wilderness of the national park. 他們花了一週時間探索國家公園廣闊的荒野。
The abandoned cottage was slowly being reclaimed by the wilderness. 廢棄的小屋正慢慢被荒野（大自然）重新佔據。

meaning: 迅速蔓延的火災，尤其是發生在荒地地區的火災。
sentences: The term wildfire refers to a rapidly spreading fire, especially one occurring in a wildland area. 野火一詞是指迅速蔓延的火災，尤其是發生在荒地地區的火災。
The lesson introduced wildfire as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了野火作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Wildfowl rested along the quiet marsh. 野生水禽在安靜的沼澤邊休息。
The hunter watched the wildfowl from a hide. 獵人躲在掩蔽處觀察那些野鳥。

meaning: 荒野地區的伯爵；地方領主
sentences: The wildgrave ruled the frontier district. 那位荒野伯爵統治著邊境地區。
In the legend, the wildgrave guarded the mountain pass. 在傳說裡，那位地方領主守衛著山口。
A wilding apple tree grew beside the road. 路邊長著一棵野生蘋果樹。
The old tale described the child as a wilding. 舊故事把那個孩子描寫成野孩子。
The dog looked wildish after the rain. 那隻狗在雨後看起來有點野。
He had a wildish smile that made people pause. 他帶著一絲略顯粗野的笑容，讓人不由得停下來。
The crowd cheered wildishly at the finish line. 人群在終點線旁狂野地歡呼。
She laughed wildishly and clapped her hands. 她帶著幾分粗野地大笑，還拍了拍手。
The wildishness of the field gave it charm. 那片田野略帶野性的樣子讓它很有魅力。
He admired the wildishness of the old trail. 他欣賞那條舊山徑帶點野氣的模樣。
The project aims to protect the local wildlife and their natural habitats. 該專案旨在保護當地的野生動物及其自然棲息地。
We saw a wide variety of wildlife, such as deer and eagles, during our trip. 我們在旅途中看到了各式各樣的野生動物，如鹿和老鷹。
The plant had a wildlike shape. 那株植物有種像野生植物的形態。
Her wildlike hair moved in the wind. 她那頭帶野性的頭髮在風中飄動。
The story follows a wildling raised in the hills. 那個故事講的是一個在山裡長大的野孩子。
A wildling darted through the grass at dusk. 黃昏時，一隻野生小動物迅速穿過草地。

meaning: 達到荒謬或極端的程度；極為。
sentences: wildly exagerrated 極度誇張
If someone acts wildly, they do so in a way that is to a ridiculous or extreme degree; extremely. 如果某人行為狂野，那麼他們的行為方式就達到了荒謬或極端的程度；極度。
The wildness of the coast drew many visitors. 海岸的荒野感吸引了許多遊客。
There was a wildness in his voice. 他的聲音裡帶著一種野性。
The wildsome hills looked untouched by roads. 那些野性的丘陵看起來沒有被道路破壞。
A wildsome mood settled over the camp. 一種不馴的氣氛籠罩了營地。
A wildwind shook the trees all night. 狂風吹了一整夜，樹木都被搖晃。
The old barn creaked under the wildwind. 那座老穀倉在狂風下吱呀作響。
He used wile to win the argument. 他靠詭計贏了那場爭論。
The fox escaped through wile and patience. 那隻狐狸靠狡猾和耐心逃脫。
The wileful merchant tricked the buyer. 那個狡猾的商人騙了買家。
Her wileful plan worked better than expected. 她那個充滿詭計的計畫比預期更有效。
The boy had a wileless smile. 那個男孩帶著一個沒有心機的笑容。
Her wileless answer sounded honest. 她那種老實的回答聽起來很真誠。

meaning: 不易受騙的；能防詭計的
sentences: The old judge was wileproof. 那位老法官不容易受騙。
Experience made her wileproof. 經驗讓她變得能防詭計。
Wilfred sent a note before lunch. 威爾弗雷德在午餐前送來一張便條。
The class waited for Wilfred to begin speaking. 全班等威爾弗雷德開始發言。
A tall wilga grew near the stream. 溪邊長著一棵高大的威爾加樹。
The guide pointed out the wilga to the hikers. 嚮導把威爾加樹指給登山客看。
The road was lined with wilgers. 道路兩旁種著柳樹。
We rested under the wilgers by the water. 我們在水邊的柳樹下休息。
Wilhelm checked the map twice. 威廉把地圖檢查了兩次。
The letter was addressed to Wilhelm. 那封信是寫給威廉的。
Wilhelmina led the group across the bridge. 威廉明娜帶著隊伍過橋。
The award was given to Wilhelmina. 這個獎項頒給了威廉明娜。
Wilhelmine wrote the report by hand. 威廉明親手寫了這份報告。
The teacher praised Wilhelmine for her calm answer. 老師稱讚威廉明回答時很沉著。
He wilily avoided the direct question. 他狡猾地避開了那個直接的問題。
The cat wilily slipped through the gap. 那隻貓機靈地從縫隙裡溜了過去。
The fox's wiliness saved it from danger. 狐狸的狡猾救了牠一命。
Her wiliness helped her read the room quickly. 她的機靈讓她很快看懂了現場氣氛。

meaning: 一種海螺；也可指狼的舊稱
sentences: The old shell collection included a wilk. 那套老貝殼收藏裡有一枚海螺。
The hunter's tale used wilk as an old word for wolf. 那個獵人故事把它當成狼的古稱。
The mineral tray held a piece of wilkeite. 那盤礦物樣本裡有一塊威爾凱石。
A label on the shelf identified the sample as wilkeite. 架子上的標籤把那個樣本標為威爾凱石。
Wilkin signed the visitor log. 威爾金在訪客簽名簿上簽了名。
The coach called for Wilkin at the gate. 教練在門口叫威爾金。
Wilkinson was written on the envelope. 信封上寫著威爾金森。
The paper listed Wilkinson as the author. 那篇文章把威爾金森列為作者。
I will help you with your project after I finish my work. 我完成工作後會幫你做專案。
The company will launch its new product next month. 公司將於下個月發佈新產品。
He kept going by sheer will. 他全靠意志力繼續往前走。
Strong will can carry a person through hard times. 堅強的意志能幫人撐過艱難時刻。

meaning: 可由意志決定的；可遺贈的
sentences: The outcome was not fully willable. 結果並不是完全能靠意志決定的。
The property was treated as willable by law. 依法律來看，那份財產可由遺囑處分。
The willawa stood near the creek. 小溪旁長著一棵威拉瓦樹。
A bird nested in the willawa during spring. 春天時，一隻鳥在威拉瓦樹上築巢。
She willed herself to stay calm. 她靠意志讓自己保持冷靜。
The estate was willed to the family. 這筆遺產被遺贈給家人。
His willedness helped him finish the climb. 他的決斷力幫助他完成了攀登。
She admired the willedness behind his choice. 她欣賞他那個選擇背後的堅定意志。
The rock contained bright willemite crystals. 那塊岩石含有發亮的威萊石晶體。
A miner found willemite in the old tunnel. 一名礦工在舊隧道裡發現了威萊石。

meaning: 立遺囑者；意志堅定的人
sentences: The willer left the house to a niece. 立遺囑的人把房子留給了姪女。
As a willer, he refused to give up easily. 作為一個意志堅定的人，他不輕易放棄。
A willet stood near the tide line. 一隻威利特鳥站在潮線附近。
The birdwatcher spotted a willet on the beach. 那位觀鳥者在海灘上看見一隻威利特鳥。
The factory used a willey to loosen the wool. 工廠用一台打散機鬆開羊毛。
The old willey still stood in the workshop. 那台舊打散機仍然放在工坊裡。
The willeyer checked the machine before starting. 操作打散機的人在啟動前檢查機器。
An experienced willeyer can keep the fibers even. 經驗豐富的打散機操作員能讓纖維保持均勻。
Something described as willful is american standard spelling of wilful. 被描述為“willful”的東西是“willful”的美國標準拼寫。
The word willful is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 任性這個詞常用來形容人、事或情況。
If someone acts willfully, they do so in a way that is uS standard spelling of wilfully. 如果有人故意行事，他們會以美國標準拼寫“willously”的方式這樣做。
The speaker responded willfully during the discussion. 發言者在討論中隨意回應。
Her willfulness made the argument longer. 她的固執讓爭論拖得更久。
The child showed willfulness and refused to leave. 那個孩子表現出任性，怎麼也不肯離開。
The book was dedicated to William. 這本書獻給威廉。
William answered the phone with a calm voice. 威廉用平靜的聲音接了電話。

meaning: 威廉石；一種蛇紋石類礦物
sentences: The specimen was labeled williamsite in the museum. 博物館把這塊標本標記為威廉石。
A geologist studied the williamsite under bright light. 地質學家在明亮的燈光下研究那塊威廉石。

meaning: 威廉森木蘇鐵；一種化石植物屬
sentences: The fossil was identified as Williamsonia. 那塊化石被辨認為威廉森木蘇鐵。
Scientists drew a sketch of Williamsonia for the report. 科學家為報告畫了威廉森木蘇鐵的草圖。

meaning: 威廉森科；一類化石種子蕨
sentences: The textbook listed Williamsoniaceae among fossil plants. 教科書把威廉森科列在化石植物之中。
She compared Williamsoniaceae with other seed ferns. 她把威廉森科和其他種子蕨作比較。
Willie waved from the back row. 威利在後排揮手。
The child called him Willie instead of William. 那孩子叫他威利，不叫威廉。
The nickname willie was written in the margin. 這個小名寫在頁邊。
She typed willie on the form by mistake. 她不小心在表格上打了這個小名。
The newer plan looked willier than the old one. 新方案看起來比舊方案更有主見。
He became willier after hearing the warning. 聽到警告後，他變得更倔強。
The movie gave her the willies. 那部電影讓她毛骨悚然。
That empty hallway still gives me the willies. 那條空蕩的走廊還是讓我不寒而慄。
He is always willing to help his colleagues with their work. 他總是樂於幫助同事處理工作。
Are you willing to travel abroad for your new position? 妳願意為了新職位而出國出差嗎？
The willinghearted volunteer stayed late. 那位熱心志工待到很晚。
A willinghearted reply made the team relax. 一句樂意配合的回覆讓團隊放鬆下來。
His willinghood showed in every task. 他在每件事上都展現出樂意合作的態度。
The judge praised her willinghood to help. 法官稱讚她樂於幫忙的態度。

meaning: 出於自己的自由意志；自由自發地。
sentences: If someone acts willingly, they do so in a way that is of one’s own free will; freely and spontaneously. 如果某人自願行事，那麼他是出於自己的自由意志；自由地、自發地。
The speaker responded willingly during the discussion. 發言者在討論過程中樂意回應。
All it takes is a willingness to learn. 所需要的只是學習的意願。
The term willingness refers to The state of being willing. 意願一詞是指願意的狀態。

meaning: 突發強風；山地或海上的狂風
sentences: The boat rocked in a sudden williwaw. 船在一陣突發強風中劇烈搖晃。
The climbers waited until the williwaw passed. 登山者等到那陣狂風過去。
The willmaker signed the document at noon. 那位立遺囑的人在中午簽了文件。
Each willmaker should read the clauses carefully. 每位立遺囑的人都該仔細閱讀條款。
The lawyer explained the process of willmaking. 律師解釋了立遺囑的流程。
Willmaking can prevent confusion later. 立遺囑可以避免日後的混亂。
Her willness helped her finish the race. 她的決心幫她完成了比賽。
The coach admired his willness to improve. 教練欣賞他想進步的意願。
The willock circled above the waves. 那隻海鳩在浪花上方盤旋。
A fisherman spotted a willock near the cliff. 一位漁夫在峭壁附近看見一隻海鳩。

meaning: 用於打開和清潔棉頭的旋轉尖刺滾筒。
sentences: The term willow refers to a rotating spiked drum used to open and clean cotton heads. 術語「柳」是指用於打開和清潔棉頭的旋轉尖刺滾筒。
The lesson introduced willow as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了柳樹作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The gardener searched for a willowbiter on the branches. 園丁在枝條上尋找啃柳樹的蟲。
A willowbiter can damage young shoots. 啃柳樹的蟲會傷害嫩芽。

meaning: 長滿柳樹的；種有柳樹的
sentences: The lane was willowed and cool. 那條小路兩旁長滿柳樹，陰涼而清爽。
They walked through a willowed riverbank. 他們走過一段種滿柳樹的河岸。

meaning: 種柳樹的人；柳樹栽植者
sentences: The willower planted saplings along the stream. 那位種柳樹的人沿著溪邊栽下幼苗。
Every willower in the village knew the soil well. 村裡每位種柳樹的人都很熟悉那片土壤。
Her willowish figure moved gracefully. 她那像柳樹般柔弱的身形動作優雅。
The dress gave her a willowish look. 那件洋裝讓她看起來很像柳樹般纖細。
The leaves hung in a willowlike arc. 那些葉子以像柳樹般的弧度垂下。
He chose a willowlike branch for the decoration. 他挑了一根像柳條的枝子來裝飾。
The shop sold willowware for picnic baskets. 那家店販售用柳條編成的野餐籃。
She learned to weave willowware from her aunt. 她跟姑姑學習編柳條器具。
The meadow was full of willowweed. 那片草地長滿了柳葉菜。
A bee landed on a patch of willowweed. 一隻蜜蜂停在一叢柳葉菜上。
The farmer found a willowworm on the leaf. 農夫在葉子上發現一隻柳樹害蟲。
A willowworm can strip the tree quickly. 柳樹害蟲很快就能把樹葉啃光。
The herbal guide listed willowwort by the stream. 草本指南把柳葉菜列在溪邊。
She picked willowwort for the field study. 她採集柳葉菜做田野研究。
She had a willowy frame and a light step. 她身形纖細，步伐輕盈。
The dancer looked tall and willowy on stage. 那位舞者在台上看起來又高又苗條。
The map marked Willugbaeya near the coast. 地圖在海岸附近標出了威盧格貝亞。
Researchers wrote a note about Willugbaeya. 研究人員為威盧格貝亞寫了一則註記。

meaning: 用柳條或柳條清潔羊毛或棉花等。
sentences: To willy means to cleanse wool or cotton, etc. with a willy, or willow. To willy 的意思是用 Willy 或柳樹清潔羊毛或棉花等。
People may willy in different situations depending on the context. 人們可能會根據具體情況在不同的情況下做出意願。
Willy ran ahead of the group. 威利跑在隊伍前面。
My uncle called himself Willy in childhood. 我叔叔小時候自稱威利。
The old book described him as willyard. 舊書把他寫成一個很有主見的人。
A willyard child does not give up easily. 一個有主見的孩子不容易放棄。
The prank was a bit too willyart for the class. 那個惡作劇對班上來說有點過於狡猾。
He used willyart to mean a tricky scheme. 他用這個詞來表示狡猾的計策。
She sounded willyer after the meeting. 會議後她顯得更倔強。
The willyer choice was also the safer one. 那個更頑強的選擇同時也是更安全的。
Wilmer arrived before sunrise. 威爾默在日出前就到了。
Everyone thanked Wilmer for the help. 大家都感謝威爾默的幫忙。
The wilsome student followed every rule. 那位樂於配合的學生遵守每一條規則。
His wilsome manner made the work easy. 他那種願意配合的態度讓工作變得容易。
She answered wilsomely and nodded. 她樂意地回應，還點了點頭。
He signed wilsomely without delay. 他毫不拖延地爽快簽字。
The teacher valued her wilsomeness. 老師看重她樂於配合的態度。
His wilsomeness kept the team calm. 他的願意配合讓團隊保持平靜。
Wilson spoke first at the meeting. 威爾遜在會議上先發言。
The package was addressed to Wilson. 那個包裹寄給了威爾遜。

meaning: 威爾遜的；與威爾遜有關的
sentences: The article used a Wilsonian style. 那篇文章採用了威爾遜式的風格。
His Wilsonian ideas shaped the debate. 他的威爾遜式觀點影響了那場辯論。
To wilt means to fatigue; to lose strength; to flag. 枯萎意味著疲勞；失去力量；標記。
People may wilt in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下枯萎。
The flowers began to wilter in the heat. 花朵在高溫中開始枯萎。
Stress can make a person wilter quickly. 壓力會讓人很快變得萎靡。
The train stopped at Wilton. 火車停在威爾頓。
She sent the letter to Wilton yesterday. 她昨天把信寄到威爾頓。
The new plant is wiltproof in hot weather. 這種新品種植物在炎熱天氣裡也不易凋萎。
They chose a wiltproof flower for the window. 他們挑了一種不易凋萎的花放在窗邊。
Wiltshire is famous for its countryside. 威爾特郡以鄉村景色聞名。
We spent a week in Wiltshire last summer. 我們去年夏天在威爾特郡待了一週。
Horatio's new girlfriend is a wily coquette, and poor Horatio is too smitten to see it. 霍雷肖的新女友是個狡猾的風騷女子，而可憐的霍雷肖卻被迷住了，看不到這一點。
The report describes the result as wily. 報告稱這一結果是狡猾的。
That sudden wim made him change plans. 那個突如其來的怪念頭讓他改變了計畫。
Her wim vanished as soon as work began. 一開始工作，她的突發奇想就消失了。
The bird ate a ripe wimberry from the bush. 那隻鳥從灌木上吃了一顆熟透的越橘。
She picked wimberry for the pie filling. 她採了越橘做派餡。
He sharpened the wimble before the repair. 修理前他先把鑽錐磨利。
The carpenter used a wimble to bore the hole. 木匠用鑽錐把洞鑽開。

meaning: 像鑽錐的；細長尖錐形的
sentences: The tool had a wimblelike tip. 這工具的尖端像鑽錐一樣細長。
A wimblelike shape helps it pierce wood. 像鑽錐的形狀有助於穿透木頭。
The wimbrel waded along the shore. 那隻鷸鳥沿著海岸涉水前進。
Birdwatchers noted a wimbrel near the marsh. 賞鳥者在沼澤附近記下了一隻鷸鳥。
The kettle sent up a thin wime of steam. 水壺冒出一縷薄薄的蒸氣。
A wime of mist hung over the field. 田野上方飄著一層薄霧。
His wimick led him to buy another gadget. 他的怪念頭讓他又買了一件小玩意。
She laughed at the wimick and moved on. 她笑著把那個突發奇想拋到一邊。
The nun adjusted her wimple before mass. 修女在彌撒前整理她的頭巾。
An old portrait showed a white wimple. 一幅古老肖像裡畫著白色頭巾。
The costume looked wimpleless and plain. 那套服裝沒有頭巾，看起來很樸素。
She appeared wimpleless in the old painting. 她在那幅舊畫裡沒有戴頭巾。
The collar had a wimplelike fold. 那領口有像頭巾一樣的褶皺。
Her scarf fell in a wimplelike shape. 她的圍巾垂成頭巾般的形狀。
Our team worked hard and managed to win the championship. 我們團隊努力拚搏，並設法贏得了冠軍。
It's not about winning or losing, but how you play the game. 重點不在於輸贏，而在於你如何參與比賽。
She hopes to win the race. 她希望贏得那場比賽。
They win by staying calm under pressure. 他們靠著在壓力下保持冷靜而獲勝。

meaning: 一種冬青屬植物的果實
sentences: The birds ate the winberry on the branch. 鳥兒吃掉了枝頭上的冬青果。
A basket of winberry sat on the table. 桌上放著一籃冬青果。

meaning: 因疼痛或不安而退縮；皺眉
sentences: He began to wince when the cold wind hit his face. 冷風吹到臉上時，他開始皺眉縮了一下。
She made him wince by touching the sore arm. 她碰到他酸痛的手臂，讓他縮了一下。
He was a wincer when the dentist asked questions. 牙醫一問問題，他就會縮一下。
The wincer covered his eyes during the loud scene. 那個會退縮的人在吵鬧場面時遮住了眼睛。
The coat was made of warm wincey. 那件外套是用溫暖的粗棉布做的。
She folded the wincey dress and put it away. 她把那件粗棉布洋裝折好收起來。

meaning: 用於裝卸貨物或拉線的起重裝置。
sentences: The term winch refers to A hoisting device used for loading or unloading cargo, or for pulling in lines. 絞車一詞是指用於裝卸貨物或拉動繩索的起重裝置。
We learned the meaning of winch during today's lesson. 在今天的課程中我們學習了絞車的意思。

meaning: 做出縮退動作的人；捲揚器
sentences: The wincher pulled the rope tightly. 那個操作捲揚器的人把繩子拉緊。
He became a wincher whenever the light flashed. 只要燈光一閃，他就會縮一下。
They traveled to Winchester for the weekend. 他們週末去了溫徹斯特。
The guidebook mentioned Winchester as an old city. 旅遊書把溫徹斯特列為一座古城。
The winchman lowered the crate slowly. 絞盤操作員慢慢放下木箱。
A skilled winchman kept the load steady. 熟練的絞盤操作員讓吊掛的貨物保持穩定。
He gave her a wincing smile after the bad news. 壞消息傳來後，他勉強露出一個皺眉的笑容。
The child looked wincing and tired. 那個孩子看起來又退縮又疲倦。
He wincingly lifted the heavy box. 他皺著眉把那個重箱子抬起來。
She looked wincingly at the bright light. 她對著明亮的燈光皺眉看了一眼。
The strong wind blew my hat off as I crossed the bridge. 當我過橋時，強風吹跑了我的帽子。
There is a gentle breeze blowing from the mountains. 從山那邊吹來一陣微風。
The Wind shook the trees all night. 風整晚都在搖動樹木。
The Wind brought cool air into the room. 風把涼空氣帶進房間。
The toy is windable and easy to use. 這個玩具可以上發條，也很容易使用。
They chose a windable clock for the cabin. 他們為小屋挑了一個可上發條的時鐘。
The shooter adjusted for windage before firing. 射手開火前先調整風偏。
Strong windage pushed the arrow off course. 強風偏差讓箭偏離了方向。
He sounded like a windbag at the meeting. 他在會議上聽起來像個大話王。
Nobody wanted to listen to the windbag for long. 沒有人想長時間聽那個愛說空話的人講話。
The old balloon looked windbagged after the party. 派對過後，那個舊氣球看起來鼓鼓的。
His windbagged speech bored the whole class. 他那番空話連篇的演講讓全班都覺得無聊。
The report was full of windbaggery and little detail. 那份報告充滿空話，卻沒多少細節。
She had no patience for political windbaggery. 她對政治上的誇誇其談毫無耐心。

meaning: 被風吹起的球；一種球類
sentences: The children chased the windball across the yard. 孩子們追著那顆被風吹動的球跑過院子。
A windball bounced against the fence. 一顆球被風吹著，碰到了圍欄。
The field guide listed windberry among rare plants. 田野指南把風莓列為稀有植物之一。
A small patch of windberry grew near the wall. 牆邊長著一小片風莓。

meaning: 愛喝冷風的人；古怪的喝風者
sentences: The old tale called him a windbibber. 那則古老故事把他叫作愛喝冷風的人。
Nobody believed the windbibber's strange claims. 沒有人相信那個怪異喝風者的說法。
A tiny windbore opened in the old plank. 舊木板上出現了一個小風孔。
The carpenter sealed the windbore quickly. 木匠很快把那個風孔封住。
They built a windbracing fence around the garden. 他們在花園周圍築起防風柵欄。
Windbracing walls kept the cabin warmer. 抗風的牆面讓小屋更暖和。
The farmer planted a windbreak along the field. 農夫在田邊種了一排防風林。
A wall can serve as a windbreak in winter. 牆在冬天也可以充當擋風設施。
He wore a Windbreaker on the cold morning. 他在寒冷的早晨穿了一件防風外套。
The bright Windbreaker made her easy to spot. 那件亮色防風外套讓她很容易被看見。
She zipped up the windbreaker before walking out. 她出門前把防風外套拉上拉鍊。
His windbreaker flapped in the evening breeze. 他的防風外套在晚風中飄動。

meaning: 被風吹出的小孔；風穿孔
sentences: The sailors found a windbroach in the sail. 船員在帆上發現了一個風穿孔。
That windbroach let the cold air inside. 那個被風吹出的孔讓冷空氣鑽了進去。
She packed windclothes for the mountain trip. 她為登山旅行準備了防風衣物。
Good windclothes made the hike more comfortable. 合適的防風服裝讓健行更舒服。
The microphone had a soft windcuffer on it. 麥克風上裝著一個柔軟的防風罩。
A windcuffer helped reduce the noise outside. 擋風罩有助於減少外面的噪音。

meaning: 被風吹得亂竄的人或物
sentences: The kite acted like a winddog in the storm. 那隻風箏在風暴裡像被風吹得亂竄的東西。
He called himself a winddog after the long trip. 長途旅行後，他把自己說成是個被風吹得東飄西盪的人。
She was winded after climbing the stairs. 她爬完樓梯後喘不過氣來。
The winded toy started moving again. 那個上緊發條的玩具又開始動了。
He windedly finished the last lap. 他氣喘吁吁地跑完最後一圈。
She spoke windedly after the long climb. 她爬完長坡後，說話時一直喘。
The windedness passed after a short rest. 休息一下後，那種喘不過氣的感覺就過去了。
His windedness worried the coach. 他氣喘的狀態讓教練很擔心。

meaning: 上發條的人或裝置；捲線器
sentences: The winder turned the handle slowly. 上發條的人慢慢轉動把手。
A cable winder kept the cord neat. 捲線器把電線收得整整齊齊。

meaning: 最易受風的；最接近風口的
sentences: The windermost room was also the coldest. 最靠風口的那間房也最冷。
They slept in the windermost tent. 他們睡在最受風的帳篷裡。

meaning: 與荷蘭溫德斯海姆相關的；溫德斯海姆派的
sentences: The manuscript had a Windesheimer influence. 那份手稿帶有溫德斯海姆派的影響。
Historians discussed the Windesheimer reformers. 歷史學家討論了溫德斯海姆派改革者。

meaning: 自然從樹上落下的果實，就像從風中落下的一樣。
sentences: They couldn't reach the branches, so they ate the windfalls. 他們搆不到樹枝，就吃掉了意外之財。
The term windfall refers to A fruit that has fallen from a tree naturally, as from wind. 意外收穫一詞是指從樹上自然落下的果實，如風。

meaning: 被風吹倒的；因風倒下的
sentences: They cleared the windfallen branches from the road. 他們清除了路上的風倒樹枝。
A windfallen tree blocked the trail. 一棵被風吹倒的樹擋住了步道。
The windfanner kept the oven hot. 那個送風裝置讓爐火保持旺盛。
He used a small windfanner to cool the coals. 他用一個小送風器讓炭火降溫。

meaning: 耐風的；不易被風吹倒的
sentences: The cabin was built to be windfirm. 那間小屋是按照耐風標準建造的。
Windfirm trees survived the storm. 耐風的樹木撐過了暴風雨。
The legend spoke of a windfish in the lake. 傳說裡提到湖中有一條風魚。
The child drew a windfish with silver scales. 那個孩子畫了一條有銀色鱗片的風魚。
A windflaw cracked the old wall. 風裂使舊牆出現裂痕。
The inspector found a windflaw in the paint. 檢查員在漆面上發現了風造成的缺陷。
A white windflower opened in the shade. 一朵白色風花在陰影裡綻放。
She planted windflower near the path. 她把銀蓮花種在小徑旁。
The vet checked the horse's windgall. 獸醫檢查了那匹馬的風腫。
A slight windgall appeared after the long ride. 長途騎乘後，馬腿上出現了輕微腫脹。
The windgalled horse needed rest. 那匹有風腫的馬需要休息。
They watched the windgalled leg carefully. 他們仔細觀察那條腫脹的腿。
The windhole in the attic let in a draft. 閣樓的通風孔讓冷風灌了進來。
He covered the windhole with cloth. 他用布把那個風洞遮住。
A windhover hovered above the field. 一隻紅隼在田野上空懸停。
The windhover dropped suddenly toward the grass. 那隻懸停的鳥突然俯衝向草地。

meaning: 食人怪；北美傳說中的惡靈
sentences: The story described a windigo in the forest. 那個故事描述森林裡有一個食人怪。
Children feared the windigo at night. 孩子們在夜裡害怕那個惡靈。
The coat hung windily on the line. 那件外套在曬衣繩上隨風飄動。
He spoke windily through the open window. 他對著打開的窗戶，在風裡說話。
The windiness made sailing difficult. 風勢太大，使航行變得困難。
They canceled the picnic because of the windiness. 由於風太大，他們取消了野餐。

meaning: 使人喘不過氣或上氣不接下氣。
sentences: The report describes the result as winding. 報告將結果描述為「纏繞」。
Everyone noticed the winding tone of the message. 所有人都注意到了這則訊息的語氣。
The road climbed windingly up the hill. 那條路蜿蜒地爬上山坡。
The stream moved windingly through the valley. 溪流蜿蜒地穿過山谷。
The windingness of the path surprised the hikers. 那條小徑的迂迴程度讓健行者很意外。
She liked the windingness of old city streets. 她喜歡老城街道那種彎彎曲曲的感覺。
The windjammer crossed the harbor at dusk. 那艘大型帆船在黃昏時穿過港灣。
He dreamed of sailing a windjammer someday. 他夢想有一天能駕駛老式帆船。

meaning: sailing or traveling under wind power
sentences: The old ship spent the afternoon windjamming down the coast. 那艘老船整個下午都靠風沿著海岸航行。
He loved the slow rhythm of windjamming on summer days. 他喜歡夏日裡乘風航行的緩慢節奏。

meaning: a winch or hoisting device turned by a crank
sentences: The sailors used a windlass to raise the anchor. 船員用絞盤把錨拉起來。
A rusty windlass creaked beside the harbor wall. 一座生鏽的絞盤在港邊牆旁吱呀作響。

meaning: a person who works a windlass
sentences: The windlasser turned the crank with steady hands. 那位絞盤工穩穩地轉動把手。
Each windlasser took a short turn during the lift. 每位操作絞盤的人在吊運時都輪流上手。

meaning: to twist, coil, or turn slowly
sentences: The thread began to windle around the spool. 線開始慢慢纏繞在線軸上。
The smoke seemed to windle into the evening air. 煙似乎在傍晚的空氣裡緩緩盤旋。

meaning: to twist or coil slowly; a winding motion
sentences: The vine windles up the fence all summer. 那株藤蔓整個夏天都沿著圍欄纏繞。
The road windles through the hills and fields. 那條道路蜿蜒穿過丘陵與田野。
The harbor was windless at dawn. 黎明時港灣沒有一絲風。
On a windless day, the lake looked like glass. 在無風的日子裡，湖面看起來像玻璃。
The snow fell windlessly through the night. 雪在整個夜裡無風地落下。
The flag hung windlessly from the pole. 旗子無風地垂掛在旗桿上。

meaning: the state of having no wind
sentences: The windlessness made the afternoon feel heavy. 這種無風的狀態讓午後顯得沉悶。
They enjoyed the windlessness before the storm. 他們在暴風雨前享受著難得的無風時刻。

meaning: a flimsy or easily blown thing; a weakling
sentences: The paper kite looked like a windlestrae in the gusts. 那只紙風箏在陣風中像一根輕飄飄的草。
He called the man a windlestrae for giving up so fast. 他因為那人太快放棄而說他是個軟弱的人。

meaning: a straw blown by the wind; a weak or useless person
sentences: The child chased a windlestraw across the yard. 孩子追著一根被風吹動的稻草跑過院子。
The old insult treated him like a windlestraw. 那個古老的辱罵把他說成一個無用的人。
Her windlike steps barely touched the floor. 她輕得像風一樣的腳步幾乎沒有碰到地板。
A windlike sound came from the open corridor. 一陣像風一樣的聲音從敞開的走廊傳來。

meaning: a weak or delicate person, especially a child
sentences: The windlin needed extra blankets on cold nights. 那個體弱的孩子在寒夜裡需要多蓋毯子。
No one expected the windlin to carry such a heavy bag. 沒人想到那個瘦弱的人會背起那麼重的袋子。

meaning: a weak or slight person; something that winds or twists
sentences: The tiny windling struggled to keep pace. 那個瘦小的人努力跟上腳步。
A windling path curled behind the garden wall. 一條蜿蜒的小路繞到花園牆後。

meaning: 假想的敵人，但呈現為真實的敵人。
sentences: to fight windmills 去對抗風車
The term windmill refers to an imaginary enemy, but presented as real. 風車一詞指的是假想的敵人，但呈現為真實的敵人。

meaning: moving or turning like a windmill
sentences: The windmilly clouds spun quickly above the field. 那些像風車一樣旋轉的雲快速掠過田野上方。
Her windmilly arms made everyone laugh. 她像風車一樣揮動的手臂讓大家都笑了。

meaning: a small opening or vent for wind or air
sentences: A small windock let air into the cellar. 一個小通風口讓空氣進入地窖。
The old house had a narrow windock near the roof. 那棟老房子在屋頂附近有一個狹窄的通風口。
The manuscript used windore instead of the modern spelling. 那份手稿用了舊式拼法。
She smiled when she saw the word windore in the poem. 她在詩裡看到這個舊字拼法時笑了。
Please close the window; it's getting a bit chilly in here. 請關上窗戶，這裡變得有點冷了。
He spent the afternoon looking out of the window at the rain. 他花了一下午看向窗外的雨。

meaning: the amount that fills a window; what can be seen through a window
sentences: The windowful of light warmed the desk. 一整扇窗灑進來的光照暖了書桌。
She admired the windowful of snow outside. 她欣賞著窗外滿窗可見的雪景。
The basement room was windowless and quiet. 那間地下室沒有窗戶，而且很安靜。
They chose a windowless storage space for the tools. 他們選了一個沒有窗的儲物空間放工具。

meaning: the state of having no window
sentences: The windowlessness of the room made it feel enclosed. 房間沒有窗戶，讓人感到很封閉。
The architect tried to reduce the windowlessness of the hall. 建築師試著減少大廳那種沒有窗的壓迫感。
A tiny windowlet opened high in the wall. 牆上高處開著一扇小窗。
Sunlight slipped through the windowlet at noon. 中午時陽光從小窗裡溜了進來。
The sketch was drawn in soft windowlight. 那張素描是在柔和的窗光下完成的。
She liked to read by windowlight in the morning. 她喜歡在早晨靠窗光閱讀。

meaning: resembling a window in shape or appearance
sentences: The opening was windowlike but too small to climb through. 那個開口像窗戶一樣，但小到無法爬過去。
He cut a windowlike shape into the cardboard. 他在紙板上剪出一個像窗戶的形狀。
The windowmaker measured the frame twice. 那位製窗匠把窗框量了兩次。
Every windowmaker in the shop knew the old craft. 店裡每位製窗匠都懂這門老手藝。

meaning: the craft or work of making windows
sentences: Windowmaking took more skill than she expected. 製窗比她想像中更需要技術。
He learned windowmaking from his uncle. 他從叔叔那裡學會了製窗。

meaning: a person who installs or repairs windows
sentences: The windowman came early to fix the cracked pane. 那位修窗工一大早就來修破裂的玻璃。
The windowman checked every latch before leaving. 修窗工離開前把每個窗扣都檢查了一遍。

meaning: a pane of glass in a window
sentences: A bird struck the windowpane with a thud. 一隻鳥撞上窗玻璃，發出一聲悶響。
She wiped the windowpane until it shone. 她把窗玻璃擦到發亮。

meaning: a person who peeps in at windows
sentences: The windowpeeper was seen near the side street. 有人看見那位偷看窗戶的人在巷口附近。
Neighbors worried about a windowpeeper after dark. 鄰居們因為天黑後有偷窺窗戶的人而擔心。
The room felt warm but windowshut. 房間裡很暖，但窗戶緊閉。
They slept windowshut to keep out the rain. 他們把窗戶關上睡覺，好擋住雨水。
She moved windowward to catch the breeze. 她朝窗邊走去，好迎著微風。
The cat stretched windowward in the sunlight. 貓在陽光下朝著窗邊伸展身子。
The children ran windowwards when they heard the rain. 孩子們一聽到下雨就朝窗邊跑去。
He glanced windowwards before answering. 他在回答前先朝窗邊看了一眼。

meaning: with regard to the window; in a window-facing way
sentences: The desk was placed windowwise to get more light. 書桌是朝窗擺放的，好多接一點光。
She arranged the chairs windowwise for the lecture. 她把椅子朝窗排列，方便聽講。

meaning: having many windows or like a window
sentences: The old tower had a windowy look from a distance. 遠看那座舊塔有很多窗的樣子。
Her sketch gave the house a bright, windowy feel. 她的素描讓那棟房子看起來明亮又像窗一樣通透。

meaning: the tube that carries air to the lungs
sentences: He swallowed wrong and felt it in his windpipe. 他吞嚥不順，感覺卡到了氣管。
The doctor explained how the windpipe works. 醫生解釋了氣管的作用。

meaning: a person who plays a wind instrument
sentences: Each windplayer tuned up before the concert. 每位吹奏者在音樂會前都先調音。
The windplayer stood at the front of the band. 那位吹奏者站在樂隊前方。

meaning: resistant to wind; designed to block wind
sentences: He wore a windproof jacket on the ridge. 他在山脊上穿著防風外套。
The tent was windproof enough for the storm. 那頂帳篷足以抵擋風暴。

meaning: a ring or shape that winds around something
sentences: The vine formed a tight windring around the post. 藤蔓在柱子上繞出一圈緊密的纏環。
She drew a windring around the moon. 她在月亮周圍畫了一圈螺旋環。

meaning: a road or path that winds along
sentences: The windroad climbed slowly into the mountains. 那條蜿蜒的道路緩緩通向山裡。
They followed the windroad through the valley. 他們沿著蜿蜒小路穿過山谷。

meaning: a plant root or root-like part that twists or spreads
sentences: The windroot spread under the dry soil. 那株植物的根在乾土下蔓延開來。
She dug up a windroot from the garden bed. 她從花圃裡挖出一段盤繞的根。

meaning: a row of cut grass, hay, or similar material left in the field
sentences: The farmer left the hay in a windrow to dry. 農夫把乾草攤成一排讓它晾乾。
A long windrow stretched across the field. 一長排草料橫亙在田裡。

meaning: a machine or person that makes windrows
sentences: The windrower moved slowly across the pasture. 那台成行機慢慢穿過牧草地。
A windrower can save a farmer many hours. 成行機能替農夫省下很多時間。

meaning: the glass screen in front of a vehicle
sentences: Rain streaked down the windscreen on the drive home. 回家路上，雨水劃過擋風玻璃。
He scraped ice off the windscreen before leaving. 他出門前先把擋風玻璃上的冰刮掉。
A small stone hit the windshield and caused a large crack in the glass. 一塊小石頭撞到了擋風玻璃上，在玻璃上造成了一道大裂縫。
She spent the morning cleaning the windshield of her car after the storm. 暴風雪過後，她整個早上都在清理汽車的擋風玻璃。

meaning: a sudden shock or damage caused by strong wind
sentences: The tree showed signs of windshock after the storm. 暴風過後，那棵樹出現了強風損傷的跡象。
Windshock bent the fence overnight. 一夜之間，強風把籬笆吹彎了。

meaning: Windsor; a royal name or place name
sentences: They spent the day visiting Windsor Castle. 他們一整天都在參觀溫莎城堡。
Windsor is also the name of a famous royal style. 溫莎也是一種著名的皇家風格名稱。

meaning: a mineral variety of albite, or related rock material
sentences: The geologist labeled the sample as windsorite. 地質學家把那塊樣本標示為溫莎石。
A pale windsorite shard lay in the tray. 一塊淡色的溫莎石碎片放在托盤裡。

meaning: a storm with very strong wind
sentences: The windstorm knocked branches into the street. 風暴把樹枝吹落到街上。
After the windstorm, the town lost power. 風暴過後，小鎮停電了。

meaning: an animal that sucks in air and swallows it, especially a horse
sentences: The stable owner worried about a windsucker in the stall. 馬廄主人擔心馬槽裡有一匹愛吞氣的馬。
A windsucker can develop the habit when stressed. 動物在壓力下可能養成這種吞氣習慣。

meaning: tight enough to keep wind out
sentences: The old door was almost windtight after the repair. 修好後，那扇舊門幾乎能完全防風。
They sealed the cabin until it felt windtight. 他們把小木屋封好，直到幾乎不透風。

meaning: the act of finishing or concluding; an ending
sentences: The windup of the meeting took only five minutes. 會議的收尾只花了五分鐘。
His speech had a careful windup at the end. 他的演說在最後有一個講究的收束。

meaning: 朝向風，或風吹來的方向。
sentences: The windward boat must give way to the leeward boat. 迎風船必須讓路給下風船。
The report describes the result as windward. 報告稱結果是順風。

meaning: toward the wind; on the windward side
sentences: They moved windwardly to stay clear of the smoke. 他們朝迎風面移動，好避開煙霧。
The boat leaned windwardly against the waves. 那艘船迎著風向傾斜著對抗海浪。

meaning: furthest toward the wind; most exposed to wind
sentences: The windwardmost hill took the full force of the storm. 最迎風的山丘承受了整場風暴的全部威力。
They camped on the windwardmost side of the ridge. 他們在山脊最迎風的一側紮營。

meaning: the condition or position on the windward side
sentences: The ship held its windwardness and stayed clear of the rocks. 船維持在迎風側，避開了岩石。
They prized the windwardness of the hilltop campsite. 他們看重山頂營地的迎風位置。
The boat drifted windwards after the turn. 轉彎後，小船朝迎風側漂去。
He pointed windwards to show the safer route. 他朝迎風方向指去，表示那條更安全的路。

meaning: a passage for air or wind
sentences: A narrow windway carried cool air into the room. 一條狹窄的通風道把涼空氣送進房間。
Dust collected near the old windway in the wall. 灰塵積在牆裡那條舊通風道附近。

meaning: fickle or hard to control, like shifting wind
sentences: His windwayward plans changed every hour. 他那種像風一樣飄忽的計畫每小時都在變。
The windwayward path made the hike feel uncertain. 那條彎來彎去的小路讓這趟健行很不踏實。

meaning: in a fickle or shifting way
sentences: The clouds moved windwaywardly across the sky. 雲以飄忽不定的方式掠過天空。
She answered windwaywardly and changed the subject. 她含糊地回話，接著就把話題換掉了。
It was a very windy day, so we decided not to go for a picnic. 那天風很大，所以我們決定不去野餐了。
The forecast says it will be windy and cool tomorrow morning. 預報說明天早上會有風且涼爽。
Would you like a glass of red wine or white wine with dinner? 你想用餐時喝杯紅酒還是白酒？
The region is famous for producing high-quality organic wines. 該地區以生產高品質的有機葡萄酒聞名。

meaning: a small ball or rounded object associated with wine or a wine press
sentences: An old wineball rolled out from the cellar basket. 一顆舊的圓球從酒窖籃子裡滾了出來。
The maker kept a wineball beside the press as a tool. 製作的人把一顆圓球放在壓榨器旁當工具。

meaning: a berry-bearing plant, or its fruit
sentences: The gardener planted a wineberry near the fence. 園丁在圍欄旁種了一株懸鉤子。
The wineberry ripened into a bright red fruit. 那顆懸鉤子熟成了鮮紅的果實。

meaning: a person who drinks wine heavily
sentences: The tavern keeper warned that the man was a winebibber. 酒館老闆提醒大家，那個男人是個貪酒的人。
He was known as a winebibber who never stopped early. 他出了名地貪杯，從不太早停下來。
The story mocked the winebibbery of the old court. 那個故事諷刺了舊宮廷的縱酒習氣。
He quit the winebibbery after a serious illness. 一場重病之後，他戒掉了豪飲的習慣。

meaning: the act of drinking wine heavily
sentences: The night ended with too much winebibbing. 那個夜晚最後變成了過量飲酒。
They joked about his winebibbing at every reunion. 每次重聚時，他們都拿他豪飲的習慣開玩笑。

meaning: related to Winebrenner or his followers
sentences: The pastor gave the meeting a Winebrennerian tone. 那位牧師讓聚會帶上了溫布雷納式的氣息。
The article described the group's Winebrennerian beliefs. 那篇文章描述了這個團體的溫布雷納派信念。

meaning: a dealer in or expert on wine
sentences: The wineconner chose the bottle with great care. 那位懂酒的人非常小心地挑選了那瓶酒。
Every wineconner in town knew the old cellar. 鎮上每位懂酒的人都知道那座老酒窖。
The host wined the guests after dinner. 主人晚飯後用酒款待賓客。
They wined and talked long into the evening. 他們邊喝酒邊聊天，直到深夜。

meaning: a glass used for drinking wine
sentences: She set a clean wineglass beside each plate. 她在每個盤子旁都放了一只乾淨的酒杯。
The wineglass caught the candlelight beautifully. 那只酒杯漂亮地映出了燭光。

meaning: the amount that fills a wineglass
sentences: He poured a wineglassful of red wine. 他倒了滿滿一酒杯紅酒。
A wineglassful was enough for the tasting. 一酒杯的份量就足夠試飲了。

meaning: a person who grows grapes for wine
sentences: The winegrower checked the vines at sunrise. 那位葡萄種植者在日出時檢查藤蔓。
Each winegrower waited for the crop to ripen. 每位葡萄種植者都等著收成成熟。

meaning: the cultivation of grapes for wine
sentences: Winegrowing shaped the valley's economy. 葡萄種植塑造了這個山谷的經濟。
The region became famous for winegrowing. 這個地區因葡萄種植而出名。

meaning: 葡萄園 上的建築， winepress 位於其中。
sentences: The term winehouse refers to The building on a vineyard in which the winepress is located. 術語 Winehouse 是指 葡萄園 上的建築物， winepress 位於其中。 酒廠一詞是指釀酒廠所在的葡萄園上的建築物。 術語 Winehouse 是指葡萄園上的建築物， Winepress 位於其中。
The lesson introduced winehouse as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Winehouse 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了 Winehouse 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課程介紹了 Winehouse 作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
We chose a wineless dinner for the guests. 我們為賓客安排了不含酒的晚餐。
The party felt wineless but still cheerful. 那場派對雖然沒有酒，氣氛仍然愉快。

meaning: resembling wine in taste or color
sentences: The sauce had a winelike color. 那醬汁呈現出像酒一樣的顏色。
A winelike scent drifted from the barrel. 一股像酒般的氣味從木桶裡飄出來。

meaning: a may wine or a wine used in spring festivities
sentences: The village served winemay at the spring festival. 村子在春季節慶上供應春酒。
She found an old recipe for winemay in the book. 她在書裡找到一份古老的春酒配方。

meaning: a pot or vessel for holding wine
sentences: The winepot stood in the center of the table. 酒壺放在桌子的中央。
He filled the winepot before the guests arrived. 客人到來前，他先把酒壺倒滿。
The winer in the contest raised the trophy. 比賽中的獲勝者舉起了獎盃。
Everyone cheered for the winer at the finish line. 大家都為終點線上的獲勝者歡呼。

meaning: 釀酒的地方，或是釀酒的公司。
sentences: The term winery refers to a place where wine is made, or a company that makes wine. 釀酒廠一詞是指釀酒的地方，或釀酒的公司。
The lesson introduced winery as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了釀酒廠這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
She bought a basket of Winesap apples. 她買了一籃溫塞普蘋果。
The Winesap was crisp and sweet. 這種溫塞普蘋果又脆又甜。
They stopped at the wineshop on the corner. 他們在街角的酒鋪停了下來。
The old wineshop stayed open past midnight. 那家老酒鋪一直營業到午夜後。

meaning: a bag made of animal skin for carrying wine
sentences: The traveler carried water in a wineskin. 那位旅人用皮酒囊裝水。
A cracked wineskin leaked onto the floor. 一個裂開的皮酒囊把地板弄濕了。
The old meal included a piece of winesop. 那頓古老的餐食裡有一塊浸過酒的麵包。
She had never tasted winesop before that day. 她在那天之前從沒吃過浸酒麵包。

meaning: a person who tastes and judges wine
sentences: The winetaster judged the bottle with one sip. 那位試酒師只喝一口就做了判斷。
Every winetaster in the room took notes. 房間裡每位試酒師都在做筆記。

meaning: a grapevine or a tree associated with wine grapes
sentences: The winetree climbed over the garden arch. 那株葡萄藤爬滿了花園拱門。
A young winetree spread its leaves in the sun. 一株幼小的葡萄藤在陽光下舒展葉片。

meaning: a large vat used for wine
sentences: The cellar held a huge winevat. 酒窖裡放著一個巨大的酒桶。
The winevat smelled of oak and grapes. 那個酒桶散發著橡木和葡萄的味道。
Winfred signed the guest book first. 溫弗雷德第一個在來賓簿上簽名。
The teacher called Winfred to the front. 老師叫溫弗雷德到前面來。

meaning: full of winning; fortunate or triumphant
sentences: Her winful smile convinced the crowd. 她那充滿勝利感的微笑打動了群眾。
They returned home in a winful mood. 他們帶著得勝般的心情回家。
The eagle soared high above the mountains with its vast wings. 老鷹展翅在高山之上翱翔。
The new hospital wing will be completed by the end of this year. 醫院的新側翼將在今年年底前完工。

meaning: able to be given wings or fitted with wings
sentences: The model plane was wingable with a simple kit. 這架模型飛機用簡單套件就能加上機翼。
He found the toy very wingable for display. 他覺得那個玩具很適合裝上機翼來展示。

meaning: a single beat or stroke of a wing
sentences: Each wingbeat lifted the bird higher. 每一次振翼都把那隻鳥帶得更高。
The owl crossed the yard in one quiet wingbeat. 貓頭鷹只用一次安靜的振翼就掠過院子。

meaning: a cut made on a wing or the trimming of a wing
sentences: The vet checked the wingcut carefully. 獸醫仔細檢查了翅膀上的傷口。
The bird recovered quickly from the wingcut. 那隻鳥從翅膀的割傷中很快恢復了。
The six- winged Seraphim are the angels closest to God. 六翼六翼天使是最接近神的天使。
The report describes the result as winged. 報告將這一結果描述為「有翼」。

meaning: in a winged or airy manner
sentences: She moved wingedly across the stage. 她像展翅般輕盈地走過舞台。
The leaves fell wingedly in the breeze. 葉子在微風中像有翅膀似地飄落。

meaning: the quality of having wings or seeming winged
sentences: The sculpture captured the wingedness of the angel. 那座雕像捕捉到了天使般的翼感。
She admired the wingedness of the bird's outline. 她欣賞那隻鳥輪廓中的翅膀感。

meaning: 其中一個木桶存放在船艙的兩翼，比存放在船中部的木桶小。
sentences: We hauled out a winger of grog. 我們拿出了一杯烈酒。
The term winger refers to one of the casks stowed in the wings of a vessel's hold, being smaller than such as are stowed more amidships. 「邊翼」一詞是指存放在船艙兩翼的木桶，其尺寸小於存放在船中部的木桶。

meaning: a fish with winglike fins, such as a flying fish
sentences: A wingfish flashed above the waves. 一條翼魚在浪面上閃過。
The child stared at the wingfish as it leapt away. 那個孩子盯著那條翼魚，看著牠躍開。

meaning: having hands or movements like wings
sentences: The dancer made a winghanded gesture. 舞者做出像展翅般的手勢。
Her winghanded flourish filled the room. 她那像翅膀般揮灑的動作讓整個房間都亮了起來。

meaning: a small wing or winglike part
sentences: A tiny wingle stuck out from the toy plane. 玩具飛機上伸出一個小小的機翼。
The metal wingle bent after the fall. 那個金屬小翼在摔落後彎了。
The wingless insect crawled slowly across the stone. 那隻無翅昆蟲慢慢爬過石頭。
A wingless statue stood at the park gate. 公園門口立著一座沒有翅膀的雕像。

meaning: the state of having no wings
sentences: The winglessness of the toy made it easy to pack. 那個玩具沒有翅膀，所以很好收納。
He noted the winglessness of the broken bird figure. 他注意到那個破損鳥像沒有翅膀。

meaning: a small wing or winglike projection
sentences: The aircraft had a winglet at the tip. 那架飛機的翼尖有小翼。
A blue winglet flashed as the bird turned. 鳥一轉身時，藍色的小翼閃了一下。
The leaf had a winglike shape. 那片葉子長得像翅膀。
Her winglike scarf fluttered behind her. 她那條像翅膀一樣的圍巾在身後飄動。

meaning: a companion or helper who supports another
sentences: He acted as my wingman at the party. 他在派對上當我的陪襯幫手。
Every pilot trusted a good wingman. 每位飛行員都信任一位可靠的僚機。

meaning: the skill or role of acting as a wingman
sentences: His wingmanship saved the whole team. 他的僚機協作能力救了整個隊伍。
The coach praised her wingmanship in the drill. 教練稱讚她在演練中的協作表現。

meaning: a piece attached to or shaped like a wing
sentences: The costume had a silver wingpiece on each sleeve. 那套服裝在每只袖子上都有一片銀色翼片。
He repaired the broken wingpiece before the show. 他在表演前修好了那塊破損的翼片。

meaning: a post or support connected with a winged structure
sentences: The wingpost held the sign steady in the wind. 那根翼柱讓招牌在風中保持穩定。
A wingpost stood beside the old gate. 舊大門旁立著一根翼形支柱。

meaning: a seed with a winglike appendage
sentences: The maple dropped a wingseed into the grass. 楓樹把帶翅的種子掉進草地裡。
A wingseed spun slowly down from the tree. 一顆帶翅種子從樹上慢慢旋轉而下。

meaning: the full span from wingtip to wingtip
sentences: The eagle had a wide wingspread. 那隻鷹的翼展很大。
He measured the wingspread of the model carefully. 他仔細量了模型的翼展。

meaning: a plant stem with winglike ridges
sentences: The botanist noted the wingstem on the specimen. 植物學家記下了標本上的翼狀莖。
A thin wingstem rose from the wet soil. 一條細細的翼狀莖從濕土裡長了出來。
The wingy seed spun down from the tree. 那顆帶翅的種子從樹上旋轉落下。
The wingy design made the toy bird look alive. 這種有翅膀感的設計讓玩具鳥看起來很有生命力。
Winifred arrived early for the meeting. 溫妮弗蕾德提早到了會議現場。
Her name, Winifred, was written neatly on the card. 她的名字溫妮弗蕾德工整地寫在卡片上。

meaning: having a winning or attractive look
sentences: Her winish smile made the room feel warmer. 她那帶著好感的微笑讓房間都溫暖了起來。
The puppy had a winish face that everyone loved. 那隻小狗有一張很討人喜歡的臉。
He gave me a quick wink to let me know that he was only joking. 他對我眨了眨眼，讓我知道他只是在開玩笑。
The light from the lighthouse could be seen winking in the distance. 可以看到遠處燈塔的光在閃爍。

meaning: a shop or store; a dialect word for a corner
sentences: The old winkel sold bread and candles. 那家舊式小店賣麵包和蠟燭。
We met near the corner, or winkel, of the street. 我們在街角，也就是那個舊式稱呼的地方附近碰面。
The winkelman opened the store before sunrise. 那位店主在日出前就打開了店門。
Every winkelman in the market knew the regular customers. 市集裡每個店主都認得熟客。

meaning: a person or thing that winks
sentences: He was a cheerful winker who loved to tease. 他是個愛眨眼逗人的開朗傢伙。
The child was a quick winker when the light was bright. 光線太亮時，那個孩子很快就會眨眼。

meaning: having side shields that block the view; blinded to the sides
sentences: The horse wore winkered gear during the parade. 那匹馬在遊行時戴著有側遮擋的裝備。
The driver felt winkered by the heavy rain and fog. 那位駕駛在大雨濃霧中覺得視線被遮住了。

meaning: closing and opening an eye quickly; suggesting a secret signal
sentences: She kept winking at her brother across the table. 她一直隔著桌子對弟弟眨眼。
The winking light on the wall looked like a signal. 牆上的閃爍燈光看起來像一個訊號。

meaning: with a wink or in a playful, secretive way
sentences: He winkingly agreed to keep the surprise secret. 他帶著眨眼般的默契答應保守驚喜秘密。
The teacher winkingly praised the student's clever answer. 老師以一種帶點默契的方式稱讚了學生聰明的回答。

meaning: a small sea snail; to pry or pull out with difficulty
sentences: We found a tiny winkle among the rocks. 我們在岩石間找到一隻小海螺。
She had to winkle the nail out of the wood. 她得費力把釘子從木頭裡撬出來。

meaning: a hawk-like bird name used in old or local writing
sentences: The old field notes mentioned a winklehawk by the coast. 舊田野筆記提到海岸邊出現了一種鷹形鳥。
The children watched the winklehawk circle above the hill. 孩子們看著那隻鷹形鳥在山丘上空盤旋。

meaning: a small hole or opening used to pry something out
sentences: The carpenter found a winklehole in the old board. 木匠在舊木板上找到一個小孔。
He used the winklehole to lift the stuck piece loose. 他利用那個小孔把卡住的零件撬鬆。
She gave him a winklet before leaving the room. 她離開房間前對他眨了一下眼。
The winklet told him that everything was fine. 那個小小的眨眼動作告訴他一切都沒問題。

meaning: in a winning, pleasant, or charming way
sentences: She winly greeted every guest at the door. 她用很討喜的方式在門口迎接每位客人。
The child winly asked for one more story. 那個孩子以惹人喜愛的口氣再要一個故事。

meaning: to win or gain; a dialect form of win
sentences: He hoped to winna the prize at the fair. 他希望在市集上贏得那個獎品。
To winna the game, they had to stay focused. 要贏得這場比賽，他們就得保持專注。
The match looked winnable after halftime. 中場過後，這場比賽看起來有機會贏。
The team stayed calm because the race was still winnable. 這支隊伍保持冷靜，因為比賽仍然有機會逆轉。

meaning: a winner or a successful person
sentences: They treated him like a winnard after the final round. 最後一輪後，大家把他當成贏家看待。
The old story praised the winnard who never quit. 那個古老故事讚揚了那位從不放棄的贏家。

meaning: a Native American people and their language
sentences: The museum exhibition explained Winnebago history. 博物館展覽介紹了溫尼貝戈族的歷史。
A Winnebago elder spoke about the old traditions. 一位溫尼貝戈長者談到了古老的傳統。

meaning: an old place name or tribal name
sentences: The map listed Winnecowet as an early settlement name. 地圖把這個舊地名標成一個早期聚落名。
Historians debated where the Winnecowet people lived. 歷史學者一直在討論那個族群住在哪裡。

meaning: to wind or twist slowly; a winding line
sentences: The vine seemed to winnel around the fence. 那株藤蔓似乎慢慢繞著圍欄纏過去。
The river began to winnel through the valley. 河流開始蜿蜒穿過山谷。

meaning: a thin or weak straw; something flimsy and easily bent
sentences: The wind snapped the winnelstrae in half. 風把那根細弱的稻草吹斷了。
He held the paper like a winnelstrae in his fingers. 他手裡拿著那張紙，像握著一根脆弱的稻草。

meaning: 曾經獲勝或經常獲勝的人。
sentences: The term winner refers to one who has won or often wins. 獲勝者一詞是指已經獲勝或經常獲勝的人。
The lesson introduced winner as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了「獲勝者」作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: a female given name or nickname
sentences: Winnie waved from the front steps. 溫妮站在前門台階上揮手。
Everyone called her Winnie because the name felt friendly. 大家都叫她溫妮，因為這名字聽起來很親切。
the winning entry in the competition 比賽中的 獲勝 作品 比賽中的獲獎作品比賽中的驚作
the winning lotto numbers 中獎 樂透號碼 中獎樂透號碼 中獎 樂透號碼

meaning: in a charming or successful way
sentences: He winningly explained the plan to the group. 他以很有說服力的方式向大家說明計畫。
She smiled winningly and won the room over. 她用迷人的笑容贏得了全場好感。

meaning: the quality of being charming or likely to win
sentences: His winningness made the audience trust him. 他那種討喜的特質讓觀眾很信任他。
The coach liked the player's winningness and calm focus. 教練喜歡那名球員討喜又冷靜專注的特質。

meaning: money or prizes won in a contest or game
sentences: She donated her winnings to the school library. 她把贏來的獎金捐給了學校圖書館。
The winnings were enough to pay for the trip home. 那筆贏得的錢足夠支付回家的旅費。

meaning: fine or dainty in appearance; tiny and delicate
sentences: The winninish bracelet looked fragile but elegant. 那條細緻的手環看起來脆弱卻很優雅。
Her winninish handwriting was hard to read at first. 她那種秀氣細小的字跡一開始很難辨認。

meaning: a lake name in New Hampshire
sentences: They spent the weekend near Winnipesaukee. 他們在溫尼珀索基湖附近度過週末。
The guide described Winnipesaukee as a favorite holiday spot. 導遊把溫尼珀索基湖形容成大家很喜歡的度假地。
The thread began to winnle around the needle. 線開始輕輕纏到針上。
The path seemed to winnle between the trees. 那條小路似乎在樹間蜿蜒。
Her winnonish tone made the complaint easier to hear. 她那種討喜的語氣讓抱怨聽起來沒那麼刺耳。
The child had a winnonish way of asking for help. 那個孩子求助的方式很討人喜歡。

meaning: to separate grain from chaff by blowing; to sift or sort
sentences: Farmers used a basket to winnow the grain. 農人用籃子把穀粒和糠分開。
We winnow the ideas until only the best ones remain. 我們把點子篩選到只剩最好的。

meaning: a person or machine that winnows
sentences: The winnower stood beside the pile of grain. 那位篩穀的人站在穀堆旁。
A modern winnower could finish the job quickly. 現代的篩穀機能很快完成這項工作。

meaning: the act of separating grain from chaff or of sifting
sentences: The winnowing took place in the afternoon wind. 篩穀工作在午後的風中進行。
The editor's winnowing left only the strongest chapters. 編輯的篩選最後只留下最有力的章節。

meaning: in a way that sifts, sorts, or separates
sentences: She winnowingly reviewed each application one by one. 她用篩選的方式逐一審核每份申請。
The wind moved winnowingly through the dry grain. 風穿過乾穀時像在慢慢篩選。

meaning: a female given name or a place name
sentences: Winona sat by the window with a book. 溫諾娜坐在窗邊看書。
The town of Winona was quiet after sunset. 溫諾娜這個小鎮在日落後很安靜。

meaning: a race or contest to win
sentences: The school parade ended with a playful winrace. 學校遊行最後以一場趣味競賽收尾。
He entered the winrace with a serious look. 他帶著認真的表情參加那場比賽。

meaning: a row or bundle of grain laid out to dry
sentences: The farmer spread the hay in a long winrow. 農夫把乾草鋪成一長列。
The winrow stretched across the field like a ribbon. 那排乾草像緞帶一樣延伸過整片田地。
Her winsome expression won everyone over. 她那討喜的神情贏得了所有人的好感。
The winsome child greeted strangers without fear. 那個討人喜愛的孩子毫不害怕地向陌生人打招呼。

meaning: in a charming or attractive way
sentences: He winsomely asked for one more chance. 他以很討喜的方式再要一次機會。
The actor winsomely smiled at the crowd. 那位演員以迷人的笑容對群眾微笑。
Her winsomeness made the whole class relax. 她那種討喜的特質讓全班都放鬆下來。
The puppy's winsomeness made it impossible to ignore. 那隻小狗的討喜模樣讓人很難不注意。
Winston carried the bags to the car. 溫斯頓把袋子搬到車上。
The name Winston appeared on the invitation. 邀請卡上寫著溫斯頓這個名字。

meaning: to twist, turn, or wind; a dialect form
sentences: The narrow road seemed to wint around the hill. 那條狹窄的路似乎繞著山丘蜿蜒。
He watched the rope wint slowly around the post. 他看著繩子慢慢繞在柱子上。
We usually go skiing in the mountains during the winter. 我們通常在冬天去山裡滑雪。
Many birds migrate south to winter in warmer climates. 許多鳥類向南遷徙，在更溫暖的氣候中過冬。
The botanist labeled the specimen as Winteraceae. 植物學家把這份標本標成溫特植物科。
Winteraceae includes several fragrant forest plants. 溫特植物科包含幾種有香氣的森林植物。

meaning: the season or period of winter
sentences: The winterage was long and cold that year. 那年的冬季又長又冷。
They stored extra wood for the winterage. 他們為寒冬季節多存了一些木柴。

meaning: a plant family name used in older botanical writing
sentences: The old herbarium sheet listed Winteranaceae. 舊標本紙上列出了溫特安植物科這個名稱。
Researchers noted Winteranaceae as an outdated family name. 研究人員註記溫特安植物科是舊式科名。

meaning: a shrub or its red berries that stay bright in winter
sentences: The winterberry kept its red fruit through the snow. 冬青灌木的紅果在雪中仍然鮮亮。
She picked winterberry branches for the table decoration. 她摘了冬青果枝來做桌面裝飾。

meaning: a flower that blooms in winter or a winter-flowering plant
sentences: The winterbloom opened during the coldest week. 那株冬花在最冷的一週開放了。
Gardeners loved the winterbloom for its bright color. 園丁喜歡冬花，因為它的顏色很鮮明。

meaning: a stream that flows only in winter or after rain
sentences: The winterbourne was dry by late summer. 那條冬季溪流到了夏末就乾了。
After the storm, the winterbourne ran clear again. 暴風雨過後，那條只在冬季流動的溪溝又變得清澈。

meaning: dykes or embankments used for winter protection
sentences: The farmers checked the winterdykes before the freeze. 農夫在結冰前檢查冬季堤岸。
Strong winterdykes kept the fields from flooding. 堅固的冬季堤岸讓田地免於淹水。

meaning: spent the winter in a place; endured winter conditions
sentences: The family wintered in a small cabin near the lake. 這家人在湖邊的小木屋裡過冬。
The herd wintered well despite the deep snow. 那群牲畜雖然雪很深，仍平安度過冬天。

meaning: a person or animal that spends the winter somewhere
sentences: The winterer packed extra blankets and food. 那位過冬者準備了多餘的毯子和食物。
Every winterer in the camp knew how to conserve heat. 營地裡每個過冬的人都懂得如何保暖。
The farmer stored winterfeed in the shed. 那位農夫把冬季飼料存放在棚屋裡。
The cows ate the winterfeed when the pasture froze. 牧草凍住時，牛群就吃那批冬季飼料。
A patch of wintergreen grew under the pine tree. 松樹下長著一小片冬青。
She crushed wintergreen leaves for their fresh scent. 她搓碎冬青葉，讓香氣散出來。
The herd moved toward the winterhain before dark. 天黑前，獸群朝冬季牧場移去。
Old maps marked the winterhain near the river. 舊地圖把越冬地標在河邊。
The geese were wintering near the lake. 那些鵝正在湖邊越冬。
Wintering in the south helped the plants survive. 到南方過冬幫助那些植物活了下來。
The morning felt winterish even in early autumn. 這個早晨即使在初秋也像冬天一樣冷。
A winterish wind swept across the field. 一陣寒冷的風掃過田野。
The air blew winterishly through the open window. 冷風像冬天一樣從開著的窗戶吹進來。
He spoke winterishly about the long, hard season. 他用一種寒冷的語氣談起那漫長又艱難的季節。
There was a winterishness in the gray sky. 灰色天空帶著一種冬意。
The winterishness of the room came from the draft. 房間裡那股寒意來自穿堂風。
The boat needed winterization before the cold months. 那艘船在寒冷月份到來前需要做越冬處理。
Winterization kept the pipes from freezing. 防寒準備讓水管沒有凍裂。
They winterize the cabin before the first snow. 他們會在第一場雪前替小木屋做防寒處理。
You should winterize the garden hoses in late fall. 你應該在深秋把花園水管收妥防寒。
The wheat suffered from winterkill after the storm. 暴風雪後，小麥遭受了凍害。
Farmers watched for winterkill in the young crop. 農夫留意幼苗是否受到冬季凍害。

meaning: 受凍害的；會在冬天凍死的
sentences: The report described winterkilling in the orchard. 報告描述了果園裡的凍害情況。
A late frost caused more winterkilling than expected. 晚霜造成的凍害比預期更多。
The island seemed almost winterless to the visitors. 對遊客來說，那座島幾乎沒有冬天。
He dreamed of a winterless place with warm nights. 他夢想有個沒有冬天、夜裡也溫暖的地方。
The hill had a winterlike silence at dusk. 山丘在黃昏時有一種像冬天般的寂靜。
A winterlike chill entered the room after sunset. 日落後，一陣冬天般的寒意進了房間。
The winterliness of the valley was hard to ignore. 山谷裡那種冬日氣息很難忽視。
She liked the winterliness of the clear, dry air. 她喜歡這種清澈乾爽空氣裡的冬意。
The gardener labeled the small plant a winterling. 園丁把那株小植物標成越冬幼株。
A winterling survived the frost by the wall. 牆邊的一株越冬植物熬過了霜凍。
The path looked winterly after the snowfall. 下過雪後，那條小路看起來很有冬天的感覺。
A winterly breeze moved through the trees. 一陣冬日般的微風吹過樹林。
The winterproof tent held up in the storm. 那頂防寒帳篷在風暴中撐住了。
They bought winterproof boots for the hike. 他們為健行買了能防寒的靴子。
The old garden had a wintersome quiet. 那座老花園有一種冷清的冬意。
His wintersome mood matched the gray afternoon. 他那種帶寒意的心情正好配上灰濛濛的午後。
The village was peaceful during wintertide. 村莊在冬季時分顯得很安靜。
Wintertide brought short days and long nights. 冬天時節帶來了白晝短、夜晚長的日子。
Wintertime makes the town feel slower. 冬天會讓城鎮的步調慢下來。
We visit my grandparents every wintertime. 我們每到冬天都會去看祖父母。
The road ran winterward along the coast. 那條路沿著海岸朝寒冷方向延伸。
A winterward slope caught the early frost. 一處朝寒方的坡面先結了霜。
The birds flew winterwards before sunset. 鳥群在日落前朝寒冷方向飛去。
He turned winterwards when the wind shifted. 風向一變，他便轉向寒冷方向。
A tough winterweed grew between the stones. 一株耐寒野草長在石縫間。
The farmer pulled the winterweed from the field. 農夫把田裡的冬季雜草拔掉。
The candle flame seemed to wintle in the draft. 蠟燭火焰在氣流中似乎微微打轉。
The leaf would wintle in the wind before falling. 葉子在落下前會被風輕輕吹轉。
The gray paint can wintrify a bright room. 灰色油漆會讓明亮的房間顯得更冷。
Fog seemed to wintrify the whole street. 霧氣似乎把整條街都變得像冬天一樣冷。
The wind blew wintrily across the plain. 風寒冷地吹過平原。
She smiled wintrily and wrapped her coat tighter. 她帶著一絲冷意的微笑，把外套拉得更緊。
The wintriness of the morning woke everyone up. 早晨的寒意把大家都喚醒了。
He missed the wintriness of his mountain home. 他懷念山居家鄉的冬意。
The evening had a wintrish feel. 這個傍晚帶著一點冬意。
A wintrish rain fell before dawn. 黎明前落下一陣帶寒意的雨。

meaning: 很寒冷的；冬天般嚴峻的
sentences: The wintrous air made the windows fog. 寒冷的空氣讓窗戶起霧。
A wintrous silence settled over the camp. 一種冬天般的寂靜籠罩了營地。
It will be cloudy overnight, with outbreaks of heavy rain at times. The rain may turn wintry over higher ground. 夜間多雲，間有大雨。雨水可能會使地勢較高的地區變得寒冷。
The report describes the result as wintry. 報告將結果描述為寒冷。
The museum displayed tools from the Wintun people. 博物館展出了溫吞族人的工具。
A Wintun story was told beside the fire. 火堆旁講述了一個溫吞族的故事。
The sauce had a winy smell after cooking. 這醬汁煮過後帶著酒味。
She noticed a winy note in the fruit. 她聞到那水果裡有一絲酒香。
The miners climbed down the winze carefully. 礦工小心地爬下那座小豎井。
A narrow winze linked two underground levels. 一道狹窄的礦井小豎井連接了兩層地下坑道。
The winzeman checked the ladder before descending. 那名礦井工人在下去前先檢查梯子。
Every winzeman wore a lamp on his helmet. 每位礦井工人頭盔上都裝著燈。
Please remember to wipe your muddy shoes on the rug by door. 請記得在門邊的地毯上擦掉妳鞋上的泥。
She used a soft cloth to wipe the dust off the wooden table. 她用一塊軟布擦掉了木桌上的灰塵。
The car's windshield wipers were working hard during the heavy rain. 汽車的擋風玻璃雨刷在大雨中正賣力地工作著。
He needs to replace the worn-out wipers on his truck. 他需要更換卡車上磨損的雨刷。
The piano repairer replaced a broken wippen. 那位鋼琴修理師換掉了一個損壞的槓桿。
A loose wippen can make the key feel uneven. 鬆掉的鋼琴槓桿會讓琴鍵手感不均。
She tied the grass into small wips. 她把草綁成一小束一小束。
The basket held a few wips of dry straw. 籃子裡放著幾小束乾稻草。
A thin wir ran along the edge of the cloth. 布料邊緣有一道細絲。
The old rope had a wir sticking out. 那條舊繩子上冒出一根細絲。
The attic is wirable if you add conduit. 只要加上管線，閣樓就可以佈線。
They checked whether the room was wirable for lights. 他們確認那個房間能不能拉線裝燈。
The toy would wirble when pushed on the table. 那個玩具一推到桌上就會轉動。
The flag seemed to wirble in the gusts. 旗子在陣風中似乎輕輕旋動。
He spoke of his wird as if it were fixed. 他談起自己的命運時，像是早已注定。
The old tale treated the accident as a weird wird. 那個古老故事把那場意外當作一樁怪事。
I used a piece of thin wire to fix the broken fence in the yard. 我用一根細金屬絲修好了院子裡壞掉的圍欄。
The electrician is here to check the faulty electrical wires. 電工來檢查故障的電線了。
The fence was reinforced with a wirebar. 那道圍欄用鐵絲條加強了。
He bent the wirebar into a hook. 他把金屬絲條彎成了鉤子。
A wirebird perched on the stone wall. 一隻線鳥停在石牆上。
The guide pointed out the wirebird in the grass. 嚮導指給大家看草叢裡的線鳥。

meaning: 非常興奮，刺激過度；高度緊張。
sentences: After three cups of coffee she was too wired to sleep. 喝了三杯咖啡後，她興奮得睡不著。
The report describes the result as wired. 該報告將結果描述為有線的。
The wiredancer crossed the rope without a stumble. 那位走鋼索者毫不踉蹌地走過繩索。
Everyone watched the wiredancer with held breath. 大家屏住呼吸看著那位走鋼索者。
The show ended with wiredancing above the stage. 表演以舞台上方的走鋼索作結。
Wiredancing demanded steady balance and courage. 走鋼索需要穩定的平衡感和勇氣。
Workers wiredraw the metal into thin strands. 工人把金屬拉成細絲。
The factory can wiredraw copper all day. 這家工廠可以整天拉銅絲。
The wiredrawer checked the machine before starting. 拉絲工在開工前先檢查機器。
An old wiredrawer stood in the workshop. 工作坊裡放著一台老式拉絲器。
The wiredrawn metal shone in the light. 被拉成細絲的金屬在光下發亮。
Her wiredrawn explanation was hard to follow. 她那種細碎冗長的解釋很難跟上。
The dog had a rough wirehair coat. 那隻狗長著粗硬的毛皮。
He brushed the wirehair away from his eyes. 他把硬毛從眼前撥開。
The office is equipped with high-speed wireless internet access. 辦公室配備了高速無線網路連接。
The early wireless sets were large and quite expensive. 早期的無線電裝置體積龐大且相當昂貴。
The speaker connected wirelessly to the phone. 那個喇叭以無線方式連上手機。
We sent the file wirelessly to the printer. 我們把檔案無線送到印表機。
The room's wirelessness made the setup simpler. 這個房間不用拉線，布置更簡單。
He liked the wirelessness of the new headset. 他喜歡新耳機那種不靠線的設計。

meaning: 像金屬絲的；細長堅硬的
sentences: The plant had wirelike stems and small leaves. 這株植物有像金屬絲般的細莖和小葉子。
A wirelike branch scratched the window. 一根細長堅硬的樹枝刮到了窗戶。

meaning: 製線工人；製作金屬絲的人
sentences: The wiremaker checked the spool before packing it. 製線工人先檢查線軸，再把它包好。
A skilled wiremaker can make thin wire very evenly. 技術好的製線工人能把金屬絲拉得很均勻。
Wiremaking used to be done by hand in small shops. 從前製線常在小作坊裡手工完成。
The factory expanded its wiremaking line last year. 那家工廠去年擴大了製線產線。
The wireman climbed the pole in the rain. 那名架線工人在雨中爬上電線桿。
We asked the wireman to repair the broken line. 我們請那位電線工人修理斷掉的線路。

meaning: 鐵絲商；販賣金屬絲和金屬配件的人
sentences: The wiremonger sold hooks, nails, and coils of wire. 那位鐵絲商販售掛鉤、鐵釘和成卷金屬絲。
Old market records list him as a wiremonger. 舊市場紀錄把他列為鐵絲商。
The newspaper published a wirephoto of the historic event. 報紙刊登了一張該歷史事件的傳真照片。

meaning: 電傳照片；透過電線傳送的新聞照片
