The garden was shaded by Wistaria vines. 花園被紫藤藤蔓遮出一片陰影。

meaning: 紫藤；紫藤屬植物的小寫拼法
sentences: The label read wistaria on the page. 標籤上寫的是小寫的紫藤。
She sketched the wistaria in her notebook. 她把紫藤畫在筆記本裡。
The narrator wiste the danger too late. 敘述者太晚才知道危險。
He wiste where the road ended. 他知道那條路的盡頭在哪裡。

meaning: 被引導得明白了的；變得知道的
sentences: The child seemed wistened after the lesson. 那堂課後，孩子看起來更明白了。
A wistened look crossed her face. 她臉上一閃而過一種恍然明白的神情。
The wisteria vines are covered in beautiful purple flowers every spring. 紫藤藤蔓每年春天都開滿了美麗的紫色花朵。
The fragrance of the blooming wisteria filled the entire garden. 盛開的紫藤香氣瀰漫了整個花園。
Wisteria hung over the old porch. 紫藤垂掛在老門廊上方。
The Wisteria perfume was soft and sweet. 紫藤香味柔和又清甜。
She gave a wistful smile. 她露出一抹惆悵的微笑。
The boy looked wistful after hearing the song. 那個男孩聽完歌後顯得有些渴望。
He stared wistfully at the sea. 他惆悵地望著海。
She spoke wistfully about her childhood. 她帶著懷念與渴望談起童年。
There was wistfulness in the music. 那段音樂裡有一種惆悵。
His voice carried a quiet wistfulness. 他的聲音裡帶著安靜的嚮往。
A wistit jumped from branch to branch. 一隻狨猴在樹枝間跳來跳去。
The zoo kept a tiny wistit in the enclosure. 動物園在圍欄裡飼養一隻小狨猴。
The guide pointed out the wistiti in the tree. 嚮導指出樹上的狨猴。
Children watched the wistiti with wide eyes. 孩子們睜大眼睛看著那隻狨猴。
He was wistless about the surprise party. 他對那場驚喜派對完全不知情。
The traveler remained wistless of the danger ahead. 那位旅人對前方危險毫無察覺。
Her wistlessness about the matter was obvious. 她對那件事的不知情很明顯。
The story shows the wistlessness of the crowd. 這個故事呈現了人群的毫無察覺。
His dream was only a wistonwish at first. 他的夢想起初只是一場白日夢。
The teacher called it a wistonwish without a plan. 老師把那稱為沒有計畫的空想。
She is known for her quick wit and ability to make people laugh in any situation. 她以機智（風趣）和在任何情況下都能逗人發笑的能力而聞名。
It took all his wits to find a solution to the complex problem. 他使出了全身解數（理智/機智）才找到了解決這個複雜問題的方法。

meaning: 機智的媒介 (修正為 wit as a vehicle)
sentences: The author uses wit vehicle to convey his social commentary. 作者利用機智作為傳達社會評論的媒介。
Humor can be an effective wit vehicle for discussing difficult topics. 幽默可以成為討論困難主題的有效機智媒介。
The king listened to the witan. 國王聽取了智者議會的意見。
The witan met to discuss the future. 那個顧問會聚在一起討論未來。
Witbooi was written in the old family register. 舊家譜裡寫著溫博伊這個姓氏。
The guide explained that Witbooi is a historic name. 嚮導解釋說，溫博伊是個有歷史感的名字。
The children dressed up as witches and ghosts for Halloween. 孩子們在萬聖節打扮成女巫和鬼魂。
In many folk tales, the witch has a black cat as her companion. 在許多民間故事中，女巫有一隻黑貓作為同伴。
The children dressed up as witches and wizards for the Halloween party. 孩子們穿得像女巫和巫師一樣去參加萬營節派對。
In many fairy tales, the powerful wizard helps the hero complete his quest. 在許多童話故事中，強大的巫師幫助英雄完成任務。

meaning: 巫鈴；與女巫傳說相關的鈴鐺
sentences: The play opened with the sound of witchbells. 那齣戲一開始就響起巫鈴聲。
She imagined witchbells hanging in the dark room. 她想像黑暗房間裡掛著幾串巫鈴。

meaning: 女巫的做法；魔法、巫術或使用超自然力量來影響或預測事件。
sentences: Wiccans believe in a modernised form of witchcraft. 巫術崇拜者相信一種現代化形式的巫術。
The term witchcraft refers to the practice of witches; magic, sorcery, or the use of supernatural powers to influence or predict events. 巫術一詞指的是女巫的活動。魔法、巫術或使用超自然力量來影響或預測事件。
He felt witched by the strange song. 他覺得自己被那首奇異的歌迷住了。
The child was witched by the storyteller's voice. 那孩子被說故事人的嗓音深深吸引。
She stared witchedly at the flickering flame. 她像著了魔似地盯著閃爍的火焰。
The crowd moved witchedly toward the music. 人群近乎恍惚地朝著音樂走去。
The old tale gave the forest a witchen mood. 那個古老故事讓森林帶上一種女巫般的氣氛。
A witchen smile crossed her face. 她臉上掠過一抹像女巫般的微笑。

meaning: 施巫術般的；帶有巫術意味的
sentences: The witchering wind made the windows shake. 那陣帶著巫術意味的風讓窗戶搖晃。
His witchering tone made the warning sound serious. 他那種像在施咒的語氣讓警告聽起來很嚴肅。
The room seemed full of witchery and silence. 那個房間似乎充滿巫術般的氣息與寂靜。
Her witchery was more charm than danger. 她的魔力更像是吸引力，而不是危險。

meaning: 小女巫；帶點惡作劇意味的女人
sentences: In the story, the witchet loved harmless tricks. 故事裡那個小女巫喜歡無傷大雅的惡作劇。
The children treated the witchet as a playful character. 孩子們把那個小女巫當成愛玩的角色。

meaning: 可食幼蟲的；澳洲可食幼蟲
sentences: The witchetty was roasted over the fire. 那條可食幼蟲在火上烤熟了。
He had never tasted witchetty before the trip. 在這趟旅程前，他從沒吃過這種幼蟲。
The novel explored her slow move into witchhood. 那本小說描寫她逐漸成為女巫的過程。
They feared the rumors about witchhood in the village. 他們害怕村子裡關於女巫身分的流言。
The witching hour made the house feel still. 那個充滿魔力的時刻讓房子顯得靜止不動。
She loved the witching glow of the lanterns. 她喜歡燈籠那種迷人的光暈。
The singer smiled witchingly at the crowd. 那位歌手對著人群露出迷人的微笑。
The fire burned witchingly in the dark. 火焰在黑暗中像施了魔法似地燃著。
The herbal guide listed witchleaf among old names. 那本草本指南把巫葉列為舊稱之一。
A witchleaf grew beside the stone wall. 石牆邊長著一株巫葉。
Her witchlike hat looked odd but memorable. 她那頂像女巫的帽子看起來怪異卻難忘。
The witchlike figure vanished into the fog. 那個像女巫的身影消失在霧裡。
The witchman in the tale spoke in riddles. 故事裡的男巫總是用謎語說話。
A witchman was said to guard the old gate. 據說有個男術士看守著那座舊城門。

meaning: 兜售巫術的人；招搖撞騙的巫師
sentences: The villagers distrusted the witchmonger at once. 村民一眼就不信任那個兜售巫術的人。
The witchmonger promised power for a heavy price. 那個騙人的巫師開價很高，才肯給力量。

meaning: 怪異的人；像女巫般的生物
sentences: The old rhyme mentioned a witchuck in the woods. 那首古老童謠提到森林裡有個怪異生物。
Children used the name witchuck for the strange shadow. 孩子們把那個怪影叫作怪巫。
The farmer pulled out the witchweed before it spread. 農夫在它擴散前先把巫草拔掉。
Witchweed can damage crops very quickly. 巫草會很快傷害作物。

meaning: 女巫；被當作女巫的女人
sentences: The rumor called her a witchwife. 傳聞把她說成是一位女巫。
The witchwife in the legend lived by the marsh. 傳說中的女巫住在沼澤旁。
The witchwoman kept to the edge of the village. 那位女巫一直住在村子的邊緣。
People came to the witchwoman for charms and advice. 人們會找那位女巫求護符和建議。

meaning: 巫木；被視為有魔力的木頭
sentences: The box was carved from witchwood. 那個盒子是用巫木雕成的。
They said witchwood could protect the house. 他們說巫木能保護房子。
The tale described careful witchwork under the moon. 那個故事描寫月光下細緻的施法工作。
No one in the room believed the witchwork was real. 房裡沒有人相信那真的是巫術。
The moonlight gave the garden a witchy look. 月光讓花園看起來很有女巫氣息。
He laughed off the witchy warning from his friend. 他把朋友那句怪裡怪氣的警告一笑置之。

meaning: 機智；巧思；聰明的言語技巧
sentences: Her witcraft helped her win every debate. 她的機智讓她在每場辯論中都占上風。
The speech showed more witcraft than anger. 那場演講展現的巧思多於怒氣。
He accepted the wite for the mistake. 他承認自己該為這個錯誤負責。
Old laws used wite to mean blame or penalty. 古代法律裡這個字指的是責備或罰金。
The witeless remark made everyone groan. 那句笨拙的話讓所有人都呻吟了一聲。
He regretted his witeless answer at once. 他立刻後悔自己那句缺乏機智的回答。

meaning: 賢人會；盎格魯薩克遜時代的議事會
sentences: The history lesson covered the role of the witenagemot. 歷史課講到賢人會的角色。
A witenagemot met to advise the king. 賢人會聚集起來向國王進諫。

meaning: 罰一便士的錢；小額罰金
sentences: The old contract mentioned a witepenny for late payment. 那份舊合約提到遲付要罰一便士。
He treated the witepenny as a symbol of old law. 他把這種小額罰金看成古法律的象徵。
The witess signed the statement after the hearing. 聽證會後，證人簽了那份聲明。
A witess was needed to confirm the deal. 需要一位見證人來確認這筆交易。
Her witful reply made the room laugh. 她機智的回應讓全場都笑了。
The witful child solved the riddle quickly. 那個聰明的孩子很快就解開了謎語。
I'm going to the cinema with my best friend tonight. 我今晚要和我最好的朋友去電影院。
Please handle that fragile glass vase with great care. 請非常小心地處理那個易碎的玻璃花瓶。
He was tired, but withal he kept working. 他雖然累了，但還是繼續工作。
She was calm and withal very firm. 她很冷靜，同時也非常堅定。
The museum labeled the sample as withamite. 博物館把那塊標本標記為威瑟姆石。
A miner found withamite in the old specimen tray. 一位礦工在舊標本盤裡找到威瑟姆石。
The botanist placed the herb in Withania. 植物學家把那株草本植物歸入醉茄屬。
Withania includes plants used in traditional medicine. 醉茄屬包含一些傳統醫療會用到的植物。
The withdraught of the tide left the rocks exposed. 潮水退去後，岩石全都露了出來。
He watched the slow withdraught of the smoke. 他看著煙霧慢慢散去。
I need to go to the bank to withdraw some cash for my trip. 我需要去銀行領（提取）一些現金去旅行。
The candidate decided to withdraw from the election for personal reasons. 候選人因個人原因決定退出選舉。
The deposit is withdrawable after seven days. 這筆存款七天後即可提領。
His offer was not withdrawable once accepted. 他的提議一旦被接受就不能撤回。
The bank charges a small fee for every cash withdrawal. 銀行對每次提款收取少量費用。
The sudden withdrawal of support for the project was a major setback. 對該專案支持的突然撤回是一個重大的挫折。
The withdrawer left the room without speaking. 那位撤回者一言不發地離開了房間。
Each withdrawer had to show identification. 每位提款人都必須出示身分證明。
The withdrawing army crossed the river at dawn. 撤退中的軍隊在黎明時渡河。
She gave him a withdrawing glance. 她投給他一個帶著退縮意味的眼神。
His withdrawingness made him hard to know. 他那種退縮傾向讓人很難了解他。
The novel captures the withdrawingness of grief. 這本小說捕捉了悲傷帶來的孤退感。
The withdrawment of the claim was announced publicly. 那項主張的撤回被公開宣布了。
She described the withdrawment as a relief. 她說這次退出是一種解脫。
She has become very withdrawn and quiet since the accident. 自事故發生後，她變得非常沉默寡言。
The product was withdrawn from the market due to safety concerns. 該產品因安全疑慮而被撤出（撤回）市場。
His withdrawnness made the party feel quiet. 他的退縮讓派對氣氛顯得安靜。
The teacher noticed the child's withdrawnness at once. 老師立刻注意到那孩子的內向狀態。

meaning: 柔韌的枝條；繩索般的細枝
sentences: He tied the bundle with a fresh withe. 他用一根新鮮的柔韌枝條綁起那一捆東西。
The basket was held together by a withe. 那個籃子是靠一根細枝綁住的。
The heat began to withen the leaves. 高溫開始讓葉子枯萎。
The flowers withen quickly without water. 沒有水的話，花很快就會枯萎。
The beautiful flowers began to wither and die after a few days without water. 美麗的花朵在缺水幾天後開始凋謝並枯萎。
Public interest in the project started to wither after several delays. 在幾次延誤後，公眾對該專案的興趣開始減退（衰退）。

meaning: 馬肩帶；跨過馬肩部的帶子
sentences: The saddle was fixed with a witherband. 那副鞍具靠馬肩帶固定住。
The old harness had a cracked witherband. 那副舊馬具的馬肩帶已經裂開。
The withered flowers were swept into a bin. 枯萎的花被掃進了垃圾桶。
His withered hands trembled slightly. 他那雙枯瘦的手微微發抖。
She smiled witheredly after the long illness. 經過長病後，她憔悴地笑了笑。
The leaves hung witheredly from the branch. 葉子枯萎地掛在樹枝上。
The witheredness of the garden showed the drought. 花園的枯萎狀態顯示出乾旱的嚴重。
He spoke of the witheredness in the old photographs. 他談到那些老照片裡的憔悴感。
The frost was the witherer of the tender shoots. 霜凍是那些嫩芽的枯萎元兇。
In the poem, time acts as a witherer. 在那首詩裡，時間扮演著使萬物枯萎的角色。

meaning: 枯萎般的陰鬱；憂傷氣氛
sentences: A withergloom settled over the empty house. 一種枯萎般的陰鬱籠罩了空屋。
The withergloom of the garden matched the cloudy sky. 花園那股憂傷氣氛正好和陰天相襯。

meaning: 傾向於破壞、破壞、壓倒或造成完全破壞。
sentences: The D-Day troops came under withering fire. 諾曼地登陸部隊遭到了猛烈的砲火攻擊。
The report describes the result as withering. 報告將結果描述為“枯萎”。

meaning: 嚴厲地；諷刺地；使人沮喪地
sentences: She looked at him witheringly after the rude joke. 那句無禮的玩笑後，她以冷峻的神情看著他。
He spoke witheringly about the failed plan. 他對那個失敗的計畫說得毫不留情。
The specimen was later identified as witherite. 那塊標本後來被確認是白鉛礦。
A collector kept a pale shard of witherite in a case. 一位收藏家把一小塊白鉛礦放在盒子裡。
The plant drooped witherly in the heat. 那株植物在高溫下枯萎地垂了下來。
He smiled witherly after hearing the bad news. 聽到壞消息後，他虛弱地笑了一下。

meaning: 以扣押財物作為損害賠償的古法
sentences: The old law book described withernam as a remedy. 那本舊法典把以扣押財物作為補償的做法當成一種救濟手段。
Withernam was used when the first seizure brought no result. 當第一次扣押沒有結果時，就會採用這種古法。
The saddle rested just behind the horse's withers. 鞍子正好落在馬的肩脊後方。
A tall rider checked the horse's withers before mounting. 騎手上馬前先看了馬的肩脊。
They walked withershins around the old stone. 他們逆時針繞著那塊老石頭走。
The child turned withershins instead of following the line. 那個孩子沒有順著隊伍走，而是反方向轉了一圈。
She snipped off the withertip of the leaf. 她剪掉了葉片乾枯的尖端。
A withertip can fall away when a plant is stressed. 植物受壓時，枯萎的末端會掉落。
The flowers bent witherwards after the frost. 霜凍過後，花朵朝著枯萎的方向彎去。
His hope seemed to move witherwards after each failure. 每次失敗後，他的希望都像在走向凋萎。

meaning: 使枯萎的重量；沉重負擔
sentences: The wet snow became a witherweight on the branches. 濕雪成了樹枝上使其下垂的沉重負擔。
Worry acted like a witherweight on her spirit. 憂慮像重壓一樣讓她的心情枯萎。
The withery leaves crumbled in his hand. 那些枯萎的葉子在他手裡碎開了。
The garden looked withery after a dry week. 乾旱一週後，花園看起來很萎縮。

meaning: 可彎作編繩的木材；柳條木
sentences: The basket maker preferred withewood for weaving. 那位編籃師偏好用可彎的柳條木來編織。
A bundle of withewood lay beside the workbench. 工作台旁放著一捆柳條木。

meaning: 已被保留或阻止他人擁有或了解。
sentences: His withheld hand stared down at my weakly outstretched one. 他伸出的手低頭盯著我無力伸出的手。
The names originally withheld from the report, have been leaked. 最初在報告中隱瞞的名字已被洩露。
The government decided to withhold the information until further notice. 政府決定對資訊進行隱瞞，直到進一步通知。
Employers are required by law to withhold taxes from their workers' salaries. 法律要求雇主從工人的薪水中扣繳（扣留）稅款。

meaning: 可被扣留的；可被保留不發的
sentences: The grant was partly withholdable under the rules. 依規定，這筆補助有一部分可以被扣留。
Not every bonus is withholdable by the employer. 不是每一筆獎金都能被雇主保留不發。
The contract allowed a withholdal of payment. 合約允許暫時扣留款項。
She objected to the withholdal of the report. 她反對把那份報告扣著不發。
The withholder refused to release the files. 那位扣留者拒絕交出檔案。
A withholder may be asked to explain the delay. 扣留文件的人可能會被要求說明延誤原因。
The withholdment of tax caused confusion. 稅款的扣留引發了混亂。
She complained about the withholdment of his wages. 她抱怨他的薪資被扣著不發。
The results of the experiment will be available within a week. 實驗結果將在週內公佈。
The hotel is located within walking distance of the city center. 飯店位於市中心步行可達的範圍內。
The children stayed withindoors during the storm. 暴風雨期間，孩子們都待在室內。
He hurried withindoors when the rain began. 雨一下起來，他就趕忙往屋內跑。
The key was hidden withinside the box. 鑰匙藏在盒子裡面。
Something moved withinside the sack. 袋子裡面有東西在動。
The mechanic checked the withinsides of the engine. 修車師檢查了引擎的內部。
Dust had gathered on the withinsides of the drawer. 灰塵堆積在抽屜的裡層。
The withinward curve made the path feel enclosed. 那條向內彎的曲線讓小路看起來很封閉。
Her withinward thoughts were hard to read. 她那種偏向內收的想法很難看透。
The door opened withinwards instead of outward. 這扇門是向內打開，不是向外。
He folded the flap withinwards to seal the bag. 他把袋口往內折，將袋子封好。
The poem celebrated a sense of withness. 那首詩歌頌了一種同在的感覺。
Their withness gave the room a warm feeling. 他們彼此相伴的氛圍讓房間很溫暖。
The old wood had witholden over time. 那塊舊木頭隨著時間慢慢老化了。
Her voice seemed to witholden after years of use. 多年使用後，她的嗓音似乎變得更蒼老。
It's difficult to finish the project without your help. 沒有你的幫助，很難完成這個專案。
He left the house without his umbrella and got wet in the rain. 他沒帶傘就出門，結果被雨淋濕了。
The dog waited withoutdoors all afternoon. 那隻狗整個下午都在門外等著。
They ate withoutdoors under the tree. 他們在樹下戶外用餐。
The old text used withouten to mean without. 舊文句用古語表示沒有的意思。
He left withouten any explanation. 他沒有任何解釋就離開了。
The gate opened withoutforth toward the road. 大門向外朝著道路打開。
A lantern glowed withoutforth in the dark yard. 黑暗的院子外面亮著一盞燈。
The withoutside of the wall was damp. 牆的外側很潮濕。
Paint covered the withoutside of the box. 漆料覆蓋了盒子的外面。
The branches bent withoutwards in the wind. 樹枝在風中朝外彎去。
The crowd moved withoutwards after the concert. 演唱會結束後，人群朝外散去。
Everyone came withsave the oldest child. 除了最年長的孩子，大家都來了。
The field was empty withsave for one horse. 這片田地空無一物，只剩一匹馬。

meaning: 成功地抵抗或忍受（某事）。
sentences: To withstand means to resist or endure (something) successfully. 承受意味著成功地抵抗或忍受（某事）。
People may withstand in different situations depending on the context. 根據具體情況，人們可能會在不同的情況下承受。
The withstander spoke up for the plan. 那位支持者替這個計畫發聲。
Every withstander added courage to the group. 每一位站在旁邊支持的人都替團隊增添了勇氣。
Her withstandingness helped her survive the crisis. 她的承受力幫助她度過危機。
The material's withstandingness surprised the engineers. 這種材料的耐受力讓工程師感到驚訝。
The beam acted as a withstay for the roof. 那根橫梁成了屋頂的支撐物。
They added a withstay to keep the frame steady. 他們加了一個支撐件來保持框架穩定。
The bridge withstood the strong storm. 那座橋撐過了強烈風暴。
She withstood the pressure without giving in. 她頂住壓力，沒有屈服。
He had to withstrain the rope to tie it off. 他得把繩子用力拉緊才能綁好。
The worker withstrained the net around the load. 工人把網子強行拉緊，罩住貨物。
The fence was covered with vine and withvine. 籬笆上爬滿藤蔓與藤條。
A withvine wrapped around the post. 一條藤蔓狀的東西纏住了柱子。
The thread began to withwind around the spool. 線開始纏繞著線軸轉動。
She watched the ribbon withwind in the breeze. 她看著緞帶在風中旋轉纏繞。
The withy stems bent without breaking. 那些柔韌的莖彎了卻沒有斷。
He picked a withy branch for the basket. 他挑了一根柔韌的樹枝來編籃子。
She stored apples in a withypot. 她把蘋果放進柳條盆裡。
The market stall displayed herbs in a withypot. 市集攤位把香草裝在藤編容器裡展示。
A withywind climbed up the old fence. 一條纏繞的藤蔓爬上了舊籬笆。
The path was blocked by a thick withywind. 小徑被一大團旋繞的藤蔓擋住了。

meaning: 維特賈；一種地方名稱或罕見名詞
sentences: The map marked a place called witjar. 地圖上標著一個叫維特賈的地方。
The old notes mentioned witjar as a rare name. 舊筆記把維特賈當作罕見名稱提到。
It was a witless mistake to leave the door open. 把門敞開是個愚蠢的錯誤。
The witless plan failed almost immediately. 那個缺乏智慧的計畫幾乎立刻就失敗了。
He witlessly repeated the same error. 他毫無判斷地重複同一個錯誤。
The crowd witlessly followed the rumor. 人群愚蠢地跟著謠言跑。
His witlessness caused a costly delay. 他的愚昧造成了昂貴的延誤。
She laughed at the witlessness of the answer. 她對那個答案的無知感到好笑。
The child tossed out a witlet during class. 那個孩子在課堂上冒出一句小聰明的話。
His witlet made the room laugh. 他那句機靈話讓全場都笑了。

meaning: 自以為有才的人；小聰明者
sentences: The witling kept interrupting the speaker. 那個自以為聰明的人不停打斷演講者。
Everyone ignored the witling's bragging. 大家都沒理會那個小聰明者的吹噓。
She added witloof to the salad. 她把菊苣芽加進沙拉裡。
The farmer harvested witloof in winter. 農夫在冬天收成比利時菊苣。

meaning: 賣弄機智的人；愛耍嘴皮的人
sentences: The witmonger turned every conversation into a joke. 那個愛耍嘴皮的人把每場談話都變成玩笑。
No one trusted the witmonger for serious advice. 沒有人會向那種賣弄機智的人尋求嚴肅建議。
The police are looking for witnesses who saw the accident happen. 警察正在尋找目擊事故發生過程的證人（目擊者）。
She was called to witness the signing of the important legal document. 她被召集來見證這份重要法律文件的簽署。
The event was witnessable from the hill. 那場事件從山坡上可以清楚目睹。
Only witnessable facts were admitted in court. 法庭只接受可作證的事實。
Her witnessdom gave the case new weight. 她的證詞讓案件多了新的分量。
The judge listened carefully to the witnessdom. 法官仔細聽取了見證人的陳述。
The witnesser signed the statement at once. 那位見證者立刻在陳述書上簽了名。
Every witnesser was asked to stay nearby. 每位證人都被要求留在附近。

meaning: 惠特尼；英國地名或布料名
sentences: The label said the cloth was made in Witney. 標籤上寫著這塊布是在惠特尼製造的。
They drove to Witney for the weekend. 他們開車去惠特尼過週末。

meaning: 惠特尼居民；與惠特尼有關的人
sentences: A witneyer told us about the old market. 一位惠特尼居民向我們講起老市場的故事。
The witneyer had lived in the town all his life. 那位惠特尼人一輩子都住在那座城鎮。
The documentary featured a Witoto family. 那部紀錄片介紹了一戶維托托族家庭。
A Witoto elder shared a story from the river region. 一位維托托族長者分享了河區的故事。
His witship made the conversation easy. 他的機智讓談話變得輕鬆。
The book praised the witship of the editor. 那本書稱讚了編輯的風趣。
She gave a wittal answer in class. 她在課堂上給出了一個機靈的回答。
His wittal reply won quick applause. 他那句機智的回應立刻贏得掌聲。
The wittawer kept the table laughing. 那個愛說俏皮話的人逗得整桌都在笑。
Everyone knew him as the local wittawer. 大家都知道他是當地那位愛開玩笑的人。
The guide pointed to a lone witteboom. 嚮導指向一棵孤立的白樹。
A witteboom stood beside the road. 路邊站著一棵白樹。

meaning: 有某種頭腦的；有機智的
sentences: The old man was still sharp witted. 那位老人依然頭腦敏銳。
Her witted response settled the matter. 她機智的回應把事情定了下來。
The guests began to witter after midnight. 客人們在半夜後開始喋喋不休。
Birds witter in the hedges at dawn. 破曉時，鳥兒在樹籬間尖聲鳴叫。

meaning: 喋喋不休的；尖聲鳴叫的
sentences: A wittering voice came from the hall. 走廊裡傳來喋喋不休的聲音。
The wittering birds woke us early. 那些尖聲鳴叫的鳥很早就把我們吵醒。
He acted like a witticaster at dinner. 他晚餐時像個愛賣弄妙語的人。
The witticaster tried too hard to impress. 那個愛耍嘴皮子的人太想表現了。
The cabinet held a sample of wittichenite. 櫃子裡放著一塊維蒂欽石樣本。
Mineral collectors studied the wittichenite under light. 礦物收藏家在燈光下研究那塊維蒂欽石。
His witticism made the room burst out laughing. 他的妙語讓整個房間笑了出來。
She ended the speech with a clever witticism. 她用一句巧妙的俏皮話為演講收尾。

meaning: 用俏皮話說；故作機智地說
sentences: He tried to witticize instead of answering. 他試著賣弄俏皮話，而不是直接回答。
Do not witticize when the topic is serious. 當話題嚴肅時，不要故作機智。

meaning: 變得風趣的；經過美化的
sentences: The note sounded oddly wittified. 那張便條聽起來莫名地風趣。
His wittified story hid the plain truth. 他那個經過修飾的故事掩蓋了平實的真相。
She spoke wittily about the traffic. 她機智地談論交通狀況。
The host wittily handled every awkward pause. 主持人風趣地化解了每一次尷尬的停頓。
Her wittiness kept the class awake. 她的機智讓全班都精神了起來。
The article had charm but little wittiness. 那篇文章有魅力，但機智感不多。
He was a witting witness to the change. 他是這場變化的知情見證人。
The witting choice surprised no one. 這個知情下做出的選擇沒有讓人意外。
She wittingly ignored the warning. 她故意忽略了那個警告。
No one wittingly broke the rule. 沒有人是知情後還故意違規。
The old play mocked the wittol at length. 那部老戲長篇嘲諷了那個容忍妻子不忠的丈夫。
He was called a wittol by the gossip. 那些閒言閒語把他稱作縱容者。

meaning: 像容忍背叛般地；寬容地
sentences: He accepted the insult wittolly and left. 他以寬容的態度接受羞辱後就離開了。
The remark was received wittolly by the crowd. 這句話被群眾以寬容的態度接受。
She is known for her witty remarks and ability to make people laugh. 她以機智（風趣）的言談和逗人發笑的能力而聞名。
The book features a series of witty dialogues between the characters. 這本書的特點是人物之間有一系列風趣（機智）的對話。
A Witumki elder spoke at the meeting. 一位維圖姆基長者在會議上發言。
The museum described the life of the Witumki. 博物館介紹了維圖姆基族人的生活。
A witwall sang in the orchard at dawn. 破曉時，一隻黃鶯在果園裡歌唱。
The child watched the witwall hop between branches. 那個孩子看著黃鶯在樹枝間跳來跳去。
She wrapped herself in a witzchoura. 她把自己裹進一件毛皮披風裡。
The costume included a dark witzchoura. 那套服裝裡有一件深色厚斗篷。
He hoped to wive before the winter. 他希望在冬天前結婚。
The prince chose to wive for love. 那位王子選擇為愛情而娶妻。
The old record listed him as a wiver. 舊紀錄把他列為結婚者。
A wiver in the story was promised a new home. 故事裡的一位配偶被答應得到新家。
The banner showed a black wivern. 旗幟上畫著一條黑色飛龍。
Children drew the wivern with great wings. 孩子們把那條飛龍畫得有一對大翅膀。
Wiyat signed the guest book first. 維亞特第一個在來賓簿上簽名。
The letter was addressed to Wiyat. 那封信是寫給維亞特的。
The exhibit covered Wiyot history and language. 那個展覽介紹了維奧特族的歷史與語言。
A Wiyot speaker taught the class a greeting. 一位維奧特語使用者教全班一句問候。
She is a wiz at solving puzzles. 她是解謎的奇才。
The wiz fixed the machine in minutes. 那位能手幾分鐘內就把機器修好了。
The wizard lifted the lantern with a chant. 那位法師念著咒語舉起了燈籠。
In the tale, a wizard guarded the bridge. 故事裡有一位男巫守著橋。
The wizardess spoke in a calm voice. 那位女法師用平靜的聲音說話。
Villagers visited the wizardess for advice. 村民們去找那位女巫師求建議。
The painting had a touch of wizardism. 那幅畫帶著一點巫術氣息。
He laughed off the rumor of wizardism. 他對那則關於巫術的流言一笑置之。
His wizardlike robe drew attention. 他那件像巫師的長袍很引人注目。
A wizardlike calm filled the room. 房間裡瀰漫著一種神秘的沉靜。

meaning: 有巫師風格的；深諳法術的
sentences: Her wizardly smile felt mysterious. 她那種像巫師般的微笑很神祕。
The teacher gave a wizardly demonstration. 老師做了一場很有法師風格的示範。
The meal was pure wizardry in the kitchen. 那頓飯簡直是廚房裡的高超技藝。
They admired the wizardry of the performer. 他們欽佩那位表演者的巫術般技巧。
The tale focused on his rise to wizardship. 那個故事聚焦於他成為法師的過程。
Wizardship gave him both respect and fear. 巫師身分讓他同時得到敬重與畏懼。
The cold wind began to wizen his face. 冷風開始讓他的臉變得乾瘦。
Time can wizen even a strong tree. 時間也能讓一棵健壯的樹萎縮。
A wizened hand reached for the cup. 一隻乾瘦的手伸向杯子。
The wizened figure sat by the fire. 那個枯槁的身影坐在火旁。
The portrait captured his wizenedness. 那幅肖像捕捉到他的乾瘦狀態。
Age had given her face a gentle wizenedness. 年歲讓她的臉帶上柔和的枯槁感。
He looked wizier after the long journey. 長途旅行後，他看起來更乾瘦了。
The wizier branches bent in the wind. 更枯槁的樹枝在風中彎了下來。
The heat will wizzen the fruit if left outside. 如果放在外面，熱氣會讓水果乾癟。
Years of sun can wizzen the leather. 多年日曬會讓皮革皺縮。
The hotel is famous for its excellent wleulinary offerings. 這家飯店以其卓越的烹飪料理而聞名。
He decided to pursue a wleulinary career and attend cooking school. 他決定從事烹飪事業並就讀烹飪學校。
The museum displayed a wloka from the old days. 博物館展出了一件古時的沉重外衣。
He wore a wloka in the winter scene. 他在冬天場景裡穿著那件舊式厚外衣。
The elderly leader is respected for her great wmdolm. 那位年長的領導者因其卓越的智慧而受到尊重。
He shared words of wmdolm with the young students. 他與年輕學生分享了智慧之言。
Wo, listen to this part carefully. 哎，請仔細聽這一段。
The rider shouted wo to the horse. 騎手對著馬喊了一聲哎。
The cloth was dyed with woad. 那塊布是用菘藍染的。
Artists once valued woad for its blue color. 藝術家過去很重視菘藍的藍色。
The woader cared for the dye plants. 那位栽種菘藍的人照料那些染料植物。
A woader once lived near the river. 從前河邊住著一位染藍工。
The woadman prepared the vats at dawn. 那位從事菘藍染色的人在清晨準備染槽。
A woadman could tell the best leaves by sight. 從事菘藍染色的人一眼就能認出最好的葉子。
The field was bright with woadwaxen. 原野上開滿了金雀花。
A bee settled on the woadwaxen bloom. 一隻蜜蜂停在金雀花的花朵上。
The river had a woady tint in the evening. 傍晚時分，那條河帶著藍藍的色調。
Her scarf looked woady in the cold light. 她的圍巾在冷光中看起來像菘藍色。
A woak grew at the edge of the farm. 農場邊長著一棵橡樹。
The table was made from old woak. 這張桌子是用老橡木做的。
They crossed the woald before sunset. 他們在日落前穿過那片荒原。
The shepherd watched the woald from above. 牧羊人從高處望著那片高地。
He looked woan after the fever. 他退燒後看起來很蒼白。
The woan child needed rest and soup. 那個瘦弱的孩子需要休息和熱湯。
There was a small wob in the chair. 那把椅子有一點搖晃。
The wob in the wheel worried the mechanic. 輪子的輕微擺動讓修理工很擔心。
The wobbegong rested on the sea floor. 這種地毯鯊靜靜躺在海底。
A diver watched the wobbegong from a safe distance. 一名潛水員從安全距離觀察那條地毯鯊。

meaning: 不均勻或搖擺地移動，或不穩定地來回移動。
sentences: the Earth wobbles slowly on its axis 地球繞其軸緩慢擺動
the jelly wobbled on the plate 果凍在盤子上搖晃

meaning: 搖晃的東西；不穩的人或物
sentences: The old chair was a wobbler on the uneven floor. 那張舊椅子放在不平的地板上很搖晃。
He called the broken table a wobbler and fixed it. 他把那張壞掉的桌子叫作搖晃物，然後把它修好。
The wobbliness of the bridge worried the crew. 那座橋的晃動不穩讓工人很擔心。
Her voice had a wobbliness after the long trip. 她長途旅行後說話有些發顫。
The lamp kept wobbling on the table. 那盞燈一直在桌上晃動。
He noticed the cart wobbling over the stones. 他注意到那輛車子在石頭上搖晃。
The puppy walked wobblingly across the room. 那隻小狗搖搖晃晃地走過房間。
She climbed the ladder wobblingly and slowly. 她搖晃著身子、慢慢地爬上梯子。
wobbly bridge 搖搖晃晃的橋
wobbly chair 搖搖晃晃的椅子
The old fishing tale mentioned a giant wobster. 那個古老的漁夫故事提到一隻巨大的龍蝦。
He bought a wobster at the market for dinner. 他在市場買了一隻龍蝦當晚餐。
The geologist labeled the sample wocheinite. 地質學家把那塊樣本標記為沃赫因石。
A cabinet of minerals displayed a tiny wocheinite crystal. 一座礦物櫃裡展示了一小顆沃赫因石晶體。
The article described a Wochua village near the river. 那篇文章描述了河邊的一個沃楚亞族村落。
A Wochua elder spoke about the old hunting trails. 一位沃楚亞族長者談起了古老的狩獵小徑。
The cabin is built entirely from local wod. 這座小屋完全是用當地的木材建造的。
He gathered some dry wod to start a fire. 他收集了一些乾木頭來生火。
He carved a small woddie from a fallen branch. 他從倒下的樹枝刻出一根小木棍。
The child used the woddie to stir the paint. 那個孩子用那根木棍攪拌顏料。
He grew wode when the news arrived. 那個消息傳來時，他變得狂怒。
The old poem described a wode king in battle. 那首舊詩描寫了一位在戰場上發狂的國王。

meaning: 沃登崇拜；對沃登神的信仰
sentences: The lecture discussed Wodenism in early Europe. 那場演講談到早期歐洲的沃登崇拜。
A scholar compared Wodenism with other old beliefs. 一位學者把沃登崇拜和其他古老信仰做比較。
He pulled a wodge of papers from his bag. 他從包裡拿出一大疊紙。
The baker cut a wodge of butter for the tray. 麵包師切下一大塊奶油放到烤盤上。
The wodgy box was hard to lift. 那個笨重的箱子很難搬。
He wore a wodgy coat that slowed him down. 他穿著一件厚重的外套，走路都慢了下來。
The story follows the many woes and challenges facing the main character. 故事講述了主角面臨的許多苦難與挑戰。
Financial woes continue to plague the small business after the crisis. 金融危機之後，財政困難持續困擾著這家小企業。

meaning: 指甲剪 (修正為 toe clipper / nail clipper)
sentences: She used a woe clipper to trim her fingernails. 她用指甲剪修剪指甲。
Please put the woe clipper back in the bathroom cabinet. 請把指甲剪放回浴室櫃子裡。

meaning: 磁碟 (修正為 floppy disk / disk)
sentences: In the past, people used a woe disk to store computer files. 在過去，人們使用磁碟來儲存電腦檔案。
He found an old woe disk filled with childhood photographs. 他找到了一張裝滿童年照片的舊磁碟。

meaning: 失敗，不足 (修正為 woe / fail)
sentences: The project ended in woe fail due to lack of funding. 由於缺乏資金，該專案以失敗告終。
Every woe fail is an opportunity to learn and grow. 每一次失敗都是學習和成長的機會。
They moved into a new woe flat in the city center last month. 他們上個月搬進了市中心的一間新公寓。
The terrain is woe flat and perfect for long-distance cycling. 地形平坦，非常適合長途騎自行車。
The dog looked woebegone after the long rain. 那隻狗在長時間下雨後看起來愁容滿面。
Her woebegone face told him that something was wrong. 她那副憂愁的臉色讓他知道出了問題。
The woebegoneness in his eyes was hard to miss. 他眼中的憂愁很難不被注意到。
The photo captured the woebegoneness of the old soldier. 那張照片捕捉到那位老兵的愁容。

meaning: 略帶愁容的；有點憂鬱的
sentences: She gave him a woebegonish smile. 她對他露出一絲略帶愁意的微笑。
The woebegonish child sat quietly by the window. 那個有點憂鬱的孩子安靜坐在窗邊。
The team made a woeful mistake in the final minute. 球隊在最後一分鐘犯了一個悲慘的錯誤。
Her woeful story moved everyone in the room. 她那個令人難過的故事感動了房間裡每個人。
The plan was woefully incomplete. 那個計畫糟得非常不完整。
He woefully underestimated the time needed. 他非常錯誤地低估了所需的時間。
The woefulness of the situation was obvious. 這個處境的悲慘一目了然。
She spoke about the woefulness of losing her home. 她談到失去家園的苦楚。
The mineral tray included a pale piece of woehlerite. 那盤礦物裡有一塊淡色的沃勒石。
A student studied the woehlerite under the lamp. 一名學生在燈下研究那塊沃勒石。
The woesome ending left the audience silent. 那個令人哀傷的結局讓觀眾沉默。
He told a woesome tale about the loss of his ship. 他講了一個關於失去船隻的悲傷故事。
The old herb book mentioned a woevine climbing the wall. 那本古老草本書提到有一種哀愁藤爬在牆上。
She drew the woevine beside the other rare plants. 她把哀愁藤畫在其他稀有植物旁邊。

meaning: 悲傷憔悴的；被憂愁折磨的
sentences: His woeworn face showed months of worry. 他那張被憂愁折磨的臉顯示出數月的煩惱。
She looked woeworn after the long night at the hospital. 她在醫院熬了一整夜後，看起來憔悴極了。
The woffler could not choose a side. 那個猶豫不決的人無法做出選擇。
No one trusted the woffler who kept changing the story. 沒有人信任那個一直改口的人。
The smell wofted through the open window. 那股氣味從開著的窗戶飄進來。
A warm breeze wofted across the field. 一陣溫暖的微風吹過田野。

meaning: 冒犯性的俚語，指外國人
sentences: The old term wog is offensive and should be avoided. 這個舊詞帶有冒犯性，應該避免使用。
The book noted that wog was once used in hurtful ways. 書中提到，這個詞過去曾被以傷人的方式使用。
The glossary listed wogiet as a variant form. 詞彙表把這個詞列為一種變體。
He found wogiet in an old note about slang. 他在一則關於俚語的舊筆記裡找到這個詞。

meaning: 沃古爾人的；沃古爾語的
sentences: The article described a Wogulian tradition. 那篇文章描述了一項沃古爾人的傳統。
She studied a Wogulian word list in the archive. 她在檔案館研究一份沃古爾語詞表。
The glossary treated woibe as a rare dialect word. 詞彙表把這個詞當作罕見方言詞。
He copied woibe from an old regional notebook. 他從一本舊的地方筆記抄下這個詞。
He used a large iron wok to cook the vegetable stir-fry. 他用一個大鐵炒鍋來炒青菜。
Cooking with a wok requires high heat and constant stirring. 用炒鍋烹飪需要高火並不斷攪拌。

meaning: 可食用的根莖植物；食物植物
sentences: The campers dug wokas from the wet ground. 露營者從潮濕的土地裡挖出可食用的根莖植物。
The tribe valued wokas as a useful food source. 這個族群把這種植物視為有用的食物來源。

meaning: 醒來（wake 的過去式），覺醒的
sentences: I woke up early this morning to watch the sunrise. 我今天早上很早就醒來觀看日出。
The movement aims to promote woke social and political awareness. 這項運動旨在提升大眾對社會和政治的覺醒意識。
The map marked a small Wokowi settlement. 地圖上標出了一個小型沃科維族聚落。
A Wokowi speaker shared a song at the festival. 一位沃科維語使用者在節慶上分享了一首歌。
They crossed the wold at sunrise. 他們在日出時穿過那片荒原。
The sheep grazed on the open wold. 綿羊在開闊的高地草原上吃草。
The hills had a woldlike shape. 那些山丘有種像荒原般的起伏感。
They admired the woldlike fields beyond the town. 他們欣賞城鎮外那片開闊起伏的田野。
The woldsman knew every path in the hills. 那位住在荒原地區的人熟悉山裡每一條路。
An old woldsman guided the travelers through fog. 一位老住民帶著旅人穿過濃霧。
The woldy land stretched to the horizon. 那片荒原似的土地一路延伸到地平線。
A woldy breeze moved across the grass. 一陣荒原般的風掠過草地。
The lone wolf was howling at the full moon in the dark night. 孤狼正深夜對著滿月嚎叫。
Wolves are social animals that live and hunt in large packs. 狼是群居動物，成群結隊地生活與獵食。
Wolf signed the letter at the bottom. 沃爾夫在信件底部簽了名。
The teacher called on Wolf to read aloud. 老師請沃爾夫朗讀。
The cabinet held a tiny wolfachite crystal. 展櫃裡放著一小塊沃爾法石晶體。
A label beside the stone read wolfachite. 石頭旁的標籤寫著沃爾法石。
She added dried wolfberry to the soup. 她把枸杞加進湯裡。
The market sold fresh wolfberry in small bags. 市場裡用小袋販售新鮮枸杞。
In wolfdom, every animal watches the pack. 在狼的世界裡，每隻動物都會注意狼群。
The story imagined a hidden wolfdom in the forest. 那個故事想像森林裡有一個隱秘的狼群國度。
He gave the crowd a wolfen stare. 他用兇狠的眼神看著群眾。
The wolfen dog guarded the yard at night. 那隻像狼的狗在夜裡守著院子。
The wolfer tracked the animal through the snow. 那位獵狼者在雪地裡追蹤那隻動物。
An old tale praised the wolfer for his courage. 一則古老傳說稱讚那位獵狼者的勇氣。

meaning: 無根萍屬；一種浮水植物
sentences: The pond was covered with tiny Wolffia plants. 池塘表面布滿了細小的無根萍屬植物。
A biologist studied Wolffia under the microscope. 一位生物學家在顯微鏡下研究無根萍屬植物。

meaning: 沃爾夫式的；與沃爾夫有關的
sentences: The essay used a Wolffian style of argument. 那篇文章採用了沃爾夫式的論證風格。
A Wolffian idea shaped the discussion in class. 一個與沃爾夫相關的觀點影響了課堂討論。

meaning: 沃爾夫主義；沃爾夫的哲學
sentences: The professor explained Wolffianism in simple terms. 教授用簡單的方式解釋沃爾夫主義。
Students compared Wolffianism with other schools of thought. 學生把沃爾夫主義和其他思想流派做比較。
Wolfgang arrived before the meeting started. 沃爾夫岡在會議開始前就到了。
She thanked Wolfgang for the careful translation. 她感謝沃爾夫岡細心的翻譯。
The novel explored the wolfhood of its hero. 那本小說探討了主角的狼性。
He spoke of wolfhood as a life lived by instinct. 他把狼性描述成一種靠本能生活的狀態。
The Irish wolfhound is known for its impressive size and gentle nature. 愛爾蘭獵狼犬以其驚人的體型和溫順的性格而聞名。
Wolfhounds were originally bred to hunt wolves in the mountains. 獵狼犬最初是為了在山中獵狼而繁殖的。

meaning: 沃爾夫式的；與沃爾夫有關的
sentences: The lecture followed a Wolfian line of reasoning. 那場演講沿用了沃爾夫式的推理方式。

He flashed a wolfish grin at the camera. 他對著鏡頭露出兇狠的笑容。
The wolfish dog watched the gate without moving. 那隻像狼的狗一動不動地盯著大門。
He wolfishly stared at the plate of meat. 他兇狠地盯著那盤肉。
The crowd wolfishly pushed toward the door. 人群像狼一樣兇狠地朝門口擠去。
The wolfishness in his eyes worried her. 他眼中的狼性讓她很擔心。
The story captured the wolfishness of the hunt. 那個故事抓住了狩獵中的兇狠氣息。
The legend said the boy was a wolfkin. 傳說說那個男孩是狼族後裔。
In the tale, a wolfkin guarded the forest path. 在故事裡，一位狼族後裔守著森林小徑。
The wolfless valley felt unusually calm. 那個沒有狼的山谷顯得格外安靜。

His wolflike stare made the room tense. 他那種像狼一樣的眼神讓房間氣氛緊張。
The wolflike animal moved silently through the grass. 那隻狼一般的動物悄悄穿過草叢。
The wolfling stayed close to its mother. 那隻幼狼緊跟著母狼。
A young wolfling peeked out from the den. 一隻小狼從巢穴裡探出頭來。
Wolfram is another name for tungsten. 沃爾弗拉姆也是鎢的舊稱。
The miner found a trace of wolfram in the rock. 礦工在岩石裡發現了一點鎢。
The chemist studied a wolframate sample. 化學家研究了一份鎢酸鹽樣本。
A wolframate can be used in mineral analysis. 鎢酸鹽可用於礦物分析。
The wolframic ore looked dark and heavy. 那種含鎢礦石看起來又黑又重。
Researchers noted a wolframic layer in the sample. 研究人員在樣本中注意到一層含鎢物質。
The report mentioned wolframine as a rare compound. 報告把鎢胺列為一種稀有化合物。
A student labeled the vial wolframine. 有位學生把那支小瓶標成鎢胺。

meaning: 鎢離子；含鎢的離子形式
sentences: The old note referred to wolframinium in the solution. 舊筆記提到溶液中的鎢離子。

The geologist identified the dark stone as wolframite. 地質學家把那塊深色石頭辨認為黑鎢礦。
Wolframite is an important ore of tungsten. 黑鎢礦是鎢的重要礦石。

meaning: 狼毒花；烏頭屬有毒植物
sentences: The garden kept wolfsbane away from children. 花園把狼毒花放在孩子碰不到的地方。
Wolfsbane can be dangerous if handled carelessly. 狼毒花若處理不慎會很危險。

meaning: 狼山礦；一種含銻硫化礦物
sentences: The specimen was labeled wolfsbergite in the tray. 那塊標本在托盤上標成狼山礦。
Wolfsbergite appears in some metal-bearing veins. 狼山礦出現在某些含金屬的礦脈中。
The hunter carried a wolfskin across his shoulder. 獵人把一張狼皮扛在肩上。
The costume used wolfskin for the cloak. 那套服裝用狼皮做斗篷。

meaning: 朝向狼群地；向著狼的方向
sentences: The lantern was held wolfward to check the fence. 燈籠朝向狼群那邊拿著，好檢查圍欄。
He turned wolfward when he heard the howl. 他聽見狼嚎時便朝狼那邊望去。

meaning: 朝向狼群地；往狼的方向
sentences: The dogs moved wolfwards at the sound. 狗一聽到聲音就朝狼群方向前去。

meaning: 矽灰石；一種鈣矽酸鹽礦物
sentences: The museum display included a piece of wollastonite. 博物館展櫃裡有一塊矽灰石。
Wollastonite is used in some industrial materials. 矽灰石可用於某些工業材料。
The old list included wollomai as a rare term. 舊清單把沃洛麥列為罕見詞。
